C: 欧洛尼斯的启示录 序言 亲爱的学徒啊，当你翻开这本书，便是踏上了解读命运天机的第一步。在这永夜笼罩的世界里，我们虽已无法亲眼仰望星空，但雅努萨波利斯流传的占星之术依旧是连接我们与泰坦意志的桥梁。 记住，真正的占星术并非简单地观测天体，而是洞悉世界运转的规律，感知泰坦们留下的印记。 *一行歪歪扭扭的字迹，从墨水颜色来看似是近些年新增的批注：* ！！！即便在永恒之城奥赫玛，在黎明机器光辉的照耀下，即使无法得见欧洛尼斯的永夜，我们仍能通过计算与推演，窥见命运的轨迹！！！ 第一章：十二天宫与泰坦 在开始学习占星术之前，你必须熟知十二天宫与对应的泰坦： 1、黎明宫 - 艾格勒 2、大地宫 - 吉奥里亚 3、潮汐宫 - 法吉娜 4、智慧宫 - 瑟希斯 5、全知宫 - 刻法勒 6、战争宫 - 尼卡多利 7、永夜宫 - 欧洛尼斯 8、公正宫 - 塔兰顿 9、门径宫 - 雅努斯 10、金蝶宫 - 墨涅塔 11、诡计宫 - 扎格列斯 12、死亡宫 - 塞纳托斯 每个天宫都代表着特定的泰坦权能，影响着世界的不同方面。在进行占卜时，我们需要计算各天宫的位置与强弱，以此推断泰坦意志的体现。 第二章：占星计算 我知道我们的读者大都来自永恒之城奥赫玛——如今被黎明机器的光辉所笼罩，无法直接观测星空。然而，这并不意味着占星术失去了意义。相反，黎明机器的运转规律为我们提供了新的计算基础。 要进行占星推算，首先需要观察黎明机器的光芒变化。记录一天中光芒最盛与最弱的时刻，这两个时间点昭示着艾格勒的权能变化。以此为基准，我们可以推算出其他天宫的位置。 例如，当黎明机器光芒最盛时，黎明宫位于正上方。 此时：大地宫位于东方，潮汐宫位于西方，永夜宫位于正下方，其他天宫则按照顺时针方向依次排列。 *不知道是谁在旁边写的批注：* 黎明机器的光芒变化…我怎么看不出来。以及，这还能叫占星吗？ 这本书的内容都不能当真，别被那些诡计多端的欧洛尼斯信徒给骗了！！！ 第三章：命盘绘制 在确定了天宫位置后，下一步是绘制命盘。命盘是一个圆形图表，分为十二等分，每一份代表一个天宫。 绘制步骤如下： 1、画一个大圆，代表整个世界。 2、将圆分为十二等分。 3、在每一份内标注对应的天宫名称和泰坦名讳。 4、根据黎明机器的光芒变化，确定各天宫的具体位置。 5、在圆心处画一个小圆，代表被占卜者。 记住，命盘并非静止不变的。随着时间流逝，各天宫的位置会不断变化。这就是为什么精确的时间记录如此重要。 第四章：泰坦影响力的解读 一旦完成命盘绘制，就可以开始解读泰坦带给我们的影响了。影响力主要取决于两个因素：天宫的位置和天宫之间的相位关系。 【位置影响】 -位于东方的天宫影响力最强，象征新生与崛起。 -位于正上方的天宫代表巅峰状态。 -位于西方的天宫影响力减弱，象征衰落。 -位于正下方的天宫影响最弱，但同时也意味着潜伏与重生的可能。 【相位关系】 -对冲：两个天宫相隔180度，代表冲突与对立。 -三分相：相隔120度，代表和谐与互补。 -四分相：相隔90度，代表紧张与挑战。 -六分相：相隔60度，代表机遇与潜力。 例如，如果智慧宫与战争宫形成对冲，可能预示着理性与暴力的冲突。而如果智慧宫与全知宫形成三分相，则可能意味着智慧与全知的力量和谐共存，是进行学习和探索的良机。 第五章：实践与警示 作为初学者，你可以从简单的日常占卜开始练习。例如，在每天门扉时进行占卜，预测当天的大致走向。在幕匿时检查自己当日的占星笔记，与门扉时占卜出的结果是否有出入。随着经验的积累，你可以尝试更复杂的星象解读。 然而，切记占星术虽然强大，但并非万能。泰坦的意志深不可测，我们的解读永远只是管窥蠡测。永远保持谦逊，不要妄图挑战泰坦的权威。 此外，警惕那些自称能够完全掌控命运的骗子。真正的占星术师明白，我们的任务是解读命运，而非操纵命运。 最后，愿欧洛尼斯的智慧指引你。 ……
E: Oronyx's Revelation Preamble Dear disciple. When you open this book, you will have embarked on the first steps to understanding the mysteries of destiny. In this world shrouded by eternal night, though we may no longer lay eyes on the starry sky, Janusopolis' astrology arts passed down to us remains the bridge that connects us to the Titans' will. Remember, true astrology is not mere inference of the celestial bodies, but insight into the laws of how the world works, and perceiving the signs that the Titans left behind. *A line of crooked characters — from the ink's color, it appears to have been added in recent years: * !!! Even in the Eternal City of Okhema, beneath the radiant shine of the Dawn Device, and even if we will never witness the eternal night of Oronyx — we can still glimpse the trail of destiny through calculation and extrapolation!!! Chapter 1: Twelve Palaces and Titans Before learning about astrology, you must familiarize yourself with the Twelve Palaces and their respective Titans: 1. Dawn Palace — Aquila 2. Earth Palace — Georios 3. Tide Palace — Phagousa 4. Erudite Palace — Cerces 5. Omniscience Palace — Kephale 6. War Palace — Nikador 7. Evernight Palace — Oronyx 8. Justice Palace — Talanton 9. Passage Palace — Janus 10. Aunarch Palace — Mnestia 11. Trickery Palace — Zagreus 12. Death Palace — Thanatos Each Palace represents a specific Titan's authority, influencing different facets of the world. When we divine, we must calculate the positions and strengths of each Palace in the sky to forecast how the Titan's will manifests. Chapter 2: Astrology Calculation I know that most of our readers would hail from the Eternal City of Okhema — it is currently enveloped in the radiance of the Dawn Device and unable to directly observe the starry skies. Nonetheless, this does not mean that the art of astrology has lost its meaning. On the contrary, the Dawn Device's operational principles have provided us with a new foundation of calculation. To perform astrology forecasts, we must first observe the Dawn Device's changes in light. Note down the brightest and dimmest moments within a day, for these two times indicate the changes in Aquila's authority. With these as fundamental references, we can forecast the positions of the other Palaces. For example, when the Dawn Device is at its brightest, the Dawn Palace's position is directly above. At that moment, the Earth Palace would be positioned east, Tide Palace would be west, Evernight Palace would be directly below, and the other Palaces would be positioned in clockwise order. *An anonymous note written to the side: * The Dawn Device's light changes in intensity...? I can't tell at all. Also, is this even considered astrology anymore? You can't take any of this book's contents too seriously. Don't be misled by those devious disciples of Oronyx!!! Chapter 3: Chart Mapping After ascertaining the heavenly Palaces' positions, the next step is to draw the chart. The chart is a circular diagram divided into twelve equal sections, each section representing a Palace. Mapping steps are as follows: 1. Draw a big circle representing the entire world. 2. Divide this circle into twelve equal sections. 3. Within each section, mark the corresponding Palace names and their Titan's title. 4. Determine, according to the Dawn Device's changes in light, the exact positions of each Palaces. 5. Draw a smaller circle at the center of the big circle, representing the divined individual. Remember, the chart is not fixed, nor unchanging. With the passage of time, the positions of each Palace will also change. This is why the precise recording of time is essential. Chapter 4: Interpreting the Titans' Influence Once the mapping of the chart is complete, you can start to interpret the Titans' influence on us. Influence is largely dependent on two factors: The Palaces' positions and the aspect relations between Palaces. [Positional Influence] The influence of the Palace in the east is strongest, symbolizing new life and ascendance. The Palace directly above represents the state of apex. The influence of the Palace in the west is weaker, representing decline. The influence of the Palace directly below is weakest, yet also hints at the possibility of concealment and rebirth. [Aspect Relations] Opposition: Two Palaces that are 180 degrees apart represent conflict and opposition. Trine: 120 degrees apart, representing harmony and complementarity. Square: 90 degrees, representing anxiety and challenge. Sextile: 60 degrees apart, representing opportunity and potential. For example, if the Erudite Palace and War Palace form an opposition, it can be construed as a clash between reason and violence. And if the Erudite Palace and Omniscience Palace form a trine, it may mean that the powers of knowledge and omniscience are harmonized — a grand opportunity to perform study and discovery. Chapter 5: Practice and Caution As a beginner, you can start with simple everyday divinations. For example, performing a reading at the Entry Hour every day to forecast the general flow of the day. Then, during the Curtain-Fall Hour, review your astrological notes for the day to see if your results match the readings of the day's Entry Hour. As you garner more experience, you can try to decipher more complicated aspects. However, keep in mind that while astrology is powerful, it is not omnipotent. The will of the Titans is unfathomable, and our readings will forever be mere conjecture and observations. Pray be always humble, and never seek to challenge the Titans' authority. Additionally, be on guard against charlatans who proclaim themselves total masters of destiny. True astrologers know that our duty is to interpret destiny, not to manipulate it. Last but not least, may Oronyx's wisdom guide you. ...

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的地方。\n有人说裂界并非单纯吞没了现实，它记录着所有被它吞噬之物的信息。若条件正确，过去的遗物会再度浮现。
E: A bite mark left by the Fragmentum when it corroded reality, leading to mysterious places.\nSome say that the Fragmentum does not simply devour reality — that it, in fact, preserves all the information of what was eaten. When certain conditions are met, the relics of the past may re-emerge.

E: A trial from the Arbitrator... for Equilibrium!

C: 随着忆流上溯的鱼群，每一尾都代表一段独一无二的过往——直到它们被遗忘之海吞没，失去形状。
E: Every fish in the schools that swim upstream along the river of memories represents an entirely unique past — until they are swallowed by the sea of oblivion and lose their shape.

C: 加工石料的区域，日夜回响着叮叮当当的凿石之声。

C: 供奉神像的厅堂，原为七贤人讲学之所。此处聚集了避难而来的生者，默默祈祷岁月与理性的庇护。
E: The hall housing the divine statues. Originally, this was where the Seven Sages lectured. Now, survivors seeking refuge have gathered here, silently praying for the protection of Time and Reason.

C: 侵晨剑锋没入石台，负世者的愿望与绝望在此处消释。

C: 严格来说，「观景车厢」这个名称似乎有失准确。毕竟很多车厢都有窗子，都可以用来「观景」。但鉴于这节车厢经常用来接待客人——可能那些各式各样的客人，才是车厢中的「景观」吧。
E: Strictly speaking, the name "Parlor Car" is not quite accurate. There are, after all, many cars with windows, and they can also be used to take in the scenery. But considering this car is usually used to receive guests, perhaps the various individuals who board the Express count as the true "scenery" within the car.

C: 工造司匠人随手造就的机巧发明。原本不具灵智，如今却因为某些异变被赋予了短暂的「生命」。

C: 蕴含特定认知的实体，由忆域中的潜意识碎片堆积而成。坚不可摧的障壁包裹起生命，阻拦异己。但在那坚硬的躯壳下，却是脆弱不堪的无名地带。
E: An entity imbued with specific cognition, formed by the accumulation of subconscious fragments in the Memory Zone. While it forms an impenetrable barrier to deter outside intrusion, beneath its hardened shell lies a fragile, nameless core.

C: 银鬃铁卫的戍卫长。\n杰帕德会指挥麾下士兵集中攻击，并且能为士兵提供免疫一次攻击的屏障。
E: Captain of the Silvermane Guards.\nGepard can command his soldiers to focus their attacks, and provide each of them with a barrier that blocks one attack.

C: 「星核猎手」的一员，面带莫测笑容的杀手丽人，善用种类纷繁的武器和心控之术。正是她将星穹列车引至此处，以实现某个计划……出现于此的是基于你的记忆模拟出的幻影。
E: One of the Stellaron Hunters. A beautiful assassin wearing an enigmatic smile, she excels in manipulation and various weaponry. It was by her design that the Astral Express was led here, all of which was simply part of a certain plan... This entity is a phantom borne from your memories.

C: 代码受到影响后的完整投影。参照本体为「纯美骑士团」的古典骑士。
E: A complete projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is a paragon among the Knights of Beauty.

C: 由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血，蕴藏掠夺而来的「理性」。被制造出来的意义并非是研究普遍的知识，而是钻研杀戮的兵法与弱肉强食的残酷理论，散布假名为哲学的疯病。
E: A Titankin sculpted by "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. They contain plundered "rationality" within their vessels. The reason behind their creation is not truly toward the study of universal knowledge, but to delve deep into brutal martial tactics and the merciless laws of survival, further spreading madness masquerading as philosophy.

C: 由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血。信仰如飞箭矢志不移，为泰坦造主的悬锋与凶矛寻取猎物，猎杀荒原中的奇兽与战场上的敌兵，射程之内无活物得以幸免。
E: A Titankin sculpted by "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. With faith as steadfast as flying arrows, they are the means to find prey for Kremnos' forces, hunting down beasts and foes across the wastes, and ensuring none survive within firing range.

C: 迷失在群星中的跨维度生物，性温，味甘，不可食用。一生中大部分时间花在进食和逃跑上。偶遇它的旅行者视之为吉兆。
E: An interdimensional creature lost in the stars. Docile in nature. Sweet in taste. Inedible. Spends most of its life feeding and fleeing. Travelers who encounter these creatures see them as good omens.

C: 迷失在群星中的跨维度生物，性温，味甘，不可食用。一生中大部分时间花在进食和逃跑上。偶遇它的旅行者视之为吉兆。
E: An interdimensional creature lost in the stars. Docile in nature. Sweet in taste. Inedible. Spends most of its life feeding and fleeing. Travelers who encounter these creatures see them as good omens.

C: 代码受到影响后的错误投影。参照本体为不属此世的怪异生命，自星核带来的裂界中成长，寄生在世界的根基结构中汲取能量，其甲胄外壳上燃烧着星辰内核的烈焰。\n在战斗中，外宇宙之炎（错误）能轻易将敌人焚作灰烬。
E: A false projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is an alien life form that was born out of the Fragmentum brought by a Stellaron and feeds on this world's energy. Its armor carries the flames taken from the core of a star.\nIn combat, the Blaze Out of Space (Bug) will incinerate anything it touches.

E: Immediately restores all friendly units' HP.

C: 【「飞霄」之影】的额外行动会与蚀月心兽的部位共鸣，共鸣会使蚀月心兽的部位恢复一定韧性，受到攻击时被削减的韧性值提高；下次行动变为强化行动，【喰云之首】共鸣大概率使我方全体目标陷入<u>怒噪</u>状态，【裂维之爪】共鸣额外大幅增加伤害，【辟尘之尾】共鸣大概率使我方全体目标陷入<u>虚弱</u>状态。

Resonance will restore a certain amount of Toughness for the Ecliptic Inner Beast's parts and increase the Toughness value reduced when attacked. The next action becomes Enhanced. Resonance with "Nebula Devourer" has a high chance of inflicting <u>Outrage</u> on all targets. Resonance with "Planeshred Claws" additionally greatly increases DMG. Resonance with "Worldpurge Tail" has a high chance of inflicting <u>Weaken</u> on all targets.

C: 对我方单体及相邻目标造成少量火属性伤害，并大概率使其陷入【灼烧】状态。只能在【狂乱】状态下使用。
E: Deals minor Fire DMG to one target and adjacent targets, with a high chance of inflicting "Burn." This ability can only be used while in the "Rabid" state.

E: Deals Ice DMG to a single target and Advances the target's action Forward. If the target has Shield, additionally deal Ice DMG to this unit with a high chance to decrease this unit's DEF.

E: Whenever a character gets afflicted with Morbid Dream, summons a corresponding Sombrous Sepulcher. When all characters get afflicted with Morbid Dream or are knocked down, this battle will be considered a defeat.

C: 随机召唤【枪尖】、【盾】、【授勋】的雕塑。
E: Randomly summons statues of "Speartip," "The Shield," and "The Honored."

C: 「『齐响诗班』神主日」召唤四个「旧梦的回声」，「旧梦的回声」受到的伤害均由「『齐响诗班』神主日」承受。自身和「旧梦的回声」受到弱点击破时，行动额外延后。且自身每层韧性被击破后，对我方施加【<u>在光明中行</u>】。

When this unit and Echoes of Faded Dreams become Weakness Broken, additionally delays action. For every stack of this unit's Toughness that is broken, apply the <u>Walk in the Light</u> state to targets.

C: 使自身进入【尔在光明中】状态，获得护盾，造成的伤害提高，受到的伤害降低，且韧性无法被削减。
E: Enters the "If We Live In the Light" state, gains a Shield, increases the DMG dealt, decreases the DMG taken, and makes Toughness immune to reduction.

E: Deals Imaginary DMG to one designated target and adjacent targets.

Possessing "Titanic Corpus" will greatly increase the DMG dealt by the next attack, with a high chance of inflicting Imprisonment on all attacked targets.

C: 对指定我方单体目标及其相邻目标造成少量虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to one designated target and adjacent targets.

C: 进入【暗潮将至】状态，下次行动施放【烬灰死寂•诸神屠灭】，并<u>修复</u>【枯槁的筛骨】和【干涸的泪骨】。
E: Enters "The Dark Tides Cometh" state. Uses "Unmaking Ashes: Godsfall" in the next action, and <u>reinstates</u> the "Languid Ethmoid Bone" and "Dried Lacrimal Bone".

E: Deals Physical DMG to all targets.

E: Currently in "Evolution Mode." Generates "Mythical Life Evolution System" in the Action Order. Each time "Mythical Life Evolution System" takes action, generates "Titankin" on the field. After a certain number of friendly units have been generated on the field or target memosprites have been summoned, Zandar will use "SET Proof_Method=Black_Tide."

C: 对我方全体造成少量冰属性伤害，处于【<u>在毁灭中狂欢</u>】状态时，对受到攻击的我方目标施加【<u>黑潮热</u>】，使造成的部分伤害以持续伤害形式在一定回合内扣除。
E: Deals minor Ice DMG to all targets. When in the "<u>Revel in Destruction</u>" state, inflicts "<u>Black Tide Fever</u>" on the targets attacked, causing some DMG dealt to be taken in the form of DoT over a certain number of turns.

C: 对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成少量冰属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Ice DMG to one designated target and their adjacent targets.

C: 陷入无法战斗状态时，对敌方全体造成伤害，并大概率使受到攻击的敌方目标受到的伤害提高。
E: When downed, deals DMG to all friendly units, with a high chance to increase their DMG received.

E: Deals massive DMG to a single target, with a high chance of inflicting Imprisonment.

E: Slightly increases ATK after attacking a target afflicted with Wind Shear. This buff is dispelled upon Weakness Break.

C: 对敌方单体【黎明的左手】施加【增幅】状态，使其强化等级提高1。
E: Applies "Amplification" to Dawn's Left Hand, increasing its Enhancement Level by 1.

C: 进入【增殖】状态，持续直到下次行动。期间受到伤害大幅降低，并且每次受到攻击时召唤【蚀蛰虫】。【增殖】状态下被击破弱点，会对敌方全体造成等同自身韧性上限的削韧值，并使自身以外的敌方目标受到的伤害提高。
E: Enters the Multiply state until the next action. During this time, DMG taken is greatly reduced, and each attack taken summons a Gnaw Sting. If this unit is Weakness Broken while in the Multiply state, it will reduce all friendly units' Toughness by an amount equal to this unit's Max Toughness and increase the DMG taken by all other friendly units besides the target themselves.

C: 被消灭后，使我方【点数】翻倍，同时削减【孤注一掷的掷骰者】的韧性，并使其失去一定量的生命值。
E: After being defeated, targets' Points will double. At the same time, reduces Daring Diceroller's Toughness, and causes them to lose a certain amount of HP.

C: 进入蓄力状态，下次行动施放【企业文化冲击】。
E: Enters the Charging state. Uses Work Culture Shock in the next action.

C: 对所有输掉赌局的我方目标造成大量虚数属性伤害，并大概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入禁锢状态。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to all targets that lost the Gamble, with a high chance of inflicting Imprisonment on the attacked targets.

C: 海洋的半神为封锁神礼观众，以幻乐打造的无尽欢宴之城。在这座为虹彩与洋流所环绕的海滨城邦，人们歆享不断续杯的蜜酿，没有任何苦痛与遗恨。
E: A city of infinite revelry crafted by illusions, built by the Ocean's demigod to contain the Theoroi. In this coastal city-state encircled by rainbows and ocean currents, people indulge in unending refills of honey brew, free from any pain or regret.

C: 根据故事书的线索，将矿灯放在正确的位置上
E: Place the Miner's Lamp at the correct spot based on the clues in the storybook

E: Resolve the Crisis at Teary Court Ruins

C: 「时间——世上最勤劳的窃贼。它不断偷走我们的当下，随手扔进名为『记忆』的仓库。有人沉溺于招领失物…有人对遗失毫不在乎。」 ——佚名，《此生苦短》 世间再无比纯粹的记忆更加包容的存在：它记录一切，不嫌恶，不偏爱；它无私地保留每个基本的事实，每种绮丽的姿态；它是绵延的生命汇聚成的河流，是亘古的智慧堆砌成的宝藏。 ——而浮黎是溯游的鱼群，亦是宝库的钥匙。祂禅坐于净土中央，静观世间万物不知疲倦地重蹈覆辙。
E: "Time — the hardest working thief in the world. It keeps stealing away our present from us, and tossing it away in a warehouse named Memory. Some are addicted to recuperating their losses... Others care not in the slightest." — Life Is Too Short by Anonymous There is no existence more embracing than the Remembrance in its purest form: It chronicles everything with neither affinity nor aversion. It unselfishly preserves every single fundamental fact and every single resplendent form. It is a river formed by the continuous flow of life, a treasure built from the eternal wisdom of antiquity. — And Fuli is the fish that swims back upstream in this river, the very key to this treasure vault. Seated in meditation at the heart of the Pure Land, THEY observe in silence the world's tireless repetitions of the same mistakes over and over again.

C: 「你看见亿万万骏马驰驾战车，遮蔽大地，唯有其一抵达终点！但你看见车辙存在，先于所有战车的启程！」 ——《德米卡纳语大辞典》中对「无漏净子」的释义 很难判断应该将「无漏净子」收录入智库的哪个分类，甚至很难判断这一词条是否应当被收录。目前为止，这四个字更像一则浮言虚论，散落在银河历史的残章断篇中。 不同文献资料指向的无漏净子，出生地、种族、身份，乃至人生轨迹都迥然相异，彼此也互不相识。唯一的共同点，是她们都行于「记忆」的命途。 从字面解读，无漏净子必然与「无漏主」浮黎有着千丝万缕的关联。她们会是某种特别的「记忆」令使吗？假说不计其数：星神破碎后散落银河的碎片、浮黎行走人间的万千化身、祂对于「自身」回忆的不同侧面…每种猜想似乎都能自圆其说，却也漏洞百出。 现在，银河能达成的共识只有一个：一位或几位无漏净子建立了流光忆庭，她们共同看守「记忆」的秘密。
E: "You see millions upon millions of steeds pulling chariots, blanketing the earth, yet only one reaches the finish! But you also see how wheel tracks existed before any chariot's departure!" — Definition of "Pure Child of Anāsrava" from the Grand Dictionary of the Demicanian Language It's hard to determine which category in the data bank the "Pure Child of Anāsrava" should be filed under, or even if this entry should be included at all. So far, these four words seem more like a baseless rumor, scattered among the fragmentary chapters of cosmic history. Different historical records lead to Pure Children of Anāsrava with vastly different birthplaces, races, identities, and even life experiences. They also never knew each other. The only common thread between these women was that they all walked the Path of Remembrance. Literally interpreted, the Pure Children of Anāsrava must have countless intricate connections with Fuli, the Master of Anāsrava. Could these women be some special form of Remembrance Emanators? The conjectures are endless: They could be fragments of the Aeon scattered across the cosmos after THEIR shattering, Fuli's countless manifestations walking among mortals, different facets of THEIR memories of "THEMSELF"... Each theory seems self-consistent, yet riddled with contradictions. Now, there's only one consensus across the cosmos: one or several Pure Children of Anāsrava established the Garden of Recollection, and these women collectively guard the secret of the Remembrance.

C: 逐梦客平均每次就餐的开销是<unbreak>9,450</unbreak>信用点——看着不多，是吧？那再看看这组数据：逐梦客平均每个系统时要就餐<unbreak>2.3</unbreak>次。
E: Dreamchasers spend <unbreak>9,450</unbreak> credits per meal on average. That doesn't seem much, right? But reconsider this fact: Dreamchasers dine <unbreak>2.3</unbreak> times per system hour on average.

E: Unlocked by Default

E: Unlocked by Default

E: Diviner

C: 幕布再度拉开，万维克走向舞台中央，化身为「齐响诗班」神主日。「一个人若想就此谢幕，必先再次登台。」
E: The curtain rose once again, and Wonweek stepped to center stage, transforming into The Great Septimus of the Harmonious Choir. "Should one desire to leave the stage for good, one must first step back onto the stage."

C: 呼雷于擂台上狂呼酣战，认为云骑士兵们孱弱不堪。彦卿、云璃与三月七联手登台，挑战呼雷。
E: Hoolay howled with fury in the center of the arena, mocking the Cloud Knights Soldiers as too feeble to pose a threat. Yanqing, Yunli, and March 7th stepped forward together to face him in battle.

C: 末日兽向空间站发动攻击。艾丝妲请姬子带你们坐列车离开，她则留下与科员们共同保卫空间站。
E: The Doomsday Beast attacked the space station. Asta instructed Himeko to evacuate your group on the Express while she remained to defend the station alongside the research team.

C: 你跟随三月七等人奔向星穹列车站台。末日兽追逐而至，在支援舱段平台前对你们发起攻击。
E: You raced with March 7th and the others toward the Astral Express platform. The Doomsday Beast chased after you and caught up, attacking your group at the supply zone platform.

C: 你发现丹恒正站在八角笼中，即将开始下一场与机器人的战斗。你与三月七加入拳台，主持人示意比赛继续。
E: You spotted Dan Heng standing inside the octagon, about to begin a match against a robot. You and March 7th joined him in the ring, and the announcer signaled for the match to begin.

C: 你们救下克拉拉，向其请求访问史瓦罗的许可。克拉拉不愿意让「地火」与史瓦罗会面，认为冲突无可避免，并会波及无辜的人。
E: Once she was safe, you asked for access to Svarog. Clara hesitated. She didn't want Wildfire and Svarog to meet, convinced that the clash would be inevitable — dragging innocent lives into the crossfire.

C: 布洛妮娅向可可利亚汇报下层区见闻，提议与外来者一同解决「星核」祸患。可可利亚怒不可遏，带布洛妮娅去见证真正的「真相」。
E: Bronya returned to Cocolia and reported all she had seen in the Underworld, urging her to work with the outsiders to eliminate the threat of the Stellaron. Cocolia was furious and took Bronya to witness the real "truth."

C: 姬子登场，公司正式提出股权方案，三方达成初步协议，<color=#f29e38ff>列车将持有匹诺康尼5%的股权</color>，翡翠将后续谈判交给托帕。
E: Himeko arrived at the scene, and the IPC formally put forth the shareholding plan. The three parties came to an initial agreement where <color=#f29e38ff>the Express will hold 5% of Penacony's stock</color>. Jade entrusted future negotiations to Topaz.

C: 芮克先生称，他先前因染上致命的模因病毒而被迫与「蕉授」合作。睡蕉小猴的风潮有机会提前退却，而答案就在乱破的「过去」中。
E: Mr. Reca claimed that he was forced to collaborate with Profnana after contracting a deadly memetic virus. The Slumbernana Monkey trend could recede earlier than expected, and the answer lay in Rappa's "past."

C: 缇安呼唤欧洛尼斯，却没有得到任何回应。缇宁感知到神殿中有未知威胁正在靠近，与此同时，缇安发现散落于地面的——披风残片。
E: Trianne called out to Oronyx, but received no answer. Trinnon sensed an unknown threat closing in from within the temple. At the same time, Trianne noticed scraps of a cloak scattered across the ground.

C: 黑塔想要为模拟宇宙再找一位合作伙伴，与阮•梅、螺丝咕姆商讨引入第五位天才的可能性。过程会很漫长，阮•梅提议先送你离开。
E: Herta wanted to bring in another partner for the Simulated Universe and was discussing with Ruan Mei and Screwllum the possibility of introducing a fifth genius. The talks would take a while, so Ruan Mei suggested letting you leave first.

C: 公司小组长称，他们正在此处执行资产评估工作，矿区资产已由公司接管，这是规矩。沟通失败，希儿决定以武力教训公司小组。
E: The IPC Team Leader explained that they were conducting an asset evaluation here and that the mines had already been taken over by the IPC, as per protocol. When the talks fell through, Seele decided it was time to settle things by force.

C: 布洛妮娅展示由贝洛伯格自主建造的「造物引擎」，托帕认可当地人的抗争意志。在星穹列车的担保下，托帕愿意推迟债务结算计划。
E: Bronya presented the "Engine of Creation," a device built by the people of Belobog through their own efforts. Topaz recognized the people's determination to resist. With the Astral Express standing as guarantor, Topaz agreed to postpone the settlement of the debt.

C: 一个神秘的声音向你低语，称赞你的强大肉身，从中嗅到与「幻胧」战斗过的气息。它迫不及待地靠近你，想要品尝一番。
E: A mysterious voice whispered to you, praising your strong physique and sensing the remnants of your battle with "Phantylia." It drew closer with eager anticipation, longing to get a taste of you.

C: 你见到卡芙卡，而她知道你一定会来。
E: You met Kafka, and she knew you would come.

C: 你们围住桑博，盘问他为什么把你们带到地下。桑博表示来此是为躲避银鬃铁卫的追捕，为表诚意，他引荐你们认识「地火」。
E: Your squad surrounded Sampo and interrogated him about bringing you to the Underground. Sampo explained that it was to avoid the Silvermane Guards. To show his sincerity, he was going to refer you to the Wildfire.

C: 你们在孤儿院角落里找到第二份物资。希儿检查酒精标签，意外发现了布洛妮娅儿时的玩具。
E: Tucked away in a corner, you uncovered a second cache of supplies. As Seele examined the alcohol labels, something unexpected caught her eye — an old toy from Bronya's childhood.

C: 你与姬子交谈，得知星穹列车即将启航前往下一站，而目的地将在接下来的航线会议中决定。
E: You spoke with Himeko and found out that the Astral Express will be heading off to its next stop, and the destination will be decided in the upcoming navigation meeting.

C: 符玄将你们送至前往工造司的星槎，与你们在此分别。她以额间法眼观之，各位此行必然元亨利贞，无往不吉。
E: Fu Xuan escorted you to a starskiff bound for the Artisanship Commission, parting ways after using her omniscia to foresee your journey as auspicious and smooth.

C: 黄泉祝你与流萤在梦里过得愉快，米沙与钟表小子向你道别。问题解决后，你继续跟随流萤前往她的「秘密据点」。
E: Acheron wished you and Firefly a pleasant time in the dreams. Misha and Clockie bade you farewell as well. After the problem was resolved, you continued on with Firefly toward her "secret stronghold."

C: 综合以上信息，流萤应该是与一位同行者进入了这条长廊。
E: With the information obtained in mind, Firefly should have entered this corridor with a companion.

C: 流萤的记忆推测，当时与你遇见的忆域迷因与「钟表匠」相关。她似乎在和什么人分享自己的发现，还不知道自己会成为受害者。
E: Firefly's memory deduced that the Memory Zone Meme you encountered back then was related to "Watchmaker." She seemingly shared her discovery with someone else, unaware that she would become a victim.

C: 你看到舞台上洒满筹码。加拉赫称前几天有个鸢尾花家系的演员来砸场子，与舒翁争执留下一地狼藉。你获得「孤注一掷」。
E: You saw chips scattered all over the stage. Gallagher said that an actor from the Iris Family caused a ruckus with Siobhan a few days ago. You obtained "Daring Wager."

C: 姬子建议追击星核，为此需要接近大剧院。三月七提议参加海选获得资格，加拉赫告别后流萤加入了队伍，你们一行人出发参赛。
E: Himeko suggested pursuing the Stellaron, which required getting closer to the Grand Theater. March 7th proposed earning qualification through the open audition. After Gallagher took his leave, Firefly joined the team, and your group set out to compete.

C: 托帕与托马斯交流，察觉家族此会面只是探虚实或施压，她提醒团队保持警惕，并嘱咐托马斯别在翡翠女士面前称其为「大老板」。
E: Topaz conversed with Thomas, realizing that this meeting with The Family was either to pry or to apply pressure on the IPC. She reminded her team to stay alert and told Thomas not to call Madam Jade "big boss" in front of Jade.

C: 波提欧的世界陷入沉默的死寂。助蕉声称， ▇ ▇ 声音， ▇ ▇ ▇ ▇ ▇ ▇ ▇ ▇ ▇ ▇。
E: Boothill's world fell into a deathly silence. Assistanana claimed that ▇ ▇ sounds, ▇ ▇ ▇ ▇ ▇ ▇ ▇ ▇ ▇ ▇.

C: 你与三月七、丹恒抵达白日梦酒店，前往办理入住。
E: You, March 7th, and Dan Heng arrived at The Reverie to check in.

C: 波提欧与三月七看到正与助蕉交谈的蒙塔娜，于是对助蕉发起进攻，以阻止其转化行为。
E: Boothill and March 7th spotted Montana talking with Assistanana, so they launched an attack on Assistanana to prevent the conversion.

C: 波提欧查看芮克先生准备好的礼物，随后放声大笑，称赞其才华。该回去见见知更鸟了，流梦礁确实不需要家族的帮忙。
E: Boothill looked at the gift Mr. Reca's prepared and burst out laughing, praising his talent. Time to go back and see Robin, as Dreamflux Reef clearly didn't need the Family's help.

C: 你与白厄在竞技场与万敌会合，然而没有发现尼卡多利的身影。万敌猜测尼卡多利藏身于铸魂区，出发之前，你考虑要不要在此拍张照。
E: You and Phainon found Mydei at the arena, but no sign of Nikador. Mydei thought Nikador might be hiding in the Soul-Forging Zone. Before leaving, you thought about taking a photo.

C: 切换时空后，格奈乌斯看到了未来昏暗破败的悬锋城。他对此感到不可思议，同时也更坚定终结这场荒谬的决心。
E: While shifting through time, Gnaeus caught a glimpse of Castrum Kremnos' ruined and desolate future. The sight left him shaken, but more determined than ever to bring this farce to its end.

C: 你与遐蝶被挡在门前，记忆中的那刻夏突然出现。你得知他与留守的学者们拼死捍卫树庭，而今他请你们前往启蒙王座，回收火种。
E: At the sealed gate, Anaxa from the memories suddenly emerged. You learned he and the remaining scholars had held off the black tide to the bitter end. Now, he urged you to head for the Luminary Throne to retrieve the Coreflame.

C: 在浑象仪前，记忆残像揭露出雨之民所吟唱的天象画壁密钥，以及天空部落之间残酷的内斗。风堇记住吟唱内容，尝试启动天象画壁。
E: In front of the celestial globe, the fragments of memory revealed the secret key to the celestial mural, one once sung by the Rainfolk, as well as the brutal infighting between the sky tribes. Hyacine memorized the words to the song, and tried activating the celestial mural.

C: 来古士吟诵起仪式念白，诸位半神的英灵在创世涡心再度显现。你与白厄一起归还刻法勒的火种，开启「再创世」仪式。
E: Lygus began the ritual chant. The souls of demigods stirred, appearing once again at the Vortex of Genesis. With Phainon, you returned Kephale's Coreflame and started the Era Nova ritual.

C: 音符小姐营造的梦境被突破。在知更鸟的令咒下，鸢尾花家系创始人阿斯娜找回了自己的名字以及身为英灵的证明，并解除从者身份。
E: The dream created by Miss Note was shattered. Under Robin's Command Spell, Asna, the founder of the Iris Family, reclaimed her name and her proof as a Heroic Spirit, severing her Servant contract.

C: 第一次逐火之旅以「律法」的试炼作结，你们必须在火种被归还前找到刻律德菈。你与昔涟来到命运三相殿，附近正有冲突发生。
E: The first Flame-Chase Journey concluded with the trial of "Law." You had to find Cerydra before the Coreflame was restored. You and Cyrene arrived at the Temple of the Three Fates, where a conflict had broken out nearby.

C: 触碰识刻锚后，昔涟的身影再次出现。你不在的这段时间里，翁法罗斯已过去千年，昔涟要把这一千年的故事都讲给你听。
E: When you touched the Chronocognitive Anchor, Cyrene appeared once more. In your absence, a thousand years have passed in Amphoreus. Now, she would tell you the story of this millennium.

C: 依照那刻夏提出的方法，万敌请求缇安为自己主持「裂魂仪式」。以此将万敌的灵魂裂成五份，以此令「纷争」的锋刃永远高悬。
E: Following Anaxa's proposed method, Mydei had Trianne perform the Soul-Rending Ceremony to divide his soul into five parts, ensuring the blade of Strife would hang forever overhead.

C: 再深邃的酒杯也终会满溢，法吉娜已无力抵御黑潮侵蚀。众海妖愿为女王分担宿命，法吉娜允诺在地上为眷属们举办一场无休的宴会。
E: Even the deepest chalice eventually overflowed. As Phagousa could no longer resist the black tide's corrosion, the sea sirens vowed to share their queen's fate. Phagousa then promised her kindred an endless feast upon the land.

C: 海列屈拉踏上陆地，迎接她的却只有「死亡」。斯缇科西亚没有蜜酿泼洒的庆典，只有寂静流淌的冥河。
E: Helektra came ashore, yet only "Death" awaited her. No honey brew spilled in celebration in Styxia, only the silent flow of the River of Souls.

C: 刻律德菈与昔涟远眺翁法罗斯的全貌。刻律德菈已决定好「律法」的去向，她最后想确认一事——「救世主」在旅途中，可曾见过大海？
E: Together, Cerydra and Cyrene gazed out over all of Amphoreus. Cerydra had already made up her mind about the fate of Law, but had one last question: Had the Deliverer ever seen the ocean during their journey?

C: 吉奥刻勒斯战败，丹恒质问对方与长夜月所做交易的内容。与此同时，大地深处传来震动与哀伤的轰鸣。
E: After Geocles's defeat, Dan Heng interrogated them about the deal made with Evernight. Meanwhile, sorrowful rumbles and tremors echoed from deep beneath the earth.

C: 姬子尝试与仙舟联盟代表联系。符玄称此番出兵为元帅亲自裁夺，「铁墓」一役确有仙舟所求之物。至于结盟玉兆，可以留待后用。
E: Himeko attempted to contact the Xianzhou Alliance representative. According to Fu Xuan, this military deployment was personally decided by the Marshal, and the Irontomb battle did offer something that Xianzhou sought. As for the jade abacus of allying oath, it can be saved for future use.

C: 你们在时光归墟遇到缇安和缇宁。缇安和缇宁得留在这里，尽力打扫不断涌现的卷轴，她们请你看看卷轴上的内容。
E: You encountered Trianne and Trinnon in the Ruins of Time. Trianne and Trinnon had to stay here and clean up the endlessly appearing scrolls, and they asked you to take a look at the contents of the scrolls.

C: 在哀丽秘榭，昔涟为幼年白厄留下心中的英雄与神谕：「汝将肩负骄阳，直至灰白的黎明显著。」
E: In Aedes Elysiae, Cyrene left young Phainon with a hero within his heart and a prophecy: "You will bear the blazing sun, until the pale dawn breaks."

C: 银枝拒绝维利特的劝阻与帮助，称自己将恪守誓言，全力护送维利特安全抵达终点。
E: Argenti refused Velite's dissuasion and help, stating that he would honor his oath and do everything in his power to escort Velite safely to the destination.

C: 丹恒称，一辆飞船与列车发生了追尾，并有两位陌生人士因此找上列车。你与三月七前去打探虚实。
E: Dan Heng reported that a spaceship had rear-ended the Express, and two strangers came looking for the Express because of this. You and March 7th went to investigate the situation.

C: 三月七扮演的罗刹即将与星核买家接头。
E: March 7th's version of Luocha was about to meet with the Stellaron buyer.

C: 你们经过第二处蜃影，白露认出这是上一任丹士长。你们在交谈中得知，丹枫使用「化龙妙法」创造了新的生命。
E: As you passed by the second Mirage Echo, Bailu recognized it as the previous chief alchemist. Through your conversation, you learned that Dan Feng had used the "Transmutation Arcanum" to create new life.

C: 镜流称自己用一笔交易换来性命，靠着剑与仇恨才支撑到现在，她还从白露处得知刃今日来过丹鼎司。此后，她决定前去同旧识会面。
E: Jingliu claimed she had traded for her life, and it was her sword and hatred that had kept her going until now. She also learned from Bailu that Blade had visited the Alchemy Commission today. After that, she decided to meet with her old acquaintance.

C: 大毫对于银枝的手法、动机和行事风格一头雾水，而云璃则提出，是「孤云」控制了银枝，并自己脱离了剑匣。
E: Dahao was completely baffled by Argenti's methods, motives, and way of doing things. Yunli suggested that Guyun might have seized control of Argenti, breaking free from the case on its own.

C: 三月七接受记者采访，回答了诸如代替师父参赛的原因、最期待的对手等问题。
E: March 7th answered a journalist's interview questions, including why she was competing in place of Yanqing and which opponents she most looked forward to facing.

C: 呼雷提及飞霄的步离血脉与战奴经历，向飞霄发出决斗邀请，称自己会在竞锋舰上等候飞霄的到来。飞霄接受呼雷的挑战。
E: Hoolay mentioned Feixiao's borisin bloodline and her past as a war slave, inviting her to a duel. Hoolay stated he would be waiting on the Skysplitter. Feixiao accepted Hoolay's challenge.

C: 这幅生动记录当地风俗舞蹈的照片，展现了领舞指导舞者表演的火热情景，颇具民俗价值。
E: This vivid photo captures the local folk dance customs, showcasing the vibrant scene of the lead dancer guiding the performers, rich in folkloric value.

C: 三月七报名「线上影展」需要的「证件照」。记录下了三月七作为摄影师初露头角的一刻。
E: The ID photo for March 7th's online exhibition submission. It records the moment March 7th begins to shine as a photographer.

C: 巨型睡蕉小猴在高楼耸立的都市中肆虐…颇具视觉震撼力，仿佛某部大片的海报，让人心潮澎湃。
E: The giant Slumbernana Monkey rampages through the towering cityscape... It's quite visually shocking, reminiscent of a blockbuster movie poster, stirring one's heart and soul.

C: 为<color=#f29e38ff>已激活羁绊</color>的助理升级收益更大帕。
E: Upgrading assistants with <color=#f29e38ff>active bonds</color> will yield even greater rewards.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>叽米</color>出现了，<color=#f29e38ff>连续点击</color>叽米越多，金币收益越多！
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Owlbert</color> has arrived, <color=#f29e38ff>{LAYOUT_MOBILE#tapping}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#pressing}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#clicking} Owlbert more</color> will increase your coins.

C: 你被扑满的次元隧道弄花了眼。
E: You got confused by the Trotters' warp portals.

C: 托帕提供了一份动物营养菜谱。
E: Topaz provided an animal meal recipe.

C: 貊泽承认是出于兴趣。
E: Moze admits he did it purely out of personal interest.

C: 你在「银河强手棋」中大败。
E: You are utterly defeated in Cosmodyssey.

C: 你请出列车外援——「闭嘴」！
E: You call in backup from the Express — "Shush"!

C: 它好像很中意这里…
E: It seems to really like it here...

C: 秉持「机甲纯洁主义」的瓦尔特满脸黑线。
E: Welt, a staunch believer in Mecha Purism, looks visibly exasperated.

C: 「吃了吗您嘞？」在水灵的语言中只需要一个手势。
E: In aqua sprite language, "Have you eaten anything?" is just one simple gesture.

C: 三无将军的第四无是无尾，她没什么建议。
E: Taillessness is the fourth thing on the lacking general's list, so she can't help.

C: 作为仙舟的重要机构，太卜司每日都运转得井井有条。结束了穷观阵的例行维护后，照惯例太卜准备去丹鼎司购置一些甜水，恰好在路上撞上了你，她心情好，说是要为你卜上一卦……
E: As an important branch of Xianzhou, the Divination Commission runs like clockwork every day. After finishing the routine maintenance on the Matrix of Prescience, Master Diviner was, as usual, on her way to pick up some sweet water at Alchemy Commission when she ran into you. In a good mood, she says she's going to do a fortune reading for you...

E: Herta Space Station

C: 稚子沉眠于此，月光萦绕耳畔，梦中不止涛声。
E: A child lays dormant here, the moonlight whispers by the ear, and the sound of waves echoes in the dream.

C: 虚拟大毫早已在庙会恭候多时，看到他身边的魔方，你心里五味杂陈……
E: Dahao's virtual avatar has been waiting for you for a long time at the temple fair. You feel complicated emotions as you look at the cube beside him...

C: 梦境支离破碎。红发的女孩能否拾回自己的过去？
E: This dreamscape is shattered. Can the red-haired girl truly regain her past?

C: 君王遗告身后：「朕的王朝，给最强者。」
E: The sovereign left this to posterity: "My throne will be bequeathed to the strongest."

C: 在地宫中，每座房间都被封印把守，而这间受制于「黄金替罪羊」。只有解开它的谜题才能继续前进。
E: Every room in the hypogeum is protected by a seal, with this one bound by Golden Scapegoat. Only by solving its mystery can one proceed onward.

C: 几位天才同时出现？！闻所未闻！
E: Multiple geniuses appearing at the same time!? Utterly unheard of!

C: ……该如何形容「巡猎」的星神呢？用一则琥珀<unbreak>2131</unbreak>纪，天戈星观测站的报告来建立直观印象好了：天文观测系统捕捉到一则引力波信号，那是由某个无法测速的事物划过天文尺度的距离后留下的空间漾动。接着，一道光劈开穹窿，留下虹彩般异样的轨迹。半个系统时后，天戈星由内而外星体溃塌。坏消息是，公司损失了商业体中的一颗星球；好消息是，在此之前，他们正拿天戈星蔓延的蜕鳞症（毫无疑问，药师的手笔）一筹莫展。那道光一劳永逸地「治愈」了这颗星球，还有星球上的患者——一群半人半蛇的不死怪物。这就是「巡猎」的行止和信条——拯救与破坏几无差别。就像祂那永恒的对手「丰饶」一样——治愈和折磨相依相存……
E: ...How would you describe the Aeon of The Hunt? We can get an impression from the Xuange Observation Station's report in AE <unbreak>2131</unbreak>. The astronomical observation system detected a gravitational wave, a spatial disturbance left by an entity traveling too fast to be measured and covering astronomical distances. Shortly thereafter, a flash of light cleaved apart the sky, leaving behind abnormal rainbow-colored traces. Half a unit of system time later, the entirety of the planet Xuange imploded. The bad news was the IPC lost a planet in its business sphere. The good news was the IPC was out of ideas regarding the molting disease (undoubtedly the work of Yaoshi) spreading throughout Xuange. The light permanently "healed" that planet and the patients on it, a race of immortal half-human half-snake monsters. This is the action and creed of The Hunt, for whom salvation and destruction are nigh indistinguishable. Their perpetual enemy, the Abundance, is the same, for THEY bring healing and torment hand-in-hand...

C: 第二真理大学以「无形目是否为人类的下一进化形态」为比赛辩题，可我们知道，无论是岁阳还是斯兰卡人，它们之中都从未诞生过天才。 是否存在一种完美的载体，作为智慧的存在形式？作为机械帝皇的无机仿生神经元集群，「权杖」理应具备承载智慧的特质。完美进化学派的学士一度怀疑，正是以「权杖」作为扩展思维的大脑延伸，#鲁珀特二世才能以血肉之躯企及摧毁半个宇宙的算能。虽然公司对无机生命的研究项目多有限制，但仍未能阻止学者们将研发重心逐渐从肉体转移向金属。 正如托克尔克学士所言，在小小的蛋白球和有限的寿命外，我们终将创造更具超越性的智慧。 ——《学派战争全史》烛墨史学家，科尔哈桑
E: The University of Veritas Secundum used "Is Shapeless the next evolutionary state of humanity" as a debate topic, but we know that be they heliobi or Sulank, a genius was never born from their ranks. Is there a perfect medium for wisdom to exist? As the inorganic bionic neuron clusters of the Mechanical Emperor, the Scepters should possess the property of bearing intelligence. The School of Evolutionary Perfection scholars once suspected that #Rubert II used the Scepters as a cerebral extension of thought expansion to generate enough computational power to destroy half the universe with his mortal body. Though the IPC has imposed many restrictions on inorganic lifeform research projects, that has not prevented scholars' academic efforts from being slowly diverted from flesh to metal. It is as Scholar Torkirk declared: Beyond minuscule protein balls and limited lifespans, we will eventually create intelligence that transcends all. — Chronicles of the Scholars' Strife Candelagraph Historian, Kerhasan

C: 相同的指令，在「权杖」和普雷图星的造物单元中运行，得到了不同的结果。关于这点，有人猜测，或许是遗产在运算问题时，主动在黑箱中修正了指令的错误。 走进星空以前，长鸣星的咕噜多教授一度认为，仅需四种基本作用力，人类就能掌握宇宙。后来，学者们将这一模型戏称为「天国」。正如琥珀王所做的一般，虚数能量与命途的不可观测及不可复现性，为大一统方程的建立树起一道无法逾越的高墙。纯粹造物学派，他们解析命途的实验被信徒视作渎神，但以最小单位为起点，重组整个宇宙，这不正是「智识」的体现吗？ 纯粹造物学派的学者就像烟花，他们转瞬即逝，却将无数星火留给了后世的求知者。 ——《学派战争全史》烛墨史学家，科尔哈桑
E: The same command, run on the Scepters and planet Plato's creation unit, obtained different results. Regarding this, some have guessed that the relic purposely corrected the command's error in the black box while calculating the problem. Before embarking unto the starry skies, Professor Groudo of Longchime once opined that humanity could master the universe using only four fundamental forces. Scholars would later mockingly call this model the "Heavenly Kingdom." Just like everything else the Amber Lord did, the unobservability and irreproducibility of imaginary energy and the Paths raised an insurmountable wall against the establishment of the grand unified equation. The experiments in analyzing the Paths by the School of Pure Creation are seen as blasphemous by the devout, but to reconstruct the entire cosmos with the smallest unit as its building block, is that not the true manifestation of the Erudition? Scholars of the School of Pure Creation are like fireworks — ephemeral, yet leaving behind myriad sparks for future seekers of knowledge. — Chronicles of the Scholars' Strife Candelagraph Historian, Kerhasan

E: When a character launches Follow-Up ATK, their DEF increases.

C: 角色发动追加攻击后，速度提高。
E: When a character launches Follow-Up ATK, their SPD increases.

C: 角色施放终结技后，消耗或恢复战技点时被视为额外消耗或恢复1个。角色消耗或恢复战技点越多，暴击伤害越高。
E: After a character uses an Ultimate, when a Skill Point is consumed or recovered, it is considered as additionally consuming or recovering 1 Skill Point. The more Skill Points a character consumes or recovers, the higher their CRIT DMG.

C: 触发临界方程后，对敌方全体造成虚数属性伤害，使其陷入【<u>中枢链接</u>】状态，并为我方全体恢复能量。
E: After triggering the boundary Equation, deals Imaginary DMG to all enemies and inflicts the <u>Central Link</u> effect on them, regenerating Energy for all allies.

C: 角色可抵抗致命伤害，并消耗能量回复自身生命值，我方全体生效次数有限。
E: Characters can resist fatal DMG and can consume Energy to restore their own HP. This can take effect a limited number of times among all allies.

C: 每层【<u>执念</u>】额外使造成的伤害提高。
E: Each stack of "<u>Obsession</u>" additionally increases DMG dealt.

C: 忆灵行动后，我方全体暴击伤害提高。
E: After a memosprite takes action, increases all allies' CRIT DMG.

C: 效果抵抗提高。
E: Increases Effect RES.

C: 施放终结技后，生命上限提高。
E: Increases Max HP after using Ultimate.

C: 黑夜延长。处于黑夜时，精英敌人被消灭时获得的宇宙碎片提高。首个昼夜切换后该效果失效。
E: Extends the Night. During the Night, increases Cosmic Fragment gained when Elite Enemies are defeated. This effect expires after the first Day/Night change.

C: 角色施放终结技时，获得护盾。角色的终结技攻击，会依据当前护盾量对攻击目标造成【<u>反震</u>】伤害。
E: When characters use their Ultimate, they gain a Shield. Characters' Ultimate attacks will deal <u>Quake</u> DMG to the attacked targets based on the current total Shield Effect on the character.

C: 【<u>孢子</u>】伤害提高，爆裂时，敌方目标每有1个负面效果，伤害额外提高。
E: Increases <u>Spore</u>'s DMG. When Spores burst, the DMG increases additionally for each debuff the enemy target has.

C: 我方累计施放<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>次终结技后，进入【超频】状态。该状态下施放终结技攻击后会造成【<u>回味</u>】伤害，当前队伍中的第一位角色激活终结技并将【<u>罐中脑</u>】充能至<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: Whenever allies have used Ultimates <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> time(s) in total, enters the "Overclock" state. While in this state and after an Ultimate is used to attack, deals "<u>Aftertaste</u>" DMG, and the first character in the current team activates their Ultimate and charges "<u>Brain in a Vat</u>" to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 角色施放终结技时，使自身与忆灵获得【<u>执念</u>】，并使速度提高，攻击力提高。
E: When a character uses Ultimate, they and their memosprite gain "<u>Obsession</u>" and increase SPD and ATK.

C: 「我见过帝皇鲁珀特！」这一天机械时傍晚九点，侵入性「奇思狂想」准点步入机械城某罐缸中之脑的思维。它无法辨别自己是有机还是无机，抑或只是一团气体？它声称自己面见帝皇，只为摆脱脑内的「奇思狂想」——它在它脑袋里乱撞，过载的思考令它疲惫不堪，而鲁珀特只是修改了一处不起眼的代码，就令它如梦初醒——它醒来后意识到一切从未发生，这不过是又一次狂想。
E: "I've seen Emperor Rubert!" Following the machine era calendar, on this day at nine in the evening, the invasive "Wildminder" entered the thoughts of a certain brain-in-a-jar in the Machine City. It was unable to distinguish whether itself was organic, inorganic, or just a gaseous lifeform. It claimed to have met the emperor, only to break away from the "Wildminder" in its head — The thought slammed the limits of its brain, overloading its thoughts to the point of exhaustion. But after Rubert fixed a single line of unmarkable code, it awakened from this haze, coming to realize that none of this had happened, that it had only been another illusion.

C: 如何与虫群共生，是摩斯卡人从出生起就要考虑的问题。他们豢养落单的蠹役，利用「繁育」的性质间接获取生物质能源。从衣食住行到尖端科技，虫子充斥着生活的每个角落。多年后，当武装考古学派抵达与外界失联的摩斯卡星时，他们在总统办公室找到了无人接听的电话。它的身体蠕动，迸射出孢子，仿佛随时都将破茧而出。「与其说是摩斯卡人利用了虫群，不如说，是虫群被动寄生在了他们的文明上。」
E: How to co-exist with the Swarm? That is the question that the Moskans have contemplated since the day they were born. They raise straggling bugs in servitude, using the properties of Propagation to indirectly harvest biomass energy. From daily necessities to cutting-edge technology, bugs are dispersed across all corners of their life. Many years later, when the Armed Archaeologists arrived on the planet of Moska — long cut off from the outside world — they found a phone that no one answered in the president's office. Its body quivered and spouted spores, as if it would hatch from its cocoon at any moment. "Rather than saying the Moskans used the Swarm, it would be more accurate to say that the Swarm passively parasitized onto their civilization."

C: 每到播种季，吉奥里亚的信徒都会反复将丰裕滚石推上山顶，再任由其轰隆隆地滚下山，从待开垦的田地上碾压而过。可别以为他们在进行什么健身运动，滚石不仅会播撒下孕育的种子，还能为土地灌输丰厚的养分。不过千万别在滚石工作的时候打扰它们，曾经有顽劣的孩童追逐滚石，结果被当成田地碾了个遍，虽然保住了性命，但全身的毛发都变成了小麦。
E: Every planting season, the disciples of Georios repeatedly push the Bountiful Rolling Stone up a hill, then let it thunderously roll down, crushing over the fields to be cultivated. This isn't just a fitness exercise. The rolling stone not only scatters fertile seeds but also enriches the soil with nutrients. However, never disturb them during their work. Mischievous children who chased after the stone ended up crushed as if they were part of the field. Though the children survived, their hair turned to wheat.

C: 阿尔法尼星发生了建星以来的第一起抢劫案，自从两个琥珀纪前这颗星球被公司开辟为贸易中转站至今，来自各外星球的人民和谐共处，恶性犯罪率始终为零。当警察包围了案发地，一所小小的便利店时，劫匪大摇大摆的走了出来。这台短路的收银机器人声称自己是外星人的先遣队，外星人即将占领这里，马上乖乖交出所有信用点。警察一梭子解决了问题——「外星人有什么了不起？我们都是外星人。」
E: The first robbery in the history of Alphany since its founding had occurred. Its diverse populace from different planets had co-existed peacefully since it was developed by the IPC as a trade transit hub two Amber Eras ago, maintaining a zero-per cent violent crime rate. When police surrounded the crime scene, a small convenience store, the robber strutted out. This malfunctioning cashier robot claimed to be the vanguard of an alien invasion and demanded all credits. The police resolved the situation with a single volley of bullets, remarking, "What's so great about aliens? We're all aliens here."

C: 天彗合金
E: Celesticomet Alloy

C: 虚构机兵
E: Illusory Automaton

C: 每次进入区域时，获得<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>个随机奇物，有可能是负面奇物，并失去<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>个随机奇物。若通过该方式将自身丢弃，失去所有奇物。获得该奇物时，若同时携带全部鲁珀特帝国机械系列奇物，将引发反有机方程的局域共鸣
E: Obtain <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> random Curio(s) (with a possibility of gaining negative Curios) and discard <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> random Curio(s) each time you enter a domain. If you discard this Curio in this way, lose all Curios. Obtaining the Curio when simultaneously carrying all Rubert Empire-series Curios will trigger the Anti-Organic Equation's Regional Resonance

C: 每进入下一区域，获得等同于当前持有的宇宙碎片<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>的宇宙碎片。进入【财富】区域时，将宝箱替换为更好的宝箱
E: Every time you enter the next Domain, gain Cosmic Fragments equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the Cosmic Fragments currently in possession. When entering Domain — Wealth, replaces the chest with a better one

E: When entering battle, increase all characters' Eidolon Resonance level by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>

C: 获得该奇物时，立即获得<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>个不同命途的随机<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>星祝福各<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>个
E: When obtaining this Curio, immediately gain <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> Blessing(s) of <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>-star rarity from <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> different Path(s)

C: 第三位面首领将为【奇想林中的蕉研组（完整）】，在第三位面【首领】区域进入战斗时，我方全体造成的伤害提高<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>
E: The Third Plane's boss is "Wonder Forest's Banacademic Office Staff (Complete)." When entering battle in the Third Plane's Boss Domain, DMG dealt by all allies increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>

C: 进入区域时，获得<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>宇宙碎片，当宇宙碎片减少次数累计达到<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>次时，该奇物损毁
E: When entering a domain, gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Cosmic Fragments. This Curio is destroyed when you lose Cosmic Fragments <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> times

C: 获得该奇物时，失去所有宇宙碎片，然后随机获得失去值<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>-<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>的宇宙碎片
E: Upon obtaining this Curio, loses all Cosmic Fragments, then randomly gains Cosmic Fragments equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> – <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of the amount lost

C: 大幅提高在【事件】区域出现2个事件的概率，但【奖励】区域只会出现<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>个奖励事件
E: Greatly increases the chances of 2 Occurrences appearing in Occurrence Domains, but only <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Reward Occurrence(s) will appear in Reward Domains

C: 你可以与【商店】区域的黑塔进行战斗。胜利后随机获得<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>个奇物商店中的商品，然后失去该奇物，且奇物商店从当前【商店】区域消失
E: You can battle Herta in Store Domains. Upon victory, you will randomly obtain <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> item(s) from the Curio Store and lose this Curio. The Curio Store will then disappear from the current Store Domain

C: 战斗胜利后选择祝福时，增加<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次可免费重置祝福的次数
E: When choosing your Blessings after winning a battle, increase the number of free Blessing resets by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>.

C: 战斗胜利后，我方全体回复等同于各自生命上限<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>的生命值
E: After winning a battle, all allies restore HP equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of their respective Max HP

C: 进入战斗时获得<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>个战技点，战技点不小于<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>个时，角色造成的战技伤害提高<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>，战技点小于<unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>个时，角色造成的普攻伤害提高<unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak>
E: Obtains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s) when entering battle. When Skill Points are not fewer than <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>, characters' Skill DMG dealt increases by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>, and when Skill Points are fewer than <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>, characters' Basic ATK DMG dealt increases by <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak>

C: 角色造成的秘技伤害提高<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>，且秘技伤害的伤害值提高，提高数值等同于角色生命上限的<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>
E: Increases DMG dealt by characters' Techniques by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. Technique DMG further increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of the Technique's respective character's Max HP

C: 奇物损毁时，使其恢复如新。效果触发<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次后，该奇物损毁
E: When a Curio is destroyed, it is immediately repaired. After the effect is triggered <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s), this Curio is destroyed

C: 第一、二位面开始时，额外生成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>个随机信标。
E: At the start of the First and Second Plane, additionally generate <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> random beacon(s).

C: 选择1个【<u>战斗</u>】或【<u>精英</u>】区域，将其与自身所在区域的随机相邻区域互换位置
E: Select 1 <u>Combat</u> or <u>Elite</u> Domain and switch it with a random domain adjacent to the current domain

C: 本次移动后，立即为自身所在区域的<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>个随机相邻区域附加【<u>知识</u>】效果
E: After the current movement, immediately applies <u>Knowledge</u> to <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> random domain(s) adjacent to the domain where characters are located

C: 初始倒计时减少<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点，重投次数减少<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>次，宇宙碎片减少<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>。
E: Initial Countdown decreases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>. The number of Dice reroll attempts decreases by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>. Cosmic Fragments decrease by <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>.

C:
你喜欢在高空飞行的感觉，卫天的双翼在风中拍击，敌人的枪炮曾笔直地穿过那里，它们很快痊愈，带着祂的印记。背生翅羽的使者择巨木而栖，将凡土的弱者迁往云中的国度，为饱受折磨的人间带去丰饶的神迹。

你从「枝梢」俯冲而下，耳畔满是炸开的空气与尘民的惨叫，那些低劣的生物应当叩首，而非愚蠢地反击。抓起一只猎物，将他拖入层云，满是恐惧的挣扎令你兴奋不已。他理应感谢你，将他掳为仆役，更有尖叫向地面远去，直到零落成泥。

你是天上的云君，主宰地上的生命。
E:
You enjoy flying in the sky, with your great wings flapping in the wind. Bullets from enemies once pierced through your wings, but they quickly recovered with the THEIR mark. The winged messenger seeks shelter in enormous trees, sending the mortal weak ones to the cloud kingdom and bringing miracles of Abundance to the suffering human world.

When you swoop down from the "branches," you are surrounded by a furor of air exploding, filled with the Residents of Dirt's scream. Those humble creatures should bow to you instead of putting up foolish resistance. You seize your prey and drag him into the clouds, relishing in the thrill as he wiggles in fear. He should thank you for enslaving him. The screams wane over the distance until he is reduced to paste.

You are the Cloudlords that dictate the fate of mortal beings on the ground.

C: 增殖…增殖，增殖，你蠕动向前方的热源，它在拼命挣扎，蓝色的火焰冲破你的身体，拖拽着你在太空中航行。你将它的外壁啃食，黏稠的身体从裂痕中渗透进去，庞大的体积从内部将食物撑破。你开始向着更小的目标前进，攀附上它们的凸起，直到整个覆盖住，再拉进体内消化。\n\n有什么在刺激你的表皮，你在那个方位生长出眼睛，将它们锁定，模仿着长出相同的东西，回应热源的攻击。你探出三分之一的身体，将它们抓住，与金属相互连接在一起。充足的养料令你的细胞颤抖，分裂出更多的子嗣。
E: Multiply, multiply, and multiply... You wriggle toward the heat source ahead. It is struggling with all its might. The blue flame penetrates your body, dragging you along through space. You gnaw away its outer shell, allowing your viscous body to seep in through the opening cracks. Your massive body bursts the food to the point of rupture from within. You start aiming for smaller targets, clambering onto their protrusions until you envelop their whole bodies, then pulling them in for digestion.\n\nSomething is tingling your skin. You grow eyes on that spot, locking them in place, and mimicking their body structures in response to the heat source's assault. You extend one-third of your body and capture them, linking them together with metal. The abundance of nutrients causes your cells to quiver and divide, producing more offsprings.

C:
我来讲个笑话吧，一位可笑的愚者，拆分命运的喀斯特尼。
明眸的受赐福者，将自我的命运编织成条条绳索，
指引方向的线团，在纷争的迷宫中滚动，
一端指向生存的微光，一端紧系黑潮中的迷途人。
丝线断裂后重续，正如置之死地而后生，
可塔兰顿早已将生死放上天平称量，
如女皇的律令，不可篡改。
每条丝线的断裂，都会带走一条道路和选择，
指引道路的盲目，编织绳索的迷途，直至只剩死亡和迷失的选择。
我不知道这样是否有意义，但，朋友，你是第一百零一个。
E:
Let me share a joke with you. It's Castini, the hilarious fool who dissects fate itself.
This blessed one with bright eyes weaves one's destiny into myriad threads,
The thread ball that points out directions rolls through the labyrinth of Strife.
One end leads to the faint light of survival, while the other is tightly tied to the lost soul in the black tide.
When threads snap, they're rewoven, akin to a phoenix rising from the depths of despair.
However, Talanton has already balanced life and death on a scale
As unyielding as the Empress's law.
With each thread's severing, a path and its choices disappear,
Blinding the guide and entangling the weaver, until the only options left are death and loss.
I'm not certain if this journey holds any true purpose, but, my friend, you stand as the <unbreak>101</unbreak>st soul.

C:
我在石板上记述那群可耻的恶徒，这样你便知晓，
帕斯图姆城为何在一夜之间崩塌。
灾厄的使者在地上卜算贼星，他们说末日就要逼近，
何不做尽毕生所不敢为？狂欢享乐！放纵游戏！
有仇怨的，就此捅穿他们的胸膛；
没烦恼的，向街道撒下毕生积蓄。
赌徒赌上身家性命，盗贼大步踹开房门，抢夺金币。
红月从未升起，可诚实者口吐谎言，德高望重的掐死友亲，
昨日笑脸待人的孩童，转眼成为扎格列斯的使役。
你问我为何还活着？在这里，幸存只有唯一的原因。
E:
I inscribed those despicable villains onto the stone tablet, so that you may know
Why Paestum fell overnight.
The messengers of calamity divined of the Thief Star upon the ground, declaring that the end is nigh.
Why not live it up, embracing every forbidden delight? Revel in hedonism and plunge into games without reserve!
If you have a grudge, pierce your enemy's chests right now.
If you have no worries, then scatter your life's savings across the streets.
Gamblers wager their souls, and thieves break down doors with bold strides and snatch gold coins with glee.
The crimson moon never rises, yet the honest speak lies, the revered choke the life out of their loved ones
The children who smiled warmly at others yesterday transform into minions of Zagreus overnight.
You ask why I'm still alive? There's only one means to survive.

C:
孩子，你吟诵的长诗里，可有这位英雄？这座墓碑的主人。
卡提忒斯，在众英雄踏上逐火之旅前，就闻名遐迩的战士。
捍卫黄金谷的石巨人，熔岩锻造的身体，
承载着吉奥里亚罕有的愤怒。
盘旋在泼利斯上空的银色巨鹰，尖啸震颤心脏，
连艾格勒也无暇讨伐的怪物。
她把流水引向山谷，冷却的巨人身形崩裂，
她站在风车顶端挑衅，风轮绞杀俯冲的巨鹰。
如今，人们只记得她在同哀地里亚的战争中陨落，
却遗忘了，百年前的英雄，也曾在狩猎海兽时高喊她的名字。
E:
Child, do the long ballads you sing speak of this heroine? The one beneath this gravestone?
Her name is Cartites, a warrior of renown long before the heroes in the Flame-Chase Journey.
There was the stone giant who once guarded the golden valley, forged of molten rock,
Embodying the rare fury of Georios.
There was the silver giant eagle that circled over Polis, its piercing cries shaking mortal hearts.
She stood tall to fight these fearsome monsters even Aquila dared not challenge.
She rerouted the rivers toward the valley, witnessed the giant's form cracked and crumbled as it cooled off in the rushing currents.
She stood atop the windmill, used wind blades to tear the diving eagle apart.
But now, all people remember was her fall in the war against Aidonia.
Regrettably, they've forgotten that her name was once roared across the sea in the hunt for beasts a hundred years ago.

C:
奥德里西安城内游荡着黯红的火焰，
无人知晓这些火灵从何而来。
起初，众人只当是扎格列斯新的把戏，
就当疑惑之际，黑潮滚滚来袭。
奥莱诺斯、伊卡利亚、汉达克……
火灵出现之处，皆伴随厄运。
有人猜测这火是塞纳托斯在呼吸，
也有人坚信它们是艾格勒的片羽，
但唯一确定的事，人人避之不及。
城门，浴场，市集，哪里都有它们的踪迹，
惶恐，惊叫，奔逃，毁灭的倒计时已经开启。
神悟树庭的学者正欲一探究竟，
火灵却彻底消失的无踪无影，
只留下了一个未解的谜。
E:
Odressian is shrouded in crimson flames —
No one knows the origin of these fiery spirits.
At first, many dismiss them as just another of Zagreus' tricks.
But amidst their confusion, a relentless black tide sweeps in.
Oleinus, Icaria, Handak...
Wherever these fiery spirits emerge, doom follows.
Some say the flames are Thanatos' breath, while others believe they are feathers of Aquila.
Yet, the only thing for sure is that everyone flees from them in terror.
From city gates to baths, markets, and beyond, they leave their ominous mark everywhere,
Causing panic, screams, and chaos.
The clock is ticking towards devastation.
Scholars at the Grove of Epiphany are determined to unravel the mystery,
But those fiery spirits vanish into thin air,
leaving a puzzle unsolved.

C:
这是刻录在石板上的毁灭瞬息，晨昏之眼艾格勒的神迹。
在古老的时代，睿智的王曾建造渡天的航船。
自大的政客向世人许诺，他们将撼动泰坦的权威，
滑稽的弄臣为僭主歌颂，永世的君王会凌驾高天。
比奥赫玛还要高，遁入层层云翳。
比天空祭司的城邦还要高，直到超越天空，凌驾烈阳。
人们歌唱僭主的伟大，搬运木头，编织蒙皮。
人们铸造喧闹的机械，牵引支撑飞翔的钢铁。
多么伟大！承载起整个国家的傲慢与狂妄，向神明的方向启航。
多么可笑！血肉与钢铁在雷霆中覆灭，只在眨眼之间。
E:
This is a moment of destruction inscribed on a stone tablet. This is the miracle of Aquila, the Eye of Twilight.
In ancient times, a wise king once built a vessel to traverse the sky.
Arrogant politicians promised the people that they would challenge the authority of the Titans.
Ridiculous jesters eulogized the tyrant, declaring that the eternal sovereign would reign over the sky.
They vowed to surpass Okhema, ascend through layers of clouds,
Tread the city of the sky priests underfoot, and even break the sky to rise above the blazing sun.
People sang of the tyrant's greatness, as they hauled wood, wove hides,
And forged roaring machinery to draw and support the flying steel behemoth.
How magnificent! Bearing the pride and arrogance of an entire nation, it sailed in the direction of the realm of the gods.
How laughable! Flesh and steel were obliterated in the thunder, in the blink of an eye.

C: 谜语人间流传着一种说法：宇宙中每有一处神秘现象发生，便会在虚空中留下一处「楼梯」，那些消融的现实会沿着阶梯淌下，汇聚成形如水母的斑驳之物。曾有一位无名客声称自己与「楼梯上的水母」有过接触，他疯狂地表示水母会开启大脑灰质的认知区域——那是一片凡人无法想象的广袤天地。
E: The Riddlers have a saying: Every time that an enigma manifests in the universe, it will leave behind a "staircase" in the void. The dissolved realities will then drip down the steps, condensing into a mottled thing bearing semblance to a jellyfish. There was once a Nameless who claimed to have made contact with a "Jellyfish on the Staircase." In madness, he proclaimed that the jellyfish will activate the cognition regions within the gray matter of one's brain — a vast place beyond the fathoming of mortal minds.
