C: 虽说有着浓墨重彩传奇故事的骑士都是十八般武艺样样精通，但少女最著名的武器无疑是 {RUBY_B#必胜黄金之剑}「石中之剑」{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#誓约胜利之剑}「湖中之剑」{RUBY_E#}。前者是少女成为王的契机，后者则代表着王威名的顶峰。 「没错，你如今见到的是湖中之剑。石中之剑在很久以前就被我用坏了。准确地说，有一次，它在挥剑的时候承受不住我的魔力，直接碎成了粉末……」 「可能是打造它的魔术师也没料到我的成长会如此迅速？结果就是，他必须自己负起责任，向湖中仙女讨要新的兵器——也就是我现在手里的这把。」 传说中，只要以充沛的魔力挥出誓约胜利之剑，持剑者就必定能摧毁敌人——这也是它名字的由来。然而，就像所有在最初就埋下矛盾的传奇故事一样，这把剑最强的力量并不属于剑刃，却属于保护剑刃的剑鞘。 「只有能守护一切之物才能承托住毁天灭地的力量。 「再锐利的刀锋，再飞速的箭矢，也只有在消灭或者吓退敌人的那一刻才真的保护了同伴。 「也就是说，如果一种兵器会导致同伴和敌人一起消亡，那它就什么也保护不了。当然，作为民众的兵器，王也一样。」 什么是理想的王？ 什么是强大的王？ 有王打败过全世界的敌手，有王囊括过全世界的财富，有王征服过全世界的土地…但到头来，他们守护的国家，也都如镜花水月，弥散在历史与传说的长河之中。 「有很长一段时间，我都生活在丢失了剑鞘的阴影里。 「但后来我想明白了一件事… 「如果我找不到能代替剑鞘的事物，命运也就不会把剑鞘再还给我。」 「这不是什么玄妙的道理。」少女莞尔一笑，「它的意思是…从者和御主，要学会平等相待、互相帮助。」
E: Though every knight of legend is said to master countless martial arts, the girl's most renowned weapons remain to be {RUBY_B#Caliburn}Sword in the Stone{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Excalibur}Sword of the Lake{RUBY_E#}. The first marks the beginning of her kingship. The second represents the peak of her sovereign power. "That's right, what you see now is the Sword of the Lake. The Sword in the Stone? I broke it a long time ago. One time, it couldn't handle the magical energy I poured into a swing and crumbled to dust..." "Maybe the mage who forged it never imagined I'd grow so fast. In the end, he had to take responsibility and plead with the Lady of the Lake for a replacement. That's the sword I hold now." Legend has it that when wielded with enough magical energy, the Excalibur can obliterate any foe — hence its name. But like many legends woven with contradiction, its true power lies not in the blade, but in the scabbard that shields it. "Only something that can protect all is worthy of wielding the power to destroy all. "No matter how sharp the blade, how swift the arrow — they only protect the companions when they strike down or drive off the threat. "In short, if a weapon causes both ally and enemy to perish, it protects nothing. And a king, who is also a weapon of the people, is no exception." What makes an ideal king? What makes a mighty king? Some have defeated every foe beneath the heavens. Some have amassed all the wealth in the world. Some have conquered all lands... And yet, in the end, the nations they vowed to protect dissolved like reflections on rippling water, lost to the currents of time and legend. "For a long time, I lived in the shadow of losing my scabbard. "But later, I came to realize something... "If I can't find something that can take its place, then fate will never return it to me." "It's not some grand revelation," the girl says with a quiet smile. "It simply means... Servant and Master must learn to treat each other as equals and support one another."

C: 巨大的棺椁像是暴风中飘摇的孤舟，在识海动荡中摇摇欲坠。她任由人们的愤怒、渴望、仇恨、恐惧和疲惫冲刷过自己的身躯，就像无色的浪涛将她从一处湍流抛向另一个浪尖。 如同溺水的死者，她终于放弃了渺小的自我，溶化在这片混沌海洋里—— 在某个瞬间，她曾是地衡司一位终日奔走的执事，在堆积如山的琐务杂事中努力向上攀爬。最终，头颅深处一声琴弦绷断的锐响后，她如同幽魂般游走在街头…… 下一刻，她强忍巨大的哀伤将生有天缺的孩子沉入注满星槎培养液的荚舱内，尽管此前她和丈夫为这个孩子的降临期待了许久…… 她曾是一名云骑，被反足狼爪狠狠践踏在地。锋利森冷的爪尖牵扯起脸部的皮肉，撕开一道扭曲的「笑容」。在之后的岁月里，她每次微笑都会疼痛不已…… 她卜到自己命数将尽，她难以置信地检修穷观阵的算端，想将自己接入阵法中枢动用其全部力量，而穷观阵的力量毫不留情地撕裂了她的心智…… 她将自己精心设计的机巧砸得粉碎，与之一同破碎的还有百般刁难她的监造师傅。她明白自己已无望成为工匠，可是不做工匠她又能做什么呢…… 她成了他们每个人，她成了他们全部。但一段画面如同一滴墨汁，落进她眼底晕染开来： 她身处蓝天下，周遭麦浪起伏，昂扬生长。一双灵巧的手将一枚花环戴在了她的头上。她任由枝叶和花香环抱住她，就像那双温暖的手环抱了她…… 那份熟悉的温暖，让她从足以溺死一切的信息中醒了过来。 她意识到自己并非他们，既非他们中的每一个，也不是他们全部。那一瞬间，她坍缩成了意识海洋中微不足道的一滴水，她想起了自己所唤何名，所司何事—— 她是十王司中的一名判官，代号「寒鸦」的判官。 觉察到她醒来，棺材一侧侍立的金人执笔疾书，动作快到肉眼难辨。 业判的结果已有分晓，梦中出现的名字被书写在一块玉兆令牌中送出。在洞天日落夜深的时刻，又将有许多人告别尘世。他们不会知晓，在仙舟最深处的角落里有人决定了他们的命终之刻。而数个时辰后那人将不再记得他们。
E: The colossal coffin, resembling a desolate vessel adrift in a tempest, sways amidst the tumultuous currents of the ocean of consciousness. Waves of anger, longing, hatred, fear, and exhaustion crash upon her like colorless surges, propelling her from one turbulent realm to another. Like a drowned soul, she finally lets go of her individuality and dissolves into the boundless ocean of chaos... There was a time when she held the role of an officer in the Realm-Keeping Commission, constantly dealing with mountains of mundane duties, yearning for a promotion. Eventually, after a sharp snap that echoed deep within her mind, she started wandering the streets like a mindless corpse... In the next moment, burdened with immeasurable grief, she submerged her baby with birth defects in a vessel brimming with starskiff culture medium, despite her and her husband's eager anticipation for their newborn baby... Once a Cloud Knight, she was ruthlessly struck down by a wolf's twisted paw, her face maimed by its sharp claws, carving a twisted "smile." Whenever she smiled, the wound induced excruciating pain in the years that followed... Her divination revealed that her life teetered on the verge of oblivion. In despair, she overhauled the Matrix of Prescience's calculation terminal, attempting to access its core to utilize its full power. However, the Matrix's power ravaged her mind mercilessly... She smashed her meticulously crafted contraption, as well as the foreman who had intentionally made things difficult for her. At that moment, she realized she would never achieve her dream of becoming a craftsman, but what else could she do...? She became every one of them, all of them. Yet, at that moment, like an ink droplet descending upon her vision, an image swirled and dissipated. Beneath azure skies, undulating waves of wheat surged and seethed around her. A nimble pair of hands gently crowned her head with a wreath. She allowed the foliage, leaves, and fragrant blooms to encircle her, just as the tender hands had embraced her... That familiar warmth jolts her from the deluge poised to consume everything. She realizes that she is not any of them, nor the sum of their forms. In that fleeting instant, she dwindles into a minuscule droplet within the ocean of consciousness. She recalls her name and her duty... She is a judge of the Ten-Lords Commission, bearing the code name, "Hanya." Observing her awakening, the aurumaton stationed beside the coffin commenced a rapid flurry of writing, its movements too swift for the naked eye to discern. The verdict of her judgment has been revealed, and the names that materialized within her dreams are transcribed onto a jade abacus token. As twilight melds into night within the delve, countless souls will bid their final farewell to the mortal realm, unaware that the precise moment of their demise had been recorded by someone within the innermost recesses of the Xianzhou ship. And within a few hours, the woman will no longer retain any recollection of them.

C: 如往日千万次所经历的那样，他于火光中再次看见—— 哀丽秘榭的清晨，朝阳的光辉照耀在村庄的麦田。 「好像…做过无数次这样的梦……」 在树下醒来的男孩揉着惺忪的睡眼。 梦中，太阳坠落，英雄的造像崩塌，融化，碎裂，将世界烧成一片灰烬。 在一片死寂中，那形如焦炭的熟悉身影踽踽独行，朝着漫无止尽的黑暗走去。 「那个身影燃烧自己…但也燃尽周围所有的一切……」 男孩怔怔地看着那尚未完成的木雕，梦中那刺骨的愤怒与对自我的憎恨仍在震动着他的心。 「这样的世界…正在呼唤着英雄的到来吧……」 「未来会是什么样的？」 枕在那金黄的麦草上，男孩眼前浮现出跌宕起伏的史诗故事。 「也许，即将到来的英雄漫游四方，行侠仗义，解决过无数棘手的难题，却从不留名…… 「身负神秘的过去，对抗荒谬的命运，战胜可怕的敌人。 「当世界陷入危难，便会以至诚的心践行誓言，所到之处，总是带来和平与繁盛…… 「哪怕百次，万次，千万次…英雄可以被毁灭，但绝不会被打败……」 …… 如果一切未曾改变。 哀丽秘榭的日子仍旧静静流淌，如过去千万次那样。 那朵微弱的火苗，启程之初便已种进他的心里。 当男孩成为少年，再一次站在渡口，再一次向着远方启行。 他会马上奔向未来，忘记那些支离破碎的梦。 他不会知晓这趟旅程有多遥远，直到成为熊熊燃烧的薪柴，去壮大那徒劳的火焰。 到达终点时，他才会得知自己已行过漫长的路。 最后一次，他回想起那个朝阳初升的时刻，自己曾刻下理想的雏形，在往后的岁月里，他将为它取另外一个名字——「救世主」。 而他自己的名，就此在记忆中零落。
E: As he had countless times before, he once again saw it through the blaze — Morning light pouring over the wheat fields of Aedes Elysiae, bathing the village in a golden glow. "Feels like... I've had this dream a thousand times before..." The boy rubbed his sleepy eyes as he woke beneath the tree. In the dream, the sun fell from the sky, the statue of a hero crumbling, melting, shattering, consuming the world in flames. In the dead silence, a familiar figure, charred and broken, trudged alone into the endless darkness. "That figure burned itself away... and everything else around it too..." The boy stared blankly at the unfinished wooden carving. The searing anger and deep self-loathing from the dream still echoed through his heart. "Maybe that broken world... is calling out for a hero..." "What will the future look like?" Lying back on the soft, golden straw, the boy pictured an epic tale unfolding before his eyes. "Maybe the hero will roam the world, righting wrongs, solving impossible problems, yet leaving no name behind... "Carrying a mysterious past, defying a cruel fate, and vanquishing fearsome enemies. "When the world teeters on the brink, they'll honor their vow with a heart pure and true — wherever they go, peace and prosperity will follow... "Even if they fall a hundred times, a thousand times, a million times... A hero can be destroyed, but never defeated..." ... If nothing had changed... The days at Aedes Elysiae would have continued to drift by quietly, just as they always had. That tiny ember had already been planted deep in his heart at the start of his journey. When the boy grew into a young man, when he once again stood at the ferry, setting out toward distant lands... He would rush toward the future, forgetting the broken dreams he left behind. He wouldn't realize how long and arduous the road ahead would be — not until he had used himself as the kindling to feed a futile flame. Only when he reached the end would he learn how far he had come. One last time, he would remember that morning when the sun first rose and who he was when he carved the first shape of his ideals. In the years to come, he would give that person a new name: "Deliverer." And so, his name faded into the scattered fragments of memory.

C: 在入侵现场优雅踱步的女人如同一道谜题，她嘲弄着受害者的同时又残酷地将加害者消灭殆尽。\n通讯里神秘的协助者透露出两人似乎怀抱着某种目的。\n她们的入局是混乱升级的预兆抑或是一段故事的开始？
E: The woman sauntering elegantly across the invasion site is a mystery. She mocks the victims, while also ruthlessly eliminating their oppressors.\n Over their comms, the mysterious helper revealed that the two seem to have some sort of agenda.\nIs their presence a sign of more chaos to come? Or is it the start of a new story?

C: 你睁开眼，发现自己仍在空间站，还好这次不需要再面对什么陌生的天花板。\n刚刚的经历仍在你的脑中盘旋，如果这一切是真的，你希望姬子就在附近。\n你的心中，还有一堆疑问需要她的解答。
E: You open your eyes and find yourself still in the space station, staring at a ceiling that doesn't look so strange.\nYou are living through what just happened. It seems your mind is not playing tricks on you. You wish Himeko was here.\nYou have so many questions to ask.

C: 矿区风波暂告一段落。「地火」首领奥列格为报答各位无名客的支援，他同意与你们合作，并为你们安排了合适的住处。\n不过，上一次在大人物安排下入住旅店、随后被人反手捅一刀仿佛就发生在昨天。\n不知道现在返回列车，向帕姆索要绊线地雷还来得来不及…
E: Peace has at long last returned to the mines. Oleg, chief of Wildfire, has agreed to work with you to show his gratitude towards you, the Nameless, for your support. He has arranged your accommodation.\nSpeaking of accommodation, the last time you got invited to stay by someone important and then got backstabbed does not seem too long ago.\nMaybe it's not too late to go back to Pom-Pom and ask for some tripwire mines...

C: 这一晚虽没有军靴踢踏扰人清梦，可你却被梦中诡谲异常的低语惊醒。\n一连几天里，你的噩梦内容都是如此。这不寻常的巧合使你辗转难眠。\n硬逼着自己睡着只会使你更加焦虑…横竖都睡不着，不如出门散散心吧。
E: Although this night was not disturbed by the sound of the footsteps of the troops, you were abruptly awakened by the eerie whispers in your dream.\nYou've had the same nightmare for several days in a row. This odd coincidence has made it hard for you to fall asleep.\nYou've tried sleeping in all postures, and forcing yourself to sleep will only cause more frustration... Why don't you go outside and take a walk?

C: 深锁的大门已经全部打开，此为扭转世界命运的必由之途。\n史瓦罗正在此处守护着这个世界的全部真相…\n直面他吧。
E: The locked gates are now all opened. This is a path that must be traveled in order to change the destiny of the world.\nSvarog is here guarding the truth of this world...\nGo and face him.

C: 你拍下了永冬铭碑，画面里还捕捉到了佩拉和虎克。\n三月七似乎对你的拍照技巧很满意…去问问出现在你镜头里的两个人有何感想吧！
E: You photographed the Everwinter Monument and included Pela and Hook.\nMarch 7th seems to be happy with your photography skills... Go ask what the two people in your photo think.

C: 司辰宫中，满心以为会获得支持的你们却遭到了驭空的回绝。\n所幸云骑军将军景元现身定策。但他并未将搜索星核的重任交给你们，而是让你们找到行踪无定的卡芙卡。\n出得司辰宫，你们暂得片刻休憩，而后，你们将开始猎手与猎物间的追逐。
E: In the Palace of Astrum, the hopeful Trailblazers are rejected by Yukong.\nFortunately, General Jing Yuan of Luofu's Cloud Knights appears and intervenes. However, he does not entrust you with the task of searching for the Stellaron, instead instructing you to locate Kafka's unpredictable whereabouts.\nAfter leaving the Palace of Astrum, you have a short rest before commencing with your game of cat and mouse.

C: 丹鼎司深处，古老的丹炉被重新启动，吐纳烟云。此处曾因这些丹炉而得名「云霞紫府」。但如今这些炉鼎释放的烟气已由药王秘传施加毒物，能令长生种更迅速地堕入魔阴身状态。\n但作为被星核猎手诱来此处的短生种，你们却无巧不巧地成了符玄所需要的帮手。
E: Deep in the bowels of the Alchemy Commission, the ancient elixir crucibles have been reactivated, and smoke bellows from them. This area was once named Evemist Mansion due to the mist generated by the elixir crucibles. Now these mists have been poisoned by the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, and can quickly induce mara in long-life species.\nHowever, as short-life individuals led here by the Stellaron Hunters, you happen to be the indispensable help that Fu Xuan desperately needs.

C: 返回现实果然没有你想象中的那么简单——你和流萤甫一抵达黄金的时刻，就遭到了桑博的袭击。在你失去意识之前，你看到桑博似乎幻化成一女人的身形…如果不是他惯于女装，那袭击你们的一定另有其人。\n你们来到了一间氛围谈不上正常的房间，一只明晃晃的宝箱似乎正在等你上门…你要打开它吗？
E: As expected, returning to reality isn't as simple as you expected — Firefly and you are attacked by Sampo as soon as you arrive at the Golden Hour. Before you lose consciousness, you see Sampo shift into what appears to be the figure of a woman... Either he's a habitual crossdresser, or your assailant is actually someone else.\nYou arrive in a room with a strange atmosphere. An unguarded treasure box lies in front of you, waiting for you to open it... Will you open it?

C: 万事俱矣，是时候直面那位橡木家主了。祝你好运。
E: Now, you're all set to meet the head of Oak Family. Good luck.

C: 你的█ ██ ██ █注意力彻底被那█ ███ █埃维金男孩夺去了。他到底是██ █ ██ █ 什么来头？还有时间，或许你可以追上█ ███ ██，问问他究竟是什么██ ███ ██ ██。
E: You are c█m█lete██ ██tranc█d by t█e █vgin boy.██ust who ███he? There█s sti█l tim███Mayb█ you ███ catch up ██ h██ and as█ █im exactly wha█ █████████.

C: 流萤向你解释了此前她种种不寻常举动背后的深层原因，并指引你下潜至家族宣扬的「噩梦」——美梦之外的原初忆域——「流梦礁」。而这一举动也揭露了「死亡」的部分真相：不过是协助有心之人往返美梦的驯化迷因，而「闭上眼睛」则是唤来它的奇妙咒语。\n短暂的不适后，你发现自己已经抵达了一座荒废的旧镇。与众人交流过、准备停当后，就开始此次废弃车站下车之旅吧。
E: Firefly explains to you the deeper reasons behind her various inexplicable behaviors, and guides you to dive deeper into a place declared as a "nightmare" by The Family... The primitive Memory Zone outside the sweet dream: "Dreamflux Reef." This move also exposes some of the truths behind "Death" — It is nothing but a tamed memetic entity that assists specific people who wish to travel between dreams. "Closing your eyes" is merely a strange invocation used to summon them.\nAfter a brief moment of discomfort, you realize that you have arrived at an abandoned old town. Once you have spoken with everyone and prepared yourself, alight and begin your adventure at this abandoned station.

C: 当你们找到姬子时，她正在与一位名为米凯的当地人交谈。好巧不巧，这位自称「守墓人」的温和男性竟还是这片流梦之地的负责人之一。\n你们的出现似乎并不令他感到意外。他表示可以带领各位深入了解流梦礁，但在此之前需要与某位「重要的客人」同行——如无意外，这位「客人」多半就是知更鸟小姐了。
E: When you find Himeko, she is speaking with a local named Micah. Coincidentally, this mild-mannered man who calls themselves the "Gravekeeper" is actually one of the people responsible for this land of Dreamflux.\nYour appearance in this land doesn't seem to surprise him in the slightest. He says that he would be able to take you to get a deeper understanding of Dreamflux Reef, but you must travel alongside a certain "special guest"... If you are not mistaken, this "guest" is quite likely Miss Robin.

C: 忍者！忍者！又是忍者…也罢，没必要惊讶。仔细想想，你遇到过能编辑现实的骇客、能华丽变身的公司高管、满嘴宝贝的机械牛仔，一个忍者算什么？\n但是忍者和猴子混在一起，就像番茄酱和羊肉串混在一起，多了一丝奇妙的质感。
E: Ninja! Ninja! It's a ninja again... but really, there's no need to be surprised. You've already bumped into a reality-editing hacker, an IPC executive who has a magnificent shapeshift, and a robotic cowboy spouting "fudgin' ash-vole" all day. So, why not throw a ninja into the mix?\nHowever, this quirky ninja-monkey fusion seems like mixing ketchup with lamb kebabs, infused with a whimsical touch of flavor.

C: 你费了好大工夫，才让被家族管控的迷因把你送到了这个鸟不拉屎的地方。这里没看到什么目标的线索，天气差得要命，但麦芽果汁还凑合。\n外面的人吵个不停，可能是欠爱了。
E: You spent a great amount of effort to get the meme controlled by The Family to send you to this dump. Not much here looks helpful, and the weather's been a nightmare, but hey, the malt juice ain't half bad.\nThose sons of a nice lady causing a ruckus outside need some serious chill pills.

C: 这是什么地方？这具身体…又是谁？应该万分不安地向前走，又或回头寻找来处？
E: What is this place? ...Whose body is this? Should you power on ahead in uncertainty, or turn back to find out where you came from?

C: 列车车厢受袭迫降，好在我们并无大碍。初步判断，这个世界有文明存在。我们决定提高警惕，探索这片完全未知的土地。
E: The coach was forced to make an emergency landing, but thankfully, we were both unharmed. Our initial assessment suggests that this world contains civilization. We resolve to remain vigilant as we explore this unfamiliar land.

C: 列车车厢受袭迫降，好在我们并无大碍。初步判断，这个世界有文明存在。我们决定提高警惕，探索这片完全未知的土地。
E: The coach was forced to make an emergency landing, but thankfully, we were both unharmed. Our initial assessment suggests that this world contains civilization. We resolve to remain vigilant as we explore this unfamiliar land.

C: 阿格莱雅对奥赫玛的掌控程度远超我们想象，此前的风波已然传到她的耳中。这位黄金裔的领袖展现出她铁血冷酷的一面，以极端手段再度确认我们的来意。历经如此险境，我们需要重新思索翁法罗斯之旅的可行性。
E: Aglaea's control over Okhema runs far deeper than we anticipated, and the previous incident has already reached her ears. This leader of the Chrysos Heirs revealed a cold and unyielding side, going to great lengths to reassess our intentions. After such perilous moments, we must reconsider the viability of our expedition in Amphoreus.

C: 为尽可能安全地推行计划，遐蝶与{NICKNAME}决定融入祭典，与一名沉默的斗士组成三人小组，向悬锋城深处进发。
E: To execute their plan as safely as possible, Castorice and {NICKNAME} decided to blend into the festival celebration, forming a trio with a silent warrior and venturing deeper into Castrum Kremnos.

C: 尼卡多利一战，以黄金裔的胜利作结。我们返回奥赫玛，经过休整，将一同见证泰坦火种的归还与火种试炼的开启。
E: The battle with Nikador ends with the Chrysos Heirs' victory. We return to Okhema to rest and recover. Together, we will witness the return of the Titan's Coreflame and the start of the Coreflame's trial.

C: 重回故乡，缇宁不禁睹物生情，也回想起许多本已忘却的人、事、物。
E: As Trinnon returned to her homeland, familiar sights stirred forgotten memories within her — of people, moments, and treasures she thought time had washed away.

C: 与风堇一同前往友爱之馆，获取能够补充智库的资料，补充对翁法罗斯的认识。\n找找与阿那克萨戈拉斯有关的资料。
E: Head to the Library of Philia with Hyacine to collect materials for the data bank and expand our understanding of Amphoreus.\nLook for documents related to Anaxagoras.

C: 你已经寻找了塞纳托斯太久。如今越是接近它，越是觉得夜晚漫长。\n你还有些话想和缇安讲，好像也有人察觉了你的想法。
E: You've spent far too long searching for Thanatos. Now, the closer you seem to get to them, the longer the night seems to last.\nYou still have some things to say to Trianne, and someone else seems to have noticed your thoughts.

C: 遐蝶登门拜访，既是为了散心，也是让{NICKNAME}跟随她取一样东西。\n遐蝶为{NICKNAME}准备了礼物。
E: Castorice's visit isn't only for the purpose of relaxation, but also to have {NICKNAME} follow her to retrieve a certain item.\nCastorice prepared a gift for {NICKNAME}.

C: 你记得「长老」阿蒙内特，也记得这座信仰塞纳托斯的城邦哀地里亚，这是你回忆开始的地方。\n你当然也记得，你是如何成为一名行刑者，一名督战圣女的。
E: You remember "Elder" Amunet as well as Aidonia, this city-state that worshiped Thanatos. This is where your memory begins.\nOf course, you also remember how you became an executioner and a Maiden of War.

C: 塞涅俄丝的过往似乎与故事所述相差甚远，在她曾经的两名随伴奇兽陪同下，我们即将揭示被掩藏的古老真相。
E: Seliose's past seems to diverge greatly from what was told in bygone stories. Now, accompanied by her two mythical companion beasts from ages past, we stand poised to unveil the ancient and hidden truths.

C: 某时某刻，白厄携最后一枚火种赶赴创世涡心，但在那里，他却见到了本不该身在此处的人……
E: Sometime, someplace, Phainon bore the final Coreflame and rushed into the Vortex of Genesis. But there, he saw someone who shouldn't be there manifest before him...

C:
你还记得他们吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
昔日，恩师尚能为你指点迷津；还有那捷足的羁客，多洛斯的偷儿，她的家乡尚未因你落入火场。
是了，过去的已经过去，但神样的战士，你是否也曾垂泪，为那美酒似的年光？
难道你们不曾血肉相连，金血不曾浓于水么？
不！就让眼泪尽情流淌吧，别教那怒火蒸干了——
然后，记得痛饮：因为之于诸神，人子的泪水胜过凡间万千般蜜酿。
E:
Do you still remember them, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
Once, your teacher could still guide you through the dark. And that fleet-footed traveler, the thief of Dolos, her home was yet untouched by the fires you brought.
Yes, the past is gone. But you, godlike warrior, did you ever shed a tear for those years, sweet as wine?
Weren't you once bound by blood and flesh? Wasn't golden blood thicker than water?
No! Let your tears flow freely. Don't let rage burn them away —
Then, remember to drink deep: For, to the gods, the tears of mortals are sweeter than any honey brew on Earth.

C: 哎，如果不是在这种场合相遇，有点音乐的点缀也未尝不可。
E: *sigh* Shame we had to meet in a place like this. Otherwise, a little music wouldn't hurt.

C: 同样的能力，但凡给我换一个有用点的御主，我是不是都已经赢了？
E: With these abilities, if I had a slightly more decent Master, I'd have already won.

C: 你已知悉翁法罗斯的往日，如今，你要改写它的明天。该如何与命运的伟力抗衡？你身旁的伙伴与同行的智者，一定能驱散疑虑的阴云。
E: You have seen the past of Amphoreus. Now, you shall shape its future. How will you stand against the weight of destiny? The companion beside you and the sages who walk with you will definitely clear the clouds of doubt.

C:
奥赫玛，最后的城，有着好多好多神话。
她曾像一位天真的宁芙，受着律法的庇护，穿着浪漫的华服，沐浴天空的曙光，在大地上起舞，听海洋的歌声，受着理性的教导，避开追求者的诡计，远离纷争和死亡，在一扇扇漂亮的门径间穿行，背负世界的拥护……
直至岁月带走了她的快乐、容貌、生命和更多。一具骸骨静静躺在石棺中。而在像白玉雕的肋骨下，心还没有枯萎。
扫却美丽心脏的灰，去听，听为你留存的心跳。
E:
Okhema, the last city, was a cradle of countless myths.
Once, she was like an innocent nymph, sheltered by law, draped in flowing finery, basking in sky's dawning light. She danced across the earth, listened to the ocean's songs, followed reason's teachings, slipped past suitors' trickery, untouched by strife or death. Through ever more beautiful passages she wandered, and people supported her in her worldbearing...
Until time took her joy, her beauty, her life, and more. A skeleton lies quietly in a stone coffin. Yet beneath ribs carved like white jade, her heart hasn't withered.
Wipe away the dust from that beautiful heart, and listen... listen to the heartbeat preserved for you.

C:
奥赫玛，最后的城，有着好多好多神话。
她曾像一位天真的宁芙，受着律法的庇护，穿着浪漫的华服，沐浴天空的曙光，在大地上起舞，听海洋的歌声，受着理性的教导，避开追求者的诡计，远离纷争和死亡，在一扇扇漂亮的门径间穿行，背负世界的拥护……
直至岁月带走了她的快乐、容貌、生命和更多。一具骸骨静静躺在石棺中。而在像白玉雕的肋骨下，心还没有枯萎。
扫却美丽心脏的灰，去听，听为你留存的心跳。
E:
Okhema, the last city, was a cradle of countless myths.
Once, she was like an innocent nymph, sheltered by law, draped in flowing finery, basking in sky's dawning light. She danced across the earth, listened to the ocean's songs, followed reason's teachings, slipped past suitors' trickery, untouched by strife or death. Through ever more beautiful passages she wandered, and people supported her in her worldbearing...
Until time took her joy, her beauty, her life, and more. A skeleton lies quietly in a stone coffin. Yet beneath ribs carved like white jade, her heart hasn't withered.
Wipe away the dust from that beautiful heart, and listen... listen to the heartbeat preserved for you.

C:
船呵，波涛又把你推向海上，
怎么办？毅然停住吧，进港！
难道你没有看见，舷边已没有划桨，桅柱已被强劲的西南风折断，帆杆在嗟怨悲鸣，没有缆绳，船体怎经受得住风浪的猛烈冲击？
风帆已经破碎，神像也已失去。
——你要千万当心呵，不要作风暴的玩具。
E:
O ship, the waves are pushing you back to sea.
What now? Firmly stop. Turn toward the harbor!
Can't you see? The oars are gone from your sides. The mast has snapped in the fierce southwest wind. The rigging groans with sorrow. No ropes remain. How will your hull survive the crashing waves?
The sails are torn, and the divine statue has vanished.
— Beware. Do not let the storm toy with you.

C: 正如有人攥着希望的灯火，踏过自己一生命运的黄昏，直至步入坟茔。\n正如你抱着你的希望，圆满地抵达了时间的终点。\n去吧，再见。庙宇旁便是天造地设的洞府。
E: Just as one clutches the flame of hope, traversing through the twilight of their destined life until they reach their grave.\nJust as you, embracing your hope, have arrived at time's end in fulfillment.\nGo now. Farewell. By the temple lies a heaven-made sanctuary.

C: 「再创世」的仪式已经顺利完成，翁法罗斯的旅程结束…为什么自己什么都不记得？难道真的是以「记忆」为代价…？\n这不是匹诺康尼吗？难道说「太一之梦」就一直没醒来？
E: The Era Nova Ceremony was a success, and the journey in Amphoreus had reached its end... So why can't you remember anything? Was it really at the cost of "memories"...?\nIsn't this Penacony? Could it be that you never woke up from Ena's Dream?

C: 「军团」战役暂告息止，行进于茫茫星海中，来自「黑塔」的星声余音再度传来——在艾丝妲与全体科员的群策群力下，作为寰宇明珠的空间站，似乎正开展着名为「复兴计划」的行动，亟需有志之士加入。\n而阿兰认为，你是一等一的好选择。
E: The Legion's campaign has come to a temporary end. Traveling amongst the vast sea of stars, the star echo remnants from Herta Space Station are heard once again — with the combined strength of Asta and all the researchers, the peerless space station seems to be expanding and recruiting for an operation known as Project Revival.\nArlan believes that you are the most suitable candidate for this.

C: 现在你手握大名鼎鼎的「猎彗人宝藏」，离破解其中的玄秘还差一步之遥。将宝藏带给温天翁，真正价值千金的东西将显影其上。
E: You are now in possession of the renowned Comet Hunter's Treasure and just a step away from deciphering the mysteries within. Bring the treasure to Wen Tianweng and the real prize will finally surface.

C: 成功集齐三卷失落的录像带之后，你发觉三者内容似有交叉，均记录着一位名叫「希拉」的科员的人生备份。\n正当你疑惑之时，录像带通过视讯号植入的秘密防卫机制使你头痛欲裂，失去了知觉。
E: After gathering the three lost videotapes, you notice that they all seem to be records of the life of a researcher named Sheila.\nJust as you start to figure this out, a secret defense mechanism implanted in the video signal gives you a splitting headache and knocks you unconscious.

C: 被困于此的科员告诉你，帕梅拉和人群走丢，失散在怪物附近。\n想不到想找「瓜农」竟如此曲折，但事已至此，还是救人要紧。
E: The trapped researcher told you that Pamela went missing near where the monsters gathered.\nFinding Gossipmonger proves to be more troublesome than you thought, but at this point, saving people is more important.

C: 与艾丝妲进行远程通信，击败引发能量波动的怪物
E: Communicate with Asta remotely and defeat monsters causing the energy fluctuations

C: 基座舱段的气氛比你想象中喧闹得多，听说有位贵客即将到访，科员们都开始了繁忙的工作。从阿兰的只言片语中，你隐约猜到了来者的身份。
E: The atmosphere in the base zone seems much more boisterous than you would expect. Hearing of the imminent arrival of an honored guest, researchers all begin their busy work. From Arlan's words, you vaguely guess the identity of the visitor.

C: 空间站的网络安全工程师认为军团入侵事件的背后另有隐情。你回想起自己苏醒时的遭遇，决定与他一同追踪星核猎手「银狼」的行迹。
E: The network security engineer of the space station thinks there is something else behind the invasion of the Legion. You recall what happened to you when you woke up and decide to join him in tracking down the Stellaron Hunter, Silver Wolf.

C: 在螺丝咕姆的帮助下，你得以进入模拟宇宙的回归序列。不出所料，银狼的入侵也已触及这里。\n冥冥之中你有一种预感，一场隐于水面之下的游戏，将在这段冒险的终点决出胜负。
E: With Screwllum's help, you entered the Return Sequences of the Simulated Universe. Unsurprisingly, Silver Wolf's infiltration had reached here.\nYou have a hunch about this game hidden beneath the surface, and it will be revealed and resolved at the end of this adventure.

C: 矿车工老师傅为你准备了眼前的「矿车难题」——三下五除二地解决掉吧。
E: The senior mine cart operator prepared the Mine Cart Puzzle in front of you. Solve it promptly.

C: 原来科鲁泽就是一直给诊所寄匿名包裹的好心人，你决定将这个消息告诉娜塔莎，并向娜塔莎询问科鲁泽妻儿的消息，或许娜塔莎会知道什么。而这就是你能为科鲁泽所做的所有了。
E: It turns out that Kluzer was the one who kept sending anonymous care packages to the clinic. You decide to share the news with Natasha, and ask her if she knows about Kluzer's wife and children. This is all you can do for him.

C: 你找到了没好气的托比，但好在它很乐意听从克拉拉的指令带你前往机械墓场。\n跟随托比的脚步，在机械墓场中寻找合适的机械外壳吧。
E: You find a rather annoyed Toby. At least it is willing to obey Clara's orders and take you to the machine graveyard.\nFollow Toby and find a suitable robot shell in the graveyard.

C: 有传闻说：铁卫禁区的某位队长正满世界寻找这样一群「外来者」——他们衣着光鲜、气宇非凡，还一度使驻扎在禁区内超半数士兵陷入昏迷…当然，这位队长也包括在内。\n他是来找你寻仇的吗？还是见过你的武艺后竟想拜你为师？直觉告诉你，后者发生的概率微乎其微…但也不是没有这种可能。\n总之，不妨亲自去拜访一下这位队长吧——只是应当记得：这次下手千万要轻点。
E: Word has it that a certain Captain of the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone is looking up and down for a group of outsiders, who are said to be well-dressed with a lordly bearing. They knocked out half of the soldiers in the Restricted Zone... including the Captain himself.\nDoes he want payback? Or is he so impressed by how good of a fighter you are and decided to become a student of yours? The latter, however unlikely it seems, may as well be plausible.\nIn any event, perhaps you should pay a visit to this Captain. Just try not to beat the snot out of everyone this time around.

C: 尤利安将《冒险鼹鼠队》的后记交给了你，至此，你已经得到一整本故事书。在尤利安的建议下，你决定将这本书交给出版社，让出版社将这本儿童冒险书出版上架。出版商尼古莱就在上层区的行政区，去向她打听一下吧。
E: Julian hands you the postscript to The Adventurous Moles. With that, you now have the whole storybook. Upon Julian's recommendation, you decide to submit this children's adventure book for publication and sale. Nika the publisher works in the Administrative District up in the Overworld. Go and inquire with her.

C: 希露瓦为感谢你帮助茉莉解决麻烦，特意发来短信向你道谢，并邀请你闲时前往「机械屋」陪陪茉莉。\n根据希露瓦的描述，茉莉恐怕还没从打击中恢复过来。有空时不妨去「机械屋」看看她的状况吧。
E: Serval sends you a message to thank you for helping Molly and invites you to accompany Molly in the "Workshop."\nAccording to Serval, Molly hasn't recovered from that accident. Go to the "Workshop" to check on Molly when you're free.

C: 你和佩拉在「残响回廊」中受尽折磨，好在最后确实找到了茉莉需要的「钥匙」。\n返回「永动」机械屋，将此次裂界之旅的见闻汇报给二人吧。
E: You and Pela have suffered a lot in the Corridor of Fading Echoes, but you find the key Molly needs.\nReturn to Neverwinter Workshop and report the findings from your trip to them.

C: 你就希露瓦的请求征求了列车组成员的意见，并且得到了肯定的答复。把这个好消息告诉希露瓦吧！
E: As Serval requested, you asked the opinion of the Express crew and received affirmative answers. Give this good news to Serval!

C: 雪原极光观测之旅到这里就全部结束了，结局可谓是皆大欢喜，但两位女孩似乎还想让这趟旅行变得更加完美。\n她们已经各回各家，为晚些时候的夜宵各做准备，而此时的你则受到了来自朗道姐弟的短信。\n时间刚好，就趁这个机会向二人汇报你们在雪原的种种见闻吧。
E: The trip to observe the Snow Plains aurora is now over. You achieve a happy ending, but the two girls seem to want to make this trip even more special.\nThey've both gone home to prepare for supper later, just as you receive a message from the Landau siblings.\nNow is the time to report to these two what you have seen out in the Snow Plains.

C: 佩拉和玲可此行的目的原来是「观测极光」——为了达成这一目标，两人必须首先找到一处合适的露营地才行。
E: Pela and Lynx's goal for this trip was actually to observe the aurora — They need to first find a suitable camping ground before they can achieve that goal.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆的展品遭遇了一连串的莫名失窃。\n为了找回失窃的展品，你和佩拉决定前往大矿区调查。\n佩拉确认你们在歌德大饭店找到的「流星碎片」就是失窃的真品——该物归原处了。
E: There has been a series of thefts in the Belobog History and Culture Museum.\nTo find the lost exhibits, Pela and you decide to head to the Great Mine to investigate the matter.\nPela confirmed that the Meteor Fragment you found in the Goethe Grand Hotel is the genuine article that was stolen. It's time to return it to where it came from.

C: 用于投影展示的「微缩胶卷」失窃了，没有了这带胶卷，历史区将无法顺利开放。\n你和佩拉来到了没落的商业街，追查嫌疑人诺尔伯特公子的下落。\n证据已经确凿，上前与嫌疑人和他的买家直接对峙吧。
E: The microfilm used to display projections was stolen. Without this film, the History Exhibit cannot open to the public.\nYou and Pela arrive at the desolate shopping street to chase down Norbert, the suspect.\nThere is enough evidence now. Go up to the suspect and the buyer and confront them.

C: 真是没想到，丹枢竟然是药王秘传的一员。也许你无法轻易接受这个事实，也许你早就看穿了她的真面目…无论如何，你都要早些找到她，避免她做出更糟糕的事情。
E: Surprise, surprise. Dan Shu is a Disciple of Sanctus Medicus. You might not be able to accept that fact easily, or perhaps you already saw through her... No matter what, time is of the essence. You need to find her before she does something worse.

C: 收到了「高级会员资格」后不久，你收到了你的第一次「美丽狐仙聊天」服务。和青雀商量一下，接下来该怎么办。
E: Shortly after receiving your premium membership, you receive your first Foxian Beauty Chat service. Discuss with Qingque what to do next.

C: 你很擅长拍摄这些离别的时刻，将它们带给婉约诗人吧。\n离别有很多形式，但是人们忧愁的总是「归期未定」。
E: You are very good at photographing these parting moments. Bring them to the Graceful Poet.\nThere are many forms of parting, but what worries people is always the "uncertain date of return."

C: 你将信交给丹恒，由他单独赴会，并不意味着你对后来发生的事情毫不在意。
E: Delivering the message to Dan Heng and having him attend the meeting alone doesn't imply that you are indifferent to what later transpires.

C: 虽然有种种疑惑，不过结果好一切都好。能拿到地衡司的赏钱，还有什么不满的呢？别想那么多了，快去地衡司拿钱吧！
E: Though you have many doubts, everything turned out fine in the end. What is there to be dissatisfied with if you can get a reward from the Realm-Keeping Commission? Don't overthink things. Go to the Realm-Keeping Commission and get your money!

C: 事实是没有人偷走了孤云，是孤云自己偷走了孤云。无论是作为犯人还是受害者，孤云应该向你们解释清楚。\n跟随孤云继续前进。
E: The mystery's solved: Nobody stole Guyun. It just made itself "gone with the wind." Culprit or victim, Guyun owes everyone an explanation for what happened.\nFollow Guyun and continue onward.

C: 竟然有刺客想要刺王杀驾！这太离奇了，怎么会有人对这样一位善良的好人图谋不轨？\n快抓住刺客，保护皇帝陛下的安全吧。
E: Assassins are after the Emperor! Unbelievable, who would do such a thing to such a kind soul?\nFind the assassins quickly and protect Her Majesty.

C: 那时候的我，个子可真够小的。\n周围的人们都说，我比同龄人早熟，也比同龄人聪明。但我知道那都是我刻意营造出的假想。我只不过是个打肿脸充胖子的小姑娘罢了，强装出一副聪明世故的模样，来掩盖内心的不安。\n父亲死前对我说，生在帝王家，只有工于心计的人才能幸存。我并不擅长那些政治操弄，但我想活下去。
E: Back then, I was really little.\nEveryone around me said I was mature beyond my years and smarter than my peers. But I'm sure that was just an illusion I created. I was just an insecure little girl, pretending to be wise and smart.\nBefore my father died, he told me — in the royal family, only the cunning survive. I wasn't great at politics, but I wanted to survive.

C: 在你、黑塔、螺丝咕姆三人的注视下，一生受尽外界和内心折磨的查德威克博士终于得以走向平静的终结。\n但在树海彻底归于谧宁之前，那位天才仍然有未尽之语……
E: Under the watchful eyes of you, Screwllum, and Herta — Dr. Chadwick, who has endured external and mental struggles throughout his life, finally reaches a peaceful end.\nHowever, before the Ocean of Trees returns to complete tranquility, the genius still has something to say...

C: 翻翻看桌上的报纸，或许能知道些新的信息。
E: Go through the newspapers on the desk. Maybe you can learn something new.

C: 在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。\n悬锋城人为什么要在牢房周围放一堆能打开牢房的机关？是出于对劫狱者的尊重？还是天天打架真的会影响智力？
E: With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness.\nWhy would the people of Castrum Kremnos place mechanisms that can open the prison doors placed all around the cells? Are they showing respect for those who would perform a jailbreak? Or has fighting every day taken its toll on their brain power?

C: 对于小机器人的故障情况，维修工程师有些新想法。他拜托你设法取得小机器人身上的报错记录，然后回来验证下他的猜想是否正确吧。
E: The maintenance engineer has a new idea about the meal-delivery robot's malfunction. He asks you to obtain the error log on the robot to verify if his guess is accurate.

C: 配音演员塞琳似乎在为什么事感到苦恼。\n找她聊聊，看看你能如何帮到她。
E: Celine, the voice actress, seems to be distressed about something.\nSpeak with her and see if there is anything you can help her with.

C: 丹鼎司洞天重开之后，鱼龙混杂。仅仅依靠护珠人在海滩巡逻是不够的，他们向善良勇敢的志愿者发出了邀请。\n护珠人跃渊希望你能参与海滩巡逻…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？
E: After the Alchemy Commission delve reopened, people honest and crooked walked betwixt each other. As such, the Pearlkeepers alone are no longer enough to patrol the beach. They have offered invitations to brave and noble volunteers for the task at hand.\nYueyuan the Pearlkeeper hopes that you can help patrol the beach... Seriously, though, who's the one that actually protects this place?

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 丢失的奇物竟然在一名叫「管家」的造物手里，它是谁？它在哪儿？你和佩佩两眼一抹黑，在走丢的造物处，它们似乎知道「管家」的信息……
E: The lost Curio is currently held by a creation known as "butler." Who is this butler? And where can they be found? Despite lacking any information, you might uncover new leads by locating the lost Curio...

C: 你再次加入了铁卫禁区的联合演习。\n和「少校」聊聊，了解这次演习的作战目标吧。
E: Once again, you join a joint training exercise in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone.\nTalk to the Major and get a sense of the objective of this training.

C: 小贩依旧不肯承认长矛和盾牌都是赝品。现在，该检验长矛的质量了。
E: The merchants still refuse to acknowledge that the lance and shield are both fakes. Now, it's time to assess the lance's quality.

C: 果蔬摊老板德墨忒尔的女儿失踪已久，然而就在昨天，她梦到了自己最亲爱的孩子。或许你回溯记忆的能力能够帮到她。
E: The fruit and veg store owner Demetria's daughter has been missing for a long time. However, she dreamt of her beloved child just last night. Perhaps your ability to rewind memories could be of assistance?

C: 实验助手工作正式开始！去问问看温世玲本次实验还缺少什么素材吧。
E: The work of a lab assistant has officially begun! Go ask Wen Shiling what materials are still missing in this experiment.

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你找到贝洛伯格知名画家雷比尼，从他手中取得约定交付的画作。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to collect a commissioned piece from Belobog's famed painter, Rebini.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你前往机械聚落，收集「自动机兵•战犬」的战斗数据，以便博物馆制作复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan needs your help to collect Automaton Hound combat data at the Robot Settlement to help the museum make a replica.

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是收容舱段中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something from the Storage Zone...

C: 在西衍先生的故事当中，「龙尊大人」带着你辗转于罗浮各处，寻找锻造神兵利器的诸多材料…这下彻底变成喜闻乐见的寻宝故事了。
E: In Mr. Xiyan's story, the "high elder" takes you to many places in the Luofu to look for the various materials needed to forge the divine weapon... Now this is truly a stereotypical treasure-seeking adventure story.

C: 事情告一段落，明曦还有话要说。\n再去和小秘书见上一面吧。
E: Though matters have been resolved, Mingxi still has something to tell you.\nGo and meet with her again.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「清玩斋」与商会建立合作关系。但「清玩斋」的老板泊阳此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Elegance Pagoda to establish a partnership with the guild. However, its proprietor Boyang has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「清玩斋」与商会建立合作关系。但「清玩斋」的老板泊阳此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Elegance Pagoda to establish a partnership with the guild. However, its proprietor Boyang has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 黑塔、阮•梅、螺丝咕姆和斯蒂芬，联手推出了模拟宇宙的第一次大更新！天才们对做项目各有各的想法，塞了不少好东西进去。接下来，他们将正式开启本次为模拟宇宙制作的三个片段的「位面」！
E: Herta, Ruan Mei, Screwllum, and Stephen have joined forces to bring about the Simulated Universe's first major update! The geniuses added a substantial influx of fun content from all their various ideas. Following that, they will officially initiate the three sections of "planes" developed for this version of Simulation Universe!

C: 想要挑战每个决胜乐园的冠军候补，必须先完成乐园对应的试炼。\n据希露瓦和佩拉所说，这里的试炼是点亮全部的「照雪灯炉」...很难不让人怀疑她们在白嫖挑战者的劳动力。总之，先拿眼前的两座灯炉试试手吧。
E: In order to challenge the championship contender for each Victory Zone, you must complete the corresponding trial in the Zone.\nAccording to Serval and Pela, the trial here is to light up all the Snowshine Lamps... It really makes one wonder whether they're exploiting the challengers' free labor. Anyways, let's give it a go with the two lamps in front of you.

C: 流云渡，七扭八弯的流云渡...这要是没个向导，真不知跑到什么时候才能见着冠军候补。\n乔瓦尼先生居然也在这里？他还真是来去无踪。
E: Cloudford, the twist-and-turn map of Cloudford... You have no idea how much time you'd end up wasting if you didn't have a guide to the championship contender.\nMr. Giovanni is here too? He sure is a mysterious one.

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 既然太卜神志不清，你大可用手中的棒球棍，轻轻敲醒沉睡的心灵，这也是驱魔手段的一种。
E: Since the master diviner is not herself, you can always softly knock her sleeping mind awake with the baseball bat in your hand. This is also a means of exorcism.

C: 岁阳妖物擅于摆布人心，若是让它扰乱彦卿的心智，那一切可就危险的很了！你们顺着彦卿遗留的飞剑一路追索，打算在事情不可挽回前加以遏制。
E: Heliobi are known masters of manipulating others' minds. If they ensnare Yanqing, the consequences would be dire! You follow the trail of flying swords left behind by Yanqing, determined to contain the threat before it can get worse.

C: 十妖在林，不如一妖在手。岁阳唯一该去的地方，就是绥园中的镇妖塔。\n别忘了，夺取藿藿神智的岁阳还在「藏月瓠」里呢。
E: The only good heliobus is a captured heliobus. The only place they should go is the Suppression Towers in Fyxestroll Garden.\nHowever, let's not forget that the heliobus possessing Huohuo's consciousness is still inside the Lunaumbra Gourd.

C: 以帮助房东取回房产证为前提，捉鬼小队得到调查凶宅的许可。桂乃芬已经跃跃欲试了。
E: The ghost-hunting squad obtained the permission to investigate the haunted residence in order to help the landlord recover the deed. Guinaifen can hardly keep her excitement down.

C: 一只、两只…收伏岁阳也是个漫长的工作。
E: One heliobus, two heliobi... Capturing heliobi is a tedious job too.

C: 天真的岁阳被冒险所吸引，也许鳞渊境里难得一见的景致能够满足它。\n和三月七、宝烛一起去鳞渊境吧。
E: The innocent heliobus was drawn to adventure. Perhaps the rare sights found in Scalegorge Waterscape can satisfy their curiosity.\nJoin March 7th and Arkeri on a journey to the Scalegorge Waterscape.

C: 你成功地找到了走丢造物，并且…在它身上发生了神奇的异变，你无法解释这种现象的成因，还是回去问问保姆机器人吧。\n吃垃圾就能进化吗？想到这里，你总觉得有些不对劲……
E: You manage to successfully find the lost creation, and... you discover a mysterious mutation on it for which you have no explanation. Better head back and ask the Helper Robot about it.\nDoes eating trash makes them evolve? Something seems off just thinking about it...

C: 艾丝妲告诉你，有「惊喜」在保姆机器人处等着你。你决定去看看，不知道究竟是何方神圣在等你……
E: Asta tells you that there's a "surprise" waiting over for you at the Helper Robot. You decide to head over and see who — or what — is awaits you...

C: 钟表餐厅似乎正在筹备什么活动…过去看看吧。
E: The Clock Diner seems to be preparing for an event... Go and see what is happening.

C: 反复出入谜一样的梦境空间后，你们终于收集齐了所有的线索。\n离开错乱的空间，和辛格勒一起为调查做个收尾吧。
E: After numerous entries and exits from the enigmatic Dreamscape spaces, you have finally gathered all the clues.\nLeave the chaotic space and join Singler in concluding the investigation.

C: 小星星准备了用于模拟的思维空间，想要告诉你「美梦剧团」的生存状况。\n按照它的规划，你现在必须前往「那个房间」。
E: Starlet has prepared a Mindspace for simulations and wants to update you on the status of the Sweet Dreams Troupe.\nBased on its plan, you must now proceed to "that room."

C: 莱桑德的后辈刚从匹诺康尼度假归来，他似乎对你在空间站的事迹颇为了解，想要见见你这位「空间站的大英雄」。
E: Lysander's junior just returned from a vacation at Penacony. He seems to know a lot about your achievements on the space station and wants to meet "the space station's big hero."

C: 《美梦仙踪》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！
E: Filming for Dreamjoy Ascension has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C: 你调制了名为「人格」的配方，黑塔人偶喝下后，展现出了令人意外的一面。\n这份配方还有另一种功效尚未调制…回到临时吧台准备接待下一位客人，或者为黑塔再调制一杯调饮吧。
E: You mixed a recipe called "Persona," and after the Herta puppet drank it, she showed an unexpected side.\nThis recipe has another effect yet to be mixed... Return to the makeshift bar to serve the next guest, or mix another drink for Herta.

C: 原以为驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大能够顺利成长下去，实现它的梦想，却没想到，在它身上出现了一种会变小的奇怪症状。据称，这代表它有欧洛尼斯相关的潜质…？那刻夏提出了一个出乎所有人意料的解决方案－让驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大修习欧洛尼斯祷言，进而稳定这一特性。好吧，神奇的第二次养成，开始啦！
E: You thought Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas would grow without a hitch and achieve its dreams, but unexpectedly, it developed a strange condition that made it shrink. Supposedly, this indicates it has potential related to Oronyx...? Anaxa proposed a solution that surprised everyone: Having Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas study Oronyx's Prayer to stabilize this trait. Well, time for a second round of magical nurturing!

C: 可恨之人尚有可怜之处。如果换成你我坐在她的位置上，每天面对逐渐衰落的城市…我们真的能紧握脆弱的信仰，没有丝毫动摇吗？

C: 不，我逃不掉的，逃得过昨天，逃得过今天，也逃不过明天……

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着貊泽：「<unbreak>60</unbreak>分！」它宣布。

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着万敌：「<unbreak>0.59</unbreak>？」眼睛流露出七分疑惑，三分怀疑。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Mydei: "<unbreak>0.59</unbreak> points?" the gaze reveals a look of confusion and semi-suspicion.

C: 眼睛敏捷地转动，「<unbreak>0.129</unbreak>分…<unbreak>0.12999</unbreak>分…<unbreak>0.129999</unbreak>分……」。恍然，眼睛停止转动，呆呆望着某处，仿佛坠入了深不见底的空洞。
E: The eye turns dexterously. "<unbreak>0.129</unbreak> points... <unbreak>0.12999</unbreak> points... <unbreak>0.129999</unbreak> points...". The eye suddenly stops moving, gazing blankly in a certain direction, as if fallen into a bottomless void.

E: Now go and experience it for yourself. I will guide you in the Simulated Universe to make sure nothing happens to you! I'll even give you a substantial reward.

C: 要知道，星神毫无自由意志，除了命途之外别无所想。因此我们提问的时候，祂们根本不予理睬…即使螺丝咕姆给每个星神都做了份虚拟人格，还把社交倾向拉满了也没用。
E: You know, the Aeons have no concept of free will at all. THEY think about nothing but the destined Path. So, when we asked THEM questions, THEY simply ignored us, even when Screwllum gave THEM each a simulated personality and maxed out THEIR social tendency stat.

C: 咦、咦？！这么快就要去见她了吗？我能先找个地方梳洗一下吗？
E: Uhh... We're gonna see her right now? Can I at least find a place to freshen up first?

C: 嗨，你好。
E: Hi, hello.

C: 让我进去！我不怕死！什么都没了…都没了……
E: Let me pass! I'm not afraid to die! I've lost everything... everything...

C: …想怎么叫随便你吧。姐姐，今天我是为公事来的。「壁垒」装置出了故障，部队里的工程师无从下手。还是得找你看看。
E: ...You can call me whatever you like. Look Serval, I'm here on official business today. There's something wrong with the Barrier Generator Device and the engineers in our unit don't know how to fix it. I need you to take a look.

C: 嗯…这我清楚。
E: Mm... I can believe that.

C: 你们遇到麻烦了吗？
E: Are you guys in trouble?

C: 希儿才刚刚离开那种闭塞的环境，不习惯这种场面也很正常…我会带她慢慢适应的。
E: Seele is still new to the vastness of the Overworld — she feels uncomfortable in a big crowd... I'll help her adjust to life here.

C: 善意的谎言也是必须的。
E: Sometimes people need to hear white lies.

C: 这个故事敬献给您，亲爱的看官——不知您是否从中得到了少许欢愉？
E: To you, my dear audience, I dedicate my performance... I wonder, did I bring a little more joy into your lives?

C: …我明白了，又开始复读了是吧。
E: ...Copycatitis still has no cure I see.

C: 的确有可能，他们一向想得周到。
E: Possibly. They always think ahead.

C: …但还是得先问问别人意见。
E: ...But I'll still have to ask the others for their input first.

C: 不管怎么说，你至少该去见她一面吧。
E: In any case, you should at least pay her a visit.

C: …把我、还有与有关我的所有记忆，全都抛在脑后。
E: ...She put it all out of her mind. Me, and every memory to do with me...

C: 你打开信封，信上写着：亲爱的卡尔•艾尔先生，您这个月的工作资料在我手里。别担心，它现在很安全。
E: You open the letter, which reads: Dear Mr. Carl Eyre, your work documents for this month are with me. Don't worry, they are quite safe.

C: 你好奇路灯是否也使用地髓进行供暖。
E: You're curious to know whether street lamps also rely on Geomarrow and give off warmth.

C: 这根路灯的金属杆上已经有了裂痕。
E: The metal pole of this lamp has already begun to crack.

C: 你常常幻想自己也处在舞会之中，要是遇到这样不请自来的客人，以你的不俗身手，肯定能摘下她的冰雪面具，让故事在第一幕就早早结束……
E: You often envision yourself in the middle of such a scenario. If you encounter uninvited guests like that, you are confident that you can remove her ice mask with your exceptional dexterity to end the story in the first act...

C: 放心，不会有的。
E: Don't worry, no one would.

C: 明智之举。这世上总归存在着比眼前的事物更为珍贵的东西。你虽然不知道那是什么，但此时此刻它是阻止你越过那一线的理由。这就已经足够。
E: Wise choice. There must be something better out there in the world than what's in front of you. You don't know what that is yet, but it just stopped you from crossing an important line, which is good enough.

C: 我放弃。
E: I give up.

C: 鼹鼠党连这里都管吗？
E: So The Moles control this whole area?

C: 啊，快看，桑博在那儿！
E: Hey! Look! It's Sampo!

C: 闭嘴吧桑博，这件事你也逃不了干系。「地火」现在有一堆麻烦事要处理，你非得在这时候添乱吗？
E: Shut it Sampo, this has "you" written all over it. Wildfire has countless issues on its plate right now. We don't need a side order of Koski.

C: 嗯…你的想法也不是不能理解。只不过，地底正处于艰难时期……
E: *sigh* ...I can understand your thinking. It's just that the underground is in difficult straits...

C: 岂有此理——
E: You shameless scoundrels...

C: 交给我吧。
E: Leave it to me.

C: 下层区对你们的怨气，光靠这两三句话可解释不清，铁卫丫头。但我尊重你的要求，不说了，不说了。
E: I haven't gotten close to voicing the extent of the Underworld's grievances, young lady. But I will respect your request. I will leave it at that, for now.

C: ——具体办法，等明天再讨论也不迟。时候不早了，你们也折腾坏了吧？回镇上休息吧，一切我来安排。
E: ...We have time. Let's get into the detail tomorrow. It's late, and you must've been through a lot. Go back to the town and rest. I'll make arrangements.

C: 真相只有一个：我就是个成熟的大人！
E: Well here's the truth: I'm a grown man!

C: 那种型号…是史瓦罗的狗腿子没错了。
E: That model... it's one of Svarog's lapdogs alright.

C: 如果他们有近似的想法，我也不能怪他们…银鬃铁卫确实欠下层人的。
E: I wouldn't be surprised if there are... the Silvermane Guards have a lot to make amends for down here.

C: 她不打算帮我们了？
E: She's not going to help us?

C: 怎么，有事想问我吗？
E: Hm, something you wanted to ask?

C: 准备好了吗？要是再磨磨蹭蹭的话，我可就自己上去，不管你们了。
E: You ready yet? If you want to keep wasting time, I'll just go on ahead by myself.

C: 我答应布洛妮娅，万一她出了什么事…我一定会亲自把她救出来。
E: I made a promise to Bronya that if something were to happen to her, I'd rescue her myself.

C: 你也是来看「怪物盔甲」的吗？哎，有他在的场次，票可真难抢。
E: Did you come to see Monster Armor too? It's so hard to get tickets for his matches.

C: 为了这么点钱，连命都要赔进去？
E: Is the money worth your life?

C: 咦，这是——好像有封信从衣服里掉出来了，是你的吗？请拿好……
E: Hey, look at this... It looks like a letter that fell out of your clothes. Is it yours?

C: 而且，「外来者」在下层区声名远扬——您要是肯赏脸参赛，那这拳馆指定是座无虚席！
E: Besides, the Outsider is well known in the Underworld. If you can grace us with your visit, then the tickets will be sold out for sure!

C: 啊啊…两台自动机兵恐怕要赛季报销了——但在这个弱肉强食的舞台上，败者只有接受自己的命运，别无选择！
E: Ahhh... I'm afraid that the two bots are done for the season, but in this part of the jungle, losers have no choice but to accept their own destiny!

C: 您听说过「天梯排行榜」吗？也就是记录了每位拳手比赛积分的榜单。您的积分越高，在榜上排的位置也就越高。只要您在对战中取胜，就能获得一定积分。
E: Have you heard of the Ladder Leaderboard? It's a list recording every boxer's match points. The higher your points, the higher the rank. You will earn points for every battle you win.

C: 而在{M#他}{F#她}面前的又是本赛季中另一匹黑马——来自熔锤镇的年轻机械师「小智」、以及他会放电机器人搭档「哔咔啾」！他们的目标正是本赛季冠军！
E: And in front of {M#him}{F#her} is another dark horse of this season — the young Mechanic Ash from Moltammerville, and his discharge robot partner Beet-Ka-Choo! Their goal is to be the season champions!

C: 这场对决作为赛季的落幕战，将会决定终极大奖花落谁家——榜首宝座是否会在这最后关头再度易手，将成为本战的最大看点！
E: As the closing battle of the season, the showdown is guaranteed to be the season's ultimate highlight — will the championship change hands at this very last moment?

C: 欢呼吧，庆贺吧！你们有幸见证了新王的诞生，搏击俱乐部的未来在此刻到来！
E: Cheer and celebrate! You're all lucky witnesses to the birth of a new king, and a future of the Fight Club!

C: 我这一阵正好在忙着拾掇大饭店的环境布置，匹克小伙是个热心肠，听说这事之后就马上跑来帮忙了。
E: Word must have gotten out that I was renovating the hotel today. Being the kind-hearted young man that he is, Peak came straight over and offered to help.

C: 不胜荣幸。但正如您所说，我们还是先将要事谈妥为好。
E: We'd be honored. But to your point, Oleg — let's finish our discussions first.

C: 看来骚乱已经圆满解决了…谢谢你们。
E: Looks like you guys have the situation under control. Thank you.

C: 战地追迹？
E: Treasure Hunt on the Battlefield?

C: 这箱子身躯硕大，内部却空空荡荡。人生也不外如是。
E: This trashcan is huge, but its inside is empty. Life is no different.

C: 两只垃圾桶紧紧地并排站着，它们的影子融在一处，像在拥抱。
E: The two trashcans stood tightly side by side, their shadows meld together as if they were locked in an embrace.

C: 有些工具的木柄上刻着主人的名字，这些工具普遍得到了精心呵护。
E: Some of these tools had their owner's name carved on them. They were probably very well taken care of.

C: 你看见沙袋，它一天<unbreak>24</unbreak>小时在岗，任劳任怨，伤痕累累，一分钱工资都没有，还要遭人白眼。你希望它能站起来。
E: You see a sandbag that works <unbreak>24</unbreak>/7. It never complains, is full of damage, was never compensated, and still had to be looked down on. You hope that it can stand up on its own.

C: 如遭遇疑似星核猎手的成员，请立刻联系公司，切勿打草惊蛇。提供有效线索者，将获得重金酬赏。
E: If you encounter anyone suspected of being a Stellaron Hunter, please contact the IPC immediately and do not act on your own. Anyone who provides useful information will be substantially rewarded.

C: 可是——
E: ...But—

C: 至于人手…各个空港目前正处于维护和修复中，人力捉襟见肘。我只能请停云暂代接引的职责，照顾各位在这段时间内的行程。
E: As for personnel... the skyports are currently all under maintenance, so we're thinly stretched. What I can do is send Tingyun as your guide — she'll take care of you during your stay.

C: 我知你心急，想做些什么，并且做成些什么，但现在还不是时候。你欲得「剑首」之名，不可随意动手，尤其不可与重犯械斗。
E: I can understand your impatience, and I know you want to prove yourself. Now is not the time. If you truly wish to become Sword Champion, you shouldn't be running around brandishing your sword at people, especially not a major criminal.

C: 这孩子……
E: *sigh* That boy...

C: 啊，有了这线索，局势就——毫无变化！仙舟可是一艘星舰哎，机器装置到处都是！
E: Ahhhh, which means... what exactly!? This is a starship! There are all kinds of devices making weird noises.

C: 我家闺女还在等我…
E: My daughter is waiting for me at home...

C: 但愿如此吧。
E: I certainly hope so.

C: 瓦尔特陷入了沉思……
E: Welt is deep in thought...

C: 太卜司的天就是塌下来，还有太卜大人顶着。虽然她老人家身高不济，能耐却是顶天的。
E: Even if the sky was gonna collapse on the Divination Commission, the master diviner would be there to hold it up. What she lacks in height, she more than makes up for in stamina.

C: …所以罗刹只是我在仙舟的常用名。仙舟以外的地方，我有个更拗口的名字。我猜你也想问这个吧？
E: ...Therefore, Luocha is just the name I use within the Xianzhou. Outside of the Xianzhou, I use something more difficult to pronounce. I'm guessing you want to know that name, too?

C: 剑术和医术，都是这么练出来的。丹恒兄弟也是漂泊的人，一定能理解吧。
E: As such, I had to improve my swordplay and healing skills. You are also a wanderer, young master Dan Heng — surely you understand?

C: 还有别的问题…
E: I have other questions...

C: 闷葫芦，你怎么不吭声啊？发现危险就大声叫唤喔，可别仗着自己懂两下子，就逞血气之勇单打独斗啊！
E: Hey, silent but deadly, shout if you see any danger, okay? Don't think just because you know a move or two you can charge off by yourself!

C: 不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 那么，只可能是有人动了手脚。既然卡芙卡在，想必这应该是星核猎手那个小骇客的手笔吧。
E: In that case, it looks like someone wants to make things difficult for us. Since Kafka's here, I wouldn't be surprised if this turns out to be that Stellaron Hunter hacker girl's handiwork.

C: 不行啊停云小姐，就算是留下线索，也不能到处乱扔垃圾啊。
E: No Miss Tingyun! You can't throw trash even for leaving behind clues.

C: 我们可是很认真地在配合她练习哎！她竟然还有心思吃点心？
E: *sigh* Here we are sweating over our training while she's busy sampling dim sum!

C: 狐族虽不如仙舟人长寿，小女子也还想再过一百几十年安稳日子呢，就饶了我吧～
E: We foxians don't live as long as the Xianzhou locals, but I still want to enjoy the hundred-odd years I've got left. You'd do the same in my shoes, wouldn't you?

C: 我们不会增添手续，只要旁听审讯就好。
E: We won't make things anymore complicated than they need to be. We just want to listen in on the questioning.

C: 就是那个坏女人没跑了吧？她有把又快又长的刀子。
E: It must have been Kafka! She's got a scary sword.

C: 怎么一眨眼，什么苦差事都塞给我们了？公司都没你们会差遣人。
E: ...and now here we are running around doing everything. Even the IPC takes it easier on us.

C: 我不想按他们的预言行动。
E: I don't want to act according to their predictions.

C: 赶快…离开这儿…
E: Hurry... leave here...

C: 来吧，服下这个，对快速恢复有帮助的。
E: Come on, take this. It'll help with your injuries.

C: 原本一切顺利，无论是「药王秘传」的妖人，还是受他们驱使的异兽都不是我们的对手。
E: Everything was going as planned. The sorcerers of the Disciples and the fantastic creatures they commanded were no match for us.

C: 受赐「建木」后，丹鼎司曾是罗浮仙舟最重要的司部。
E: After receiving the Ambrosial Arbor, the Alchemy Commission was once the Luofu's most vital commission.

C: 多谢，我没问题了。
E: Thanks. That's all I wanted to know.

C: 好啊，大家和来时一样深明大义。那么，接下来将军有什么妙计？
E: Great! Everyone's just as heroic as when they arrived. So, what's the master plan, general?

C: 倒也谈不上独自一人，还有朋友同行。
E: I wouldn't say so, I'll be counting on a few friends for support.

C: 「持明遗卵，浴月沐华。古海泱泱，浴月复生。」……
E: "Beneath the lunar glow adorned, Vidyadhara eggs begin to form, and from the ancient sea rebirthed, to walk again on solid earth."

C: 小心，三月！
E: March, careful!

C: 虽然看上去事情都在星核猎手操纵之中，但那是我们自己实现的未来。他们本事再大也没法让不存在的未来成真呀。
E: It may seem like the Stellaron Hunters are controlling everything, but we create our own future. No matter how powerful they are, they can't make a future that doesn't exist come true.

C: 吾会将消息带到，也请司舵节哀。
E: I will. Our condolences, Helm Master.

C: 往日里咱们贸易他乡，按习俗会带些当地世界的特产回来当作礼物，分送同僚朋友。
E: When we used to trade in other lands, we would bring back local specialties and distribute them among friends and other guild members — it became a custom.

C: 没能让停云小姐吃到我做的菜啊…
E: It's a shame Miss Tingyun's too busy today...

C: 帮我回忆回忆？
E: Think I need a reminder...

C: 咳咳，各位乘客久等了。因为是重要的事，所以列车长我花了点时间准备帕。
E: *ahem* Apologies for the delay, dear passengers. Something important came up, so I, the conductor, had to spend some time preparing!

C: 又要变更航线了吗？
E: Are we switching routes again?

C: 在家族的地盘上多半不会有什么惊险奇遇——在我看来有些可惜，但毕竟是个难得的放松机会，就好好享受吧。
E: There probably won't be any surprises happening on Family territory, which is a bit of a shame if you ask me. But hey, it's rare that we can take a break and let loose. Let's enjoy it.

C: 例如你在客房醒来时，口中曾念起几个名字，他们是你的伙伴？家人？敌人？你似乎已经和许多人、许多事建立了牢不可破的联系……
E: For instance, when you awaken in your room, your lips speak several names. Are they your companions? Family? Enemies? You seem to have forged unbreakable bonds with many people and many incidents...

C: 匹诺康尼形势复杂，还是谨慎点为好。
E: Penacony's situation is getting complicated. Let's tread lightly.

C: 什么意思？你对我做了什么？
E: What does that mean? What did you just do to me?

C: 这么说，我能随便浮在空中？
E: Does that mean I can levitate in the air?

C: 很快，现实与梦域的边界将会消融……
E: Very soon, the boundary between reality and dream will cease to exist...

C: 丹恒。
E: Dan Heng.

C: （好的！正在为您复现……）
E: (Splendid! I'm rendering it as we speak...)

C: （…复现完成！现在您可以更好地享用梦境了。）
E: (...The replication is complete! Now, you can enjoy an enhanced Dreamscape experience.)

C: （重申——我不会对这枚梦泡的内容作出任何解释性或暗示性的评论。）
E: (Let me reiterate that I won't make any explanatory or leading comments on the content of this dream bubble.)

C: 当然有。
E: Of course there is.

C: 我承认这枚梦泡价格不菲——您可以再考虑一下！
E: This dream bubble is indeed pricey. Still, please give it some consideration!

C: 想要签名的话，今天不行…
E: I'm not doing autographs today...

C: 不客气，毕竟你帮了我大忙嘛！
E: Glad to hear that. After all, you just did me a huge favor!

C: 你之前没在工作吗？
E: Don't you have work today?

C: 来——这里！跟上哦。
E: Over here! Follow me.

C: 是啊，一个博爱而宽容的梦…就像家族本身。
E: I know, right? It's a dream that's loving and forgiving to everyone, just like The Family.

C: 他身高大约一米八上下，误差在两公分以内，体格健壮，明显锻炼过。步幅很长，但听不见踏地声，很轻巧。这种步法不会留下脚印……
E: He's about 5 feet <unbreak>11</unbreak> inches tall, give or take. Judging from his strong build, it's clear that he's well-trained. He walks in long strides, but his steps are light and barely audible. That way of walking doesn't leave footprints...

C: 危险？流萤小姐，这可是家族的美梦，怎么会有危险？在梦里不找点刺激怎么行！
E: Dangerous? Miss Firefly, we're in a beautiful dreamland crafted by The Family. How could it be dangerous? This is the perfect place to have some thrills!

C: 不过，你想试试也没问题…我相信你的判断。
E: But it's fine if you want to give it a shot... I trust your judgment.

C: 「我不知道啊，怎么回事？」——你很想对二人这么说，但不知怎地，你现在变成了某位…卡通人物。
E: "I don't know... What's happening?" — You desperately want to say these, but somehow, you've transformed into a certain... cartoon character.

C: 真相？什么真相？
E: Truth? What truth?

C: 滴答！太好了！太好了！米沙他有救了！
E: Tick-tock! Wonderful! This is awesome! There's still hope for Misha!

C: <size=36>好啊！老大，好好教训她！</size>
E: <size=36>Punish her, boss!</size>

C: 我这就告诉你！闭上眼睛——
E: Here, I'll show you! First, close your eyes...

C: 咦，你看不到他的内心吗？这下我们该怎么办……
E: Eh, can't you see where this is going? What should we do now...

C: 好吧，谢谢您。要是对宾客动了粗，我们可要被猎犬家系重罚了。
E: Thanks for doing that. If we'd laid a finger on our guests just now, we would've faced severe punishment from the Bloodhound Family.

C: 你在说什么！不是球棒，是钟表把戏！
E: What're you talking about? It wasn't the baseball bat! It was Clockwork!

C: 虽然我也没太搞清楚状况…但{NICKNAME}说，似乎只有直率、纯真、有童心的小孩子才能看见它……
E: I don't really know how a cartoon character could show up around here, but according to {NICKNAME}, only honest people with childlike innocence can see him...

C: 「钟表匠的遗产」固然是我的所求，但我们未必要分道扬镳，走向对立，至少…我不希望这种事发生。
E: I am, in fact, after the Watchmaker's Legacy, but that doesn't mean we have to go our separate ways and be enemies. But at least... I hope things won't turn out that way.

C: 我必须得…婉拒你。
E: I have to... say no.

C: 如果二十年前没签那份合约，我已经是艾斯克兰贡最顶尖的建筑师了……
E: If I hadn't signed that agreement <unbreak>20</unbreak> years ago, I'd have been the top architect in Esclaragon by now...

C: 这次构造有些复杂了…得好好思考一下。
E: This one is a little bit complicated... I have to put on my thinking cap.

C: 我不敢肯定，这个发现太突然了。但无论如何，家族一定隐瞒了什么，关于梦境的真相……
E: I'm not sure. Everything happened so quickly. But regardless, The Family must be hiding something — something about the truth of the Dreamscape...

C: ——你来了，你便是一定要死的。
E: — You've come, and so you now must die.

C: …这显然是不文明的，换作平时，你恐怕得支付一个「崇高道德的赞许」——但这里是梦境，所以管他呢，你一脚踢在桶壁上，一阵巨响随之传来……
E: ...Evidently, this is not civilized behavior. In regular circumstances, you'd probably have to give up a Praise of High Morals... However, this is the Dreamscape, so who cares? You feel your foot impact the can with a loud bam...

C: 到底谁才能配得上？
E: Then who is worthy of it?

C: 困扰了我们许久的难题，竟然就这样解决了……
E: The conundrum that has stymied us for so long... fixed just like that?

C: 困扰了我们许久的难题，竟然就这样解决了……
E: The conundrum that has stymied us for so long... fixed just like that?

C: 暗喻死亡和谋杀的迷因怎会出现在家族宣称「绝对安全」的梦里…在匹诺康尼，所有人都可能说谎——或许也包括家族自己哦？
E: How could a meme that heralds death and murder appear in a dream that The Family proclaims "to be absolutely safe"... Everyone could be lying on Penacony — does that include The Family as well?

C: 曾经，也有人这么告诫我…「对待敌人无需怜悯，那是对自己的残忍。但你必须要认清谁才是真正的敌人……」
E: Once, someone said to me: "No compassion for the enemy, for that is cruelty upon yourself. But you must see clearly who the true enemy is..."

C: 那人就是黄泉…
E: It was Acheron...

C: 嗯，共有两位。一位偷渡犯，以及……
E: Yes. There were two. One was a stowaway, the other...

C: 若他不回头，那祂的刀必磨快，弓必上弦，使恶人施加的毒害临到自己头上。
E: Should the transgressor fail to turn away from this path, THEIR sword will be honed, THEIR bow strung, causing the malevolence the perpetrator spreads to befall them.

C: 有人意图引入外部势力，借机动摇家族对匹诺康尼的掌控；或是家族为了自保，被迫暗中向外界求援。
E: Someone is drawing in external influences to distract and disrupt The Family's control over Penacony. Either that, or The Family has been forced to seek outside aid surreptitiously for self-preservation.

C: 抱歉…我有点没听清，可以再说一遍吗？
E: Sorry. I couldn't hear you clearly. Could you repeat that?

C: 我来为各位传授一些在忆域中行动的小技巧吧。
E: I'll teach everyone some traversal tricks used in the Memory Zone.

C: 二位虽然不能像忆者一样直接穿过物理结构，但我想到一个好办法，能让你们安全无虞地抵达这个房间的正下层。
E: You two may not be able to phase through physical structures like Memokeepers, but I've got a great idea that will let you safely reach the floor right below this room.

C: 如果，能再来一次……
E: If I could try again...

C: 是星核猎手送了你们最后一程。
E: About the Stellaron Hunter who was behind your ultimate departure.

C: 是出口…沿着这边应该能离开……
E: It's an exit... Following this path should lead me out of this place...

C: 诶对了，好像那之后我还说了什么…是什么来着？
E: Oh right, I remember mentioning something after that... What was it again?

C: 「…日前，星际和平公司正式宣布——」
E: "A few days ago, the IPC made an announcement..."

C: 「令你的血脉永远鼓动……」
E: "Keep your blood eternally pulsing..."

C: …是公堂对簿，还是私下受审？
E: ...Is this a public hearing, or a private trial?

C: 我以为这件事会写在你的「剧本」上。
E: I thought this is just the kind of thing that'd get written into your "script."

C: 没事，他给的很多…
E: It's fine. I got a lot out of him, too...

C: 你记得，这是你和流萤初次相遇的地方。
E: The place where you and Firefly first met.

C: 之后的记忆…是一片空白？怎么可能…这只八音盒落入黄泉之手，被她带来匹诺康尼是事实，本该这样的…可中间的过程……
E: The memory after that... is blank? How is that possible... This music box fell into Acheron's hands, and she brought it to Penacony — that's a fact, and that's how it should have gone... but along the way...

C: 要塞？这比喻不错。前不久我才和伊伊玛尼喀星系的军阀打过交道，他们的同步轨道庄园都没这么戒备森严。
E: Fortress? I like this metaphor. I had dealt with the warlords of the Iymanika star system not long ago, and their synchronized orbital manor wasn't this heavily guarded.

C: 只是你看不见罢了！我说过，只有{RUBY_B#「家族」成员}「家人」{RUBY_E#}才能目视「机动骑士」的光辉——好了，快过去吧，别让星期日先生等急了。
E: That's because you can't see it! Like I say, only {RUBY_B#Member of The Family}Family{RUBY_E#} can see the glory of the "Mobile Knights." Enough, get going. Don't keep Mr. Sunday waiting.

C: 但别担心，我是站在您这边的。
E: But don't worry. I am on your side.

C: 当然会。
E: Of course.

C: 打开它吧，砂金先生…这是你维护自己名誉的最后机会。
E: Open it, Mr. Aventurine... It's your last chance to defend your honor.

C: 至少我们知道了下一步该找谁，顺便可以向猎犬家系打听下案情。
E: At least we know who to look for next. We can ask the Bloodhound Family for information.

C: 武、武装疏散？老大，你是不是喝醉了……
E: Ar—armed evacuation? Boss, are you drunk?

C: 那我就再想想办法。
E: I'll find another way then.

C: …什么，已经到点了？
E: ...Woah, it's this time already?

C: 又要重复这样的结果了吗…看来你我都陷入这绝望的轮回里了啊。
E: Am I destined to relive this outcome...? Looks like you and I have been plunged into a cycle of despair.

C: 尝试再次洞察他的内心。
E: Try reading his inner thoughts again.

C: 加拉赫先生，您好。听您的语气，您知道我们会来这里？
E: Hello, Mr. Gallagher, sir. Judging from your tone, it sounds like you were expecting us.

C: 梦境的声色犬马背后，是一座座「想象」的工厂。工人们日复一日地在梦中创造各种奇思妙想的商品，然后回到现实中在与豪华客房相去甚远的卧榻上休息。
E: Behind the Dreamscape's song and dance, stand many "imagination" factories. Workers create all kinds of whimsical works day in and day out in their dreams, then they return to reality and sleep on a narrow bed in a room — a far cry from luxury.

C: 听起来你只是把自己的惨状复述了一遍，用的还是极其嘴硬的方式。
E: Sounds like a very elaborate way of saying that you failed.

C: 壮汉神情复杂，仿佛在看着一只沾满泥水的麻雀，不能飞的鸟儿离死也不远了。
E: The expression on this hunk of a man was complex, as if he were looking at a mud-soaked sparrow, unable to fly and nearing its end.

C: （她还是不肯走…或许得再尝试一下。）
E: (She's still not leaving... Maybe I'll have to try again.)

C: 我…我可以帮她把路铺平——我能帮上她的忙！我回去就给梦主写信，控诉鸢尾花家系的罪行…舒翁肯定会感谢我的！
E: I... I can help clear the way for her. I can do her a favor! I'll go back and write a letter to the Dreammaster, exposing the crimes committed by the Iris Family... Siobhan will definitely appreciate it!

C: 基底选好了，接下来轮到辅料，它负责与基底产生奇妙的化学反应，不能喧宾夺主，又必须带来难忘的味觉体验，<color=#dbc291ff>你想选择哪种材料作为辅料</color>？
E: Now that you've chosen the base, it's time to pick the adjunct — the ingredient that'll create a marvelous chemical reaction with the base. It should give an unforgettable taste without overpowering the main tone. So, <color=#dbc291ff>what's your choice for the adjunct</color>?

C: 同心圆吸管。
E: Straws with concentric circles.

C: 可以啊，加拉赫，宝刀未老。
E: Well done, Gallagher. You're not over the hill yet.

C: 历史向来是由胜者书写，但抛开艺术加工的部分，《钟表小子》是以匹诺康尼历史为背景创作的动画，这是不争的事实。
E: History is always written by the winners. However, it's undeniable that Clockie is an animation that draws from Penacony's actual history.

C: 怎么看都不可能吧！
E: No way! Not even close!

C: 咦？这些特征……
E: Huh? Wait, these characteristics...

C: 成长的过程中总会获得许多，但也会失去许多。
E: Growing up brings gains, but also losses.

C: 愿公义早日得以彰显，但我个人还有一点疑问想请教星期日先生：家族究竟是如何断定凶手潜藏在内部的？
E: Let's hope justice will prevail soon. I have a question for you, if you don't mind: How did The Family come to the conclusion that the murderer was within The Family?

C: 咱们就在路上好好说道说道。
E: Let's have a heart-to-heart while we walk.

C: 可惜，你不如他。但凡你做了，也不会沦落至此…为什么不这么做呢？应该不是出于什么职业道德吧？
E: A pity you're not him. You wouldn't be in this state if you could just get with the program.... And why couldn't you? Out of professional integrity?

C: 你总会赢下去，你从未输过——但为什么是你？为什么…非得是你？
E: You will keep winning, having never lost before. But why you? Why... must it be you?

C: 「该氏族向处于公司保护下的『埃维金』氏族发起大规模袭击，造成<unbreak>6728</unbreak>人死亡，<unbreak>3452</unbreak>人失踪，伤者目前已被医疗救援组织『创伤战线』接收——」
E: "The clan launched a massive attack on the Avgin, who were under the protection of the IPC, resulting in <unbreak>6,728</unbreak> deaths and <unbreak>3,452</unbreak> missing. The casualties are currently under the care of the Frontline Trauma Team..."

C: 对了，在你临走前，我还有个比较私人的问题。
E: By the way, before you go, I have a personal question.

C: 我很早就获得了提示：如果哑巴指向的并非「不能发声之人」，那就只可能是「不能说话之人」……
E: I got the idea early on, chewing on that Masked Fool's little hint. If a mute isn't "someone who cannot make a sound," then it has to be "someone who cannot speak."

C: …在分别前，能再回答我一个问题么？身为走在那条路上的人，你能否告诉我……
E: ...Before we part, can you answer one more question? As someone who has traveled on that road, can you tell me...

C: <color=#ff3a3e>而「结局」…也会因此展现截然不同的意义。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>And because of this, the "end" will thus reveal a completely different meaning.</color>

C: 只是发表一下个人看法。怎么，戳到你痛处了？
E: Just expressing a personal opinion. Why, did I hit a nerve?

C: 不可欺凌弱小、不可滥杀无辜…这些个誓言可不是什么高高在上的信念，而是做人绝不应该触犯的底线。
E: Never bully the weak, never kill the innocent... These oaths aren't some lofty beliefs, but the fundamental bottom line that one must never cross as a person.

C: 没关系，我没放在心上。
E: It's all right. I didn't take it personally.

C: 咦？原来瓦尔特先生也了解忆质动力学，我正发愁怎么向各位介绍这座大空洞呢。既然如此，各位一定和科玫小姐很有共同语言！
E: Oh? So Mr. Yang is also versed in memoria dynamics. I was just trying to figure out how to explain this huge hole to everyone. I bet you guys have a lot in common with Miss Kaimee!

C: 姬子，我把他们带来了！
E: Himeko! Here they are.

C: 但是你看，现在爱玛和加里不再自卑，卡萝逐渐懂得如何面对失明的困扰，安迪比从前活泼了许多，甚至连我都变得更加乐观了。
E: But you know what? Emma and Gary aren't plagued by their insecurities anymore. No — and Carol is learning how to cope with her blindness. And Andy is livelier than ever. Well, even I've become more optimistic.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我…无论如何都希望它能活着。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>I... I want it to live, no matter what.</color>

C: 大家的表情都好严肃…有什么我能帮忙的吗？
E: You all look quite serious... Is there anything I can do to help?

C: 你是否愿意身体力行，领受罚赎？
E: Are you willing to accept the process of atonement?

C: 又是谁徒留他们在苦难的人间哀号？
E: ...then who— who is responsible for the suffering and anguish in this wretched world?

C: 天哪…是星期日先生！快来，这里！哈哈哈……
E: Oh, dear... it's Mr. Sunday! Hey, come over here! Hahaha...

C: 现出真身吧，你的诡计于我们无用。
E: Show yourself. Your trick won't work on us.

C: 我们认真将它在鸟笼里养大，每天喂食换水，梳理它的羽毛，后来…决定离开匹诺康尼的时候，我打开笼子的门，让它回到了天空。
E: Yeah, we took care of it — provided food and water, and groomed its feathers. And later... when I decided to leave Penacony, I opened the cage and set it free.

C: 自然如此。
E: Naturally.

C: 哼，果然是这样。
E: Hmph... so this is how it is.

C: 不急，咱们先喝几杯。也许是我来得太快了，她还没赶上。
E: No need to rush. Let's grab some drinks first. Maybe I arrived too early and she hasn't come yet.

C: 二位满意就好，请慢用。
E: As long as you are satisfied, dear guests. Please enjoy.

C: 曾有人这么对我说…每一场雨都是苍天对世界的怜悯。
E: Someone once told me... that every rainfall is like a gift from the heavens, a sign of their mercy upon the world.

C: 我呢，其实不太擅长弯弯绕绕，如果能干回老本行，很多事都会变得简单许多。
E: Well, going back to my old career would make things a lot easier.

C: 大家好，我是大家好。
E: Hello everyone, I'm "Hello Everyone."

C: 流程越来越复杂了，救命…
E: Ah, the plot thickens. Help!

C: 这就对了！这片海选会场正是那可能性时代的缩影。
E: That's right! This venue is a miniature representation of that time known as the era filled with boundless possibilities.

C: 我明白了，看来各位果真在为「纯美」之道四处奔走。
E: It's clear to me now. Evidently, you are traveling in pursuit of the Beauty's ideals.

C: 聊聊我们的困境和选择，我们各自的理想和信念……
E: Let's talk about our tribulations and choices, our ideals and beliefs...

C: ——纯美女神伊德莉拉美貌盖世无双！
E: ...Idrila, the Beauty, is the most peerless beauty of them all!

C: 我会的，但这要取决于此次谈判的结果。
E: Oh I intend to, but that hinges on the outcome of this negotiation.

C: 毕竟如果把它留在原地，肯定会被野兽伤到的…那样的话，小鸟也太可怜了。
E: After all, leaving it there, it's bound to get hurt by wild animals or something... And that'd just be too sad.

C: 其实我也不知道…
E: Too bad I don't know either...

C: 答案正是「星穹列车」。{NICKNAME}的经历证明，至少流萤小姐和黄泉小姐是看不见这位钟表小子的。
E: The answer lies in the Astral Express. {NICKNAME}'s experience shows that neither Firefly nor Acheron can see this Clockie.

C: 那我很快就要下去找你了，老东西。
E: Then I'll be joining you soon, you old fool.

C: 不，我在俄尔刻龙还有个同伴。她个头小小的，是个无名客，想把自己发射到「IX」里去…她总说自己要走一条「比阿基维利更深、更远的路」。
E: No, I had a companion in Orkron. She's a short Nameless girl who aspired to explore IX... She always said she'd walk a path "deeper and farther than Akivili's."

C: 因为这样的温暖，我也拥有过许多。很久以前，我和他人约定过，要把它带给更多的人，在余生的每一刻都去追寻…「对所有人都更好的结局」。
E: Because I have experienced this warmth many times. Long ago, I promised someone that I'd bring it to more people, and that for every remaining moment of my life, I'd strive for... a better ending for all.

C: 「会计！你我是宅邸的基柱，曾经盟誓团结一致，永不背弃——你为何要杀我？」
E: "Accountant! We are the pillars of this mansion, bound by an oath of loyalty and unity... Why are you plotting my downfall?"

C: 「已经不再有人能阻断你们的道路，你们自由了。」
E: "No one can restrain you any more! You are free!"

C: 怎么样？顺利吗？
E: How did it go?

C: 伤哉！有大伟力的星神……
E: How tragic! The Aeon with great might...

C: 我和姬子小姐一起吧。
E: I'll go with Miss Himeko.

C: 嗯，交给我吧。
E: Sure, leave it to me.

C: 有点意犹未尽就是了…
E: It kind of left me wanting more, you know...

C: 感觉很多东西还没讲清楚？
E: Seems like there are still lotsa loose ends, no?

C: 「琉璃光带」三票，江户星两票……
E: Three votes for the Glass Belt, two for Edo Star...

C: 三月七说得没错。虽然「求救信号突然中断」意味着我们多半来不及了…但我觉得还是先去确认一下为好。
E: March is right. Though the fact that the distress signals have ceased means we're probably too late... but I still think we should investigate the situation there.

C: 桑博
E: Sampo

C: 但失败不意味着你们的力量更弱小，相反，只有坚强的人才能站在美梦的对立面，打破「秩序」的约束。
E: Failure doesn't mean weakness. Only the strong can gather the will to resist the Order and try to break free.

C: 打退堂鼓了么？很可惜，人的意识总是趋向现实的。既然你已经察觉到了梦境的破绽，就没办法再回去了。
E: You want to go back? Unfortunately, human consciousness always gravitates toward reality. Now that you've seen the flaw in the dream, there is no turning back.

C: 想来，也只有「结盟玉兆」能做到了。
E: Looks like the Jade Abacus of Allying Oath will be the only solution.

C: 交给「巡海游侠」来解决。
E: Just leave it to us Galaxy Rangers.

C: ——而是让所有人选择自救。
E: ...But to inspire them to save themselves.

C: 一定会的。
E: Yes — that is certain.

C: 我有问题要问你。老实点，不然我现在就一枪把你爱死——
E: I have a question for you. Be honest now, or I won't think twice about puttin' a bullet in your fudgin' head.

C: 但我们还有机会靠其他方式扭转现状，先继续走吧。
E: However, there are still other things we can do. Let's keep going.

C: 大人物都还没到…看来离会谈开始还有一会儿。
E: None of the important figures have arrived yet... Looks like the conference won't be starting for a while.

C: 「震荡」？好官方的说法，还真是轻描淡写啊。
E: Reverberation? Such a formal way of putting it. You're really downplaying the whole thing.

C: 「安全起见」？这些按钮一样的玩意，是什么了不得的东西吗？
E: For my safety? Are these buttons something dangerous?

C: 对，但这样更好。知道为什么吗？
E: That's true, and it works in our favor. Do you know why?

C: 难怪他们会邀请星穹列车从中斡旋。依你之见，我们该站在哪边？
E: Well, no wonder they sought the mediation from the Astral Express. In your opinion, who should we stand behind?

C: 等待他的将是一场审判，至于更多的…家族不便透露。
E: He'll face a trial. As for further details... The Family would rather not disclose them.

C: 「溺甜」——调制难度最高的饮品之一。只要原料比例稍微失衡，口感就会变得过分浓稠、腥腻。
E: Drowning Sweetness... one of the most challenging drinks to make. A slight imbalance in the ingredients can result in an overwhelmingly viscous, sweet taste.

C: （「慈玉女士」？似乎从谁那里听过这个名字…是银狼吗？）
E: (Lady Bonajade? I think I've heard that name somewhere before... Was it from Silver Wolf?)

C: 废话少说，赶紧开始吧。
E: Enough talk. Let's get started.

C: 要是我赢了……
E: If I win...

C: 没问题，就叫这个名字无妨。
E: No problem. Let's just use this name.

C: 嗨，又见面了。
E: Hi, we meet again.

C: 我相信你的判断——你觉得哪组证物才是决定性的证据？
E: I trust in your deduction. Which piece of evidence do you think is the deciding one?

C: 这酷似匹诺康尼传奇动画品牌主人公「钟表小子」的声线登时令你警铃大作！远古深刻的肌肉记忆令你抡圆了胳膊，将娃娃抛向九霄云外——
E: The striking resemblance to the voice of the legendary Penaconian cartoon character "Clockie" instantly rings an alarm within you! The profound muscle memory from ancient times prompts you to swing your arms in a wide arc, catapulting the doll into the heavens.

C: 「芙莫」娃娃的眼睛眨都不眨。说真的，要是眨了那还怪吓人的。
E: The "Furmur" doll's eyes never blink. Honestly, if they did, it would be quite unsettling.

C: …总觉得，米哈伊尔先生肯定很想亲眼见证这一天吧。
E: ...I still feel that Mr. Mikhail must have really wanted to witness this day himself.

C: 嗯，我理解。珍惜此刻的心情，它能让你不忘来时的道路。
E: Yes, I understand. Cherish this moment, for it can help you remember the path you've traveled.

C: 你想叫啥就叫啥吧…
E: Eh... Close enough.

C: 时间差不多了，去办入学手续吧。
E: It's almost time. Let's proceed to admissions.

C: 为什么折纸大学的教职人员是美梦剧团？
E: Why are the faculty in Paperfold University from the Sweet Dreams Troupe?

C: 哈哈，各位同学是不是吓了一跳？别担心，我没有傻也没有疯，之所以用这个造型登台，只是为了向新同学们展现折纸大学的风貌——
E: Haha, did I surprise you? Don't worry, students. I've not gone mad. The reason I'm appearing before you like this is to show our new students the ethos of Paperfold University—

C: 天呐，是本人！居然能在学校里看见芮克先生！
E: Oh my gosh, it's him! It's Mr. Reca in the flesh in the school!

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 放心吧，等下批货出仓，我马上联系你们…不，直接给各位大佬送货上门！
E: Don't worry. Once the product leaves the warehouse, I'll contact you... No, I'll personally deliver it to you!

C: 你露出一个微笑，嘴角划出一道比香蕉还弯的弧度，有如黑云压城，令纪检部学生颤抖不已。
E: You flash a smile, your lips curving more than a banana, like a storm cloud looming, making the Disciplinary Committee students tremble.

C: …波提欧，是他么？
E: ...Is it Boothill?

C: 要联系家族吗？
E: Should we contact The Family?

C: 说是给乱破搭把手，但这地方哪有什么怪动静？
E: I get that I'm supposed to be helping Rappa, but I don't see anything strange going on here.

C: 得了吧，哥们，我还没问你呢。
E: Come off it, pardner. I ain't even said anything yet.

C: 呦呵——上哪儿去？
E: Hey — where you going?

C: 哈，倒是来了个识相的？
E: Hah. Finally, someone sensible.

C: 真没想到，竟然能在这种地方见到大明星。
E: I can't believe I just ran into a superstar, and in a place like this too.

C: 波提欧先生这是…咦，等等？
E: Mr. Boothill, you... Huh? Hang on.

C: 答案很简单，开火的是枪，但要人命的是子弹。
E: The answer's simple: The gun may fire, but it's the bullet that does the killin'.

C: 好了好了，我们很快就会布置好的。
E: Soon, soon. Everything will be set up real soon.

C: 还真是个脑子不好使的——我在找茬，懂了吗？
E: A little slow on the uptake, ain'tcha? I'm picking a fight here, pardner.

C: 我没有理由，不追求极致。
E: There's no reason for me not to seek perfection.

C: 别着急，哥们，现在还不够热闹——你就瞧好吧。
E: Patience, pal. Wait till the crowd starts spilling in. That's when it'll happen.

C: 是派对的氛围提前感染了您吗？
E: Is that because you're starting to get into the mood for the party early?

C: 就是就是，再怎么说刚才的批评也太过了。而且我的六相冰也不差嘛！
E: Yeah! You were being way too mean to her. And my Six-Phased Ice is pretty good too!

C: 我要好好学习！
E: I need to focus on my studies!

C: 财、财富蕉师！
E: F—Fortune BananAdvisor!

C: 赶紧住手！
E: Get your hands off him now!

C: 那在下就继续了——人心滋生出妖物，宴会化成了焦土，欢笑变为了嚎哭，过路的侠客出手相助。
E: Then I'll continue— From the hearts of men, monsters arise, the banquet turns to scorched earth, laughter to cries, a passing hero lends a hand, ha — no surprise.

C: 御猿屋戕害天下苍生，只为建立一座百祟•夜行的邪恶国度？
E: The endless atrocities that Osaru unleashed onto the world... just to build an Evil Realm where a hundred malevolent spirits prowl at night?

C: 因为它接受了错误的*蕉育*，所以博士要让误入歧途的世界变回充满潜力的胚胎，给予它们再次成长的机会，这就是返祖实验。
E: Having undergone a flawed Bananenlightenment, the Doctor seeks to return these misguided worlds to their embryonic potential, giving them a fresh chance to develop. This is the atavistic experiment.

C: 人尽其才，物尽其用。这么久了，还没学会这个知识点吗……
E: Whether imbued with life or not, everything ought to be used to its full potential. Ah, how long has it been now? I'm surprised that lesson hasn't stuck...
...What!?
...Huh?

C: 末法日下的终极•试炼…破除御猿屋的阵法，灭却笼罩此地的灾厄。
