E: The final trial of the Mappou Age... Destroy the matrix of Osaru's house and end the catastrophe that has befallen this land.

C: 请带上我的胶卷，将她的记忆变作破局的{RUBY_B#关键线索}「麦高芬」{RUBY_E#}吧。
E: Go on, take my film reel and turn her memories into the {RUBY_B#key clue}"MacGuffin"{RUBY_E#} that will shatter this plot once and for all.

C: 什、什么…这才不到两个系统时……
E: Wh—What...? It's not even two system hours...

C: *忍侠俚语*我可算懂了，这姑娘中了模因病毒。乖乖，换普通人早*忍侠俚语*成*忍侠俚语*了，她还能活蹦乱跳？
E: *Ninja Slang*, I get it now. This girl's infected with a memetic virus. *Ninja Slang*, most people would've turned into complete *Ninja Slang* by now, but she's still running around like nothing's wrong?

C: 不，老爹，我不回去。
E: No, Dad, I'm not going back.

C: 这里就是「睡蕉的时刻」吗？到处都是睡蕉小猴的踪迹，它们应该都是折纸大学和流梦礁的*蕉粉*吧。
E: Is this the Moment of Slumbernana? This place is crawling with Slumbernana Monkeys. I'm guessing they're the Ripe Bananas from Paperfold University and Dreamflux Reef.

C: 飞龙忍者，无需犹豫。若有埋伏，便破埋伏；若有诡计，便破诡计。
E: There's no need for hesitation, Ninja Hiryū. If there's an ambush, we foil the ambush. If there's a scheme, we thwart the scheme.

C: 三月七
E: March 7th

C: 现在看来…这或许也是一种命运使然。
E: Looking at how things have unfolded, fate might have had a role in it.

C: 说得对，我不想掺和。
E: Exactly. No way am I getting involved.

C: 情势危急，又事关白厄的性命，无名客自然当仁不让。我们该怎么做？
E: Things have taken a critical turn, especially so with Phainon's life on the line. Of course, we Nameless will do what is necessary. How should we help?
(What...)

C: 哈…哈哈……
E: Ha... Haha...

C: 那就好说了。把那个窝囊的剑士交出来，让我们尽快结束这场闹剧。
E: Great. Let's cut to the chase, then. Hand over that poor excuse for a swordmaster so we can be done with this farce.

C: 我平素喜欢收集工艺品，前些日子在云石市集上看见有人兜售这个小东西，就出价买了下来，摆在小铺当作装饰品。
E: See, I have a little hobby of collecting handicrafts. Some time ago, I found this trinket being sold at the Marmoreal Market and bought it to use as decoration at my stall.

C: 这倒无妨。但这若真是雅努萨波利斯的遗物，恐怕价值不菲。遐蝶小姐，我毕竟是个商人，您看……
E: Certainly. It's just... if it truly is a relic from Janusopolis, it could be worth a small fortune... Miss Castorice, I'm running a business here, after all, so...

C: 在那里同样驻扎着几名黄金裔，其中就有风堇小姐和那刻夏老师。
E: Several Chrysos Heirs are based in the Grove, including Miss Hyacine and Professor Anaxa.

C: 当时还有一名「昏光庭院」的同伴与我同来，我已经让她提前整理好行李在城门口等待了。我们去跟她会合吧！
E: I came here with a colleague from the Twilight Courtyard. I've asked her to pack her luggage in advance, so she's already waiting for us by the city gates. Let's go meet up with her!

C: …我明白了。愿命运为这位不幸的人网开一面。
E: I understand. May fate have mercy on this poor man.

C: 为什么不直接用「百界门」？
E: Are we not using the Century Gate?

C: 迷迷也想试试吗？那…换你来？
E: Hehe, Mem wants to try sewing? Here, why don't you give it a go?

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，我们一起上吧。
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, let's do this.

C: ——没有，因为水车得有水才能动。真是太让人遗憾了。
E: — No, because it needs water to turn. What a pity.

C: 来无影去无踪啊…真是个怪人。
E: Coming and going without a trace... She's such a strange person.

C: 没关系！缇安，刚刚才飞下来来着。
E: It's all right! Trianne only just flew down.

C: 金色的睡莲甫一与琥珀相接，火光便自花瓣流溢而出。
E: As the golden water lily touches the amber, flames spill from its petals.

C: 嗯？宝珠映出的时空…生着睡莲呢。
E: Hm? The time dimension revealed by the orb shows... water lilies growing there.

C: 唔，金线抖得越来越厉害了……
E: Ugh, the golden thread is vibrating more and more violently...

C: 换个地方说话吧，迈德漠斯。跟这石头脑袋交谈，我已经厌烦了。
E: Let's talk somewhere else, Mydeimos. I'm tired of speaking with this silly lion.

C: 但那只是结果。
E: That was merely the final outcome.

C: 可笑。能杀死一位王的只有长枪，就连悬锋的婴儿都明白这个道理。
E: Don't be ridiculous. The only thing that could slay a king is a spear... Even an infant knows that much.

C: 就从这孩子开始——就在我染血的双手中结束。
E: ...Starting with this child. With these bloodstained hands, I will end it all.

C: …我会和你一起祈祷的。
E: ...I will pray with you.

C: …那就恕我僭越了，阁下。
E: ...Please forgive my presumptuousness, my lords.

C: …什么？
E: ...Huh?

C: 你别太过分！他可是……
E: How can you say that!? He's your...

C: 请别开玩笑了…她大概确实在忙。我们稍等片刻，我尝试用石版联络一下。
E: Please don't jest... It's possible that she really is busy. Let's wait here a moment, and I'll try to contact her using the slate.

C: 还有那黑袍的剑士…
E: And that black-robed swordmaster...

C: 转起来了！还有声音……
E: It's rotating! And I can hear something...

C: <size=36>妈妈…！</size>
E: <size=36>Mama...!</size>
Ah...

C: 你说万敌么？他正在解决另一桩难题呢。
E: You mean Mydei? He's dealing with a different problem.

C: 死神也抛弃了你啊，吾师。
E: I see the Reaper has forsaken you, too, teacher.

C: 虽未有机会与你交心，但共同经历了这么多…万敌，你同样是「开拓」的盟友。
E: Though we never had a chance for a deep conversation, after all we've experienced together... you are also an ally of the Trailblaze, Mydei.

C: 我将担起你们的信任，令世界不再受恐惧主宰。
E: I will honor your trust and liberate the world from the clutches of fear.

C: 请为我们抵御黑潮，守护者…
E: Please fend off the black tide for us, Guardian...

C: 为什么…阿格莱雅没告诉你们吗？我们受命前来协助各位，围猎盗火行者。
E: What...? Didn't Aglaea tell you? We have been instructed to assist you in trapping the Flame Reaver.

C: …无论如何，泰坦之死已成定局。我们得归还{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的火种。
E: Regardless, the Titan has fallen, and we must surrender {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame.

C: 放心吧，我不想自讨苦吃。
E: Don't worry. I don't want trouble either.

C: 它一定存在，风堇。记得吗？指引黄金裔的神谕，是刻法勒缄默前留下的声音。
E: It exists, Hyacine. Do you not remember? The prophecy that guides the Chrysos Heirs is the voice of Kephale before it fell silent.

C: 还是在扰乱时空？
E: Or disrupting the spacetime dimension?

C: 这样啊！我也是来见圣女大人的。可惜听卫兵说，她今天要出远门呢。
E: Oh, really? I was here to meet the Holy Maiden as well! But the guard said she had to go somewhere far away today.

C: 那更好啦，没人会打扰我和妈妈聊天了。
E: Perfect. That way, no one will disturb me while I'm talking to Mother.

C: 以羔羊的热血，和我紧握利刃的右手封证……
E: By the blood of the lamb and the strength of my blade-wielding right hand...

C: 光历<unbreak>3870</unbreak>年 自由月
E: Light Calendar <unbreak>3870</unbreak>, Month of Freedom

C: 缇宝大人，你依然觉得……
E: Lady Tribbie, do you still think...

C: 如果我们总是严阵以待…「死亡」又怎敢轻易找上门呢？
E: If we're always so guarded, how can "Death" reach us easily?

C: 那个黑袍的剑士呢？
E: What about the black-robed swordmaster?

C: 我当然不是这个意思…又或者说，我就是这个意思……
E: That's not what I meant... or maybe that is what I meant...

C: 自琥珀王之石心中流溢而出的七个魂灵……
E: Seven souls flowing from the Amber Lord's stony heart...

C: 哼哼哈哈哈，打不死你也累死你！
E: Bwahaha! If I can't kill you, I'll exhaust you!

C: 蒙您的召唤而来，我是…Caster。
E: Summoned at your request, I am... Caster.

C: 不过直到踏足这里，这个名叫「流梦礁」的地方，我才明白这确实是个会被「圣杯」选中的世界。
E: But it wasn't until we arrived at this place, Dreamflux Reef, that I truly understood why the Holy Grail chose this world.

C: 所以——
E: Now —

C: 像你这样的家伙，能挤进黑塔空间站就已经耗尽人生所有的好运了，但我还是象征性地确认一下。
E: Someone like you has probably already burned through all your luck just trying to get into the Herta Space Station, but I'll go through the motions and confirm it anyway.

C: ……你是否清醒？要不要请假去医疗科看看脑子？
E: ... Are you dreaming or something? Maybe you should take a sick day and get a check-up at the Medical Department.

C: 我真是研究员？
E: Am I really a researcher?

C: 没事儿，你在这儿干活，我在这儿摸鱼，咱们各取所需。
E: Well, no worries. You work here, and I'll slack off. We each get what we need.

C: 哎，居然连晚上的会议室都预约空了，这里的人可真是勤勉。
E: Ugh, the conference rooms are fully booked even at night. People here really are workaholics.

C: 最终，鸟儿和一块怀表、一头狼还有无数同伴一起冲破了牢笼。
E: In the end, the bird broke free, with a pocket watch, a wolf, and countless companions by her side.

C: 老奥帝先生或许能实现你的愿望，但他索要的却是更高昂的利益。这一点，和他曾同处于一个时代的你比我更清楚。
E: Old Oti may be able to fulfill your wish, but the cost he demands is far greater. As someone born in the same era as him, you should know this better than I do.

C: 后悔？这世上哪有不会后悔的人？
E: Why speak of regrets when everyone who has ever lived has regretted something?

C: 所有向你说话的声音在瞬间沉默了，他们不再开口。
E: The voices that once spoke to you fell silent in an instant. They never spoke again.

C: 因为你的逝去，歌者和艺人们开始懂得为自己从商人手中争取自由和尊严。你绝不是什么寂寂无名的影子，你是匹诺康尼五大家系中鸢尾花一支的创始者！
E: Your death was what made singers and artists realize the need to reclaim their freedom and dignity from merchants. You are not some forgotten shadow, you are the founder of the Iris family, one of the five major lineages of Penacony!

C: 这就是商业合作，不管你的合作者有多么出色，最重要的环节还得自己来解决。
E: But that's the business world for you. No matter how capable your collaborator is, you've gotta handle the most critical parts yourself.

C: 我喜欢看见敌人被各种手段揉扁搓圆，最后血本无归！我喜欢将那些连名字都没听过的企业大笔一挥收购，成为我巨大商业版图的一部分！
E: I like seeing my business rivals being crushed and manipulated, and then lose everything in the end! I like to acquire companies that I've never heard of, fusing them into my empire with a mere wave of my pen!

C: 所以来谈谈合作如何？无论是谁，只要能将其他人排除，我就把向圣杯许愿的资格让渡给他。
E: Why don't we discuss... a collaboration instead? Whoever can eliminate the others shall have the chance to make their wish to the Holy Grail. I will give you that right.

C: 很遗憾，没有任何一位御主在这次事件中受伤，就算是向他问责，怕是也只会被他用他最熟悉的两样手段——最顶尖的律师团队，还有天价的赔偿给糊弄过去。
E: Unfortunately, no Master was harmed in the making of this show. Even if we tried to hold him accountable, he'd probably just brush it off with his usual tricks — the best legal team money can buy and sky-high compensation.

C: 所以，他把这场「圣杯战争」中最有价值的东西送给了我们。
E: So instead, he gave us the most valuable thing from this Holy Grail War.

C: 您要是被这该死的牛仔绑架了，就冲我眨眨眼！难道说…啧，你们是老相识了啊。
E: Sir! If that blasted cowboy's got you kidnapped at gunpoint, just gimme a blink! Or... or maybe... you two are actually friends?

C: 如此空旷的环境，如果对方派出Archer在远处发动袭击，我们会陷入相当被动的境地。
E: In a wide-open area like this, if the enemy sends Archer to attack from range, we'll lose the initiative and be at a serious disadvantage.

C: 现在，是三个傻子了。异世界圣杯战争的御主们如此缺乏警惕心…真是令人眉头上的皱纹都变多了。
E: Now it's three blockheads. Masters of an otherworldly Holy Grail War, and not a hint of caution among them... That's how I end up with frown lines.

C: 怪我年少轻狂…
E: Look, I was young and didn't know what I was doing...

C: 拉姆瑞三世，我将爱马的名字赐予你。现在，随我一同讨伐眼前的邪魔！
E: I bestow upon you the name of my beloved steed, Llamrei III. Now, come with me — let us vanquish the evil before us!

C: 啊——啊！
E: Ahhh!

C: 这台电视机是解开诅咒的关键，对吗？
E: This TV is the key to lifting the curse, isn't it?

C: 盗版角色的能力值，不需要考虑剧情的战力平衡。
E: Knockoff characters don't need to worry about power balancing in the story.

C: 你要向葛瑞迪效忠？
E: You're actually pledging yourself to Grady?

C: 那么，抱歉啦，各位——我投降了，投降。
E: Well then, sorry everyone — I surrender, I give up.

C: 「除汉堡外的食物均不可食用，尤其是冰淇淋」…该不会是你定的规矩吧？
E: "No consumption of food other than burgers, especially ice cream." ...Please tell me you didn't make this rule.

C: 我有点想杀了你……
E: Now, I'm feeling murderous...

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>「请勿在花坛附近倒立前进。」</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>"Handstand walks around flowerbeds are prohibited."</color>

C: 这点不用你强调啦，都看得出来！
E: Bah, you don't have to tell him that! He can see for himself!

C: 看来是段漫长的故事啊。
E: Looks like there's a lot more to this story.

C: 要我说，把那位打圆场的带走，很快就能看到结果了。
E: Well, if you ask me... Take the people pleaser out of the picture, and they'll arrive at a conclusion in no time at all.

C: 你…怎么不会飞呀？
E: You... can't fly? Why?

C: 小女子随波逐流，哪有什么意见呢，列位决定便好。
E: I go as the wind blows, so you may decide for me.

C: …等等？！
E: ...Wait!?

C: 列位的仙舟之行，小女子也听了七七八八，不得不感叹那幻胧伪装之精妙，恰如世上的另一个我，骗过了所有人。
E: I've heard about what happened to you on the Xianzhou, and I've got to admit, that Phantylia's disguise was so perfect, it was like another me tricking everyone.

C: 在两位看来，小女子与记忆中的那人…称得上别无二致吗？
E: In your eyes, am I just like the Tingyun you remember?

C: 先前已经看了一批礼物，只剩下三位没有着落。不过方才耽搁了不少时间，怕是不能再慢悠悠地晃荡啦……
E: I already picked up a few gifts earlier, so that means there's only three more left to go. But we've already lost a lot of time, so we'd better not drag our feet...

C: 彼时，眼见天地铺开，不见边际，我深深为此着迷，不是因为站在高处，而是意识到了一件事——
E: The boundless cosmos unfolded before me. I was completely mesmerized, not just by the view, but by a realization—

C: 我们不必一起飞上天际。
E: We don't have to soar into the sky together.

C: 为什么突然问这个？
E: Why the sudden interest?

C: 讲俏皮话要用心，别用技巧——更不要每次都解释。
E: When telling jokes, be sincere. Don't sweat the details, and above all, don't explain them every time.

C: 我会一直盯着你的。
E: I'll have my eye on you at all times.

C: 你将好看的垃圾放入了桶内以示重视，一转眼，桶中多出了更多好看的垃圾——真是聚宝盆原理的一种错误应用。
E: You insert Pleasant-Looking Trash into the bin as a sign of consideration, and in the blink of an eye, more Pleasant-Looking Trashes emerge — what an inappropriate application of the Horn of Plenty concept.

C: 这种机会很难得吗？
E: An opportunity hard to come by?

C: 也许帕姆不是？况且，就算是星图上标注的世界，也会发生日新月异的变化。
E: Maybe not for Pom-Pom. And worlds that have been mapped on the astral charts also present new surprises from time to time.

C: 我施展了一点小魔术，让你们也能看清它的样貌。
E: I used a little magic so all of you can also see what it looks like.

C: …乘以的是我的寿命哦。
E: ...I meant my lifetime.

C: <unbreak>0126</unbreak>……
E: <unbreak>0126</unbreak>...

C: 这位老人家，请你不要冲动——
E: Don't make this decision in haste, sir—

C: 要拎着我们飞过去吗？
E: Are you going to carry and fly us across?

C: 什么，竟然是大祭司大人？！
E: What? You're the high priest!?

C: 由他们去吧。就像诺杜斯先生崇敬{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}一样，在摇摇欲坠的末世，信仰已是一些人生命的全部。
E: Leave them be. Just as Mr. Noldus reveres {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, faith is all some people have left in a world teetering on the brink of collapse.

C: 无需再确认两位的决心了。我们即将与「纷争」的化身兵戎相见，可悬锋恫吓之下，你们的意志反而愈发耀眼。
E: There's no need to further confirm your resolve. We shall soon cross swords with the embodiment of Strife. And yet, faced against this menacing threat, your resolve only gleams more intensely.

C: 完成这一步交换，我才能允诺你们在翁法罗斯的旅程一帆风顺。
E: Fulfill this pact between us, and you can expect your journey on Amphoreus to be free of troubles.

C: 拯救世界是我们的专长。
E: Saving the world is what we do best.

C: 哦？那还真是了不起呀。
E: Really? That's pretty impressive!

C: 我和她达成了共识。
E: We reached an agreement.

C: 我们来自「塔拉萨波利斯」，一个人烟稀少的边陲村落。为前来圣城，我们经历了重重险阻，有幸在重渊与白厄阁下结识，才抵达这里。
E: We're from Thalassopolis, a sparsely populated frontier village. Our journey to the holy city was fraught with challenges but thankfully, we were able to make our way here after meeting Phainon at the Abyss.

C: 不麻烦。请把留影石机放在地上。
E: No problem. Please place the photostone on the ground.

C: 众神啊，请聆听我愿：
E: Gods, please hear my wish:

C: 哈哈，语气出卖了你，朋友！我明白，你想用尽一切办法挽留我——
E: Haha, my friend, your tone has betrayed you! I understand that you're trying to persuade me to stay...

C: 照他们俩说的做，否则…我就徒手将你碾成铁粉。
E: Do as they say. Otherwise... I'll turn you into iron dust with my bare hands.

C: 感谢你出手相助。
E: Thank you for your help.

C: 你们两个，到底干嘛去啦？*我们*在这等了好久，翅膀都扇不动啦。
E: Where have the two of you been? We've been waiting here for quite some time. Even our wings are tired.

C: 留在这段记忆的时间已经所剩无几…要把道别的机会留给卡芙卡吗？
E: There is very little time left to stay in this memory... Do you want to leave the chance of bidding goodbye to Kafka?

C: …这是什么意思？
E: ...What is the meaning of this?

C: 出于勇气，无私，侠义之心！
E: Because of our courageous spirit and selfless hearts!

C: 异乡人——<color=#dbc291ff>倘若形势剧变，你是否可能将刀尖对准奥赫玛，还有它的公民？</color>
E: Outlanders, <color=#dbc291ff>if the current situation changed dramatically, could you eventually point your blades at Okhema and its citizens?</color>

C: 无论你们作何选择，黄金裔都会继续奔赴神谕中的宿命。
E: Regardless of your choice, the Chrysos Heirs will continue to follow the path in the prophecy.

C: 请你相信一名战士的直觉。
E: Please believe a warrior's intuition.

C: 你不要过来啊…
E: D—Don't come near me...

C: 咳咳…站稳啦，听好啦！
E: Ahem! Stand still and listen up!

C: 遐蝶  ？？
E: Castorice?

C: 总算遇到点像样的抵抗了。
E: Finally, opponents who look like they can put up a fight.

C: 站着不动，是打算投降了？
E: Why are you just standing there? Giving up already?

C: 让我也看看。
E: Let me have a look.

C: 也许，你们的到来…会颠覆很多事吧。
E: Maybe your arrival will overturn many things we thought we knew.

C: 哈！看来赢家是我们啊。
E: Aha! Looks like we won!

C: …狮首？
E: ...Leo?

C: …坚持住，别死太多次了。
E: ...Stay strong. Try not to get killed too many times.

C: 厮杀到万物殆尽吧！
E: Let's battle till the world's final breath!

C: 「漂亮的配合！这两位角斗士——」
E: "What marvelous teamwork! These two gladiators..."

C: 之前在创世涡心，听你们提起过她。
E: You guys mentioned her in the Vortex of Genesis earlier.

C: 缇宝已在城外等待，随她前往重渊吧。我会向{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}祈求诸位的成功。
E: Tribbie is waiting for you outside the city — go with her to the Abyss. I will pray to {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} that you will find success.

C: …但托盘纹丝不动，你的手臂被巨大的反作用力振得发麻。
E: ...But it doesn't budge. And your arm feels numb from the strong recoil.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 总算来了啊，{NICKNAME}。
E: You're finally here, {NICKNAME}.

C: 那真是太好了。
E: That's fantastic.

C: 我们通过了它的考验，我想{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}有些惊诧。
E: I think that even {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} themself is surprised that we managed to clear the challenge.

C: 不留活口…对吗？
E: Leave no survivors... Right?

C: 骇入成功，状态回满！
E: Hack successful. Condition recovered!

C: 也带上我吧，白厄。与其在后方等待，不如让我也上前线，为你们分担压力。
E: Let me come too, Phainon. I'd rather be on the front lines, helping ease the burden.

C: …谢谢，我没有拒绝的理由。
E: ...Thank you. I don't have any reason to refuse.

C: 往世…复现，由我。
E: Past... Recreate, I will.

C: （不…没什么。你要记得，以后不可以独自在街上玩耍…即便是在奥赫玛。）
E: (Nothing. But promise me you won't play on the streets alone from now on, even in Okhema.)

C: 我会尽己所能拯救翁法罗斯，凯妮斯阁下。不论是从诸神手中……
E: I will employ every means at my disposal to save Amphoreus, Elder Caenis. Whether it means wresting it from the grasp of the gods...

C: 遐蝶。
E: Castorice.

C: 我们为找到毁灭{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的方法而来。我们收到了…一则情报，失去理智的纷争泰坦正在为自己打造不朽的躯体。
E: We came here to find a way to destroy {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}. We received... intel that the Titan of Strife had lost their reason and is now trying to create an immortal vessel for themself.

C: 「继续迎接挑战者，让他们一直战斗下去…只有让{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}沉醉在战争的气息中，才能压制它的疯狂。」
E: "Keep the challengers coming and have them fight till the end... only by letting {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} revel in the chaos of war can we control their descent into madness."

C: 内在…平静。
E: Inner... peace.

C: 你又进入了…和{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}那时一样的状态。
E: You were in the same state as when you were with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…他们还在战斗。
E: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}... They're still locked in battle.

C: 你能感觉到吗，{NICKNAME}？他好像心事重重。
E: Did you pick up on that, {NICKNAME}? He seems troubled.

C: 我明白，当时的情况容不得犹豫，我阻拦你也只是下意识的反应……
E: I know. We should not have hesitated then. I stopped you before I even realized it myself...

C: 每隔五至十年，元老院便会在<color=#dbc291ff>黎明云崖</color>举办公民大会。
E: Every five to ten years, the <color=#dbc291ff>Council of Elders</color> organizes a citizens' assembly at Dawncloud.

C: 姑且称他们为「反对派」吧。过去百年召开的十余次大会上，支持反对派的声浪一直在暗中壮大。幸亏有阿格莱雅坐镇，逐火之旅才能延续至今。
E: We can refer to them as the opposition. During the assemblies held in the past hundred years, the voices supporting the opposition have been growing stronger in the shadows. It's only thanks to Aglaea that the Flame-Chase Journey has been able to continue to this day.

C: 放心吧，没问题的。
E: Don't worry. Everything will be fine.

C: 你怎么会说话了？！
E: How are you able to talk!?

C: 遐蝶，你在颤抖。
E: Castorice, you're shaking.

C: 刚才的行为唐突无礼，若有冒犯，恳请{NICKNAME}阁下能原谅。
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, if my abrupt behavior just now offended you, I hope that you can forgive me.

C: 难怪你要拜托我来解答你那没头没脑的问题。
E: Now I understand. No wonder you asked me to answer your random, nonsensical questions.

C: 你知道吗？这恰恰是我最宝贵的天赋之一。
E: Well, what do you know! That happens to be one of my rare talents.

C: 乐观些，格奈乌斯。吾等既已找上门来，他总该不会让旧友颜面扫地吧？
E: Look on the bright side, Gnaeus. Since we've come all this way, I doubt he'd snub his old friends, would he?

C: 现在……
E: Currently...

C: 阿格莱雅大人，请听我一言。
E: Lady Aglaea, please, let me explain.

C: 还差三十二本没读啦！
E: ...Only <unbreak>32</unbreak> books to go!

C: 为了纪念德拉孔，一位老行刑人，哀地里亚行刑官常用的重剑被称作「德拉孔尼安」。
E: In Aidonia, the greatswords commonly used by executioners are called "Drakonian" in memory of Drakon, an elderly executioner.

C: 那是一段很长、很长的路，我听过太多对死亡的议论。「生命从死亡中寻获意义」、「万物因终结而前进」……
E: It was a long, long journey... I heard so many discussions about death along the way. "Life finds meaning in death." "The world improves because there is an end"...

C: 我没有理由不倾尽全力……
E: I have no reason not to give it my all...

C: …确实是她会做的事。
E: ...Exactly the kind of thing she would do.

C: 这…这怎么能行呢！您的灵魂已几近消散了，阁下……
E: N-No! Your soul is almost gone for good...

C: 瑟希斯在上，人究竟是有多么怯懦，竟同时畏惧着生和死？
E: Cerces above! What cowards humans are, for we fear both life and death simultaneously.

C: 从刚才开始…我就隐约有所预感。但斯缇科西亚的一切，我的确全然不知……
E: I've already had an inkling for a while now... But I honestly have no memories of Styxia...

C: 黑潮造物…从什么时候……
E: Black tide creations... When did they...

C: 出风头的时候到了。
E: Looks like it's your time to shine.

C: 小小蝶笑了！缇宝、缇宁、缇安的心愿，终于完成了。
E: Little Cas smiled! Tribbie, Trinnon, and Trianne's wish has finally come true.

C: 因为…它一开始就为我而身陨，如今正静静地沉睡于冥河之中。
E: That's because the Titan she became already fell at the start of everything... They died for me and now lie in slumber in the River of Souls.

C: 玻吕刻斯，我会将你从冥河中抽离，然后重塑。或许你将因此受到惊扰，身形残缺可怖……
E: Pollux, I shall lift you from the River of Souls and reforge your soul. Perhaps you will be disturbed by this, and your body may become horrifying to behold...

C: 小心，尽管只出于本能，但它正积蓄着盛怒——
E: Be careful. They may be moving by instinct, but there is fury welling up within them —

C: 还记得我吗？我就是你曾经护送过的，那个横渡冥海的女孩。
E: Do you remember me? I'm the girl you once carried across the Sea of Souls.

C: 阁下的眼睛，似乎能看清过去和未来……
E: You seem to be able to discern both the past and the future...

C: 纵使那女孩才是邪恶，你也绝无理由为那魔物开脱。
E: Even if that girl is evil, there's no reason for you to absolve that monster.

C: 票数相等，形成了绝佳的平衡。
E: Each faction holds an equal share of the votes, resulting in the perfect balance.

C: 我，卑劣可耻的渎神者，应受死刑制裁……
E: I, the vile, wretched blasphemer, deserve nothing less than death for my sins...
You...

C: 「金织」阿格莱雅女士，我请求您秉承{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}之公平，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}之正义，主持判决——
E: Lady Aglaea, the Goldweaver, I humbly ask that you take on the responsibility of overseeing this judgment, in the name of the fairness of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} and the justice of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}...

C: 我失去了一只眼睛，视野却比任何人都更明朗。你人性将尽…与我这行尸走肉差不了多少了。
E: I may have lost an eye, but my vision is clearer than anyone else. You've nearly exhausted your humanity. You're no different from my current state as a walking corpse.

C: 这一次…嘿嘿嘿…您打算用个什么形象呐？
E: Hehehe... What kind of appearance are you planning to use this time?

C: 思维折射，功率已经拉到最大。
E: Thought Refraction, at max power.

C: 但在得知此举必将导致的后果后，您也会放弃尝试。毕竟，在您漫长的人生中——即便您可能不会承认——「良知」扮演了极为重要的角色。
E: You will surely give up once you understand the consequences of your actions. After all, throughout your long life — as much as you'd hate to admit — your conscience has played a crucial role.

C: 这只是开玩笑，对吧。
E: That was a joke... right?

C: 泰坦造物…
E: Creations of Titans...

C: 当然，是假的。这只是教学装置，不起眼的魔术。
E: Of course not. This is just an image from a projection device used for educational purposes. A simple trick.

C: 风堇和丹恒传来消息：那刻夏可能会对{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的神躯有所动作。
E: I have news from Hyacine and Dan Heng. Anaxa might be trying to do something with {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s divine body.

C: 诸位，告诉我——
E: Tell me, dear citizens...

C: 更可怕的是，死者的灵魂死而有憾，被冥界拒之门外。徘徊在人间的怨灵汇成冥河，久久不能退去。
E: Worse still, the souls of the deceased were refused entry to the nether realm because they were filled with regret. Forced to roam the mortal realm, these resentful souls ultimately converged into a River of Souls, that would not retreat for a long time.

C: 唉…汝还真会出难题。
E: Ugh, you really know how to make things difficult.

C: 这世上的离别皆是哀伤，阁下。
E: All farewells in this world are sorrowful, Lord Gnaeus.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>想想巨龙童话——这枚石子定将指引你回到真正的故乡，重铸冥界大门，找到</color>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>死亡之泰坦</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>塞纳托斯</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>的下落。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Think about the story of the dragon. This stone will lead you to your real hometown, allowing you to reform the door to the nether realm and discover</color> {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Death Titan</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>Thanatos</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>'s fate.</color>

C: 翼兽大人，你们…你们想做什么？！
E: Your Highness, what are you planning to do!?

C: 呵…我早已预料到这一天的到来。
E: Ha... I've long seen this day coming.

C: 即便如此，我们还是建立起了宏伟的城邦，繁盛的文明！即使常常深陷恶意的泥沼，我们依旧挣扎着爬行……
E: Yet, despite everything, we built great city-states and thriving civilizations! Even when trapped in the mud of malice, we continued to struggle and push forward...

C: 传说的真实样貌…终于完整了。
E: The truth of the legend... is finally clear.

C: 电闪雷鸣……
E: Lightning and thunder...

C: 所以…最后还有一件事…我必须要告诉你……
E: There's one last thing I must tell you...

C: （啊对对对——创世神谕，变成一块死石头的泰坦…老生常谈了，还有什么新鲜的？）
E: (Oh, the Prophecy of Genesis. The Titan turned to stone... Heard it a thousand times. Old news. What else you got?)

C: 唷，居然是悬锋钢的——这帮家伙的装备还挺精良。
E: Wow, it's crafted from Kremnoan steel — these people are well-equipped.

C: 再陪我多玩一会儿呗！反正你也没别的事干，对吧？
E: Stick around and play with me a bit longer! It's not like you've got anything better to do, is it?

C: 嗯！白厄阁下已经定好了出征的日子。身为天空英雄的后裔，我必须要做好准备，担起责任。
E: Yes! Lord Phainon has already set the date for our departure. As a descendant of the Sky hero, I must prepare myself and carry this responsibility.

C: 燃烧的天空、破碎的巨像，还有尸横遍野…糟透了。如果这就是「翁法罗斯」内部的样貌，那确实叫人意外。
E: Burning skies, shattered statues, corpses strewn everywhere... What a mess. If this is what the inside of "Amphoreus" looks like, it's truly shocking.

C: 不必紧张，白厄阁下。我踏入此间，只是为了一个纯粹的目的：亲眼见证神谕中「创世的奇迹」。
E: No need to panic, Lord Phainon. I stepped into this space purely for one purpose: To witness the prophecy's Miracle of Genesis.

C: 要翻开新的一页了么？
E: ...turn a new page?

C: 对，而且这气息…有点熟悉……
E: Yes, and this aura... feels so familiar.

C: 不会。如我所说，我始终保持中立。
E: I will not. As I said, I remain neutral.

C: 《我的教授不可能那么娇羞》
E: My Professor Can't Possibly Be This Shy

C: 灵活运用，不要死记硬背。
E: Use them flexibly. Don't just memorize.

C: 对哦…传说里是怎么记载的来着？唔……
E: Right... How does the legend go again? Hmm...

C: （将计就计…就先陪你玩一会儿吧，<color=#dbc291ff>「巴特鲁斯」</color>。）
E: (I'll play along... Let's see where this goes, <color=#dbc291ff>"Bartholos."</color>)

C: 这玩意一启动，发出的动静几里外都能听得清清楚楚——真是蠢得没边啦！也不知道当时……
E: Once activated, this thing makes a racket that can be heard for miles — just too stupid! What was—...

C: 你…流着金黄色的血呢。
E: You... you're bleeding golden blood.

C: 我们会来这里，<color=#dbc291ff>只是为了保证你们不在别处。</color>
E: We came only <color=#dbc291ff>to ensure you weren't anywhere else.</color>

C: 「…哈托努斯。」
E: "...Chartonus."

C: 宣告她的死讯…是我作为医师做过的最艰难的事。
E: Declaring her death was the hardest thing I've ever had to do as a doctor.

C: 另一样东西，还有……
E: Another thing, there is...

C: 以此种方式，她想陪伴你们，无论如何。
E: In this way, she wanted to be with you, always.

C: 不用谢啦！你的光芒，很耀眼！继续，保持！
E: Don't mention it! Your light is as bright as ever. Keep it up and stay strong!

C: 再见啦，小白~
E: See you, Snowy.

C: 白厄阁下，你…总是那么平易近人。
E: Lord Phainon, you... have always been so approachable.

C: 约好了，迈德漠斯。
E: It's a date, Mydeimos.

C: 裁缝女，我问你！
E: Seamstress! Tell me!

C: 也许他打听到了什么……
E: Maybe he's heard something...

C: 没错，吾师…「美丽」。
E: That's right, teacher. "Beauty."

C: 我回来了……
E: I'm back...
Hee...

C: 我想以自己的意志去诠释天空后裔的使命…以我的方式，为跨越千年的守望画上句号。
E: I desire to define the mission of the Skyfolk in my own terms... to conclude the vigil that has spanned millennia.

C: 我明白啦。那就拜托你了，丹宝！
E: Got it. I'm counting on you, Dannie!

C: 带着我的赐福回归天空，俯瞰这个行将接受拯救的世界吧。
E: Return to the sky with my blessing, and watch over this world on the threshold of salvation.

C: 刺破那掩埋了救世神谕的烟尘与战火。
E: Pierced through the smoke and flames that buried the prophecy of deliverance.

C: 拜托你了，迷迷。
E: Counting on you, Mem.

C: 感受时间的流向……
E: Feel the flow of time...

C: 到哪都会发生类似的事…
E: A common story everywhere...

C: 啊，那边——那个圆盘形状的仪器，我倒是不陌生。
E: Ah, there — that circular device. I'm quite familiar with it.

C: 雅辛忒丝——你身上没有她的气息。
E: Hyacinthia — you don't have the scent of her on you.

C: 看到殿堂两侧那些巨大的「电路」了么？也许我们该试着把它们修好。
E: Do you see those two giant "circuits" on either side of the hall? Maybe we should try fixing them.

C: 看着没什么压迫感。
E: Doesn't look very foreboding.

C: 难道……
E: Could it be...

C: 我准备好了，两位阁下。
E: I am ready, honored ones.

C: 这道大门…应该是圣堂的出口？
E: Is this door... the exit to the hall?

C: 但，圣城的明天，若需由它守护……
E: But, if to protect the holy city's future, they are needed...

C: 呵…呵呵……
E: Hah... Hahah...

C: …感谢你陪我走到最后一刻。
E: Thank you for walking this path with me to the end.

C: 话虽如此，这命题似乎有些宏大，该从何说起才好？
E: My, what a broad topic this is. Where shall we start?

C: 如果——我是说如果——有一台权杖完成了对<color=#dbc291ff>「生命第一因」</color>的解答……
E: What if — hypothetically — a Scepter found the answer to <color=#dbc291ff>"the prime mover of life"</color>...

C: 咳，好吧。{F#她}{M#他}今天是…「银河无敌球棒侠」。
E: *clearing throat* Uh... today {F#s}he's going with "Invincible Galactic Baseballer."

C: 不记得了？那好，我可要带小兵人回家啦。
E: She doesn't remember, eh? This little soldier's coming with me.

C: 披索！莉维娅！开饭了！
E: Piso! Livia! Dinner's ready!

C: 我想想，它现在应该在……
E: Let's see, they should be...

C: 可弑王者，不能再负担起王名：就让垂死的狮子独自走上他的末路吧。
E: He who has slain a king can no longer bear the title. Let the withering lion walk his last path alone.

C: 想什么呢…这就是你为自己抽出的牌面呀。
E: Oh silly... this is simply the card you drew for yourself.

C: 无所谓。新兵，最后给你个机会：转身离开，我会承诺放你一条生路。
E: It makes no difference. One last chance, new recruit. Walk away, and I'll spare your life.

C: 这场角斗并非结束，而是开始。所以，听从你<color=#dbc291ff>内心的声音</color>吧，*我们*期待的只是你的回答。
E: What the duel marks is not an ending, but a beginning. So, listen to your heart. We wish only to hear your answer.

C: 你用来称重的信物是…一张纸牌？
E: Your offering is... a card?

C: 从走出村子的那一刻起，我们就做好反抗命运的准备了，不是吗？
E: After all, we've been ready to fight fate ever since we left the village, haven't we?

C: 白厄阁下？
E: Lord Phainon?

C: 为什么，是这种样子呢？
E: Why does it look like this?

C: 那又何必在这里作别？你可以带上我，一同启程。我会陪伴在你左右，给你指引，一如既往。
E: Then why do we part here? You can take me with you, and we can start this journey together. I'll be by your side, guiding you, just like before.

C: 以「负世」之名，我向你保证……
E: In the name of "Worldbearing," I promise you...

C: 所以，你的意思是：你在时间中溯洄而上，行至未曾抵达的这片海床，只为告诉我们——
E: So, what you're saying is: You've traveled back down the river of time, finally reaching this untouched seabed, just to tell us—

C: 但这一次，翁法罗斯迎来了命运的转折。
E: But this time, Amphoreus encountered a turning point in its fate.

C: 我能做的不止有「等待」，当时间回到原点，改变世界的契机，也会从历史的字里行间浮现……
E: I could do more than just wait. When time resets, the chance to change the world also emerges from the lines of history...

C: 你的冷漠令我心寒。他们对你而言，只是一堆无足轻重的注脚？
E: Your indifference chills me. To you, were they just a bunch of insignificant footnotes?

C: …然后，出于不甘，或是仇恨，再度站在我的面前。
E: ...And then, driven by defiance, or hatred, she decides to stand before me once more.

C: 终于，还是……
E: In the end, still...

C: 你…要去哪里？
E: Where... are you going?

C: 很好。那么，{NICKNAME}，我的伙伴，战友……
E: Good. Then, {NICKNAME}, my friend, my comrade...

C: 幸好最后，他等来了你，{NICKNAME}。
E: Thankfully, you arrived during his long wait, {NICKNAME}.

C: 潜伏在翁法罗斯的铁墓是「源代码」——这台权杖就是它的培养皿。
E: The version of Irontomb hiding in Amphoreus is its "source code." And this Scepter is its incubator.

C: {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>律法之泰坦</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>塔兰顿</color>{RUBY_E#}。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The Law Titan, Talanton.</color>
"▀▄Delay█▄Irontomb█▄Birth▀▄"

C: 斯事体大，还请慎重权衡。毕竟摆在您面前的选择……
E: This matter is of grave importance, so please, do not make your decision lightly. After all, the choice before you...

C: 因为你的特殊性，我们成了凯撒的贵宾，这是好事，奥赫玛人肯定会对你尊敬有加。只要好好运用这层身份，再加入一点你的经验和人格魅力……
E: We've received the Imperator's favor because of your unique background. As a result, the people of Okhema will certainly respect you more. Just put that to good use, and add a bit of your experience and charm...

C: 你好，天外的救世主。*我们*是雅努萨波利斯的缇宝，很高兴认识你们……
E: Greetings, Deliverer from beyond the sky. We are Tribbie of Janusopolis. It's very nice to meet you...

C: 而后，军团的勇士将随我一道，踏上讨伐{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的征程。
E: Then, the legions' warriors will join me in embarking on the campaign against {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}.

C: 去吧，先沐浴一番。你们身上…咳，有一股海潮的腥味。
E: Go now, take a bath first. You two... ahem, reek of seawater.

C: 眼下疑点重重，这算是为数不多的幸运。只是……
E: There are many uncertainties right now, but this is one of the few blessings. Still...

C: 劳逸结合可是很重要的。你看，大家都是这么想的，对吧？
E: Work and rest are both important. You see, everyone agrees, right?

C: 小、小海兔？
E: Little... little sea hare?

C: 「成为半神，泯灭人性」——我无数次求告神谕，换来的只有这唯一一道回应。
E: "Become a demigod and lose your humanity." That is the only reply I've received in the countless times I've sought wisdom from the prophecy.

C: 如果有时间，要不要也接触一下？
E: Since we have time, should we go meet them?

C: 凯撒的逐火军，未尝一败！
E: The Imperator's Flame-Chase Army has never lost!

C: 嗯…每次这位英雄一登场，气氛就会瞬间冷下来呢。
E: Eh... This hero always brings down the vibe whenever he shows up.

C: 如何，甜吗？
E: How is it? Sweet enough?

C: 放松，放松，表现得自然些。
E: Relax. Relax. Try to act natural.

C: 可你分明说过，铁墓在星间无可匹敌，何人胆敢扬言扼杀？
E: But you previously said that Irontomb is unrivaled in power across the stars. Who would dare to annihilate it?

C: 是我们赢了，「真诚」才是永远的捷径。
E: And we won. "Sincerity" will always remain the greatest shortcut to people's hearts.

C: （气氛似乎和上次不太一样，该怎么回去……）
E: (This doesn't feel the same as before. How should I get back...?)

C: 黑塔大人，救救我！
E: Save me, Madam Herta!

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>传输信道解析完毕，正在切断非法通信……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>[Communication channel analysis completed. Terminating unauthorized communication...]</color>

C: 你调用了「记忆」的命途力量，等待着援兵的回响……
E: You invoke the power of Remembrance, awaiting the resonance of reinforcements...

C: 它柔和的低语像是一只温热的手，牵起你的灵魂，缓缓向界外散逸……
E: Their soft whisper is like a warm hand that takes up your soul and slowly disperses it beyond this realm...

C: 翁法罗斯的{RUBY_B#神话}秘所思{RUBY_E#}，亟待你来续写……
E: The {RUBY_B#mythology}mythos{RUBY_E#} of Amphoreus... waits for you to continue its story...

C: （没错，奇怪的感觉越来越明显了……）
E: (No... The discrepancy is getting worse...)

C: 丹恒呢，他应该回到列车了吧？
E: Where's Dan Heng? He should be back on the Express now.

C: 我不愿欺骗你。所以，我不会使用「她」的名字。
E: I don't want to lie to you, which is why I will not use "her" name.

C: 神悟树庭七贤人已踏上行程，不日将逐批抵达，投身抵抗事业。在他们中，有一位名叫阿那克萨戈拉斯的学者……
E: The Seven Sages from Grove of Epiphany are already en route. They'll arrive in waves to join the resistance in a couple of days. Among them is a scholar named Anaxagoras...

C: 向您澎湃的决心致敬。那么，在踏上最后的舞台前，请允许我基于先前的寓言向你发问——
E: To your unshakable resolve, I salute you. But before we step onto the final stage, let me ask you this, in the spirit of that fable I told you just now...

C: 那不如让剑为我而舞，让琴为我而鸣——
E: Then how about letting the sword dance for me, and letting the violin sing in my name...

C: 毕竟，那静谧的池底，是由无数骸骨铺就……
E: After all, beneath that still surface lie the bones of countless dead...

C: 凭她的计谋，怎么可能会让我们陷入如此境地？她从一开始就知晓这场战役的结局……
E: With her schemes, do you think she'd ever let us end up like this by accident? She knew how this battle would end from the start...

C: 他们第一次和谐共处，停留在永远的和平之中，再无争斗。
E: For the first time, they coexist in harmony, dwelling in eternal peace, with no more conflicts.

C: 不错，那我就单刀直入了：既然在翁法罗斯里，他的思考速度远超常人，我们现在要做的，就是通过外力把一段「记忆」植入他的灵感回路——
E: Good. Then I'll cut to the chase: Since his thinking speed far exceeds that of normal people within Amphoreus, we are going to externally plant a "memory" into his Inspiration Circuit...

C: 能和天才们心有灵犀，真是莫大的荣幸呢。
E: It's my greatest honor to be on the same page as the geniuses.

C: 别大意，做好最坏的打算。
E: Don't let your guard down. Be prepared for the worst.

C: 现在，翁法罗斯至伟大的「律法」，已被我踏破……
E: Now, I have shattered the greatest "Law" of Amphoreus...

C: 下一个世界，是梦境的国度。
E: This next world is a nation of dreams.

C: 这片宇宙值得我投入这么多时间。
E: This universe is worth all that time that I invested.

C: 「岁月」的神权于你何用？
E: What do you need the divine authority of Time for?

C: 你是在扭曲她的愿望！
E: You're twisting her wish!

C: 「听你这么说，反倒令我放心了。因为丹恒那孩子……」
E: "Hearing you say that makes me feel much better. Dan Heng..."

C: 嗯。多亏了指引的声音，我才能穿透忆质的壁垒。不过……
E: Yes. It was thanks to your voices that I could pierce through the memoria barrier. Although...

C: 声音…是从客房车厢传来的？
E: Are the voices coming from the Passenger Cabin?

C: 不错，很聪明。
E: That's correct. You're a smart one.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>信道已建立，正在封装对象——</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Channel established. Proceeding to encapsulate—</color>

C: 一片寂静，感受不到任何气息。
E: Absolute silence. I can't sense anything at all.

C: 什么…？
E: What...?

C: 这一次，我想和你分享个小故事：来这里的路上，我看见一只小小的若虫。它停在一根倒下的麦穗上，在阳光下闪闪发光。
E: I want to share a story with you this time. I saw a little nymph on my way here. It was on a fallen wheat stalk, and it glowed under the sunlight.

C: 我在想，过去的每一个「昔涟」，会不会也觉得它很美呢？
E: I wonder... did every "Cyrene" in the past feel that the nymph was beautiful?

C: 不必为「我」感到遗憾，好朋友。
E: No need to feel sorry for "me," good friend.

C: 就拜托下一位「昔涟」继续守候啦。
E: I'll have to ask the next "Cyrene" to continue our watch.

C: 笑一笑，好吗？
E: C'mon, cheer up a bit, okay?

C: 我们有信心战胜铁墓。
E: We are confident that we can defeat Irontomb.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>对象：回归#33550337。进程：<unbreak>13.131%</unbreak>——</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Object: Recurrence #33550337. Progress: <unbreak>13.131%</unbreak>—</color>

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>操作已授权，协议名：【Ἠλύσιον】</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Operation authorized, protocol name "Ἠλύσιον"</color>

C: 过时的话题，没必要讨论！
E: Such an outdated theme. Not worth discussing!

C: 快，{NICKNAME}！拿上这个——
E: Quick, {NICKNAME}! Take this—

C: 怎么会！既然说了要给我拍照，{NICKNAME}肯定会在翁法罗斯四处按下快门。我总有机会等到{F#她}{M#他}。
E: No way! {NICKNAME} will definitely be snapping away all over Amphoreus because {F#s}he promised me to take photos! I'm guaranteed to run into {M#him}{F#her} eventually.

C: 你确实很了解{F#她}{M#他}呀。
E: True, you really know {M#him}{F#her} well.

C: 看看它。
E: Take a look.

C: 「同谐」。
E: "Harmony."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「开山者」吉奥刻勒斯…大地的龙骑士，好久不见。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Geocles the Mountainbreaker... Earth's Dromas Rider, it's been a while.</color>

C: 你，后悔过吗？
E: Have you ever regretted anything?

C: 燃烧的火种…这就是「毁灭」的滋味么？
E: This burning Coreflame... Is this what the Destruction feels like?

C: 桀桀桀，你来啦，你也是大老远听到了本大爷的英雄事迹吗？
E: Hehehe, so you've come! Did you also travel from afar after hearing tales of my heroic deeds?

C: 嗷呜！不愧是巴特鲁斯大人！
E: Awoo! Your greatness truly knows no bounds Lord Bartholos!

C: 给人「添堵」——桀桀桀，我最擅长的就是这个！
E: Providing "obstacles" for people — Hehehe, that's what I do best!

C: 万幸，「长夜月」没有出手阻拦。看来这一次，我们成功抢占了先机。
E: Thankfully, "Evernight" did not try to stop me. Looks like we've managed to stay ahead of her this time.

C: 听说螺丝先生的藏品都是行星级。「风信子」、「虞美人」、「夹竹桃」…不知道会派遣哪一艘前来支援？
E: I've heard Mr. Screwllum's fleet includes planet-class mechs: Hyacinth, Poppy, Oleander... Which one will answer the call, I wonder?

C: 救世主，我，还有这个世界——会亲自证明，最初的智种，宇宙的终极，绝非「毁灭」。
E: The Deliverer, myself, and this world will together prove that the original Nouspore, the ultimate truth of the universe, is anything but Destruction.

C: 若能与寰宇众多文明同舟共济，共克时艰，我们必当舍命不渝。
E: If we can stand together with civilizations across the universe to overcome this crisis, then we must do so, even at the cost of our own lives.

C: 识刻锚收到一则联系请求，你尝试响应……
E: The Chronocognitive Anchor receives a contact request, you try to respond...

C: 在如此宏观的灾难面前，相对弱小的文明…一向没有更多选择。
E: In the face of a massive catastrophe like this one, relatively smaller civilizations... have never had many options.

C: 走吧，各位。既然有人已经吹响了启程的号角。
E: Let's go, everyone. Someone has already sounded the horn of departure.

C: 别说这种扫兴话。所以我们才要过来，不是么？找到「德谬歌」，那把丢失的钥匙。
E: No need to kill the mood. This is why we're here, isn't it? We need to find the Demiurge and that lost key.

C: 我可没兴趣当「救世主」。我只想赢——赢过「赞达尔」，还有机器头。
E: I'm not here to be a "Deliverer." I just want to beat Zandar and Droidhead.

C: 一道神神叨叨的模因，她的话能有几分真。星神会这么拐弯抹角？我不信。
E: A memetic entity full of theatrics. How much of what she's saying is true? Would an Aeon really speak in circles like this? I doubt it.

C: 对。最后一座终端，也是最后一把钥匙。开启「内核层」的封印吧。
E: Exactly. One last terminal. One final key. Time to crack open the "kernel."
This is...

C: 我知道。我们在想同一件事。
E: I see it too. We're thinking the same thing.

C: 啧，无聊的把戏。
E: Tch. Cheap trick.

C: 真没想到，咱有朝一日还能坐上{NICKNAME}化身的列车……
E: Never thought I'd one day be riding a train that's literally the incarnation of {NICKNAME}...

C: 这一世，「纷争」的诗篇将不再以据守悬锋作结，而要踏上不绝的征程——
E: In this life, the song of Strife shall not end in a final watch over Kremnos, but rise again into a journey unending.

C: 三千万世的使命和责任，格外沉重呢……
E: The weight of thirty million lifetimes of duty... is no small burden.

C: 很少见你这么放松，阿格莱雅。
E: You don't usually look this relaxed, Aglaea.

C: 那神礼官允诺的，终究是一条如此狭隘的道路。可怜。
E: That Theoros's promise still turned out to be such a narrow road. Pity.

C: 「如此一来，算是得胜了吗？」
E: "Does this mean we won?"

C: 那时候，你还在为「负世」的职责而烦恼，思考自己该扮演什么样的角色。但现在，所有人都给出了回答……
E: You were still burdened by the weight of Worldbearing back then, still unsure of the role you were meant to play. But now... everyone has already given you the answer.

C: 我相信每一个你。
E: I believe in every version of you.

C: 你是？我是…是谁？
E: You are? I am... Who?

C: 当然……
E: Of course I will...

C: 简单，轻轻松松。
E: Easy-peasy.

C: 「但火烧得够旺，就能反客为主！」
E: "And once the fire is strong enough, the hunter will become the hunted!"

C: 四亿史诗，以「我」成篇——
E: "I" shall compose four hundred million sagas—

C: 门关月，我令游离的足迹于此「同谐」——
E: In the Month of Gate, I command the wandering steps here to reach Harmony...

C: 不知为何，浴缸中的水体变成了浓稠且不透明的金色。
E: For some unknown reason, the water in the bathtub had turned into a thick, opaque golden liquid.

C: …喂喂，别血口喷人哪！
E: ...Hey now, don't go throwing wild accusations around!

C: 后脚刚醒，人就已经在这列车上了哪？
E: And next thing I know, we're all on this Express. No idea how that happened.

C: （袖手旁观）
E: (Stands idly by)

C: 他一定和荒笛很有共同语言。
E: He must have a lot in common with Terravox.

C: 你们自由了。
E: You are all free.

C: 「一直以来，辛苦了。」
E: "Thank you for your hard work all this while."

C: …只剩我们了呢，小白。
E: ...It's just us now, Snowy.

C: 这或许是每一个无漏净子都要面临的抉择。
E: Perhaps this is the choice every Pure Child of Anāsrava must face.

C: 于是，在「过去」的记忆中，你领会了三月精湛的箭术……
E: And so, in a memory from the "past," you inherited March's mastery of the bow...

C: 但是，以我的力量…可以做到吗？
E: But... can I really do that with the strength I have?

C: 他就一定能坚持下来。
E: He would hold on and keep going.

C: 如果你将「记忆」留在一切故事的开端，投下那枚最初的石子——
E: If you leave "memory" at the very beginning of the story, and cast the first stone...

C: 写下日记的地方。
E: Began writing journals.

C: 那也意味着，有很高概率——它的力量微乎其微，无法左右战局。
E: Which also means there's a high chance that their powers are minuscule and cannot alter the outcome of the battle at all.

C: >>>记录：桃子。在地面。
E: >>> Record: Peach. Is on the ground.

C: >>>结论：进程，坏。
E: >>> Conclusion: Progress, bad.

C: 昔涟是。粉头发。尖耳朵。
E: Cyrene has. Pink hair. Sharp ears.

C: 昔涟是。不喜欢眼泪。嘻嘻哈哈。
E: Cyrene. Doesn't like tears. Always happy.

C: 能以「昔涟」的名字，被{NICKNAME}呼唤。
E: I want {NICKNAME} to call me "Cyrene."

C: 你是逐火的一员，自始至终。
E: You have always been and will always be a member of the Flame-Chase.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>很简单：一位反造物主，「毁灭」的巨匠——它的憎恨将点燃众神的星空，却只出于对凡人的哀怜。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>It's simple... An Anti-Creator, a giant of the Destruction, would be born. Its hatred will ignite the starry skies of the gods, motivated only by its lament toward the sufferings of humankind.</color>

C: 希望你说话算话，前辈。
E: I hope you hold up your end of the bargain, Senior Society Member.

C: 只有我自己知道。你信吗？
E: Just me. Do you believe it?

C: 饰
E: as

C: 遐蝶
E: Castorice

C: 跟我回去对质。
E: Let's go back and check this with Mr. Wen.

C: 一百个宝箱？
E: A hundred treasure chests?

C: 想要宝贝啊，你就得听我跟你慢慢唠。
E: If you want the treasure, you have to listen to me talk first.

C: 是啊，放着好好的月台不走，非要在我的地盘闹事。
E: That's right. He just wanted to cause trouble on my turf.

C: 他倒是一走了之，这大洞欠下的巨额债务，我一股脑背到了今天。
E: He just walked away, but to this very day, I am still paying the huge debt from all the damage he's done.

C: 我有个朋友，据说这空间站里就没有她不知道的八卦消息。
E: I have a friend — they say there isn't a single piece of station gossip she doesn't know about.

C: 你怎么知道？
E: How did you know?

C: 我是来制裁你的。
E: I'm here to punish you.

C: 我不！
E: I won't!

C: 还有上次那个歼星舰……
E: And that starnought fleet from the last time...

C: （想必这就是三重权限所守卫的「那扇门」。）
E: (This must be the door protected by triple authentication.)

C: 同步程序激活中…激活成功！确认坐标信息来源于<color=#dbc291ff>收容舱段</color>。
E: Activating synchronization program... Activation successful! Beacon signal is coming from the <color=#dbc291ff>storage zone</color>.

C: 但是就像我刚才说的，这诗写得怎么样不重要，重要的是要有机会把诗送出去……
E: But just like what I said, it doesn't matter how these poems are. First I need to be able to send them out...

C: 历史纪录查阅结束。尚未侦测到正在传输的电波讯…号……
E: End of historical record lookup. Airwave Transmission has not been detected.

C: 如果防护得当，星震不会对人产生物理性伤害。
E: With proper protection, a starquake will not cause physical damage to humans.

C: 我谁都不在乎，我只在乎莱斯莉。
E: I don't care about other women. I only want Lesley.

C: 连我都能做到。
E: Even I can do it.

C: 脑海中的语言突然变得断裂颠倒，昏暗的舱室逐渐在你眼中扭曲成碎异之景。
E: The sentences in your mind suddenly become broken and disordered. In your vision, the dark cabin gradually becomes distorted and strange.

C: 你也许遇上了窃忆者。
E: Maybe you had a run-in with a Memosnatcher.

C: 你有过恋人或丈夫？
E: Have you ever had a lover or a husband?

C: 记忆大师，你不是在进行大记忆恢复术吗？怎么跟查户口似的，还扯上了录像带。
E: So, memory expert, aren't you gonna cast your memory restoration spell? You sound like you're doing a survey. And what's with the videos?

C: 必须尽快把这些资料交还给希拉，再进一步分析这其中究竟有何隐情。
E: I have to get this information to Sheila as soon as possible. Then we can work out what the secret is.

C: 毕竟这世上，还有许多秘密等待着有缘人的见证。
E: After all, there are still many secrets in this world waiting to be unearthed.

C: 担心什么？你是指会影响到他们在空间站的研究工作吗？除了克里斯需要医师进行心理疏导之外，我不觉得有什么问题。
E: Worried about what? Do you mean how their research at the space station will be affected? I don't think there's any problem except that Chris might need some psychological counseling from a doctor.

C: 哎，阿兰究竟有什么想不开的，需要油嘴滑舌的卡波特来协助他修行呢？
E: *sigh* What happened to you, Arlan? Why did you have to get that sleazy Capote to help you with a trial?

C: 这个家伙我从没见过，看上去很像是遭受侵蚀之后变异的新个体。
E: I've never seen anything like this before. It looks like some kind of new entity — it must have mutated after being corroded.

C: 哦！所以你是想提前练习，然后学会拒绝黑塔的委托对吧？
E: Aha! So, you're trying to learn how to reject Herta, and then put it into practice!

C: 啊，是你。我们正在讨论空间站最近出现的诡影照片……
E: Oh, it's you. We're discussing the recent photos of specters circulating around the space station...

C: 似乎混进了奇怪的东西…
E: Looks like something weird got mixed into the batch.

C: 偏偏最近大肆出没，三两结群，赫然有抢夺生存空间，密谋不义之事的倾向！
E: However, recently, they've been appearing in groups very frequently. It's as if they were plotting to take up more living space and stir up an uprising!

C: 你认为它们没安好心？
E: You think they're up to no good?

C: 你是谁啊，干嘛一上来就凶巴巴的……
E: Who do you think you are? Why are you so mean...

C: 是的是的。小阿德勒可是界种科的天才呢，没有科员可出其左。
E: Yeah, yeah, that's right. Little Adler is our genius in the Department of Ecology. No one else can outsmart Adler.

C: 我之所以不告诉你们，是因为…空间站到处都是埋首工作的大人，好不容易有了玩伴，我不希望它们因为莫须有的罪名而被回收。
E: I didn't tell anyone because... because everyone in the space station is an adult working on their own research projects. It's so hard to find a playmate, and I don't want them to be recovered just because of some baseless accusations.

C: 如果你们能帮上忙，那就是自己人。否则，要消息没有，要呜命一条——它说完了。
E: If you can help them out, then you're a friend. Otherwise, it still won't tell you a single word, even if you threaten to take its life.

C: 稍安勿躁，{NICKNAME}。你还记得那篇《呜呜伯行为考》么？
E: Be patient, {NICKNAME}. Do you still remember what was written in the Observation on Wubbaboo Behavior?

C: 你好，我叫{NICKNAME}。
E: Hi, I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 嗯？有什么事吗，找前台的话，出门笔直走就是……
E: Huh? Do you need something? If you're looking for the front desk, just go straight through those doors...

C: 来试试吧。
E: Let me try.

C: 吓死我了！
E: That scared me to death!

C: 唔，总觉得我们追了很久，却没找到什么有用的信息…不过这也正常，万事开头难嘛，我们再去收容舱段看下。
E: *sigh* I feel like we've been chasing for a long time and still haven't found anything useful... Oh well, I suppose that's the way it goes — things are more difficult at the outset. Let's take another look at the storage zone.

C: 咦！等一下，快看这边！定分枪的收容舱有一条奇怪的访问记录。
E: Whoa! Look here! There's a strange access log in the rating pistol's compartment.

C: 果然有蹊跷！
E: So there was something strange after all!

C: 你在我心中一直是这样的形象。
E: I've always thought of you that way.

C: 看，我们找到了，以太卡带就在这里，完好无损。
E: Look, we found it. The Aether Cartridge is here and it's perfectly intact.

C: 晚饭打算吃什么？
E: What do you plan on having for dinner?

C: 嘿嘿，其实她刚才和我说了句做得不错。
E: Ha! She said I did a good job.

C: 你在说啥呢…不会指望我能听懂吧？
E: You really expect me to know the answer to that?

C: 那么……
E: In that case...

C: 唉…
E: *sigh*

C: 刚，刚刚的声音…帕姆怎么了？！
E: Wh—What was that... Did something happen to Pom-Pom!?

C: 这也是「开拓」的意义所在…我们都必须面对挑战。在这个过程中，大家才会获得历练与成长。
E: Such is the very essence of trailblazing. It is through these trials that we find wisdom and maturity.

C: （抛出记忆盲点或许可以唤醒模糊的记忆）
E: (Using Cognition Chasm might help you restore hazy memories)

C: （辛克尔之外的另一个人应该是<color=#dbc291ff>密卷科</color>的，快想想是谁……）
E: (The other person should be from the <color=#dbc291ff>Department of Insight</color>. I need to remember who it is...)

C: 这是你要的账号，绿色干净，直连内网毫无压力。
E: Here's the account you asked for. It's legit and secure, allowing you to connect straight to the intranet.

C: 你的办事能力，我信得过。要不考虑下？此间事了，跟我一同离开？
E: I have faith in your abilities. So, how about my offer? Why not come with me after this is done?

C: 之前那个连环失踪案，是真的。
E: The multiple disappearances — they're all for real.

C: 哦，难怪艾丝妲小姐会默许我的加入。毕竟博识学会的代表不太会和空间站有所牵连，但立场却与公司一致。
E: Oh. So that explains why Lady Asta approved of my participation. After all, the Intelligentsia Guild's representative wouldn't be linked to the space station but would still share the IPC's position.

C: 不用担心偏私，也会保护空间站的利益——一举两得。
E: They wouldn't be partial to anyone, but would still act for the space station's benefit — two birds with one stone.

C: 但如果你们要找他…最后一次见到他时，他一直在翻这本小册子。
E: But if you want to find him... he was reading this booklet the last time I saw him.

C: 此间事了，相信剩下的风波靠空间站内部便能自行平息。我替黑塔感谢你的付出，{M#先生}{F#女士}。
E: This business is over, and I believe the space station will be able to deal with any internal aftershocks. In Herta's stead, I thank for your efforts, {F#Madam}{M#Sir}.

C: 我会前往黑塔办公室，启用奇物收容室的折叠空间。只要对参数略作修改，它便可用于阻断对方的转移路线，将其封闭在空间站内。
E: I will head to Herta's office and activate the folded space in the Curio storage room. With some changes to its parameters, I can use it to block the fire's teleportation routes and seal it inside the station.

C: （呼噜呼噜…）
E: (Purring)

C: 一些信息倒是可以透露：那里也会用来接待非人形的访客，有连通外空的接驳车。
E: But there is some information I can give you. That place is also used to welcome non-humanoid visitors and has a shuttle that connects to outer space.

C: （一位「繁育」令使的复制体？！怎么可能…）
E: (An Emanator of Propagation clone!? How can that be...?)

C: 还有小三月，她帮应物科测试了下多维扫描仪。
E: March also helped the Department of Implement Arts test their multidimensional scanner.

C: 这也许就是书本里说的，两个孤独且高尚的灵魂最终会走到一起。
E: Perhaps this is what authors mean when they speak of lonely but noble souls finding their way to be together.

C: …好、好像舒服点了。
E: ...I—I feel a little better now.

C: 很遗憾的是，地衡司尚未通过你的进入申请，也不知道此事的后续如何。
E: Unfortunately, the Realm-Keeping Commission still hasn't approved your application for entry. You have no idea what happened afterwards.

C: 那还等什么，这就出发吧～
E: Then what are we waiting for? Let's go.

C: 我们不是他的同伙。
E: We're not his accomplices.

C: 三月七向杰帕德展示了这颗冰雪星球的照片……
E: March 7th shows Gepard a picture of the ice-covered planet...

C: …是虚卒的盔甲，很古老了。
E: This is Voidranger armor. It's ancient.

C: 布洛妮娅，没事吧？那个托帕…居然有那么强势的一面，本来以为是个很好说话的人呢。
E: Is everything all right, Bronya? I didn't know Miss Topaz was so... intense. She seemed nice when we met her.

C: 公司认为雅利洛-Ⅵ遭受了毁灭级别的打击，文明已经不复存在，那笔投资也就被评定为了烂账。
E: The IPC deemed that the disaster had caused irreparable damage and that there was no civilization left to reclaim the debt from. As such, they considered the owed sum permanently lost...

E: But with a keen eye, it's possible to find a diamond in the rough, so to speak.

C: 列车会替贝洛伯格付清！
E: The Express will pay off Belobog's outstanding debts!

C: …灭你个头啊，你别乱动！我这就过来。
E: Take them out!? Just hang tight for a second, I'm on my way. Don't do anything stupid.

C: 请教教我该怎么赚大钱！
E: Teach me how to get rich!

C: 真可惜，我超~级喜欢小动物的。啊，你们之前见过账账了吧？可惜，它现在应该是自己玩去了。
E: That's such a shame! I absolutely adore little animals! Have you guys met Numby yet? I guess they're off playing somewhere.

C: 你什么时候换的衣服？！
E: When did you change your clothes?

C: 回去等我，克拉拉。会没事的，放心。
E: Go, Clara. Everything will be fine.

C: 这是……
E: This is...

C: 「重建星球生态」——规模如此巨大的项目必然伴随着风险。
E: Performing "ecological reconstruction" on a planet carries inevitable risks.

C: 这台机器的名字是「造物引擎」，回想起来了吗？
E: It's called the Engine of Creation. Do you remember it?

C: 时间很紧，希露瓦！你有什么想法就告诉我们吧。
E: Serval, we're racing against the clock! No time for head-wrapping.

C: 我从小就憧憬星空，所以才会爱上科学，投身于对星核的研究。如果有人告诉我，我的愿望立刻就能实现，而且只需要付出一点点代价…那我大概不会犹豫。
E: I've always longed for the stars since I was a child, which is why I devoted myself to science and the studying of the Stellaron. If someone told me that I could do whatever research I wanted with only a small price to pay... I probably wouldn't hesitate.

C: …当然是拒绝！绝对不能妥协！
E: Why, I'd refuse the contract, of course! There is no room for compromise!

C: 没关系的，克拉拉！你只要把当下真实的想法告诉我们就好。
E: It's alright, Clara, no pressure. Just tell us how you feel about it.

C: {NICKNAME}，快来快来！希露瓦好像要开嗓啦！
E: {NICKNAME}, quick! Serval's about to start singing!

C: （周围的观众欢呼中）
E: (Audience cheering)

C: 你就只会中伤诽谤吗？
E: Is slander the only language you speak!?

C: 喏，拿着吧，这是「疑难重症患者互助会」卖药的地址。我再最后强调一遍——不许把这消息透露给娜塔莎！
E: Here, take this, it's the address. A final warning — do not reveal this information to Natasha!

C: 你问我瓦赫留下的药？那玩意…真的能称得上是药吗？
E: The medicine Vache left behind? That stuff... Can you even call it medicine?

C: 去尝试着和她交流一下吧，{NICKNAME}。尽量表现得有亲和力一些…不要吓到病人了。
E: Try talking with her, {NICKNAME}. And try to be as kind as possible... you don't want to scare her.

C: …谁？我又是…谁？
E: ...Who? And... who am I?

C: 你这家伙，就是诊所那个女医生的跟班吧？你以为我们「互助会」没有自己的情报网吗？
E: You're that clinic woman's lackey, aren't you. Did you think the mutual aid society didn't have its own intel?

C: 如果我在实验时犯了错误，他会用尖刻的词句苛责我…但事后又会道歉，安慰我。他就是如此矛盾的一个人。
E: Whenever I made a mistake in an experiment, he'd bite my head off... and then a while later, he'd apologize and comfort me. He was conflicted in that way.

C: （适当的沉默）
E: (Brief silence)

C: 就在我的眼前，他独自走进了雪幕…从那时候起，我就不断在脑海里对自己重复一句话——「瓦赫已经死了」。
E: His figure gradually disappeared into the snow curtain... I've been telling myself that Vache is dead ever since.

C: 没问题，我立刻为您安排！
E: No problem, I will help you arrange it immediately!

C: 听听，这名字多唬人啊！这场对决，将会决定赛季揭幕战的终极大奖花落谁家——
E: Listen here, what a name it is! This battle will decide the one who lays claim to the season opener ultimate prize!

C: 我…我本来是卡波特先生的秘书。
E: I... I was Mr. Capote's secretary.

C: 啊？！是吗…我最近一直呆在这边，倒是没有发现异常。
E: Oh!? Really... I've been hanging around here lately, but I haven't noticed anything unusual.

C: 做完水魈已经老死了吧。
E: By that time the Xenohydro will have died of old age.

C: {NICKNAME}！别着急，我来替你治疗。我身上留着许多药剂，本来是医疗科的粉丝送给卡波特先生的，他不稀罕，就全扔给了我。
E: {NICKNAME}! Don't worry, I'll treat your wounds. I have a lot of medicine on me. It was originally given to Mr. Capote by his fans among the medical staff. He didn't want it, so he gave it to me.

C: 你好像知道背后的事…
E: You seem to know the back story.

C: …你先吧。
E: ...You first.

C: {F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}…真厉害！我在这里待了很久，但一直没想到办法……
E: {F#Ma'am}{M#Sir}... you are amazing! I've been here for so long but never could figure out how to solve this...

C: 你眨了一下眼，然后……
E: You blink, and then...

C: …不用了，{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}。我不想让你这样的好心人受伤。
E: ...Don't worry, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}. I don't want to hurt a kind person like you again.

C: 你好像对这里很熟悉？
E: You seem familiar with this place?

C: …什么声音？
E: ...What's that sound?

C: 这种旋转栈桥在设计初期都会配置一个数据储存端，只有通过这个端口才能查看和调用旋转栈桥的各种数据……
E: This kind of gear bridge is pre-equipped with a data storage terminal. Only through this very specific terminal can you view essential data about the gear bridge.

C: 瓦赫…要说我们家谁和花的缘分最浅，应该就属他了吧？
E: Vache... Out of everyone in my family, I think he probably appreciated flowers the least.

C: 我清楚了，咱们去挑花吧。
E: I see. Shall we go to the florist?

C: 我很想花上一整天的时间，坐下来跟她叙叙旧。可惜现在还不是时候。
E: I really wish I could spend the whole day talking to her about the old days. But sadly now is not the time.

C: 当然，当然。给——您肯定能认出来，这绝对是少爷的笔迹。
E: Of course, of course — here... You can tell it's the young master's handwriting.

C: 我们继续前进吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: Let's press on then, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我们该回去了…
E: It's time we headed back...

C: 「医生没有选择患者的权力，孩子们——记住，永远不要放弃任何一个向你求救的人。永远不要。」
E: "A doctor does not get to choose his or her patient, my children. Remember, never say no to those who come to you for help. Never."

C: 我就知道你的选择一定能让我满意。爸妈收到这花，一定会喜出望外的。
E: I knew you'd pick the right flowers. Mom and dad will be so happy.

C: 滴——滴！保护货物！保护货物！
E: Beep! Beep! Protect the goods! Protect the goods!

C: 欸…啊？唔，那个…谢、谢谢您的夸奖！
E: I — huh? Uhh... Thank you, what a nice compliment!

C: 如果这次的行动顺利…工业展馆应该也能顺利对外开放了。
E: If the next stage of the investigation is successful, we should be able to open up the Industrial Hall to the public.

C: 下层区，看来咱们又得跑一趟了。
E: It seems like we'll have to make another visit to the Underworld.

C: 好像和调查关系不大。
E: This doesn't have anything to do with our investigation.

C: 哦，这位听众莫非是…贝洛伯格的救星，现任守护者的贵宾，银河与星星之子！欢迎你回到这座纯白且美丽的冬城！
E: Oh, if it isn't... the savior of Belobog, the guardian's honored guest, child of the galaxy and stars! Welcome back to our eternally snow-covered yet forever beautiful winter metropolis!

C: …啊，我想起来了。交通部大臣诺伊尔有一个侄子就叫诺尔伯特，现在应该是在市政部门做运输协调的工作。
E: ...Ah, I remember now. The Minister of Transportation, Noel, has a nephew named Norbert — I believe he's currently working in the Municipal Department as a transportation coordinator.

C: {NICKNAME}，事不宜迟，我们这就出发吧。
E: {NICKNAME}, we can't delay a moment longer. We need to move now.

C: 我只求你一件事，别把我交到我叔叔手上！克里珀在上，他肯定会气得把我的皮扒下来的！
E: I only ask one thing — please don't hand me over to my uncle! With Qlipoth as my witness, uncle would be so angry he'd turn me into a leather jacket!

C: 喂喂喂，你脑子清醒点！咱俩撑死了就是共犯关系，懂吗？共犯！谁想跟你有难同当啊喂！
E: Whoa, whoa, whoa — Did you stop at a bar on the way over here? You know what we are? Accomplices. You know what that means? Partners in crime! You know what else that means? We're not friends!

C: 呃…大概<unbreak>40</unbreak>多个？
E: Uhh... about <unbreak>40</unbreak>?

C: 哦，对啦，如果你还想继续帮忙经营历史文化博物馆的话，我和艾丽斯小姐随时欢迎你哦。
E: Oh, by the way, if you still want to help run the History and Culture Museum, Miss Eris and I are always happy to work with you.

C: 「致我最最最亲爱的大客户{NICKNAME}——感谢你！多亏了你的宽宏大量，伟大的寒腿叔叔才能在贝洛伯格的雪原上自由地驰骋！」
E: "To my dearest and most valued client, {NICKNAME}, from the bottom of my heart — thank you! Your generosity means that Mr. Cold Feet is free to keep roaming the snowy plains of Belobog!"

C: 是志愿者。
E: It's VOLUNTEER.

C: 谁是小朋友呀！要叫我漆黑的虎克大人！
E: I'm not a kid! I'm Pitch-Dark Hook the Great!

C: 嗯…克拉拉不会紧张的……
E: Okay... I'm fine...

C: 我不知道，可能得问问她。
E: I'm not sure. I should probably ask her.

C: 可以修改「个人经历」这栏…
E: You may make changes to the "Personal Experience"...

C: <size=36>对不起，银鬃铁卫的情报官大人！</size>
E: <size=36>I'm sorry, the great Intelligence Officer of the Silvermane Guards!</size>

C: 另外，{NICKNAME}，今天也辛苦你了。感谢你为博物馆振兴计划的付出！
E: {NICKNAME}, thank you for what you have done to revitalize the museum!

C: 至于我嘛——打我记事起，全下层区的人就都知道有个叫希儿的小无赖了。
E: As for me, everyone in the Underworld has seen me as a little rascal for as long as I can recall.

C: …你这家伙，故意的吧？
E: I can tell you're enjoying teasing me like this, don't you?

C: 跟我们有啥关系？别把我们跟那群地痞流氓混为一谈！
E: What's that got to do with us? Do you think we're the same as those thugs?

C: 洞洞机？
E: Diggertron?

C: 叛徒！
E: Traitor!

C: 鼹鼠党的老大就得说到做到才行。我还有病历要填，你们先聊着吧。
E: The Boss of The Moles should stick to her word. I have patients to take care of, see you later.

C: …然后我会良心不安。
E: ...And then I'll feel bad about not helping you.

C: 你怎么看待费斯曼大叔？
E: What do you think of Mr. Fersman?

C: 唔…你这家伙！
E: Argh... You!

C: 这不就是畏罪潜逃吗？
E: So he's fleeing from justice, huh?

C: 得给你点苦头尝尝。
E: Guess you want to do this the hard way.

C: 住口！先让我打你一顿！
E: Quiet! I'm going to give you a good butt-kicking!

C: 这探测器的探针都没了，就像是没了眼睛耳朵，现在就是堆破烂，一点实用价值都没有。
E: The detector's probe is gone, it's like searching for something without eyes or ears. Now it's nothing more than a pile of junk with no practical value.

C: 是你们？不不，大家都误会了——
E: It's you! Oh, no, no, you misunderstand...

C: 呜、呜呜……
E: Oh... *sob*

C: 齐诺——抓住姐姐的手，我们快离开这里！
E: Zino, take my hand! Let's get out of here!

C: 呼…真是难缠的怪物。不知道那两个小鬼怎么样了……
E: Phew... These monsters are tough. I need to find those kids...

C: …啊，原来是地钉！
E: ...Ah, it's the pegs!

C: 哎？但是这个小家伙上次还给了我件好东西呢，也没有伤害我的意思……
E: Huh? But this little buddy gave me something good last time, and it didn't hurt me...

C: 原来如此。谢谢你，不光拯救了贝洛伯格，这次还救了我们两个。
E: I see. Well, in that case, thanks for saving us — not to mention Belobog.

C: 好，我跟你走。
E: Absolutely.

C: 小心！前面有敌人。
E: Careful! Enemies ahead.

C: 哇！这个小东西…居然也会说话嘛？
E: Wow! This little thing... it can talk?

C: 虎克！嘿嘿，又抓到你啦！
E: Hook! Hehe, got you again!

C: 「试炼」第一步开启，请听题——
E: Launching stage one processing. Please listen to the following question...

C: 「试炼」第一步开启，请听题——
E: Launching stage one processing. Please listen to the following question...

C: 遗物帮
E: Relic Gang

C: 你没事吧，克拉拉？受伤了没？
E: Are you okay, Clara? Are you hurt?

C: 「只靠下层区的人们，不可能阻止灾难降临」——这是她的原话，依我之见，突破口就在此处。
E: The strength of the Underworlders won't be enough to prevent the disaster... Those were her exact words. For me, that's our starting point.

C: 但是，就算这么说……
E: You keep saying that, but...

C: 克拉拉，你很擅长观察的对吧？你看我们三个，像是下层区人嘛？
E: Clara, you're observant, right? Take a look at us. Do we look like Underworlders?

C: 我不想让事情变成那样。如果大家有信心说服史瓦罗先生的话…克拉拉也要表现得勇敢一点。
E: I don't want that to happen. If you guys really believe that you can convince Mr. Svarog... then I need to be brave too.

C: 走吧，我们去见史瓦罗。
E: Let's go and see Svarog.

C: …多年研究的结果就摆在你的眼前，守护者大人。证据已经确凿了，那个所谓的「星核」就是一切灾难的根源。
E: ...This is the fruit of many years of research, Madam Guardian. The evidence is irrefutable: This so-called "Stellaron" is the source of all the destruction.

C: 在局势完全稳定下来之前，我们不想贸然行动，要等待时机成熟。
E: Well, we don't want to act in haste before the situation has stabilized. We need to wait for the right time.

C: 「地火」为什么要举办拍卖会？
E: Why is Wildfire hosting an auction?

C: 告诉你们一个诀窍——<color=#dbc291ff>参加竞拍的买家越多，玩偶大熊的价格就能卖得越高。</color>这会场里还潜伏了很多潜在买家，只需要你们轻轻地推他们一把。
E: I'll tell you a secret... <color=#dbc291ff>the more bidders there are, the more you can get for your bear here.</color> This place is teeming with potential buyers. It only takes a gentle nudge to get them to join in.

C: 哼，你其实是在夸我对不对？臭小鬼，别以为我听不出来！
E: Hmph, I'll take that as a compliment! You think I can't hear you, you little brat?

C: 不管怎么说，这种纯度的黑宝石在下层可不多见。得想办法把那只玩具熊搞到手，就算要花大价钱……
E: In any case, erebus of that purity is hard to come by in the Underworld. I have to get my hands on that bear, even if it means breaking the bank! Ha...

C: 关于拍卖会的事…
E: About the auction...

C: 老太太，您认错人了。
E: Excuse me ma'am, you've got the wrong kid.

C: 才、才不是！是老奶奶认错人了。
E: No! She mistook me for someone else.

C: 我孙子就在这呢，来，让奶奶仔细看看…
E: My grandson is right here. Come on, let grandma me see that cute little face...

C: 哎呀，我好像真的认错了！
E: Oh for the love of... You're not my grandson after all!

C: …嗯，一定可以的！
E: ...You're right, let's do this!

C: 没什么好想的啦，小偷叔叔！虎克确实很想要这根探针，但是虎克才不要当小偷！
E: There's nothing to think about, Mr. Thief! I want this detector, but I don't wanna be a louse like you!

C: 虎克，交给你了。
E: Over to you, Hook.

C: 七百五十冬城盾两次！
E: <unbreak>750</unbreak> shield going twice!

C: 后悔没和小偷做交易了？
E: Do you regret not making a deal with the thief?

C: …是虎克拍到了嘛？荣誉队员，虎克真的拍到探针了嘛？
E: Honorary member... Did I win the bid? Does Hook really get the probe?

C: 醒醒，这不是梦！
E: Wake up! This isn't a dream!

C: 老爹！呜——
E: Daddy! *sob*

C: 你不就是收废品的吗？
E: Aren't you a scrap collector?

C: 哼，那我就姑且信你…等下我去找费斯曼，问问他探针打算怎么卖。
E: Hmph, I'll give you the benefit of the doubt... Let me find Fersman and ask if he intends to sell the probe.

C: 你、你不要凭空污人清白！我都吓成这样了，怎么可能是共犯？呜呜……
E: How can you just accuse me like that!? I was terrified, how could I be an accomplice!? *sob* ...

C: 不过问题应该不大，这些小型机器人的结构其实都相差不多——辛苦你跑这一趟啦，{NICKNAME}{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。
E: But it shouldn't matter. The structures of these small robots are nearly identical. Thank you for bringing this to me, {NICKNAME}.

C: 帕斯卡的状态越来越不稳定了…我们还是先给它换上新外壳吧。
E: Pascal is becoming increasingly unstable... We should change his shell.

C: 我们已经帮帕斯卡找到了兼容的硬件…如果能用其他方法清除信息噪音，不损伤到关联情感智能的扇区……
E: We've helped Pascal find compatible hardware. If we can eliminate the muddled information without damaging the sectors linked to his emotional intelligence...

C: 你不能低估了那孩子的决心。
E: Clara's determination cannot be underestimated.

C: 或许，趁克拉拉对帕斯卡的感情还没那么深…早点放手才是更好的选择？
E: Perhaps it's best to let go now, while my feelings for Pascal aren't as strong?

C: 失去了人民，铁卫的意义也就不复存在。与裂界怪物的作战是为了「存护」，但和你们的战斗…我现在不明白它的意义。
E: If we lose the people, we lose the reason for our existence. Our fight with the Fragmentum monsters is for the sake of preservation, but our fight with you... I fail to see the purpose.

C: 呃、那个…先别急……
E: Well... Um... relax...

C: ——我只在乎能不能以高效的方式妥当处置这次事故，而这取决于你能不能再从脑袋里挖出更有用的信息。不要浪费时间，这对你我都有好处。
E: I only care about handling this incident properly and efficiently, and that depends on whether you can give me useful information. Don't waste our time!

C: 我还以为他们真的是硬茬…
E: I thought they'd be tougher....

C: 这是什么？
E: What's this?

C: 你又被箱子给「困住」了吗？
E: Have you been "trapped" by your box again?

C: 你是怎么离开边缘通路的？
E: How did you leave Backwater Pass?

C: 但是斯捷潘先生握住了我的手。他在微笑，他对我从来都是微笑…他说一切都会好起来，没什么好担心的。
E: But Mr. Stefan is holding my hand. He's smiling, and he's always smiling at me... He says everything will get better and there's nothing to worry about.

C: …你还没告诉我这究竟是什么地方，母亲。
E: ...You still haven't told me what this place is, mother.

C: 但是？
E: However?

C: 那些怪物，好像在把守能源中枢？
E: Are those monsters guarding the energy hub?

C: 给他起名七月三好了。
E: I hereby name him: March 8th.

C: 看着他们承诺的未来，布洛妮娅！一个没有贫穷、寒冷、痛苦的世界；一个人们不必再像囚徒般祈求存续的世界；一个我们可以永远守护的世界。
E: Look upon their promised future, Bronya! A world without poverty, without cold, without suffering... A world where people no longer have to pray like prisoners for survival... A world that we can guard for all eternity.

C: 铲平山峰！
E: Raze to oblivion!

C: 起码它有点「存护」的希望。
E: It keeps the hope of preservation alive, at least.

C: （斯捷潘？我记得这个名字。）
E: (Stefan? I remember that name.)

C: 抱歉，我不认识这个人。
E: Sorry, I don't know him.

C: 下次再遇到这种事，你就告诉我，我让他们给你安排专属客服——咱不用受这种委屈！
E: Just let me know the next time you run into a problem like this. I'll have them arrange exclusive customer service for you. We don't have to suffer this kind of spamming ads!

C: 哦，准备好了？你要是准备好了，我们就开始吧。
E: Are you ready? We'll start whenever you are.

C: 亲属？…俺没有亲属。
E: Family? ...I don't have any family.

C: 其实我当初雇佣她的时候也不是很满意。一来，我是看中了她要的价格低廉；二来，我了解了她的经历后，就当作自己行善扶贫了。
E: Actually, I wasn't super satisfied when I hired her. I only hired her because her asking price was low, for one. After learning about her experience, I also thought I'd give her a try as an act of charity.

C: 有时候我特别生气，声色俱厉地纠正她，她总是笑嘻嘻地让我的话从她另一只耳朵里溜出来，很快她又重蹈覆辙，我又更加生气…如此折腾，我也受不了了。
E: Sometimes I get so upset and scold her, but she always laughs it off. The words just go into one ear and out of the other for her, and she eventually repeats the same mistakes, which makes me even more upset... I can't stand this vicious cycle anymore.

C: 别的什么俺都不记得了。
E: I can't remember anything else.

C: 嫌疑人之前就有非法改造星槎犯罪前科，事故发生前嫌疑人从迴星港出发，事故发生后不久便返回迴星港。
E: The suspect has a criminal record of modifying starskiffs. The suspect departed from Stargazer Navalia before the accident occurred, then returned to Stargazer Navalia after the accident.

C: 这是你的吗，你得意什么？
E: Is this really yours?

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}谢谢你啊。
E: Thank you, {F#young lady}{M#young man}.

C: 好…这画的几个方块是什么？
E: Okay... What are these squares over here?

C: 她是在担心没人照顾我的生活。
E: She is worried that no one can take care of me after she is gone.

C: 看着她的小本子，我才意识到，她照顾我已经有两百年了。
E: After looking at the notes, I realized that she has taken care of me for two hundred years.

C: 我不想因人废政。但她犯的事，你想必听说了吧？云骑正在严查司内，连正常的医务工作也受到了干扰，真是的……
E: I don't want to change her policies, but you must've heard about her crimes, right? The Cloud Knights are thoroughly investigating the commission, and even our day-to-day job as healers are being affected...

C: 陶德将诡异的枝条制成样本。
E: Todd makes the eerie twig into a specimen.

C: 神策府也不可能出得起比我更高的价。
E: Even the Seat of Divine Foresight won't be able to pay more than me.

C: 听说你在找我？
E: I heard you're looking for me?

C: 请问你是会写诗的蘑菇吗？
E: Excuse me, are you a mushroom that can write poetry?

C: （直接打开它的后盖）
E: (Open up its back flap)

C: 我总得有个可以努力超越的目标吧？
E: I have to set myself a lofty goal to surpass, right?

C: 一定是小聪，派你来监工。任务太烦难，汝命恕难从！
E: Surely it's the wily Cong, sent you here to crack the whip. The task at hand, a tedious slog, my duty's weight hard to equip.

C: 也许是汲取了太多诗才，格律诗人在一阵尖锐的爆响后炸成了一团烟花。连一句「我一定会回来的！」都没来得及留下。
E: After an ear-splitting sound, the Metrical Poet exploded into a firework, probably from taking in too much poetic knowledge. It did not even say "I'll be back!" before it was gone.

C: 很好，我可以把灵感玉兆交给你。这本《流云集》我也交给你吧。
E: Great. I'll give you the Inspo Jade Abacus and this Drifting Clouds.

C: 小聪，喜欢，静斋…怎么样？
E: Cong, loves, Jingzhai... How about that?

C: （不好，还是先追上小聪吧。）
E: (This is bad. I should check on Cong.)

C: 但情诗不能代替真正的关心和交流。
E: Love poems cannot replace care and communication.

C: 静斋喜欢怎样的人？
E: What kind of person is Jingzhai attracted to?

C: 想再听听你的故事。
E: I want to hear more stories about you.

C: 轻轻的我走了，正如我轻轻的来；我轻轻的招手，作别长乐天的云彩。
E: Softly I go, just as softly I came; I softly beckon my leave to the soft Exalting Sanctum clouds.

C: 面不改色，念得不错。
E: Not bad, you didn't even flinch while reciting.

C: …你们先回去打牌吧，我和这位「地衡司的条子」有事聊聊。
E: ...You can go back to the game, I have something to discuss with my "Realm-Keeping Commission spy" friend.

C: 也是，正常人看到这样的数目可能很难相信自己的眼睛。
E: Good point. It might be difficult for regular people to believe a sum of money that large.

C: 为什么会知道这个名字？
E: How do you know this name?

C: 走，我们去看看。
E: Let's go check it out.

C: 我不会揭露你的真实身份。
E: I won't reveal your true identity.

C: 可是，我已经改了好几版了……
E: But, I've already rewritten it a few times...

C: 「在这茫茫银河中，我们和许多人相识、相知」……咳咳。
E: In the midst of the boundless cosmos, we meet and get to know so many people... *sigh*

C: 抱歉，要让你在一边稍等了…上了年纪，视力和分辨颜色的能力也衰弱了。
E: I'm sorry for keeping you waiting... As we get older, we can't see and tell colors apart that well.

C: 做学问这么些年，我唯一肯定的就是不敢肯定。
E: After all these years of being a scholar, the only thing I am certain of is that nothing is certain.

C: 这位陶德先生的入关文牒，客栈的登记信息，在地衡司的案牍库中都有录入，不管他接下来拥有多少青春，他恐怕都得在幽囚狱里度过了。
E: Mr. Todd's customs clearance docket and check-in details from the inn have been saved to the document office at the Realm-Keeping Commission. No matter how many more years his newfound youth affords him, he'll be spending the majority of it behind bars at The Shackling Prison.

C: 小陶德的眼神里闪过一丝与年龄不符的傲慢。
E: Todd's little eyes lit up with a flash of arrogance that was beyond his years.

C: 孩子苹果般的脸蛋似乎又小了一圈。
E: The child's cherub face seemed to be smaller yet again.

C: （仅从穿着上来看，这人是丹鼎司的医士。）
E: (That's an Alchemy Commission doctor's uniform alright.)

C: 药王秘传的秘信，信中指明了「背叛药王秘传的医护半夏已经逃出了丹鼎司洞天」。
E: The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus letter indicates that Banxia, the nurse who betrayed the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, has already escaped the Alchemy Commission delve.

C: 只能说，「寿瘟祸祖」赐予的东西，血肉凡胎谁也参不透。
E: In truth, nobody in this world can fully comprehend the curse of the Plagues Author.

C: 有医士认为，仙舟人肉身不朽，但记忆却随岁月与日俱增。这种增长，最终会达到极限，脑袋里容不下更多记忆了。
E: Some doctors believe that because the people of the Xianzhou have immortal bodies, their memories accumulate until no more can be stored in the brain.

C: 不过，地衡司的人说的也没错……
E: But the people of the Realm-Keeping Commission do have a point...

C: 想吃什么自己买！
E: Buy whatever you want yourself!

C: 对他们来说，生活应该就像我嘴里这颗糖，起初甜蜜，片刻就消失的无影无踪，只留下空落落的渴望。
E: For them, life should be like this candy here in my mouth. Sweet at first, but then soon disappearing without a trace just to leave behind nothing but empty desire.

C: 你还想去哪儿？
E: Where else do you want to go?

C: 哈…呼……都已经到了这一步了，我是不会回去的，一定得见到他最后一面。
E: Ha... phew... I made it this far... I won't go back without seeing him one last time.

C: 要是没有本小姐卖力假哭，你们肯定都过不了哨卡。
E: If I hadn't pretended to cry, you wouldn't have got through the sentry post.

C: 魔阴身本就是无药可医的。我现在还能清醒地和你说话，已经是奇迹了。
E: You can't cure someone stricken with mara. It's already a miracle that I still have my senses... that I can talk to you.

C: 我们到了，可是他还是不在吗？
E: We've arrived. Is he not here either?

C: 动…动手吧，别忘了…承诺！
E: Do it... don't forget... the promise!

C: 现在，把，嘴，闭上——！
E: SHUT! YOUR! MOUTH!

C: 我来此处是为了修复「建木」封印，这是罗浮持明的职责所在。
E: I'm here to repair the Ambrosial Arbor's seal — this is the duty of the Luofu Vidyadhara.

C: 长久以来，我不得其法，以为自己虚度了此世轮回，直到您启迪了我！
E: I have been without success for a long, long time, thinking that this reincarnation had been nought but a waste. But now you have enlightened me!

C: 下次吧。
E: Maybe next time.

C: 从仙舟律法的角度来讲，地衡司不相信。
E: From a Xianzhou legal standpoint, the Realm-Keeping Commission is unable to accept a judgment like this.

C: 我曾经想过…但现在已经没有那个念头了。我越来越体会到了执事这项工作的意义。打击犯罪、帮扶弱者、处理别人不想处理的麻烦事…每天都过得很充实。
E: I considered it once... That was a long time ago. The longer I stay in this job, the more I understand its purpose. Fighting crime, helping the weak, solving the problems no one wants to touch... It's a satisfying feeling.

C: 您这么一说，还真是。
E: Now that you mention it...

C: 瞧，丹鼎司的人都这么写，没准就是可能的。
E: True... If someone from the Alchemy Commission was suggesting it could be done, then there's always a possibility.

C: （普洱拿到接头用的扉页，就去通知他的老板了。过了不久，罗刹看到一个威严的身影向自己走来。）
E: (Pu'er takes the page and goes to find the boss. Before long, Luocha sees an imposing figure walking towards him.)

C: 还有，即使按照这个千难万险的流程，罗刹也不会在那个地方滞留两小时。
E: Last but not least, even if Luocha did encounter all the troubles you described, it wouldn't have taken him two hours to escape.

C: 背面是接头暗号？
E: Is it a secret code?

C: 你自己看吧。
E: Take a look yourself.

C: 肃清了附近的孽物之后，云骑将被困的少女救了下来。
E: After cleansing the area of the abomination, the Cloud Knights rescued the trapped girl.

C: 亲子关系嘛…理解，理解。
E: I understand. It's the parent-child relationship.

C: 其实我妈是个通情达理的人。可一谈到飞行的话题，她就变得不可理喻了。
E: My mom is actually a reasonable person, but she gets unreasonable as soon as I mention flying.

C: 又是茶？司辰宫里喝很多啦？
E: Tea again? I got enough in the Palace of Astrum.

C: 谢谢岩明先生！
E: Thank you, Mr. Yanming!

C: 还有些事想问…
E: I have other questions...

C: 可这是你的家事…
E: But this is a family affair...

C: 这是我第一次听您谈起这些事……但是，妈妈，我已经不是懵懂的孩子了。成为斗舰飞行士是一条残酷的道路，这我早有准备……
E: Mom... this is the first time I've heard you talk about this... but I'm not a little girl anymore. The road of a fighter pilot is a cruel one, I know that now...

C: 考斗舰飞行士的时候，我的分数是最高的。他们夸我是不亚于您的天才，都说我不愧是您的女儿，令人羡慕……
E: I got the highest grade in the fighter pilot test — they all said I was a genius like you. "Like mother, like daughter." They were all jealous of me...

C: 但是，未来会发生的事情依然清晰：真正的考验还在后面：年轻的云骑剑士，那可不是个好对付的敌手。
E: But the future is still clear — the real test lies ahead... The young swordmaster of the Cloud Knights. He will not be an easy foe.

C: 杨叔下决定好快啊…
E: You're pretty decisive...

C: 万一打不过人家呢…
E: What if they're not friendly and we can't defeat them...?

C: 我的名字是个秘密。
E: My name's a secret.

C: …啊，我想起来了，「白珩」这个名字，我在书中读到过。
E: Ah... I remember now. I've seen Baiheng's name in books before.

C: 既然如此，危难时刻云骑又在哪里？我听说拯救此处的可是一行化外旅客。
E: And yet where were the Cloud Knights when danger was at the door? From what I heard, it was a group of outworlders that came to the rescue.

C: 可惜联盟不会让一介短生种接掌工造司。到头来，他也只得在我们这些异类身旁寻求温暖。
E: Unfortunately, the Alliance would never allow a short-life species to run the Artisanship Commission. He was only able to prove his worth alongside us outcasts in the end.

C: 你不能接受白珩的离去，竟对她使用了…在她本应该安息的时刻，你犯下了无可挽回的过错。
E: You couldn't accept that Baiheng was gone. Instead of leaving her to eternal rest, you decided to... You made a mistake that can never be undone.

C: 若我猜的没错，是龙师们不舍龙脉绝传，想让「饮月君」死灰复燃，故而在蜕鳞之刑上耍了些欺瞒世人的手段，把你变成了这般模样。
E: ...If my guess is correct, the Preceptors were unwilling to allow the Ichor Line to end and hoped for Imbibitor Lunae's resurrection. That is why they tampered with the molting rebirth... and turned you into what you are now....

C: 你真的变了，景元。
E: You've changed, Jing Yuan.

C: 「云上五骁」…该是彼此告别的时候了。
E: High-Cloud Quintet... It is time to say goodbye.

C: …就比如这一句。「呜汪，汪汪汪呜汪汪嗷！」
E: ...For example, "Woof woof, woof woof woof woof!"

C: 不过一意强攻，不知藏锋……
E: However, your zealousness inhibits your ability to hide your line of attack....

C: {NICKNAME}，我有一事相求。
E: {NICKNAME}, I have a favor to ask of you.

C: 哈哈，你这个人真有意思，坦率讲吧，我这儿只能为化外民提供长生不死的机会，但也许你更适合加入反物质军团。
E: Haha, what a peculiar person you are. I'll tell it to you straight — to outworlders I offer the chance of immortality... but perhaps someone like you would be better off joining the Antimatter Legion.

C: 抄经可以判断出二位的虔敬之心，但是否对组织忠诚，还需要一些更有力的保障啊…没办法，规矩也不是我定的。
E: Transcribing scripture allows us to ascertain your devotion, but determining whether or not you'll be loyal to the organization requires a stronger guarantee... Sorry, there's nothing I can do about it, I didn't write the rules.

C: 我才不要…
E: I'll pass...

C: 哈哈哈哈，我喜欢你的性格。
E: Haha, I like this kid.

C: 与这些妖人接触，难免会有危险，与他们接触时，请一定不要疏忽大意。
E: Danger is practically an inevitability, take care and try to stay out of harm's way.

C: 非得排除掉所有错误选项吗？你有强迫症吗？
E: Must we clear ALL the wrong options...?

C: 我知道这句话听起来也许有些怪。但推演过去，正需要那时相关的材料，三月小姐不妨再回忆回忆？
E: It may be strange to you, but to infer the past, I need materials that were pertinent at that time. Could you try recalling some memories again?

C: 什么叫「太卜大人倒是还好」？
E: "Easy-peasy"!?

C: 小三月，做好准备，接下来的战斗会非常危险。
E: March, get ready. The next fight is going to be very dangerous.

C: 不不不…杰帕德是银鬃铁卫的戍卫官，就类似罗浮上的云骑队长吧。我也不知道他怎么就成了宾馆的保安了。
E: No, no, no... Gepard is a captain of the Silvermane Guards, just like how the Luofu has its own Cloud Knights captains. I have no idea what he's doing running security at a hotel like this though.

C: 感谢{NICKNAME}介绍，小女子夕葵在司辰宫担任司舵秘书。
E: Thank you for your introduction, {NICKNAME}. I'm Xikui, and I work in the Palace of Astrum as the secretary for the Helm Master.

C: 好极了，能有这么多人见证宝剑归还，真是荣幸。
E: Wonderful! It's an honor to have so many people witness the sword's homecoming.

C: *吸鼻子的声音*
E: *sniffle*

C: 我知道在「赠剑仪式」上我做得不对。可我仔细思考过了，要是我不闯祸，要不了多久，那把魔剑就该闯祸了——所以还是让我来闯祸吧！
E: I know I shouldn't have caused a scene at the Sword-Gifting Ceremony, but I've thought this through. If I don't make a fuss now, that cursed sword will cause a whole lot more trouble. So, it's better if it's me causing the trouble.

C: {NICKNAME}，事出紧急，我们先就此别过了。
E: I have to go now, {NICKNAME}.

C: 不对，怎么想都是爷爷有问题，你还记得吗？关于「赠剑仪式」，他是一点都没有告诉我，他肯定有什么瞒着我。
E: No, no matter how I think about it, something is definitely off. Grandpa didn't tell me anything about the ceremony. He must be hiding something.

C: 我问得差不多了。
E: That's all I have to ask.

C: 云璃，我认为可以一试。
E: I think it's worth a shot, Yunli.

C: 好冷啊～明明战斗的时候没有体会，现在真是冻到骨头里了。
E: It's so cold here... I didn't feel it when I was in the thick of battle, but now it's freezing me to the bone.

C: 英雄曾要求先民们在石碑上刻下一些文字。此次出访，我也将文字拓了下来。
E: The hero had asked our ancestors to carve something into the monument, so I made a copy of it too.

C: 你的说法不太严谨，我、银枝还有使团成员也来过工造司。
E: Your statement isn't quite accurate. Argenti, the delegation members, and even me, we were all at the Artisanship Commission at some point.

C: 砸坏了金人，我怎么还敢从正门出去嘛？
E: Why would I dare leave through the main entrance after smashing the aurumatons?

C: …你怎么知道的？
E: ...How did you know?

C: 钟珊这人胆子比较小，遇见山贼转身就跑，结果撞到了山岩上，<color=#dbc291ff>整张脸都破相了</color>。可惜可惜，以前他可是城中难得一见的美男子啊。
