E: Then there's Zhongshan — this guy's a coward who ran away as soon as the group spotted some bandits along the road. He ended up smashing into the side of a cliff and <color=#dbc291ff>getting his face disfigured</color>. It's a real shame, as he used to be one of the rare handsome men left around town.

C: 呃，你们为什么要这样说话？是什么我老桑博不懂的艺术形式吗……
E: Uh, why are you talking like that? Is this some sort of artistic performance that young people are into these days?

C: 我来为您介绍下，本案的几名嫌疑人，身份都不复杂——
E: Let me introduce the identities of these suspects to you. It's very straightforward —

C: 证据就是这条领带，对么？
E: This tie is a piece of evidence, right?

C: 太对了，桑博警探！没想到您也有推理出真相的时候啊！
E: Correct, Detective Sampo! I never thought you'd be able to deduce the truth!

C: 啊…啊啊啊啊！姐，你…你把花火给打死了！
E: Ah... Ahhh! Miss, you... you killed Sparkle!

C: 是位星际和平公司的职员，叫沙马里。听目击者说，有个人高马大的壮汉，穿得宽袍大袖，和沙马里擦肩而过时突然一锤子砸了下去…
E: An IPC employee named Shamari. Eyewitnesses reported that a tall, strong man wearing a large robe with long sleeves walked right past Shamari, then suddenly assaulted him with a hammer...

C: 因为是突发事件，没什么有用的线索，只有袭击者使用的凶器，和受害者的证件……
E: This is a developing case, so there aren't many clues yet. All we have to go by are the weapon used by the assailant and the victim's ID...

C: 他们不会突然意识到，咱们根本不是什么「侦查人员」吧……
E: You don't think they'll realize we aren't actually detectives, do you?

C: 然后是富商佐罗。他想加入匹诺康尼的商事集团，同花火大人是竞争关系。也许这就是他的杀人动机。
E: Next up, you have the merchant Lefton. He wants to join up with the Penacony trading guild, and is in direct competition with Miss Sparkle. That could be a motive for killing her.

C: 根本没有凶手。
E: There is no murderer at all.

C: 有没有一种可能，你被开除了？
E: Is it possible you were... fired?

C: 杨先生，我来教你。这东西可好玩了。
E: Let me show you — this thing is pretty fun.

C: 抱歉，云骑军正奉太卜之命整顿司部安全。前方区域暂不开放。
E: I'm sorry, the Cloud Knights have orders from the master diviner to secure the commission's safety. The area up ahead is temporarily closed.

C: 就像这座穷观大阵，无论天理衍变，还是人世代谢。只要信息充足，任何问题它都能回答。
E: Take the Matrix of Prescience here as an example. As long as sufficient information is provided, it can answer questions on anything — from the evolution of natural phenomena to the metabolism of living things.

C: 来都来了，总得人尽其用嘛。
E: Well, since they're here already, I may as well make use of them.

C: 你自己去吧，{NICKNAME}，我才不想和那个女人说话呢～
E: You go, {NICKNAME}. I don't wanna talk to that woman.

C: 你在说谎。
E: You're lying.

C: 侥幸活过战争的仙舟同胞，则堕入名为「魔阴身」的长生疾患中。
E: Many Xianzhou comrades who were lucky enough to survive the wars became stricken with mara — a condition that immortals are susceptible to.

C: 有是有。只是工造司中遍布许多示警机关，一旦被机关奇械围住，将军一时间怕也是不能到场救人。
E: Yes, we do. Still, the Artisanship Commission is filled with security mechanisms. Even the general won't be able to save us in time if we get trapped.

C: 但老夫实在爱莫能助啊，这工造司被一只不知何来的木精邪祟占据！连司里的至宝，「造化洪炉」也被那木妖窃夺了。
E: But there's not much I can do to help! The Artisanship Commission was suddenly taken over by some evil tree demon. It seized our most precious possession — the Creation Furnace!

C: 可老夫思来想去，也不能就这么走嘞。毕竟那「洪炉」里封着……
E: But then, I couldn't just run away... knowing what lies sealed in the furnace...

C: 多谢老师傅告知实情，告辞！
E: Thanks for the colorful explanation. Bye!

C: 真是讽刺，智者埋泉下，愚者长不灭啊……
E: Ironic, isn't it? The wise are buried while the fools remain immortal...

C: {NICKNAME}，你来了啊。怎么，是有什么事要商量吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, you're back. Anything you wanted to share?

C: 医者开药也许能保护一个人的身体，但有时候心里的孤独和创伤却只有陪伴关心才能慢慢疗愈。
E: A healer's medicine might remedy one's physical health, but sometimes the loneliness and hurt inside one's heart needs companionship and care to heal.

C: 真遗憾啊，如果你先结识的是在下，也许我们就能成为真正的朋友了。
E: Most unfortunate. Had you known me first, perhaps we could have been good friends.

C: 再见了，无名客。
E: Farewell, Nameless.

C: 小瞎子，上楼台！
E: Little miss lady, can't see ahead!

C: （调查这种失踪案应该需要点专业设备…去地衡司借一只谛听吧，它才是专业侦探。）
E: (Some professional equipment might come in handy for the investigation of a disappearance case like this... Let me borrow a Diting from the Realm-Keeping Commission. It's the real professional detective.)

C: （贝娜说放生的羊就是在这里失踪的。放出谛听找找看吧，附近也许有什么线索。）
E: (According to Benna, this is where the released sheep went missing. Let me use Diting to search for clues in this area.)

C: 嗐，你盛名在外，难道自己没有自觉吗？
E: Huh? Don't you realize how famous you are?

C: 可是怎么才能保证他们放生的东西，不会构成食物链呢？
E: But how can we guarantee the living creatures they release won't form a food chain?

C: 「草叶派」的放生标准…
E: What are the criteria for a species that can be released by the Plant Faction...?

C: 哎呀，这些濒危宝宝，我还真是越看越喜欢……
E: Oh, the more I look at these endangered darlings, the more fond I grow of them...

C: 我什么时候有得这种特长…
E: Since when did I have such expertise?

C: 人家灰熊知恩图报嘛！这不是回来给您报恩来了嘛！
E: Grizzly never forgets every favor it receives! It did that to return your kindness!

C: 你还是操心操心你自己吧。
E: You should consider your own safety, first...

C: 嘿嘿，我从见到您那一刻就知道，您是干这个的。走吧走吧！
E: Hee-hee, I knew it! This is what people like us live for. Let's go!

C: 吾已说过，仙舟之上并无鬼魂。这是荒诞迷信，身为仙舟住民，理当不信谣不传谣。
E: We have already told you there are no ghosts on the Xianzhou — it is a ridiculous superstition. As a resident of the Xianzhou, you should refrain from believing or spreading rumors.

C: 但观众喜欢神秘感，喜欢捉摸不透的秘密和阴谋。咱们这些主播也只能看人上菜了。
E: My audience likes getting to the bottom of mysteries, secrets, and conspiracies... We streamers have to cater to that, you know?

C: 要不是…要不是因为被你缠上，我早就…早就能支个小摊过上安安稳稳的小日子了。
E: Hmph, i—if it weren't for you, I would've opened a dessert stall ages ago!

C: 现在你再去瞧那些纸符小人吧，你会知道如何继续前进的。
E: Now, go and look at those talismans again — the paper dolls. You'll know where to go.

C: 再说了，老子要是没有被封印在尾巴上，会在这里陪你们过家家？
E: You think I'd be here playing house with you numbskulls if I could fly away?

C: 说的不错。不过藿藿饱经训练，论对抗岁阳更有心得。
E: Correct. However, Huohuo has had many more years of training and is more experienced in fighting heliobi than you.

C: 她成为判官未久，仍需历练。除此之外，那些落入恚炎掌控的冥差，也请手下留情。
E: Her time as a judge has been brief — she is still inexperienced. Apart from that, please also have mercy on the spiritfarers that have fallen under Furynox's control.

C: 岁阳是不会就这样被消灭的。
E: Heliobi don't die that easily.

C: 可是……
E: But...

C: 将藿藿擢升为判官乃是十王降旨，其中定有深意。
E: It is the decree of the Ten Lords for Huohuo to be elevated to a judge. There must be some meaning in it.

C: （情况好像有点失控了……）
E: (The situation seems to be getting out of control...)

C: …好，如果这样能让您放心的话——请把它给我吧。
E: ...Okay, if it will make you happy. Please give it to me.

C: 您看——我已经把特调喝了。现在，请您放心去吧。
E: Look, I've drank it all. Now, please rest easy and go.

C: 贵客，欢迎光临……
E: Welcome, esteemed guest...

C: 感谢您…今晚，我想听着它睡去…最好就这样一睡不醒。
E: Thank you... Tonight, I will fall asleep while listening to it... Even better if I don't ever wake up.

C: 只写了一个开头……
E: I've only written an opening so far...

C: 我就知道我的娜娜与众不同！等娜娜在匹诺康尼歌剧院举办演出的时候，我就要和别人炫耀：「看！那是我最好的朋友！」。
E: I knew my Cocona is incredible! When you organize a concert at the Penacony Theater, I'm going to show off to everyone: "Look, that's my best friend!"

C: （咦？那不是庞德……）
E: (Huh? That isn't Pound...)

C: 扔掉庞德的门票。
E: Throw Pound's tickets away.

C: 放手。
E: Let go.

C: 毕竟那是你的梦想。
E: It is your dream, after all.

C: 那位小姐，唱得好棒…
E: That lady's singing is magnificent...

C: 您也是来要签名的吗？请稍等……
E: Are you here for an autograph, too? Just a moment...

C: （信息量很大，来总结一下吧……）
E: (There is a lot of information in here. Let's summarize the main points...)

C: 逃亡？
E: Running away?

C: …等等，「芙洛拉」……
E: ...Wait, "Flora"...

C: 直接用我的名字我的脸。
E: Just use my name and face.

C: 抱歉，方才太过专注于欣赏雕像成品，有些失态了。
E: Sorry, I was mesmerized by the statue. That was inappropriate.

C: 呃…没记错的话，您应该是星穹列车的{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}？
E: Err... If I'm not wrong, you should be {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME} of the Astral Express, yes?

C: 「慨当以慷，忧思难忘。何以解忧？惟有乐达！」
E: "In the haunted days of worries and sorrow, SoulGlad will bring you... bring you... happiness!"

C: （不错的开头，{NICKNAME}……）
E: (Nice start, {NICKNAME}...)

C: 这是我的私人住宅，你越界了。
E: This is my private home. You are crossing the line.

C: 好吧，我也不知道是谁给我发的信息！但邀请我来的那条信息我还保存着呢。
E: Fine, I don't know who sent me this message! But I've still got the invite saved here in my messages.

C: 交给我这个专业摄影师吧。
E: Leave it to me. I'm a pro.

C: 怎、怎么办…您、您应该是位好人……
E: Wh—What should I do... I—I think you're a good person...

C: 看吧！傲慢！自负！阴暗的巨人！
E: See? How arrogant! How conceited! The giants are all wicked!

C: 太…太可怕了！世间竟然存在着如此面目可憎的巨人，而且还是两个！矲主，宽恕他们……
E: Soooo... scary! It's unbelievable there exist such hideous giants in this world. And there are two of them! Master, please pardon them...

C: 一定要来泰科铵巡演啊！
E: Please come to Taikiyan for your tour!

C: 来就来，谁怕谁？
E: Just bring it on! I ain't scared!

C: 波提欧兄弟、青雀小姐、以及我的挚友{NICKNAME}…愿伊德莉拉的光芒照耀你们未来的路途。希世难得号已空置太久，我也该继续踏上追寻「纯美」的征程了。
E: Boothill, Miss Qingque, and {NICKNAME}... May your future be illuminated by Idrila's glow. The One and Only has been idle for too long. It's time for me to continue my quest to pursue the Beauty.

C: 这下明白了！
E: I get it now!

C: 嘻嘻，来得早不如来得巧，妾身一到就赶上一场好戏。
E: Hehe, looks like I made it just in time for a show.

C: 那{NICKNAME}你想做些什么吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, what do you want to do?

C: 那你就更不应该放弃了！
E: Then you definitely shouldn't be giving up!

C: 星槎的萌芽阶段已经拍摄成功了。
E: Photos have been taken of the starskiff in germination phase.

C: 你这么说就生分了，经过上一次迴星港一别，我已经将你和青雀小姐看作是我的挚友了！朋友要来，我怎么可能擅自离开嘛。
E: I'm disappointed to hear that. Since we parted ways at Stargazer Navalia, I've seen you as my close friend! How can I go away when I'm expecting a friend's visit?

C: 公输师傅何出此言？
E: Why do you think so, Master Gongshu?

C: 我的水平完全不够，不过是在狗尾续貂而已，只有老师他才能补上缺失的部分。
E: My skill isn't up to snuff, and I'm a poor successor to my master. Only my master can complete the missing part.

C: …越难的事越想尝试。
E: ...The harder the challenge is, the more I wanna try it.

C: 巨大的金人缓缓移动着笨重的身躯，四下环顾。最后，终于仿佛从那场漫长、昏暗的冥梦中醒了过来。
E: The enormous aurumaton moves its bulky body slowly and scans its surroundings. Then, it moved as if waking up from a long and bleak dream.

C: 你这个人责任感也太重了。
E: You have such a strong sense of responsibility.

C: （将纸船送进航道里）
E: (Push the paper boat and send it onto a lane)

C: 嗯？那倒没什么关系，这是我个人的修炼计划。
E: Hm? Not really. It's my personal training plan.

C: …别乱动，你还没完全恢复好。希儿，你也别逼得太紧了…卢卡现在需要休息。
E: ...Slow down — you haven't completely recovered. Seele, don't pressure him... let him rest.

C: …这可算不上理由。
E: ...Well whatever they are, they're not good enough.

C: …哦？我徒弟？你们后来又发生什么了吗？
E: ...Oh? My student? Did something happen recently?

C: 话是不假。但一码归一码，你的这个新「习惯」，我实在是……
E: True, but quit changing the subject! This new "routine" of yours is just...

C: 巧了，我们刚从那儿离开。
E: We just left there. Talk about coincidence.

C: 他真可爱。
E: Yeah, he's adorable.

C: 你又是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: 哈哈。不必如此正式，老朽此行便衣简从，与来观礼的游客并无区别。
E: Hehe, no need to be so formal. I'm just a tourist here, no different from other tourists who've come to attend the ceremony.

C: 你不和我们一起走吗？
E: Aren't you coming with us?

C: 演武仪典不过是一场小小的节庆，能让其他仙舟的两位天将同时来到这儿，只怕另有原因。
E: The Wardance is just a small festival, and now we have two Arbiter-Generals from other Xianzhou ships here. I'm afraid they're here for something more.

C: 但你们要在港口停留数日，才能修复引擎再次启航。我们怎么可能让未经检查的危险品在罗浮港口停留数日呢？
E: But you'll have to stay in the port for several days before your ship is repaired and you can take off again. How can we just leave unchecked items sitting here?

C: 莫非她就是…？
E: Could she be...?

C: 你还是和过去一样讨厌。
E: But you're still as annoying as ever.

C: 年少。
E: Young.

C: 那彦卿就恭敬不如从命了。
E: I'd be happy to accept your invitation.

C: 我明白了，那就跳过介绍这一步吧。
E: I see. Let's skip the "introduction" part then.

C: 以后有这等面见将军的好差事，你还是饶了我吧。我一个随军医士怎么就要被推到台前，和两位将军谈笑风生了呢？
E: I'd prefer to be excused from future meetings with generals. I'm just a military healer, and now all of a sudden I'm thrust onto the center stage having cordial chats with two generals?

C: 不过是斩了些怪物就得意忘形。
E: All you did was chop down a few monsters. Don't get carried away with yourself.

C: 而且我听说彦卿小兄弟剑术过人，他代表罗浮守擂，老朽觉得这件礼物真是再合适不过了。
E: Moreover, I hear that Yanqing is an excellent swordmaster, and that he will be representing the Luofu as the ringmaster, so it seems like a perfect gift for him.

C: 我被派来安他们的心。
E: That's why I was sent here — to reassure them.

C: 优先完成任务…
E: Complete the mission first...

C: 它们的目光交汇处，有一个黑黢黢的空洞，不知作何之用？
E: Their gazes converge at a pitch-black void, and you wonder what it's for.

C: 离去的脚步声仿佛一个信号，让你们松了口气。
E: The departing footsteps sound like a signal, prompting you to breathe a sigh of relief.

C: 自罗浮前任剑首镜流俘获呼雷以来，数百年过去了，幽囚狱从未允许呼雷进食给养。但即便馁饿至今，他依旧活着。这和记录在案的步离人生理完全不符。
E: It has been centuries since Jingliu, the former Sword Champion of the Luofu, captured Hoolay. And during all those years, we never provided him with any food. Yet he's somehow managed to stay alive. It defies all the documented physical characteristics of the borisin.

C: 如此想来，他究竟是在下落中度过了一生的时间，还是被某些长生种犯人吸食精气变老？这就不得而知了。总之，两位可不要轻易尝试啊。
E: Did he spend his whole life falling? Or did some long-life prisoner drain his life essence? We'll never know. Anyway, please don't try anything like that.

C: 我和弟兄们会封死这座监狱的门关，把狱卒闷死在里面。这样我们能暂时得到喘息的时间。
E: My brothers and I will lock down this prison, trapping the prison guards inside. This will buy us some time.

C: 呼雷这厮倒是逃得飞快，还将门关紧紧闭锁。如今云骑军已经重新与内部取得了联系。
E: Hoolay made a quick escape and even sealed the gates of the prison. As of now, the Cloud Knights have re-established contact with the staff inside.

C: 大人，我不怀疑飞霄将军的能力，我更关心的是演武仪典。
E: I have no doubt about General Feixiao's capabilities, General Huaiyan. I'm more concerned about the Wardance.

C: 当然了，你的法子倒也不是没人认同。
E: But of course, not everyone disagrees with your idea.

C: 丹恒、灵砂，要劳烦两位随我一起走这趟苦差了。
E: Dan Heng and Lingsha, I'll need both of you to accompany me on this challenging journey.

C: 这蛮力，绝不是寻常的步离人能办到的…多半是呼雷。
E: Such brute strength is not something an ordinary borisin possesses... This is likely the work of Hoolay.

C: 丹恒先生曾经警告我慎重处理持明长老对丹鼎司的干涉。难不成……
E: You once warned me to be cautious of the Vidyadhara Elders' influence within the Alchemy Commission. Could it be...

C: 从未听过…我、我并没有向您发号施令，我也绝对服从您的指示。
E: No, I've never heard anything like that... I... I wasn't trying to defy your will. I will always unquestioningly follow your orders.

C: 你是步离人？！
E: Wait, you're a borisin!?

C: 步离人这三个字，只能用来称呼那些狼头恩主。我是一个出生在「沦陷地」的狐人……
E: The word "borisin" was only used to refer to those wolf masters. I'm a foxian who was born in one of the "fallen territories"...

C: 而为了回报她的救命之恩，你打算倾尽所能，去挑战这个无法解开的谜题。
E: And in return for her saving your life, you intend to give everything to solve this impossible puzzle.

C: 你看那边，那边就是我们要登上的擂台。
E: Look over there, that's the ring we'll be standing on.

C: 我可是三月七。
E: I am March 7th.

C: 所以，你能做的便是治好我们，让我们去「医治」战争。
E: So, all you can do is heal us, and let us go "cure" war.

C: 真是大言不惭啊，小姑娘。这场战争持续了几千年，还会继续打下去！说什么「医治」战争，你们不过是在送死！
E: Such arrogance, young lady! This war has been waged for thousands of years, and it will only continue! What do you mean by "cure" war? All you will achieve is getting yourself killed!

C: 别放过眼前的机会！
E: This is our chance!

C: 嗯，我尽力镇压了步离人的袭扰。当我察觉到呼雷不在地面上时，我就争分夺秒地赶来这儿了。
E: Everything's fine. We were able to suppress the borisin attacks. When I sensed that Hoolay was not on the ground, I raced to get here as quickly as I could.

C: 彦卿小弟，你做得好啊！刚才击倒呼雷的最后一剑，我怎么从来没见你使过？
E: Yanqing, that was amazing! The final blow you dealt to Hoolay, how have I never seen that before?

C: 没错，毕竟你和我是如此相似。我们都是为战而生，也是为战而死的怪物。
E: That's right, we are so similar after all. We are both monsters that were born for war and will die for war.

C: 你是一头为战而生，为战而死的野兽！
E: You are a beast that was born for war and will die for war!

C: 自我降生之日起，天空泣血，万物嚎哭。
E: Since the day I was born, the skies have cried tears of blood, and all living creatures have howled and lamented.

C: *咆哮*
E: *roar*

C: 你受将军指派前来，不就是想听我俯首自白吗？若你心中存有一丝不忍，就该明白我做这一切的动机。
E: You were sent here by the general to hear my confession, weren't you? If there's even a shred of empathy in you, you should understand the reasons behind everything I've done.

C: 神策府
E: Seat of Divine Foresight

C: 算了伊里潘，停下！再打真的要惊动家族了！
E: Forget it, Illifan. Stop! Any more and we'll alert The Family!

C: 赶紧解释，别做谜语人。
E: Spill it, now. Stop beating around the bush.

C: 朕被扶上王座，成为了普普沙帝国的皇帝。太后为了保护她年幼的女儿，开始临朝称制。
E: I ascended the throne and became the Pupsha Empire's Emperor. In order to protect her young daughter, the Empress Dowager began ruling in her stead.

C: 这事朕不放心交给别人，就由你来处理吧。
E: It's too important to leave to anyone else, so I'm entrusting you to handle this.

C: 朕知道你不是，但你们…真是一模一样……
E: I know you're not, but you two... look so much alike...

C: 我是他的副手，旧帝国资产清算委员会的执行副组长伊里潘。
E: I am his second-in-command, Illifan, Executive Vice-Leader of the Old Empire Dissolution Committee of the Pupsha Republic.

C: 谢谢你，无名客。
E: Thank you, Nameless.

C: 你为什么要继承「皇位」？
E: Why do you want to inherit the throne?

C: 你是怎么知道的？
E: How did you know?

C: 假设：查德威克博士确实因某种原因遭到家族记恨，并被软禁于梦境世界中；该推导中仍然存在无法解释的漏洞。
E: Hypothesis: Dr. Chadwick offended The Family for some reason and was confined in the dreamscape as a result. Things still don't quite add up in this scenario.

C: 我想亲自前往匹诺康尼，借故探访查德威克博士。{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，不知你是否愿意同行？
E: I'd like to travel to Penacony myself and find a chance to visit Dr. Chadwick. {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}, would you like to join me?

C: 为什么？一切都那么混乱，那么无序。我是「天才俱乐部」的一员，这我记得起来…但我做了什么？我又忘记了什么？是谁把我束缚在了这幻象里……
E: Why? Why is everything in such a chaotic, disorderly manner? I remember I'm a member of the Genius Society... But what did I do, and what have I forgotten? Who bound me to this illusionary world...

C: 自动巡航AI已部署。触敌引爆AI已部署。
E: Automatic cruise AI deployed. Enemy contact detonation AI deployed.

C: …你同情查德威克博士，是吗？
E: ...You sympathize with Dr. Chadwick, right?

C: <size=28>四……</size>
E: <size=28>Four...</size>

C: 一句简单的话，我却憋了大半辈子没能说出口。我想…现在是时候让我自己听见了。
E: It's just a simple phrase, but I haven't been able to say it. It's probably time I hear it myself now.

C: 听到了吗？快去吧——这座梦境，没你想得那么简单。
E: Did you hear me? Quickly now. This Dreamscape isn't as simple as you think.

C: 这个嘛…我也并不清楚，如果你感兴趣，就请自己去探寻真相吧。
E: About this... I'm not too sure either. If you're interested, you may wish to seek out the truth yourself.

C: 你认识这些筑梦师？
E: You know these Dreamweavers?

C: …这些的都是什么乱七八糟的！真正的隐夜鸫压根不是这样的，我们——
E: ...What's all this nonsense about! The true Nightingales weren't like this at all, we...

C: 糟糕，当鸟当久了，好像忘了什么很重要的事情……
E: Oh no, I've been a bird for so long. It's as if I've forgotten something important...

C: 小鸟又恢复了那副*贱贱*的神情——说真的，它是你见过最不讨喜的卡通形象了，没有之一。
E: The bird regains its *sly* expression — honestly, it's the most unpleasant cartoon character you've ever seen, hands down.

C: …但对它来说，这真的是<color=#dbc291ff>「最好的结局」</color>吗？
E: ...But to it, is this really the <color=#dbc291ff>best ending</color>?

C: 小鸟抬头望向星空——十二片梦境的灯火连成一片，组成了流梦礁的星空。
E: The bird looks up at the starry sky — The lights from the twelve Dreamscapes link up to form Dreamflux Reef's starry sky.

C: ——啾，啾啾！找到啦！
E: — Tweet, tweet tweet! Found it!

C: （就如惠特克爵士所言，真正的历史总被时间磨损，或许我该将这些都记录下来……）
E: (It's just as Sir Whittaker said — that real history would always be ground down by time. Maybe I should record all these...)

C: 费歇尔先生…哎，我知道此行的目的。但奥尔拉说他不愿意见你。
E: Mr. Fischer... Look, I know the reason behind this trip, but Orla says he doesn't want to see you.

C: 如今，这些外邦人大多被安置在了远离城墙的避难所里，生存条件比荒原好上许多，还有圣城守卫保护。但那毕竟没法给他们家园的安定感。
E: Right now, most of these outlanders have been situated in a shelter far away from the city walls. The conditions are much better than the wasteland's, with the city guards protecting the place. But it will never grant them a sense of security akin to their homes.

C: 那都别放进来了，最公平。
E: How about no one gets allowed in then, that's most fair.

C: 多谢你们，还有这位灰发的英雄。我们…我们该怎么回报你们？
E: Thank you all so much, especially this gray-haired hero. How... How can we ever repay you?

C: 女人蹲下，紧紧抱住了自己的孩子，泪水从她眼角默默滑落。
E: The woman crouches and holds her child tight, tears silently streaming down the corners of her eyes.

C: 怎么样，小家伙？如果你想要，我的报价是<unbreak>4000</unbreak>利衡币。
E: What about it, little one? If you wish, I'll sell them to you for <unbreak>4,000</unbreak> Balance Coins.

C: 反正放着也是放着。
E: It's not like the supplies are going anywhere.

C: 圣城的资源有限，这个事实不因我们的态度而改变。奥赫玛帮不了所有人。
E: The resources of the holy city are limited. This truth cannot be changed by our attitudes. Okhema can't help everyone.

C: 退下！该死的{RUBY_B#尼卡多利}疯王{RUBY_E#}残兵，不许再向前了！
E: Stay back! Foul remnant of {RUBY_B#Nikador}the Mad King{RUBY_E#}. You are not permitted any further!

C: 尼卡多利生腌！
E: Nikador raw pickles!

C: 放弃吧…不要再玷污我残存的荣耀了…让我投身命定的冥流……
E: Just give up... Do not further sully what little honor I have remaining... Let me give myself to my destiny in the underworld...

C: 哎哟，还真是……
E: Ah, such a pity...

C: 此刻已是圣城存亡之刻，萨白尼、阿狄安、奥利弗兰卡…奥赫玛的藩邦一个个化为焦土，而天谴之矛已将矛尖指向城门。
E: The moment of reckoning has come for the holy city. Sabany, Adian, Alflanke... The vassal states of Okhema have been reduced to scorched earth one by one. Now, the Lance of Fury points its tip at the city gates.

C: 这次敌军带着尼卡多利的神启袭来，上阵的士兵怕是凶多吉少——但我可不想死！
E: The enemy forces are attacking with the Revelation of Nikador. I fear any soldier that face them will meet a grim fate... But I don't want to die!

C: 我会成为你最好的战友，与你共同承担这伟大的义务与使命，一起守卫……
E: I will become your greatest ally and share the weight of your duty and mission. Let us guard...

C: 太好了，恩人，多亏了有你的见证才这么顺利！
E: Oh felicitations, my savior! This all went so smoothly thanks to you bearing witness.

C: 当然…是因为…因为你！
E: Isn't it obvious...? This is all... your fault!

C: 戍卫长？戍卫长！
E: Captain? Captain!?

C: 帕…里斯……
E: Pa... ris...

C: 让我断了这手上的金丝，莫让那叛徒寻到了我们的踪迹……
E: Let me cut this golden thread on my arm. I cannot have the traitor following us...

C: 戍卫长倒伏在鲜血中，充斥嗔怨的胸口停止了起伏……
E: The captain collapses in a pool of fresh blood. His chest, once heaving with rage, now still...

C: 你是不是听不懂人话？我是叫你别信那些鬼话，所谓预言，不过是些好听的谎话罢了。
E: Are you deaf or dumb? I'm telling you not to listen to that drivel. So-called prophecies are nothing but honeyed lies.

C: 想见帕西提亚的话，已经晚了。我来的时候，刚巧看见那家伙被圣城卫士们抓走。
E: It'll be too late if you want to meet Pasithea. When I arrived, I happened to witness the city guards escorting that scoundrel away.

C: 别急，这位朋友。我又不是墨涅塔的蝴蝶，不会在你面前飞走的。在你重新开口之前，让我猜猜你的身份……
E: Don't rush, my friend. I'm not Mnestia's butterfly. I will not flit away before your eyes. Before you start, let me guess your identity...

C: 就像一直以来那样？
E: Like we always do?

C: 闭上眼，将你的心灵放至永夜天帷之上，在星夜之间，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}，岁月与命运的车轮，它们正碾过你那纯粹的灵魂。
E: Close your eyes and cast your soul into the Evernight Veil. Among the starry night, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, the wheel of time and destiny, shall grind your pure soul.

C: 还记得我之前教你的吗？三相祭祀的下一步是什么？
E: Do you still remember what I taught you? What's the next step to the tripartite ritual?

C: 然后，取得与之相称的命运。
E: And then, attain the destiny of equal worth.

C: 母亲不会责怪你，为了让你活下去，她多半会承担那些危险的工作，深入黑潮的活计。
E: Your mother will not blame you. To ensure your survival, she will likely take on dangerous jobs, doing work deep in the black tide.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，麻烦你带我回去一趟。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}, please bring me back.

C: 她名为<color=#dbc291ff>帕西提亚</color>，把她带出来，她会带来命运泰坦的神谕，指引你们活着到达奥赫玛。
E: Her name is <color=#dbc291ff>Pasithea</color>. Bring her out, and she shall bestow you the prophecy of the Fate Titans, ensuring your survival to Okhema.

C: 于情于理，有办法说服。
E: One way or another, they can be persuaded.

C: 安珂，你又没记住名字，那叫「互惠贸易协定」！
E: Anke, you forgot the name again. It's called the Mutual Benefit Trade Agreement!

C: 好，好！
E: Alright, alright!

C: 我会帮忙把《如我所书》列为空间站必读书目——也许科员们对神话不感兴趣，可一提到这是黑塔女士的项目，就会像佩佩见了宇航服一样兴奋。
E: I'll get As I've Written added to the space station's required reading list. The researchers may not be interested in mythology, but once they hear it's Madam Herta's project, they'll get as excited as Peppy seeing a spacesuit.

C: 呜呜伯
E: Wubbaboo

C: 总感觉你好像学废了…
E: I get the feeling you've been led astray...

C: 如果有机会的话，我真想去别的星球转转，用我的躯体，亲自丈量一下外面的道路，体验一下风沙吹拂在脸颊的滋味。
E: If I got the chance, I'd go to other planets and use my steps to measure how big those worlds are. I want to feel the sensation of wind and sand brushing past my face.

C: 一会儿我有个会议，要和应物科的人一起开会…我有点害怕，万一遇到什么问题，麻烦你远程指点我一下吧！
E: I've got a meeting coming up soon with the Department of Implement Arts... I'm a bit spooked about it. If I have any issues later, can you help me remotely? Please?

C: 真的吗？你可不要骗我。
E: Seriously? You better not be kidding.

C: {NICKNAME}，你怎么来了？机器人不是修好了吗？
E: Back again, {NICKNAME}? Aren't the robots fixed already?

C: 你也别瞎打听了，信我一句话：这事儿八成就是个乌龙！
E: Save your breath. There's no point in asking around. Trust me, this is most likely just a rumor!

C: 我最恨投机取巧！
E: I detest those who take shortcuts!

C: 时尚的车轮滚滚向前…我这头白发留了这么久，也换个颜色了。
E: Fashion is changing every day... I've had white hair for so long that it's about time for a change.

C: 虽然特效有些夸张，但琥珀色真的很好看，我也很心动！
E: The special effects are rather extravagant, but the amber shade is quite pretty. I am definitely tempted!

C: 我权衡了一下，以我的身份和格局，跑到大街上逮人就问未免有些自降身价。于是我想到一个精妙的点子：拍照。
E: I've thought about it. With my reputation, I will be degrading myself if I just ask anyone on the street to be my friend. So I have a great idea: Photos.

C: 奇怪…太奇怪了，简直可疑。我看不清楚这个华劳斯的动机…这可不是什么好兆头！
E: This is strange and suspicious. I can't understand Wallace's motives... That's not a good sign!

C: 如果能和华劳斯少爷当上朋友，那相当于整个行政区…不，整个贝洛伯格的房产市场大门都会为我敞开！
E: If I could befriend Wallace, the doors of the real estate market in the Administrative District... no, the entire Belobog would be open for me!

C: 我总结了过去的失败，得出一个结论：错不在我。
E: I've studied my failures and come to one conclusion: It's not my fault.

C: 糟了，又是你…
E: Yikes, it's you again...

C: 嘿嘿，不用谢，歌蒂阿姨！记住，以后再有需要帮忙的地方，可以随时召唤鼹鼠党哦！
E: Hehe, you are welcome, Ms. Gertie! Remember, you can come to The Moles for help any time!

C: 谢谢你们，{NICKNAME}还有尤利安。有关「鼹鼠党」的事迹，我肯定会多跟客人们提及的。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME} and Julian. I will definitely tell the guests about the good deeds of The Moles.

C: 快看，荣誉队员！「地火」要送的快递果然都放在这里。
E: Honorary member, look! It's the supplies Wildfire is planning to ship out.

C: 下次任务再见啦，荣誉队员——鼹鼠党，解散！
E: I'll see you at our next mission, honorary member. The Moles, dismiss!

C: 我算缓过劲来了——你是不是一直在逗我玩呢？你觉得这很好笑吗？
E: I get it now — have you been playing with me? Do you think this is funny?

C: 我都跟你说了好多遍了，这是原则问题……
E: I've told you many times. It's a matter of principle...

C: 送给一位热爱动物的爱心人士。
E: The flowers will be given to a kind animal lover.

C: 我是故意选错的！
E: I meant to pick the wrong answer!

C: 第一题是这样的……
E: The first question is...

C: 好家伙，您这上下段还连着…
E: Gosh! I didn't expect there's a sequel.

C: 不过这样也好，从今天开始，我们可就算是同病相怜了，我——一个科学家，这些年吞下了多少委屈，你也能感同身受了吧？
E: But that's alright. Misery loves company. As a scientist, I've had to swallow many a bitter pill over the years. I'm guessing you're the same?

C: 记住，那道题的答案是「<unbreak>14</unbreak>」！
E: Remember: The answer to the question is "fourteen"!

C: 您是不是漏读了题面的信息？这嘈杂的环境确实不适合深度思考。我相信以您的聪明才智，只要有足够的时间，一定能给出正确答案……
E: Did you miss all the info in the question? It really is too noisy in here for cognitive testing. I'm sure with your wits, it's only a matter of time before you come up with the right answer...

C: 塔米拉小姐，今天也要七彩虹吗？
E: Hi Tamila, are you after more Rainbows today?

C: 能不能请你亲眼看一看，塔米拉小姐在舞台下的样子呢？
E: Could you please go and see for yourself how Tamila looks when she's offstage?

C: 难道其中暗藏玄机？
E: Is there any funny business in this?

C: 哎…这都哪跟哪啊！我们这是志愿者团体——专门做义工、做好事的！
E: Huh... Wait, no! We are a volunteer group — We volunteer and do good deeds!

C: 有意思，我加入。
E: Sounds interesting. I'm in.

C: 那就拜托了，感激不尽！
E: Please! You have my sincerest thanks!

C: 再加上我已经到了这个岁数…对各种事都不会感到惊奇了。
E: Besides, I'm old now. I don't get surprised anymore.

C: 这裂界里哪来的兄弟？
E: Where are you going to get other Guards in the Fragmentum?

C: 你有没有「现在的玩伴」？
E: Do you have any current "playmates"?

C: …不过你说这玩意儿是从海里打捞上来的，有点意思。我还是收下来跟邻居家小孩儿炫耀吧，谢谢你啦。
E: But you said you salvaged this from the sea? That is interesting. Perhaps I should take this to show off to the neighbor's kid. Thanks!

C: 这里可不是一般人该来的地方。
E: This is no place for regular citizens.

C: 我很喜欢这种治愈心灵的感觉。
E: I really enjoy this feeling of spiritual healing.

C: 这毫无疑问是一个漂流瓶，还是漂洋过海的那种。
E: This is undoubtedly a drift bottle, one that has crossed the ocean, too.

C: 刚刚喝的茶？
E: What was the tea I just tried?

C: 刚才发生的事我自己都不知道。
E: I don't even know what just happened.

C: 但你为何能看见他耳朵后面的汗水？没由来地想到这一点，你忽地收回了所有思绪，背后直冒冷汗。
E: But why can you see the sweat behind his ears? As you ponder this question, your thoughts come to an abrupt halt, and a cold shiver runs down your spine.

C: 可能刚刚喝得急嗝嗝嗝。
E: Maybe I drank it too fast. *burp* *burp* *burp*

C: 在高塔上仰望星空——这是与当今的翁法罗斯彻底无缘的古代情景。某一日，神明不再游弋于天空，于是人们失去了日月和繁星…当地人好像是这么说的。
E: Gazing at the starry sky atop the high tower — an ancient sight that the present Amphoreus will never know. One day, the gods traversed the skies no longer, and thus people lost their sun, moon and stars... That's what the natives say.

C: 卫士们的指定站岗区域，如今已无人迹。
E: Designated post for sentries. No one uses it now.

C: 「大地兽眼中最美味的食物…要是能拥有可以品尝它的味蕾就好了。」——奇怪，你为什么会反复冒出这样的念头？
E: "The most delicious food to a dromas... If only I possessed the taste buds to savor it." Strange, why are you suddenly having such notions?

C: 水漫琴，受法吉娜赐福的乐器，旋律醉人。周围水体的流量越大，乐器的声音也越响亮。
E: The water harp, an instrument blessed by Phagousa, is capable of producing a riveting melody. The more water that flows around it, the more resonant the music is.

C: 热烈的事物总是带来痛苦——你懒得继续感慨了。
E: Intense events usually bring pain — you can't be bothered to keep sighing.

C: 你仿佛听到了瑟希斯的呢喃——静心，清念，在下次的纷扰中，你将被自然的气息吹拂。
E: It's as if you can hear Cerces whispering — calm your mind, clear your thoughts, and let nature's breath soothe you through the turmoil ahead.

C: 以过去的开拓经验来看，所有危机最终都与星核脱不了干系。可直觉告诉你，墙上的枪不会响三次，凡事也不能都推给纳努克。
E: From what you've learned in your trailblazing experience, every crisis ends up being related to the Stellarons. However, your intuition tells you that lightning never strikes the same place twice, and not all such things can be written off as the work of Nanook.

C: 尘封千年的门扉再启，内殿的烛光亮如白昼。
E: The doors sealed for a millennium reopen, and the candles within burn bright as daylight.

C: 当我们走出这集市，请你即刻忘却此事——
E: The moment we leave this market, please forget about what I have said...

C: 吾师，莫要忘了我们如今的位置。
E: Master, do not forget the position that we are currently in.

C: 你记住了「浪漫、纷争与一捆丝线的故事」
E: You remembered the "tale of Romance, Strife, and a Bundle of Threads."

C: 石像低垂的兜帽下空无一物，却让人感觉仿佛被注视着。四周的萤火虫无惧这份庄严，依然在它身边欢快地起舞。
E: Beneath the statue's lowered hood is an empty void, yet it gives one the eerie feeling of being watched. The fireflies dancing joyfully around it seem undeterred by its solemnity.

C: 毫无疑问，我不能。
E: Undoubtedly, I cannot.

C: 等等，我只是想打个卡。
E: I just want to take a selfie.

C: 你好，请你帮我们取来一个能被定义为「树种」的物品，它位于步行难以抵达的位置，且视线范围内有个扎格列斯之手的石台。
E: Greetings. Please retrieve for us an object that can be defined as a "Tree Seed." It is located in a place difficult to reach by foot, with a stone platform bearing the Hand of Zagreus within view.

C: 你想起了遐蝶，「冥河的女儿」。初来奥赫玛时，你曾险些被她拥入温柔的花乡…直到肌肤相贴时，你才发现她的拥抱并不能为你带来死亡。
E: You think of Castorice, "Daughter of the River of Souls." When you first arrived in Okhema, she almost led you into her gentle, flower-filled realm... until your skin touched hers, and you realized her embrace wouldn't bring you death after all.

C: 五只？你别硬凑了！
E: Five? That's stretching a bit!

C: o((='ω´= )っ「受伤了吗？还是感到疲惫了呢？」)∋
E: o((='ω´= )っ "Are you hurt? Or perhaps fatigued?" )∋

C: 需要培养好身手…
E: You need to strengthen your body...

C: o((■ω■- )o「如我所料，上█场比拼后，豹███黑洞引力激增，现在就连██声音，也█难逃逸了…」)∋
E: o((■ω■- )o "As I expected, after the pre█vious match, my███blackhole gravity has intensified. Now, even██sound can█not escape..." )∋

C: 冷静点啊，爷爷！
E: Calm down, grandpa!

C: 木马里宽敞而幽暗，让你睡意茫茫…但眼皮打架时，眼球却被内壁的一行文字夺去了注意力——
E: The interior of the wooden horse is dark and spacious, lulling you into drowsiness... but as you begin to nod off, your eyes catch a line of text etched on the inner wall —

C: …维尔图斯啊。看来，这就是我们的最后一个晨昏时了。
E: ...Virtus. Looks like this is our final day in this world.

C: 好可怕的伤口，我恐怕命不久矣了吧……
E: This wound is too deep... I don't have a lot of time left...

C: 我会在西风的尽头，盼待由他开辟出的奇迹。
E: I will be waiting at the end of the west wind, looking forward to the miracle he will create.

C: 「小灰子啊，你不会真信了这唬人的玩意吧？」你仿佛听见一声熟悉的讥笑在耳边响起。但待你凝神细听，却只听见浪声交叠。
E: "Gray Mystery, you don't really believe in this bluff, did you?" You seem to hear a familiar mocking laugh in your ear. But when you focus and listen closely, you hear nothing but the sound of waves intertwining.

C: 都说海钓的难度很高，但也不是非得钓到鱼才算是成功。
E: They say sea fishing's tough, but hey, landing a catch isn't the only way to win.

C: 道理都懂，但是蘑菇为什么能长得这么大？也许，这就是魔法的力量吧。
E: It's not like you don't know about safety issues... but why is this mushroom that big? Maybe it's the power of magic.

C: 那、那我祝你出门掉进树洞里迷！
E: W—Well! I hope you trip into a tree hollow the second you leave, mem!

C: 背负世界的重量……
E: The weight of bearing the world...

C: 把水中留给鱼儿，先上岸吧
E: Let's leave the water to the fish and get back to shore.

C: 十二本完结…？还早。
E: Twelve volumes finished...? We're only getting started.

C: 收到。
E: Noted.

C: 朋友啊…留下吧，留在冥界，与我们一同享受这永恒静谧的月光……
E: My friend... stay here. Remain in the nether realm with us and savor this eternal, serene moonlight together...

C: 嗯…大功告成！不过，总觉得还少了些什么……
E: Hmm... All done! But I feel like something's still missing...

C: 幸好有阿姨陪着缇安，给阿姨讲故事的时候，*我们*想起了很多过去的经历。
E: Luckily, you're here to keep us company. When telling you stories, we recall so many past experiences.

C: 她知道我的底牌是她，我同样知道，她的底牌是你们。
E: She knows I'm holding her as my trump card, and I know just as well that you all are hers.

C: …算了，毕竟兄弟一场。它要还活着替我带声好。
E: ...Whatever, we were brothers after all. If it is still alive, give it my regards.

C: 哥啊，我真是不小心蹬了你一脚啊——
E: Brother, I really did not mean to kick you—

C: 拜见左右互搏大师！
E: All hail the master of self-battling, left hand against right!

C: 我们若虫之间流传着一条古老的传说：「当树桩飞向天空时，隐藏的秘密也将被揭晓。」
E: There's an ancient legend among us nymphs: "When the stump soars to the sky, hidden secrets shall be revealed."

C: 攀登顶峰！
E: To the summit!

C: 怪东西在哪呢？
E: Where is the strange thing you were talking about?

C: …所以你们也帮忙教育教育阿七，让她不要随便鼓捣列车上的设备喔。
E: So... help me educate March about not messing with the equipment on the Express.

C: 嗯，我也这么认为，和忆庭打交道太危险了。关于「记忆」的交易也…十分蹊跷。
E: Yes, I agree. Dealing with the Garden of Recollection is dangerous, and the trade of memories is... a shady business.

C: 没错。最后一轮演练的内容就是「人海战术」。
E: Correct. This final drill stage tests out your human-wave attack strategy.

C: 哔——啵。收到指示。立刻开始布置演练场地。
E: Beep-boop. Instructions received. Setting up the drill venue...

C: 奥、奥列格兵长已经入驻前线了…他说过您一定会来的！
E: C—Captain Oleg's already hit the front lines... He said that you'd definitely come!

C: 再等等。
E: One second.

C: 我会在身后祝福他们。
E: I will pray for their triumphant return.

C: 跟我来吧——山路崎岖，还请小心脚下。
E: Come with me. The mountain roads are treacherous, please watch your step.

C: 就是你偷了奇物？
E: You were the one who stole the Curio?

C: 知道了，我再去找找。
E: Got it, I'll keep looking.

C: 这里什么也没有啊。
E: There's nothing here.

C: （打听「管家」的秘密）
E: (Inquire about the butler's secret)

C: 你的身份也是假的。
E: Your identity is also fake.

C: 我…只是想尝尝空间站科员们吃的食物，有些好奇…好奇心的事嘛，是这样的。
E: I... only wanted to try what the space station researchers would eat. I am curious... And when you're curious, it's like that.

C: 佩佩朝你伸出毛茸茸的爪子，示意你握住它的爪子。
E: Peppy extends a furry paw towards you, hinting you to grab it.

C: 不，「开拓」永不停歇。
E: No, "Trailblaze" never rests.

C: 要不…粉色记忆精灵？
E: How about... "pink memory spirit" then?

C: 就…先写上「{NICKNAME}」，空出来一点点，再写上「迷迷」！以后，你还可以在中间加上别的字，比方说…
E: Let's write "{NICKNAME}" first, leave a little space, and then add "Mem"! You can even add more words in between later, like...

C: 该读睡前故事了。
E: It's time for a bedtime story.

C: （还是先去确认一下时刻表吧。）
E: (It's better to check the schedule first.)

C: （还算有些赚头。）
E: (It's still some money made.)

C: 一段时间过去，新入港的货运星槎等待着引航……
E: Some time has passed, and the new incoming freight starskiff awaits pilotage...

C: 过去星际和平公司的能量容器，打出<unbreak>15</unbreak>发就会耗尽能量。要是能够自由切换备用能源的话，就可以在战场上保持火力续航了。
E: In the past, the energy container of the Interastral Peace Corporation would run out of energy after firing fifteen rounds. If we can freely switch between backup energy sources, we can have constant firepower on the battlefield.

C: 最近老夫我改进了承接器的工艺，变得可以移动了。这样，未来战场上的云骑军便能够借助脑波，发动无线无人遥距攻击。
E: Recently, I have improved the craft of the receiver, and it has become movable. In this way, the Cloud Knights can use brain waves to launch wireless unmanned remote attacks on the battlefield in the future.

C: 今天测试就到这儿吧。
E: Let's call it a day.

C: 就是外人才合适啊。您只需负责启动阵基就好。
E: Yes, in fact only outsiders like you are suitable. You just need to start up the base terminal, and that's all.

C: 人类嘛，「损不足而奉有余嘛」。
E: Humans. We mitigate our losses and share our surplus.

C: 唔，我手头确实有桩必须要占算的事情，走吧。
E: Well, I just so happen to have something that needs divining. Let's go.

C: 您真是勤快。不过占算次数太多…难免有些不便。请之后再来找我吧。
E: You are so diligent. However, when there're lots of divinations... there would be inevitably some issues. Please come back to me later.

C: 就喜欢您这样有自知之明的天才。
E: I like geniuses with self-awareness like you.

C: 不过我能从玉兆的震动中感受到您磅礴的棋力，不愧是我们「寻径指津」的最强棋手之一。
E: Through the vibrations of my jade abacus, however, I can tell that you must be a prodigious chess master. It's no wonder you're one of the best "Pathfinder" players.

C: 别「Re」了…
E: Sounds re-diculous...

C: 我想换成*挑战难度*。
E: I'd like to change to *Challenging Difficulty*.

C: …滴答，说得有点多了。我打算去派对逛逛…等我那两个朋友都到齐了，就来舞池找我们吧。
E: ...Tick-tock, I have said too much. I intend to go wander around in the party... When both my friends are here, come to the dance floor and look for us.

C: 滴答！这叫摆脚开手舞！游客！这绝对会流行！
E: Tick-tock! This is the boogie-woogie! Guest! This will go viral for sure!

C: 有好好享受派对吗？要不要喝点苏乐达？
E: Are you enjoying the party? Want some SoulGlad?

C: 而这毫无疑问是游客的功绩！值得被用力称赞！
E: And it was no doubt completely thanks to your effort! You must be profusely lauded!

C: 若虫会如何协助你？
E: How does a nymph assist you?

C: 您这一手拨转时针的手艺越发纯熟了，难怪欧洛尼斯它老人家对您青睐有加呀。
E: You're getting better and better at turning time back. It's no wonder that old Oronyx is keen on you!

C: 「巴特鲁斯，巴特鲁斯，」它说，「您能偷盗世界上一切东西，唯独偷不到一件。吉奥里亚的秘果，深埋在大地之中，您能如何品尝到它呢？」
E: "Bartholos, O Bartholos," it said, "you can steal everything beneath the sky, except for one thing: Georios' secret fruit, buried within the earth. How would you even be able to taste it?"

C: 您想听什么方面的？
E: What do you wish to hear?

C: 来点警世恒言？
E: Any worldly warnings?

C: 「巴特鲁斯，巴特鲁斯，」它说，「您能偷盗世界上一切东西，唯独偷不到一件。吉奥里亚的秘果，深埋在大地之中，您能如何品尝到它呢？」
E: "Bartholos, O Bartholos," it said, "you can steal everything beneath the sky, except for one thing: Georios' secret fruit, buried within the earth. How would you even be able to taste it?"

C: 桀桀，没错，就是这种心情！老巴特鲁斯我看到宝箱，也控制不住自己的手呢！
E: Hehe, now that's what I'm talking about! When I see a treasure chest, I can't control my own hands either!

C: 所以，你的身份其实是……
E: So, your true identity is...

C: 是吗？很可惜，我并不具备那样的记忆…因为我只是一个由母体巴特鲁斯捏出的空壳，寿命恐怕也仅此一天。
E: Really? Too bad I don't have those memories... I'm just an empty shell created by Bartholos, probably lasting only this one day.

C: 巴特鲁斯一溜烟地跑掉了…看来这位精明的泰坦，已经看破了迷醉的「诡计」。
E: Bartholos vanishes in a flash... Seems like this shrewd Titan has seen through the intoxicated "Trickery."

C: 短的吧。
E: Keep it short.

C: 桀桀…古有王下一桶，今有盗下一圣！
E: Hehehe... History had its Lordly Trashcan, and now it has the Thievishly Saintcan!

C: 嗐，你可骗不过「诡计」的祖师爷！也就是说，或许你们能从这里出去，但巴特鲁斯就绝无可能？
E: Hah, you can't fool the legend of "Trickery"! So you're saying that while you folks might make it out, Bartholos has absolutely no chance?

C: 回见！到时候，请允许老巴特鲁斯再偷走您的一点儿时间~
E: See ya! When we meet again, allow me to steal just another moment of your time~

C: 「无聊的真相个个相似，精彩的诡计个个不同」——送你一句扎格列斯老祖的格言，咱们有缘再会~
E: "Boring truths are all the same, while every brilliant trick is unique in its own way." Here's a little proverb from ancestor Zagreus for you. Until we meet again~

C: …为什么不能光明正大一点？
E: ...Why can't we be more open about it?

C: 太谢谢您了，来古士老师！
E: Thank you so much, Mr. Lygus!

C: 如果一切顺利…今后我们就可以进一步利用它的算力来解析「黄金替罪羊」之谜。
E: If all goes well... we might even be able to leverage its computational power to further analyze the mystery of the "Golden Scapegoat."

C: 什么人会对这个下手？
E: Who would do such a thing?

C: 就像第欧根娜所质疑的，在下也不认为那位恐怖剑士拥有此等算计。只不过……
E: Just like Diogena's doubts, I also don't think that terrifying swordmaster is capable of such calculated actions. But still...

C: 每次念祷言都感觉怪怪的，为什么一定要往西呢？
E: It feels odd every time I recite the chant. Why does it need a referee?

C: 哗啦啦，门开啦——悄悄跟你说，即使不解迷，我也可以从旁边的缝隙飞进去。
E: *whoosh* The door's open! Just so you know, even if we didn't solve the puzzle, I could've slipped through the cracks.

C: 哗啦啦…真的吗？岁月的祭司都没你厉害。
E: *whoosh* Really? You're even more capable than the Priest of Time.

C: 别一惊一乍啊。
E: Don't scare me like that.

C: 想起来了，这是刻法勒的谕示集，每个侍奉天父的祭司，都要在受洗礼前对它宣誓虔诚。
E: I remember now. This is the oracles of Kephale. Every priest serving the sky father must swear their devotion to them before baptism.

C: 没想到有一天，我也能触碰到天父的火种。
E: Never thought I'd live to touch the sky father's Coreflame...

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，请您用欧洛尼斯的力量，打开最后一重秘术锁吧！
E: {NICKNAME}, use Oronyx's power to break the final arcane seal!

C: 天父啊…伊来内呢？阁下，您有没有看到伊来内？
E: O, sky father... Where's Alain? {NICKNAME}, have you seen him?

C: 这次也没有大呼小叫。
E: Huh. No dramatic reactions this time.

C: 欢迎回家，墨莉亚。
E: Welcome home, Moria.

C: 好吧，为了「均衡」。
E: Alright, then. For the "Equilibrium."

C: 就聊到这儿吧？诸位休息得也差不多了。
E: Let's leave it at that, shall we? I think we've all had enough rest.

C: 「没有的事。」黑塔的视线游移着，似乎在回避事实。
E: "No way." Herta's eyes are shifting around, seemingly trying to deny the truth.

C: 不是一瞬间的事吗？
E: Didn't you say it'll only take a second?

C: 噢，你说得对，是我得意忘形了…抱歉，{NICKNAME}，我很尊重你！如果方便的话，请你再进去测试一下。
E: Oh, you're right. I got too excited... Sorry, {NICKNAME}. I do respect you! If you don't mind, could you please go in for another test?

C: 好的，我这就去。
E: Alright, I'll go now then.

C: 当然！为了你的安全，我要确保你见到的景色是熟悉可控的。我可不想你被一台虚拟设备弄到发疯！
E: Of course! For your safety, I want to ensure that everything you see is manageable. I don't want you to lose your mind in the simulation!

C: 怎样才能和星神交谈呢？
E: How can one speak to an Aeon?

C: 可是祂露个面就跑了。
E: But THEY have run away.

C: 「星神秘史，逸闻，爱恨情仇，或者宇宙起源，什么都行。」黑塔没好气，「你自己想想就是了！」
E: "Myths of the Aeons, anecdotes, love stories, the origin of the universe... Anything will do!" Herta was annoyed, "Just think of something!"

C: 「在这里就不多说了，接着探索吧，可以进行沉浸的时候我再向你说明。」她难得地笑了一声。
E: "That's all you need to know for now. Get exploring, and I'll tell you more once the immersion function is ready to be used." She lets out a rare laugh.

C: 阿哈到底是怎么回事？
E: What is up with Aha?

C: 此刻，还有很多闪回如胶卷般在你面前穿梭：在那灾虐五纪的祸患中，「繁育」与「贪饕」争斗不休——
E: Numerous flashbacks are playing in your mind like a film reel — the Propagation and the Voracity fought incessantly during the calamity that spanned five eras.

C: 但回应你们的只有亘久的静止…黑塔耸了耸鼻子。「找不到了…记忆碎片对模拟宇宙来说可能太多了。这可是整个宇宙的历史！可怕的浮黎，祂令多少『记忆』得以留存？」
E: Resounding silence is the only response you two receive... Herta scrunches her nose and says, "They can no longer be found... The memory fragments might be too many for the Simulated Universe to handle. They contain the entire history of the universe! Fuli is terrifying. How many memories have THEY preserved?"

C: 你不费吹灰之力便成为了后世眼中的占星大师！
E: You have become a master astrologer without effort!

C: 现在，他向你展现罕见的邀请——他欣赏你这位会在工作之余写诗的领航员，对命运的求知欲并非只是落在你指尖的蝴蝶，他也同样拥有。
E: Now, he extends an invitation to you, something he rarely offers. He admires you, a navigator who composes poetry in your spare time. The curiosity for destiny is not just a butterfly that alights on your fingertips, but also on his.

C: …在遇到你后就不一定了。
E: ...But not so much afterwards.

C: 渴睡者终于得到了安眠；她在睡着前拉下了面罩，以掩盖自己将开始梦游的事实——她会在梦中开始毫无规律的行为，并于某刻毫无征兆地苏醒，对此前一切毫无知觉。
E: Finally, the drowsy ones had a restful sleep. She pulled down her mask before falling asleep to conceal the truth that she would start sleepwalking. In her dreams, she would behave erratically and wake up suddenly, oblivious to everything that had happened before.

C: 但你体会到了挺直腰杆的感觉！
E: But you feel what it's like to sit straight!

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 「我可以加入，但我不认为斯蒂芬的意见对研究星神有什么帮助。」一个冷漠的、崭新的声音出现了，她言简意赅。
E: "I can join, but I don't think Stephen's opinion is helpful to the study of Aeons." An indifferent voice emerges. She makes her statement clear and concise.

C: 你打了个寒颤。这些虫族除践行本能外并无意识。你不禁怀疑起这种科技改造来源于何处…
E: You shudder. These insects only act according to their instincts and have no awareness. You can't help wondering about the source of this technological modification...

C: 这次实验收获了不少东西，鱼龙混杂，我和螺丝得好好理理。这期间，研究先暂告一段落。
E: We gained plenty in this experiment. It's all in disarray, so Screwllum and I will organize all these proper. Research will be adjourned for now.

C: 「不，不。你得夸他的形象很中年…但哪个中年人会穿背带裤？」黑塔说到一半，自己笑了，「斯蒂芬让我说：谢谢你。」
E: "No no. You have to say that his avatar is mature... But what kind of middle-aged person even wears overalls?" Herta smiles midway through her sentence. "Stephen wants me to say: Thank you."

C: 「第二场？第一场战争结束过吗？」黑塔嘟囔，「二者明明是交织在一起的。这些家伙就没消停过。」
E: "The Second War? Has the First War even ended?" Herta mumbles, "The two are clearly connected. These guys have never let up."

C: 边星贸易战争已打响数纪。天空中络绎往来的船只将「感情」、「记忆」、「思维」当作物资运输——以「忆泡」作为载体。
E: The Borderstar Trade War has been raging for several eras. The vessels that come and go in the sky transport feelings, memories, and thoughts as supplies using Memory Bubble as the carrier.

C: 判定「自我认知」 - 我是有机。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — I am organic.

C: 极致有机：「神的三个启示」•其二
E: Supreme Organic: God's Three Revelations (II)

C: 仍有那么多的地方在等待你去复原！
E: There are still lots of places waiting for you to revitalize!

C: 冲入敌阵。
E: Dash into enemy formations.

C: 能量攻击在彼此的身边炸开，你第一次感到有些力不从心。热浪将你的表皮撕裂，金属在轰击下融化。可恶的家伙！你要让它们全都消失在这里！
E: Energy attacks detonate next to both parties and, for the first time ever, you feel a sense of powerlessness. The heat rips through your outer surface as metal melts under the barrage. Curse them! You are going to make all of them vanish right here!

C: 这正如我愿。
E: Just as I wish.

C: 请赐予我们不死。
E: Please gift us immortality.

C: 要不要来点零食？
E: Would you like some snacks?

C: 「老伙计，不知道你要在下面待多久。」导师俯身把你塞进盒子。「恐怕我们没机会再见面了，但我的同志们一定会找到你。」
E: "Dear partner, I do not know how long you will be down here." The teacher places you inside a box. "I fear that we may never meet again, but my comrades will find you."

C: 你在黑暗中履行自己的义务，量子硬盘里的数据完好无损，但你的计算单元运行着一个疑问——导师所说的「他们」究竟是谁。
E: You carry out your duty in the dark, your quantum disk data complete and undamaged. However, your computing unit keeps running over a single question... Who are "they"?

C: 你窥视人性的丑恶，也见证人性的伟大。你开始理解人和文明，不仅理解人作为个体的悲欢离合，还理解文明整体的兴衰轮回。
E: You catch a glimpse of the humanity's ugliness, and also witness its greatness. You begin to understand man and civilization, not only understanding the joys and sorrows of individuals, but also the rise and fall of civilization as a whole.

C: 「晚上好，诸位『酒客』。」面具人的声音扑朔迷离，仿佛酒馆里每处物件都是祂的喉舌，「承蒙诸君厚爱，我们从『谜语人』那儿费了老大劲搞来一段佚失历史，并改编成一出微喜剧供诸君取乐。」
E: "Good evening, dear patrons." The masked man's voice was confusing and bewildering, as if every object in the tavern were a conduit for THEM. "In return for your kindness, we have put great effort into retrieving a lost period of The Riddlers' history and edited it into a miniature comedy for your entertainment."

C: 阿尔比拉德第二天就从学派中消失了，此后你再也未能看见她。
E: The next day, Arblad disappeared from the school and you never saw her again.

C: 「由于缺少关于『神秘』的直接资料，我们对祂的大部分认知，都来源于虚构史学家。这个群体的知识都是必考点，请做好笔记……」
E: "Due to a lack of direct information regarding the Enigmata, the majority of our knowledge regarding THEM comes from History Fictionologists. Knowledge from this group is all examinable, so make sure to take notes..."

C: 技术研发部每天会收到几万件发明专利，其中<unbreak>99.99%</unbreak>被定义成「无法创造收益」的垃圾。剩下的<unbreak>0.01%</unbreak>被开发成赚取信用点的商品。
E: The Technology Department receives tens of thousands of patents a day, and <unbreak>99.99%</unbreak> of them are ruled garbage inventions that "cannot generate revenue." The remaining <unbreak>0.01%</unbreak> are developed into products to earn credits.

C: 何必再继续浪费时间？
E: Why keep wasting time?

C: 这是博识学会的耻辱！
E: This is a disgrace for the Intelligentsia Guild!

C: 规模日益增大的兼并让事态向写好的剧本回归，知识就像金钱，源源不断地流向头部学派。了无背景的你们这时才意识到，最初由大学派主导，向下分配冗余配额的格局，只是短暂的幻梦。
E: The mergers, ever-increasing in scale, cause the situation to return to the state of the written script — knowledge is akin to money, endlessly flowing to the leading school at the top of the food chain. It is at this moment that your group, with nothing as your background, realizes that the initial directive of the major schools distributing the surplus allocation downwards was but a fleeting illusion.

C: 注射调和剂。
E: Inject the stabilizing agent.

C: 「一个美丽的波动，纷争与猜疑在花朵间绽放，相信你会喜欢这出万人主演的笑剧。」刀刃轻盈地刺进你的胸膛。
E: "A beautiful ripple, conflict and suspicion blooming among flowers. I trust you will like this comedy ensemble of myriad protagonists." A blade slides effortlessly into your chest.

C: 帕提维娅小心翼翼地走上前。在墓碑前，她看到一束别致的无机花，花蕾是亚共合金，枝干是晶体管和铜丝，铁锈和机油的芬芳与花香混合在一起。
E: Patavia cautiously steps forward. In front of the tombstone, she sees a unique bouquet of inorganic flowers. Their buds are constructed from acrylic alloys, their stems of transistors and copper wire, with the smell of rust and machine oil mixed with their floral scent.

C: 伟大的自由意志，将超越生命的束缚。
E: Almighty free will would surpass the shackles of life.

C: 「去更高的世界俯瞰！」
E: "Go to a higher world and look down upon it!"

C: 上辈子学过。
E: I learned about it in a past life.

C: 「何必匆匆向前呢，各位朋友。」倒行的人群仿佛接到了语声的命令，光阴在刹那间被冻结。帕提维娅成了动弹不得的冰雕，而她身边的女人——那个本该是虚假数据体的女人，将目光投向你们。
E: "Why in such haste to advance forth, my friends?" Time freezes in that instant as if the crowd moving in reverse hears a commanding voice. Patavia becomes an immobile statue of ice and the woman beside her — the woman who should have been an entity composed of false data — turns her gaze to you.

C: 「阿基维利，你又惹了什么麻烦？」如同一团面具的疯狂之源自群星中现身，向你行了个礼，「瞧瞧这个地方，所有东西都被固定在轨道上，简直安静得可怕。要我说，星星们都该哈哈大笑，毕竟，无论是这个假宇宙，还是那个真的，都不过是个拙劣的笑话。」
E: "Akivili, what trouble did you get yourself into this time?" The source of madness in the guise of a cluster of masks appears and gives you a bow. "Take a look at this place. Everything is locked in its path, and it's eerily silent. Honestly, the stars should all burst into laughter, because whether it's this false universe or the real one, they're both just poorly executed jokes."

C: 又一个罪孽。
E: Another sin of man.

C: 闹剧的罪魁祸首骤然抽搐，节肢动物的附足，软体动物的触手，植物的枝条，浑浊的生命力自他的皮肤上源源不断地涌出。
E: Suddenly, the face of the man that instigated this disaster begins to contort as anthropoid limbs, mollusc tentacles, plant vines, and a stale, fetid life force come bursting endlessly from their skin.

C: 「如果神秘不再笼罩宇宙，每个人都会察觉到自己被注定的命运，他们自以为通过*自由意志*做出的选择，都是在那个*时刻*必然出现的。」
E: "If the universe is no longer shrouded in mysteries, then everyone will detect the determined state of their destinies. A choice they think they make through free will is actually pre-arranged for that particular moment."

C: 你踹了电视机一下，痛感从脚趾传来——按钮刺进了你的指甲缝。电视机的屏幕闪烁两下，接着恢复了正常的画面。
E: You kick the television, and a surge of pain shoots up from your toes — a button wedges between your flesh and your toenail. The television screen flickers twice and returns to normal.

C: 你看着空中浮动的像素砖块，耳边回响复古电子乐。一群像素蚂蚁在地上爬行，它们摆出了几个字「欢迎吉巴欧萝卜先生」。
E: You stare at the pixel blocks floating in the air as vintage electronic music plays in the background. A group of pixel ants crawls on the ground in a formation that reads, "Welcome, Mr. Jibaou the radish."

C: 接着，它用古怪声音宣读幸福理论，附近住客从窗户里探出头来听。你突然意识到，所有顾客都被它宣读的教义蛊惑了心智…
E: Using an aberrant voice, he starts reciting the theory of happiness. The guests nearby all stick their heads out to listen. Suddenly, you realize that the guests are all brainwashed by his recitation...

C: 你注意到树旁倚坐数名士兵，你不确定他们是否睡着了。他们是虔诚的骑士，每人的皮肤都不带血色。
E: Several soldiers are leaning against the tree, and you are not sure whether they are sleeping. They are pious knights with faces as pale as a sheet.

C: 你注意到它们似乎发生了突变…它的皮肤上覆盖一层鎏金硬壳，似乎正饱受突变之苦。
E: You notice signs of mutation on one of them... Its skin is covered by a layer of gilded hard shell, and it seems to be suffering from the mutation.

C: 「我们以*信任*为资源进行投资。」星际和平投资机器打开它的肚子，里面放着一些模拟合成的『宇宙碎片』，「我保证，越多的*信任*，将获得越多的回报。」
E: "*Trust* is the resource we use to invest." The Interastral Peace Investment Device opens its belly and shows the simulated and synthesized Cosmic Fragments inside. "I promise you'll get higher returns the more *trust* you have."

C: 你来到了夫莱昂机械联盟的停泊港湾。这里有一个大埠口，遍布各类机械招待员。
E: You arrive at the docking bay of the Freon Mechanical Alliance. It is a vast harbor with mechanical attendants everywhere.

C: 「嚯，好狂妄的后生。」几位评委一跃而上，观众们擦干净盖子，准备见证垃圾厨艺界这史诗级的对决。
E: "Wow, what an arrogant youngster." Several referees jump forth, and the audience wipe their lids clean — preparing to witness an epic showdown in the world of garbage cuisine.

C: 对图珀王国的征讨即将开始，溅起的海浪在顷刻间变得光怪陆离。二进制海洋的干涉让瑞勒号颠簸不断，但仍无法阻止伟大的三进制军团对它发起同化。
E: Conquest of the Tupah Kingdom is about to commence, and the spattering waves grow bizarre within seconds. The binary ocean's interference makes the Riviera somewhat bumpy, but cannot stop the great Trinary Legion from assimilating it.

C: 你走进阴暗的档案资料馆，库存史料散发出腐朽的气息，看台中央，执笔的画家正在用调色盘配置颜料。
E: You enter the dimly lit archives as the records around you emit an atmosphere of decay. In the center of the platform, you see a painter busy mixing colors on their palette.

C: 「造物工作已完成，请验收——注：由本设备制造的任何物品，其专利及解释权归▄▀▄▄学派所有。」
E: "Creation complete. Please take your item. Please note: The patent and right to interpretation of any items created by this equipment are the sole property of the School of ▄▀▄▄."

C: 冗长的泊停登记磨灭了你的耐心，外星细菌消杀更是令你陷入了长达二十个标准时的空腹时间。
E: The long and drawn-out docking registration process has destroyed your patience and the alien bacteria extermination process has sent you into a long, <unbreak>20</unbreak>-hour period of fasting.

C: 「我为你准备了十个字，希望你能从中体验语言的美妙。」他缓缓隐入词语的森林，一道由十个字连成的怪物浪潮，咆哮着向你袭来。
E: "I have prepared ten words for you, and I hope that you will experience the true beauty of language from them!" He slowly disappears into the forest of words, as waves of monsters made from ten words begin their assault with a great roar.

C: 灵感回路，闪过的电讯号与冲动，逻辑，完整的理性个体，抛弃生命的悖论。
E: Inspiration Circuits. Flashing electric signals and impulses. Logic. A complete and rational individual who has abandoned life's paradoxes.

C: 「是谁往里面加入了反有机方程！」学士在匆忙间按下格式化按钮。
E: "Who added the Anti-Organic Equation in there!?" The scholar hurriedly presses the formatting button.

C: 「这位可有意思。」愚者的身形跟着船体震荡摆动，「绯红的面具，假扮作他人混入其间。演员可不是个简单工作，面具戴得太久，没准儿就再也摘不下来了。」
E: "This one is really interesting." The figure of the Fool shakes and swings with the ship. "A scarlet mask. Infiltrating via disguise. Being an actor is not an easy job. If you wear a mask for too long, maybe you'll never be able to take it off."

C: 你轻轻地抚摸着歌鸲的尾巴，羽毛里藏着一位传奇骇客的秘密。
E: Tenderly, you stroke the songbird's tail, within the feathers concealing the secret of a fabled hacker.

C: 你还要继续下潜吗？
E: Do you want to continue diving?

C: 「我已经列举出了<unbreak>12222</unbreak>种可能性，不过我倾向于相信，作案道具是一朵定制的全息电子玫瑰。」侦探自信地吐出纸质报告单。
E: "I've listed <unbreak>12,222</unbreak> possibilities, but I'm inclined to believe that the tool in the crime is a customized holographic rose," says the detective as he confidently presents a paper report.

C: 随着骰子停下，你的最后一搏也落下帷幕。
E: As the dice come to a stop, your final gamble draws to a close.

C: 草地的湿润与泥土的香气，都在告诉你，危险已离你远去。你张开双臂，手却骤然触摸到一块冰凉的东西。
E: The dampness of the grass, the fragrance of the earth... they all tell you that danger is far behind you. You stretch your arms, only for your hands to abruptly touch something cold.

C: 在他曾停留的地方，泛着绚烂色彩的宝物安谧地沉睡着。只不过，长年被黑潮侵蚀的财宝，似乎也早已染上灰黯之手的气息。
E: Where he once stood, treasures gleaming in vibrant hues now rest in serene slumber. Yet, they have long been eroded by the black tide, their luster dulled with the Hand of Shadow's taint.

C: 畸形的奇美拉从石壁上啃下一块，在房间里横冲直撞，因两只奇兽的错误结合，无机的怪物竖起尖刺，向你们发出阵阵嘶吼。
E: The deformed chimera gnaws off a piece of stone wall, romping about in the room. Because of the erroneous fusion of two chimerae, the inorganic monster sprouts spines, growling menacingly at you all.

C: 你举起铁棍，和疯掉的奇美拉大战了三回合，终于收获了一堆废铁。你好像明白了，以前导师让你处理的那些废品是什么……
E: You raise an iron rod and fight the crazed chimera for three bouts, finally ending up with a pile of scrap metal. You now understand what the scrap metal pieces your mentor had you deal with really are...

C: 「即使身处困境，也能让你如此挂念，我感到十分荣幸」，螺丝咕姆亲切地向你问好，「至于树庭的文档解析工作，就由我来为你带来更多『祝福』。」
E: "Even in difficult times, to know that you think of me is an honor." Screwllum greets you warmly. "As for the Grove's document analysis work, I'll be the one to bring you even more 'Blessings'."

C: 对罪人的鞭笞持续了十二个昼夜，但扎格列斯的把戏会就此终止吗？天上的贼星已告诉我们答案。
E: The sinner's punishment lasted twelve days and nights, but would Zagreus' tricks truly cease? The Thief Star in the sky already told us.

C: 「想要带走诡计之泰坦的宝藏吗？它把它们都留在了冥界。只要放弃生命，就能在塞纳托斯的国度找到比一座山还要沉重的黄金。」
E: "Looking to claim the Trickery Titan's treasure? It's all stashed in the nether realm. Sacrifice your life, and in the domain of Thanatos you'll find gold heavier than mountains."

C: 最后，还是讲一个美好的故事吧。
E: Finally, let us tell a beautiful story.

C: 追随蝴蝶的指引。
E: Follow the butterfly's path.

C: 墨涅塔，世间爱与浪漫的捍卫者。
E: Mnestia, the eternal defender of love and romance.

C: 至此，律法得以订立。
E: Thus, laws are established.

C: 但指引并非永远温和。
E: But guidance isn't always gentle.

C: 「呀，真不巧了，宝贝又卖掉一件。您要还有看上的，可得抓紧出手啊。」商人拼命怂恿你。
E: "Ah, too bad! Another prized treasure just left the shelves. If you've got your eyes on something, don't wait too long!" The merchant prods.

C: 你的心肠简直比石头还要硬，那就别怪吉奥里亚惩罚你喽。
E: Your heart is harder than stone. Then don't be surprised when Georios delivers your punishment.

C: 这场战争让那些曾经质疑欧洛尼斯的人也不得不信服，因为没有人能阻挡尼卡多利征服的脚步，而即使是这位战神，也没能违背欧洛尼斯的预言。
E: This war forced even those who once doubted Oronyx to believe, for no one could halt Nikador's conquests, yet not even this God of War could defy Oronyx's prophecy.

C: 主要起到心理安慰作用吧。
E: It mainly serves as psychological comfort.

C: 于是，雅努斯于虚空中创造了一团本不该存在的物质，塔兰顿将其揉捏成具体的形状，欧洛尼斯为它赋予自我演变的能力。
E: Thus, Janus created a mass of material that should not have existed in the void, Talanton molded it into a concrete shape, and Oronyx gave it the ability to self-evolve.

C: 这便是智慧的果实。
E: This is the fruit of wisdom.

C: 有生便有死.
E: There's life, and then there must be death.

C: 最终，首领到达了小岛。但法吉娜知道他们借助了神的智慧，扬言将用海水灌满加蒂尔的土地。
E: At last, the leader reached the island. But Phagousa, realizing they had borrowed divine wisdom, declared that they would flood Kadir's land with seawater.

C: 巨人不停地走，背上的天平也在不断交替着日夜，它一次也未曾停息。仿佛它一旦停下脚步，就追不上那理想中的生命。
E: Kephale never stopped. With each step, the scale on their back shifted, exchanging day for night and night for day. They never paused, as if the moment they did, they would lose sight of the perfect life they sought.

C: 巨人找来天空之主，言语恭谦——
E: The giant sought out the ruler of the sky, speaking with humble words —

C: 艾格勒微笑答应。而那星夜之神却面露不愉，刚要转身离去——
E: Aquila smiled and readily agreed. Yet the god of the starry night frowned, turning away in displeasure —

C: 重启后再次激活该设备即可登录，登录！
E: Reboot and reactivate the device to log in, log in!

C: （庄重点头）
E: (Nodding gravely)

C: 你一个人在那么危险的地方干嘛？
E: What were you doing alone in such a dangerous place?

C: 小机器人继续在此待机，等待空间站的工作调配。
E: The little robot continues humming along in standby mode, waiting for its next task to be allocated.

C: 你为史考特打拳吗？
E: Do you fight for Scott?

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：宴席的尾声。
E: Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "The end of a banquet."

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: 偷黄金血的贼！
E: Thief! Someone's stealing golden blood!

C: 谢谢你陌生人！但是蝴蝶藏在对面的篮子里。
E: Thank you, stranger! But the butterfly is in the opposite basket.

C: 请问是你在自言自语吗？
E: Might I ask why you're talking to yourself?

C: 「叮蟹」——记住这个名字，短短几十秒过后，{F#她}{M#他}可能就会成为万人景仰的磐岩镇大胃王！
E: "The Stinging Crab" — remember this name. In just a moment, {F#she}{M#he} very well could be Boulder Town's Competitive Eater Champion worthy of our admiration!

C: 鲜香、浓郁的味道在你口中晕开。你完全未曾想过，自己居然能在下层区品尝到如此的美味。
E: You are blown away by the fresh, fragrant, and rich flavor that hits your mouth. You've never imagined that you could enjoy such a delectable flavor in the Underworld.

C: 你去打开其中一个。看看今天走不走运。
E: Open one of these chests and see if you are lucky today.

C: 拿起那个发光的东西。
E: Pick up the glowing object.

C: 你的署名：<color=#dbc291ff>{NICKNAME} / 你邻家的友善无名客 / 海森伯格</color>
E: Your signature: <color=#dbc291ff>{NICKNAME} / Your friendly neighborhood Nameless / Heisenberg</color>

C: 出于好奇，你将耳朵贴上门板，仔细辨认其中的声音……
E: Curiosity gets the better of you. You press your ear to the door and try to figure out what the sound is...

C: 不会是想让我给她拍照吧…
E: You're not about to ask me to go take her picture, are you...?

C: 喀喀——要说设计建筑，最重要就三点：公平、公平，还是公平。
E: Crrk crrk — When it comes to building design, there are three things to consider: Fairness, fairness, and fairness.

C: 造物与创造者。
E: Creation and creator.

C: 感觉浑身冷冷的，有些难受…我可不想再体验一次了喀。
E: I felt chilled all over, so nauseous... I never want to have to experience that ever again.

C: 我的宝藏呢！
E: My treasure! Where is it!?

C: 不确定，再尝一口…
E: Still not sure. Need one more taste...

C: 这座塑像的附属品像是某种用来崇神的工具，现在已经失去了光泽。
E: This statue's adornments appear to be tools of worship. They have since lost their luster.

C: （适当的沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 对不起…
E: Sorry...

C: 无心工作…
E: Not feeling like working...

C: 我自己找到的！
E: I found it myself!

C: 别再逃避了！
E: Stop running away!

C: 一只什么鸟？
E: A what cycrane?

C: 一只出故障的机巧鸟。
E: A malfunctioning cycrane.

C: 它真的能跟你对话？我不信。
E: Was it really able to speak with you? I can hardly believe it.

C: 看，把你急坏了吧，嘻嘻，我正打算回去了。
E: See. I've got you all worked up. Hehe. I'm just planning on heading back.

C: 还有这页…这根轴承，好强壮，好有力量！这是什么材质的…新研发的合金，天啊，要是能给我用上，我飞起来一定会发出吓人的嘎吱声吧！
E: And this page... This bearing is so strong. It has serious power! What is it made of... A newly developed alloy? Gosh! If I could use that, I would have such a shocking creak when I fly!

C: 走开就走开，我最善解人意了。
E: Fine, I can get lost. I'm the most understanding person in the world.

C: 都怪你这家伙，你干嘛非要盯着我看？我和货全老板的赌约就差这一个时辰了，你这出来得倒是轻巧，我却输掉了赌约。
E: This is all your fault. Why do you gotta stare at me like that, huh? Salesby here and I only have one dual-hour left on our bet. You come at me with a cheap trick like this that cost me a bet.

C: 果然是这样，要是我这一个时辰能忍住不动，事情就截然不同了……
E: Ah, I see then. Things would be completely different right now if only I could've just held out right then...

C: 就是这个态度，我就喜欢和你这样认真的人对赌。
E: That's the right attitude. I've been looking for someone to take things seriously around here.

C: 1+1是不是等于2？
E: Does 1 plus 1 equal 2?

C: 就好像一个长期困扰它的问题，就在此时得到了结果。你不太确定，你和它之间的赌约在这个疑惑中发挥了怎样的作用。
E: It's as if a problem that has plagued it for a long time has finally been resolved. You're not quite certain what role your bet has played under these confusing circumstances.

C: 机巧鸟在你面前缓缓坠落，就像是断了线的风筝——只要我们不停下飞行，道路就会…现在不是想这个的时候！
E: The cycrane slowly drops before you, like a broken kite — as long as we don't stop flying, the road will be... Now's not the time to think about that!

C: 规矩我懂，来吧，直接开打吧。
E: Oh, I know the rules. Guess that means we'll have to duke it out.

C: 别打别打，我们这里没有这么匪气的江湖规矩。
E: Please simmer down. We don't go by the rules of gangsters here.

C: 这美景、震撼人心！
E: This scenery... absolutely breathtaking!

C: 小钱——只需<unbreak>1000</unbreak>信用点，您就可以参加小店的大胃王比赛了！
E: Only a little — for just <unbreak>1000</unbreak> Credits, you can join in our Competitive Eater Championship!

C: 当然！正如包子铺老板所说那般——「赛场如战场」——你的任何一个微小的决定，都将决定成败！
E: Sure is! Just as the bun stall proprietor said, this contest is "like a battle" — every small decision you make could tip the scale toward victory or failure!

C: 最近我们店在举办大胃王挑战赛，您要参加吗？
E: Our store is about to hold the Competitive Eater Championship soon. Do you want to join?

C: 既然那个人不愿意回应我们，我们就想到了你……
E: Since the designer was unwilling to give us a reply, we thought of you...

C: 别过来——
E: Stay back—

C: 连心率<unbreak>79.9%</unbreak>。没有失控现象哎！
E: Synchronization rate <unbreak>79.9%</unbreak>. Still in control so far!

C: 金人、金人失控了！谁来救救雷力！
E: The aurumaton — the aurumaton went out of control! Somebody help Leili!

C: 炒作的事都给你玩明白了。
E: You're a master at viral marketing.

C: 最近梦里不怎么太平啊，家族大乱，「钟表匠」也走了。
E: The Dreamscape hasn't been a peaceful place lately... The Family is in chaos and the Watchmaker is gone.

C: 你是怎么过来的？
E: How did you get here?

C: 真好玩，下次还来。
E: How fun, I'm coming back next time.

C: 你决定——
E: You decide to...

C: 你将辛苦扛来的电视机卸在此处，再三研究后接通了电源。
E: You put down the television you worked so hard to carry over. After studying it carefully, you connect it to a power source.

C: 待会儿的舞会…
E: The upcoming ball...

C: 好像…应该…我不知道……
E: I think... it should be... I don't know...

C: 这里和悬锋城差好多！
E: This place is so different from Castrum Kremnos!

C: 就不能多写点八卦吗？
E: Can't they write more gossip?

C: 要进行祭司选拔考试了…
E: Time for the priest selection trials...

C: 我已经内定下任辅祭了。
E: They've already picked me internally as the next acolyte.

C: 祭司说这是保密事项！
E: The priests say that's restricted information!

C: 劲！爽！艾格勒就这？
E: That's what I'm talking about! Is that all Aquila's got?

C: 女人再次丢出一枚硬币，那硬币划出一道弧线，打在「玦轮」的边缘，落入了天空球之中。
E: The girl flings another coin, tracing an arc through the air as it hits the rim of the jade wheel and clunks down into the middle of the skybox.

C: 你是不是左右不分啊！说好的分头行动呢！
E: Can you not tell left from right? I thought we were gonna split up!

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，我看你们都收拾东西回列车上了，仙舟的事务想必也解决得差不多了吧。
E: {NICKNAME}, I noticed that you've all packed your things up and moved them back on the Express. Those affairs on the Xianzhou must be all good and sorted now, hmm?

C: 那个……
E: Then...

C: 呜哇呜哇，刚刚怎么就睡过去了——{NICKNAME}乘客，你刚刚在说什么来着？
E: Wow, ahem sorry, I just dozed off there — {NICKNAME}, you were saying?

C: 那么，在哪里能买到呢？
E: Where can I buy all of that?

C: 冒险必备品
E: Adventuring Essentials

C: 你不就是「小动物」…
E: Aren't you in fact a "small animal"...?

C: 「就这」？这可是只有在星穹列车上才能看到的景色！
E: "That's it"? This rare vista can only be admired from aboard the Astral Express!

C: 但是上一步帕姆就已经加入过蓝莓了。「莓莓果汁」的做法到底是什么呢……
E: But I already added the blueberries during the last step. How on earth do you make this Berry Juice...

C: 如果{NICKNAME}乘客准备好了的话，就来替我测量帕！一定要贴在墙壁上才能测得准哦！
E: If you're ready, {NICKNAME}, come and measure Pom-Pom! Stick it on the wall and get an accurate reading, please!

C: 还是喝茶好了。
E: I'll have some tea.

C: 不要自卑，也不要过度谦虚！
E: Don't feel inferior about yourself or be too humble!

C: 你将球球扔了出去，帕姆很快捡了回来。如此这般重复了许多次……
E: You throw the ball, and Pom-Pom gets it back quickly. The process is repeated many times...

C: 记住组织里的每个成员，还要带大家一起吃好吃的，玩好玩的！还有…还有…定期组织大探险活动！
E: Remembering every member in The Moles, bringing everyone to eat delicious food, and having fun together! And... and... conducting regular big adventures!

C: …啊？你什么意思？
E: ...Huh? What do you mean?

C: 哔——啵。想要通过演练，就必须突破铁卫设下的封锁线，然后在终点接受邓恩队长的试炼。
E: Beep — boop. If you want to pass the drill, you'll have to break through the blockade that the Guards have set up, then challenge Captain Dunn's trial at the end.

C: （去会会这位「少校」吧。）
E: (Let's go meet this Major.)

C: 打起精神来，小伙子们！你们可不想在长官面前丢脸吧？哈！哈！哈！
E: Brace yourself, lads! You don't want to lose face in front of the captain, do you? Bwahaha!

C: 不过，「热能核心」的结构非常不稳定，在长期无人看管的情况下可能会自行脱落，<color=#dbc291ff>甚至被怪物藏到难以寻找的位置……</color>
E: But the thermic core's structure is very unstable and can fall out over time if nobody is monitoring it — <color=#dbc291ff>and may even be carted off and hidden by these monsters...</color>

C: 不过，即便我们已经完成了两次扫荡…我猜裂界的怪潮还是不会善罢甘休。毫无疑问，我们要面临的是一场持久战，{NICKNAME}。
E: Even though we've carried out two raids, I don't think it's enough to send them home. Without a doubt, we're facing a protracted war, {NICKNAME}.

C: 没有什么好犹豫的，你都已经捕获了那么多扑满，不可能在面对最后一只时大发善心…等等，你不会是真的想放过它吧？
E: There's no need to hesitate. You've already caught so many Trotters, and you're not planning on letting the last one go... Wait a minute, you're not really considering it, are you?

C: 太好了，谢谢英雄，谢谢英雄。
E: Great! Thank you so much!

C: 「四大天王」之二
E: Second of the Formidable Four

C: 「四大天王」之三
E: Third of the Formidable Four

C: 你很急，这可以理解；但擅自打开别人的行李箱就是窥探他人隐私！这是不对的！
E: I know you are in a hurry. But opening others' suitcases without their explicit permission is an invasion of privacy! This is simply wrong!

C: 没有，你画得很传神！
E: No no, your painting is very vivid!

C: …而钟情于混乱的人则开始摩拳擦掌、试图让它回归宇宙无尽熵增的铁律中，并很快给自己找好了由头——「翻箱倒柜是勇者的特权」。
E: ...While those who love chaos lick their lips as they try to return things to the lawless entropy of the universe, quickly finding reason enough for themselves: "The valiant reserve the right to rummage through this desk."

C: 我别无选择。接它。
E: I got no choice but to answer.

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 你终于意识到了…那个女人并不是在与你对话。她的语句间之所以留有间隙，纯粹是因为一阵又一阵的情感溃堤。
E: You finally realize the woman is not interested in a conversation so much as venting her frustrations.

C: 这谢礼太贵重了，我不能要…
E: This thank-you gift is too precious for me to hold on to...

C: 嗯？你不喜欢它吗？它可是你亲自给我带来的。
E: Huh? Don't you like it? But you gave this to me yourself.

C: {NICKNAME}，非常感谢您愿意再次来帮助我们！
E: {NICKNAME}, thank you for taking time to come help us again!

C: 这您可找对人了，夕葵大人，咱们{NICKNAME}最擅长用机巧鸟找东西了！
E: You've come to the right person, Lady Xikui. {NICKNAME} here is an expert in finding things with cycranes!

C: 积玉坊南侧
E: Trove of Verdure, South Wing

C: 信号监测系统提示，<color=#dbc291ff>可疑的信号源似乎就在附近</color>，请仔细查找附近区域。
E: The signal monitoring system indicates that the <color=#dbc291ff>source of the suspicious signal is nearby</color>. Please do a thorough search of this area.

C: 另外，那些地方现在算不上安全，所以途中可能会遇到一些危险，也请你最好准备。
E: Side note, these places are not entirely safe, so there might be some dangers along the way. Please be prepared.

C: 还有别的事…
E: I have other things to do...

C: 你要向谁复仇。
E: Who are you taking revenge on?

C: 其中有一篇讲波月古海里，有能活上千年的鲛人，流下眼泪就能化为珍珠，我看了这种志怪故事难免浮想联翩。
E: In one of them, there are drakons in the Lunarescent Depths that can live for thousands of years — and their tears crystallize into pearls. It's enough to set the mind racing!

C: 你的要求还挺复杂的。
E: You sure are fussy.

C: 好骨气！来吧！
E: That's the spirit! Bring it on!

C: 我要取个货。
E: I'm picking something up.

C: 我来帮「那位老师」取东西。
E: I'll help "that teacher" with his fetch errand.

C: W望着你，笑意盈盈，却仿佛下一秒就会跳起来咬断谁的脖子。
E: W looks at you with a beaming smile on his face, but he still seems as though he's about to jump up and bite someone right in the neck.

C: 不过你也用不着可怜他。他早该明白，像我们这种怪胎，怎么可能会讨人喜欢？都这样了还不远万里跑来玩什么找朋友游戏，真不知道是倔还是傻……
E: But anyway, you don't need to feel sorry for him. He should've figured out a long time ago that freaks like us... we can never be lovable. It's just the way it is, so what's the point in journeying all this way to play at making friends? I honestly can't tell if it's stubbornness or foolishness...

C: 还有这个《迷因危机》！多少年前的故事了，还敢拿出来炒冷饭？
E: And this one, Meme Crisis! How stale is that old story? Yet they're still trying to warm it up like leftovers?

C: 销量如何？
E: How are the sales?

C: …火…火…还在燃烧…从未熄灭……
E: ...Fire... the fire... It still burns... It never stopped burning...

C: 这种天上掉下来的假期，可得好好享受才不算浪费啊。
E: A vacation out of nowhere like this should not be wasted and should be fully taken advantage of.

C: 有一次，我受博识学会委托，前去回收位于「新伊甸」大黑洞附近的一个侦测信标。报酬非常优厚，所以我没多想就同意了。
E: There was this one time on an assignment from the Intelligentsia Guild, when we were retrieving a probe beacon from nearby this mega black hole called the New Eden. The pay was so fat that we agreed without thinking too much about it.

C: 我挨个检查那些住房，见到了更多外星人的尸体。房间内完全没有生存物资，除了简单的石镐外也几乎没有工具。
E: I checked over the houses but only found more alien corpses. There were no supplies in any of the buildings, and almost no tools at all save for a crude pickax.

C: 至于这到底是机缘还是诅咒，恐怕只有时间能给出答案……
E: As for whether this is a blessing or a curse, I'm afraid only time can deliver an answer...

C: 后来我仔细一看，才发现那家伙已经死去多时了。
E: Upon closer look, I realized that this guy was dead, and had been so for some time.

C: 没错，就是从那时起，「万界之癌」开始侵害诸界。
E: That's right. It was from that moment forth that the Cancer of All Worlds started its invasion across all worlds.

C: 曾经忠诚的部下要么离开了他，要么被他残忍地折磨。就在海盗团即将分崩离析时，一位戴面具的访客找上韦兰，说虚空鲸的大脑提取液可以缓解这种不良反应。
E: His once-loyal crew either deserted him or were cruelly tortured by him. Just as this band of pirates was about to fall apart, a masked visitor came to Wyland telling him that an extract from the brain of the void song whale could relieve his adverse reactions.

C: 他原以为缸里的存货足够挺到下一次狩猎，结果找了几周都没发现猎物——根据博识学会的统计，那片星区早就没有活着的虚空鲸了。
E: He thought the supplies in the tank would last until the next hunt, but could find no prey after weeks of searching. According to the statistics from the Intelligentsia Guild, there haven't been any living void song whales in that sector for a long time.

C: 你考虑吧，我先默认你同意了。
E: You think it over. I'll just take it as your tacit agreement.

C: 出于匹诺康尼的安全考虑，我们打算好好调查她一番，看看基因数据能不能对上号…结果才刚敲了下门，就被她在房门上安装的护盾给弹飞了。
E: For the sake of Penacony's safety, we planned to thoroughly investigate her and try to get a match from her genetic data... but as soon as we tried knocking on the door, we bounced off the repelling shield she'd installed.

C: 你们还跟我谈上条件了？！
E: You dare to negotiate with me!?

C: （小声）大哥，这家伙说的有道理。要是家族真和公司发生了什么矛盾，咱们承担不起风险啊。
E: (Whispering) Dude, {M#he}{F#she} makes sense. We can't afford the risk of being the cause of fallout between the IPC and The Family.

C: 不会去干坏事了吧？
E: You're not going to do something bad, are you?

C: 这种辐射对植物没什么影响，却杀死了奥特兰上绝大多数动物，包括人类。
E: This radiation had little effect on plants, but was fatal to most of the animals on Outerland — including the people.

C: 直到某天，一位老人在屏障边缘的贫困区架起大灯，宣告对天幕塔的反抗。奥特兰随即爆发了漫长且激烈的内战。
E: Until one day, an elderly man set up a spotlight in the poverty district at the edge of the barrier and revolted against the Canopy Tower. Thereafter, a long and bitter civil war broke out in Outerland.

C: 你真坏。
E: You're nasty.

C: 除非…这次的冒险能让我改变主意。
E: Unless... The adventure this time can change my mind.

C: 所以我才打算让你先探探路，把家族为我布下的陷阱都踩干净。
E: That's why I wanted you to explore the route first so that you could trigger all the traps laid for me in advance.

C: 这也是近半个琥珀纪以来，我们团队首次尝试打造一个全新的IP——敬请期待！
E: This is our first attempt in nearly half an Amber Era to build a brand-new franchise. Please stay tuned!

C: 嗯…我想有些时候是该静下心来，仔细分析一下当下的状况。
E: Hmm... Maybe it's time I get serious and take stock of the situation at hand.

C: 您姑且先从<color=#f29e38ff>费曼身边</color>入手，找找能和他聊起来的*话题*吧。
E: Now, think about <color=#f29e38ff>things about Feinman</color> and find "topics" you can talk about to him.

C: 波奇的同事似乎因为加班而对他颇有怨言。这件事似乎和费曼脱不开关系。
E: Bocchi's co-workers seem to have a grudge against him because they are forced to work overtime. Feinman seems to have something to do with this.

C: 我已经全都确认过一遍了。
E: I've gone through everything.

C: 好，准备上了！
E: Ready, go!

C: 你也看到了？正好，省得我再费口舌了。
E: Did you watch it? Thank goodness I don't have to repeat the whole story.

C: 反正我把企划带来了，你自己看吧。
E: Anyway, I've brought his proposal here. You can take a look.

C: 别开玩笑了，我靠卖专利赚的钱，普通人八辈子也花不完！
E: Don't be ridiculous. I've made more money from selling patents than average people could spend in eight lifetimes!

C: 这是什么？
E: Huh. What's this?

C: 啊，科蒂…是你！我的美梦…我的命运！
E: Ah, Coty... It's you! My dream... my destiny!

C: 为了她，我偷偷苦练以太战线，收集了我所能收集到的所有珍稀以太灵……
E: For her, I secretly ground hard in Aetherium Wars, collecting every rare Aether Spirit I could get my hands on...

C: 因为你永远不会知道自己什么时候会受到万众瞩目，更不会知道成名之后有哪些往事会突然浮现，让你万劫不复。
E: Because you never know when you might become a star. And once you are a star, you never know what shady stuff from your past might come back to haunt you.

C: 我相信她说得对，我就是更适合当个可爱的吉祥物，当个在综艺和舞台上让粉丝们欢呼尖叫的娃娃，这样更容易成为巨星——
E: I think she's right. I'm indeed better off being an adorable mascot who enjoys the cheers of my fans onstage during variety shows. That's an easier path to stardom for me...

C: 这样呀…也没办法，毕竟是我自己把他逼走的。
E: I see... Well, it was me who drove him away.

C: 我会把之前给他们制定的方向全都丢掉，然后告诉他们——去成为你们所憧憬的样子吧，我会帮助你们的！
E: I'll set aside all the plans I've previously made for them. I'll encourage them to be whatever they want to be and reassure them that they'll have my help!

C: 呵呵，您还真是位好心的听众。
E: Thank you for your unwavering support. You are truly a kind listener.

C: 我无法原谅这样的自己，便申请从公司离职——不过上头的领导比我快一步。在递交辞呈之前，我就已经被开除了。
E: Unable to forgive myself, I decided to leave the IPC. But my boss was a step faster. Fast enough to fire me before I could tender my resignation.

C: 现实远比梦境更加沉重。我在那里有酒、有诗，唯独没有死去的勇气。
E: Reality is way bleaker than dreams. I have the company of wine and poems there, and lack only the courage to finish things up.

C: 谢了，虽然这不是什么复杂的道理，但果然还是要由别人说出来才行。
E: Thanks a lot. Although it isn't something complicated, sometimes it takes someone else to say it for it to sink in.

C: 倒也没必要惦记那一官半职…从今往后，我会以私家侦探的身份继续活动，为「黄金的时刻」铲除威胁。
E: I'm not too keen on it either... From now on, I'll work as a private detective who eliminates dangers in Golden Hour.

C: 最初我并不是智械，甚至不是这副人形的身躯。但后来发生了一些事，让我变成了现在的模样。这是命运赠予我的第二次生命。
E: At first, I wasn't an Intellitron and didn't even exist in this humanoid figure. Something cropped up later, and it turned me into what I am today. I was fortunate enough to be reborn.

C: 梦境酒店现在已经被封锁了，非指定工作人员不得入内。
E: The hotel in the dreamscape has been locked down. Unrelated personnel are prohibited from entering.
...Leave■ her... ■■She... destroyed■■■■■■... ■■■!!!

C: 需要送你离开酒店吗？
E: Do you need me to send you out of the hotel?

C: 麦考…麦考……
E: McCoy... McCoy...

C: …我今天已经吐露了太多秘密了，但愿短期内不会有人深掘我的意识。感谢你的帮助，开拓客…拿去吧，这些是你应得的奖赏。
E: ...I've already let enough secrets out of the bag for today. Hopefully, nobody takes a deep dive into my consciousness for the time being. Thank you for your help, Trailblazer... And take this, as it's the least you deserve.

C: 我的心脏在苏乐达里跳舞，钟表小子和洋娃娃手牵手，大把大把的账单滚滚流。
E: My heart is dancing in SoulGlad. Clockie and the doll are holding hands, and the skies are showering with money.

C: 要我说，大人的事，小朋友就别这么上心——晚上会睡不着的。
E: If you ask me, kids shouldn't work themselves up about grown-up things... or they won't be able to sleep at night.

C: 丢掉你那正义必胜的小孩子气吧。远在天边的几个数字和近在眼前的利益，正确选项很明确了——钱不够我可以再加。
E: Ditch your naive ideas about justice always prevailing. One is an abstract number light-years away, and the other is profits right under your nose — the right answer couldn't be any clearer. If it helps, I can give you even more.

C: 关你什么事，都说了我不接受采访…是、是你？！
