E: Mind your own business. I already said I don't take interviews... I—It's you!?

C: 遥想当初我毕业那届学生，就业率可是百分之百。两千来号人没有一个无所事事的，全都成为了宇宙中的精英。
E: When I think about the class of students that I graduated with, I recall that the employment rate back then was a hundred percent! Two thousand people and not a single of them loafed around all day! And they all became the universe's elites!

C: 要不还是找个工作吧？
E: Perhaps you should still look for a job?

C: 承认吧，即便羽翼未丰，你树上的小鸟也终究不是雏鸟了。我们规定要去做的事，于他们而言未必是最好的选择。
E: You have to admit, even though their feathers aren't fully developed yet, the fledglings in your tree are all ready to take flight. What we instruct them to do may not always be the best choice for them.

C: 先放一放吧。这种大事还是得等考虑清楚后再做决策。
E: I'll give it more thought. Such major changes have to be carefully considered before the final decision is made.

C: 但...你的「开拓」精神并没有平息。难不成还有其他秘密等待被发现？
E: However... your ardor as a Trailblazer has yet to be quenched. Who knows what other secrets await you?

C: 明智的选择。收手吧，阿棒。这个世界还有其他美好等待你去体验。
E: A wise decision. Just let it go, batter. This world has countless other wonders for you to explore.

C: 大部分照片被不礼貌地打上了叉，看来拍摄者对它们并不满意，不知是因为选手还是摄影技术。
E: Most of the photos are crossed out, as if the photographer wasn't satisfied with them. You're not sure if it's due to the players or the quality of the photos themselves.

C: 希望下次见到你时，你也能加入健身的行列，跟我一起倒立！
E: I hope the next time I see you, you'll join our fitness crew and try doing headstands with me!

C: 啾！对不起，是我没注意，你才是船长啾。那我把船长这个职位还给你，我去当你的大副怎么样？啊，已经有大副了，好可惜啾……
E: Tweet? Oh, you're the captain! I'm sorry, I should've realized sooner, tweet. In that case, you can have the position back and I'll be your first mate? ...Aw, you already have one. That's a shame, tweet.

C: 为什么要跳，人家会飞啾。
E: Why are we jumping? We can fly, tweet.

C: 你真是不懂浪漫啊……
E: You're so not a romantic...

C: 浪漫是什么，人家不知道啾。
E: What's a romantic? I don't get it, tweet.

C: 那是见证我荣光时刻的必需品！哇咔咔！
E: That's an essential item to helping others witness my glorious triumph! Mwahaha!

C: 「王座」究竟是啥？
E: What exactly do you mean by the "throne"?

C: 哇，我终于不用再流浪了！谢谢你，{F#漂亮大姐姐}{M#帅气的大哥哥}。
E: Wow, I won't have to keep stumbling around! Thank you, {F#lovely miss}{M#good sir}.

C: 你应该知道，如今贝洛伯格面临的最大挑战就是修复这台造物引擎——但这个项目具体该怎么推行，大家始终没能统一思想。
E: I'm sure you know, the biggest challenge facing Belobog right now is repairing this Engine of Creation... However, none of us can seem to agree on how to move this project forward.

C: 双腿。
E: Two legs.

C: 不过...因为这项工程很大程度上要倚仗「公司」，我们四个是没有权力做决策的。
E: Although... this project will rely heavily on the IPC, so the four of us will have no right to make the final decisions.

C: 将本杰明委托你的事告诉了佩拉。
E: You told Pela what Benjamin asked you to do.

C: 这个火炉的造型真是太平庸了，当时应该加上一些装饰的啾……
E: The shape of this stove is too mundane. It should have been decorated a little more, tweet...

C: 啾！可恶，居然被你抓住了啾！
E: Tweet! Rats! I can't believe I'm caught by you, tweet!

C: 是呀，这里是美梦小镇唯一的宾馆…也是人家最得意的作品啾。
E: Yes. This is the only hotel in Dreamville... and also my proudest achievement, tweet.

C: 哎呀~现在宾馆里这么危险，万一人家被石头老板抓住了怎么办？客官要懂得怜香惜玉啾~
E: Eek~ The hotel's so dangerous right now. What if I get caught by Boss Stone? You ought to protect a delicate lady like me, tweet~

C: 啾~啾啾~
E: Tweet! Tweet tweet!

C: 关于钟表小子家…
E: About Clockie's home...

C: 太好了！太感谢了啾！
E: That's great! Thank you so much, tweet!

C: 可在下还需要监督筑巢的施工进度，腾不开翅膀啾——一切就拜托您了啾！
E: I have to supervise the construction efforts for the nest, so I can't lend you my wings, tweet — I'll leave this in your good hands, tweet!

C: 啾？
E: Tweet?

C: 嗯哼，之后的小助手们也都交给你了啾~
E: Mhmm, I'll leave the helpers to you!

C: 可怜的人，没有翅膀，只能跳过去了啾…
E: Poor human, with no wings, you have no choice but to jump over, tweet...

C: 这里是死胡同呢，下次别再走错了啾。
E: This is a dead end. Don't go the wrong away again, tweet.

C: 每个箱子里都有亮闪闪的宝石和硬币啾。
E: All of these chests are filled with shining gems and coins, tweet.

C: 如果把全小镇的宝箱收集起来，是不是能填满成一片充满金币的小湖呢？
E: If we collected all of the chests in town together, do you think we could fill a small lake with gold coins?

C: 「或许有天我也需要你的帮助啾。但在那天到来之前，请先收下这份礼物吧。」
E: "Perhaps one day I shall also need your help, tweet. Until that day comes, please accept this gift."

C: 没问题！
E: No problem!

C: 据说，最初美梦小镇就是由猫头鹰教授一根根树枝搭建而成的——多么伟大的鸟啾！本公子也想成为这么厉害的鸟啾！
E: Legend has it that in the beginning, Professor Owl built Dreamville branch-by-branch all by themselves... What a great bird, tweet! I want to become an amazing bird like them, tweet!

C: 单推了。
E: I only stan you.

C: 这点困难，就想让勇敢的小鸟退却啾？不，绝对不能的啾！
E: Think a minor setback is going to deter this brave birdie, tweet? Never, tweet!

C: 学得不太像。

C: 这已经不需要证明了。

E: Thank you for singing opera with me, {NICKNAME}.

E: Wait, Sir! I wanted to ask, do you know if there is a place where artists gather inside Penacony?

C: 来，搭把手，扶我站稳点。嘶…脚踝也碎了，还真痛啊，混蛋。

C: 他在最后的赌局中落败了。

C: 没人知道这里发生了什么，也没人会在乎。它梦想着摆脱平凡，并为此做出了太多努力，或许还干过些不能摆上台面的事…但现在那都不重要了。

E: It's hard to believe we managed to make it out alive...

C: 大家都别紧张…

C: 这样就可以了吧？
E: Is this alright?

C: 祂倾倒在寰宇间，九千只眼睛在三万个桶与六万只手臂上闪烁。其伟力令桶不再锈蚀，其注视让无机物生意盎然。
E: Admired by the universe, THEIR nine thousand eyes blink on the thirty thousand cans and sixty thousand arms. THEIR greatness prevents the cans from rusting, and THEIR gaze causes the inorganic things to flourish.

What grievous offense could a mere book have committed to warrant imprisonment in The Shackling Prison, to the extent that numerous individuals across the Cosmos had gone to great lengths to search for it but had all failed?

C: 你这根本不是数学题…
E: This isn't a math problem at all...

C: 吼，问题很简单，但却蕴含着一个深刻的道理：<color=#dbc291ff>「什么东西令穷人熟视无睹，富人却重金难求？」</color>
E: Ho, the question is simple, but contains a deeper meaning: <color=#dbc291ff>"What is something that makes the poor turn a blind eye, but is unattainable to the wealthy?"</color>

C: 吼！遐蝶小姐的见识实在令本狮惊叹，事件的全貌，确如您所描述的那般令人唏嘘…但很遗憾——答错了吼！
E: Ho! Miss Castorice's insight has left this lion simply slack-jawed. Your narration of the entire incident was simply breathtaking... Alas, wrong answer!

C: 你的危险操作太多，真相已经不得而知。
E: Your dangerous moves are so numerous that the truth is hard to emerge.

C: 旁白：生老病死，难以逃避的常理。人们往往忙着生，却不在意如何有尊严地死去。也许是这点打动了你，你决定听听它的临终遗愿。
E: Narration: Birth and death are inescapable rules of this world. People are often too busy living their lives, but are indifferent to death with dignity. Perhaps that moves you, as you decide to listen to its dying wishes.

C: 你依次点开那十份文档，发现其中九份都是「诅咒连锁信」：「收到这封邮件后，请立刻转发给十个好友，否则电竞排位永远卡在『青铜』。」
E: You clicked on those ten documents in turn, and found that nine of them were cursed chain emails: "Upon receiving this email, please forward it to ten friends immediately, or you will be stuck at Bronze Rank forever."

C: 为大家制定冰箱使用时间。
E: Set a period of time when people can use the refrigerator.

C: 等等再看。
E: Check later.

C: 呼呼。看这跳动的火焰，纯净而神秘，温暖而永不熄灭，是否会让你想要撷取一缕，时刻带在身边？献出些许供品，如此便有收获。
E: *crackle* Look at this dancing flame. Pure, mysterious, warm, and everlasting. Beholding such a feat, do you want to draw a sliver and take it along? Make an offering and you shall have it.

C: {RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}亲手雕琢了我的身体，又拿火种为我点燃灵智。呼呼，漫长岁月里，我始终守护着小小的火苗。
E: It was {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#} that sculpted me, and used a Coreflame to give me sentience. *crackle* I have guarded the small flame all these years.

C: …对某些人来说，这个答案或许是正确的——这样的人，我必将铲除！
E: ...This answer might be correct for some individuals. But I intend to exterminate all those for whom this answer might apply.

C: 不管以垃圾桶还是人类的角度，你都配得上智慧的奖励。我会为你让出前路……
E: Your intelligence deserves recognition, be it from the perspective of a trashcan or a human. I shall make way for you...

C: 你是垃圾桶的王？
E: Are you the King of Trashcans?

C: 嗯…这听起来倒是很简单，而且不费力气。我喜欢。

C: 瞧瞧这群筑梦师吧，这群人压根不懂得梦境的真谛。他们制造出来的东西怎么能称为美梦呢？
E: Look at these Dreamweavers. They have not a single clue about what the Dreamscape is really about. How can they call their creation a beautiful dream?

C: 惩戒顽徒！
E: Punish the rogue!

C: 这都是你编的设定吧？

C: 听说这里有些不法之徒，专门把我们这种无家可归的垃圾桶骗去回收站，当作廉价劳工，不知此事是否属实？
E: I hear there are outlaws around here who trick homeless trashcans like us to the recycling station to be sold as cheap labor. Is any of this true?

C: 我记得…我是个垃圾桶？不对…这个身份的真实性很可疑。是不是每个人，每个物体，都有可能不是他们表面上的模样，那我到底是什么……
E: I seem to remember that... I am a trashcan? No... It's doubtful that it's true. Could it be that every person and every object isn't what they actually look like on the outside? If so, what could I be...

C: 打个马虎眼过去了。
E: Try to smooth things over.

C: 因为那些村庄屋顶上的瓦片，显然更加可口呀！

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 可是没关系。比起一张照片，「留影」的心情才更值得纪念。「给{NICKNAME}拍了照片」…就这么记住今天的回忆，也足够温馨啦。
E: But hey, it's not about the photo, it's the feeling that matters. Just thinking "I took a photo of {NICKNAME}" is enough to make today special.

C: 但那些最勇敢的水手，在征服大海后，往往都会抵达美丽的仙境，见证壮阔的星空。
E: But the bravest sailors who conquer the sea always reach a beautiful paradise under a magnificent starry sky.

C: 我们，在屋顶待了多久啦？
E: How long have we been sitting up here on the rooftop?

C: （站在原地）
E: (Stay put)

C: 想四处看看，多了解这里。
E: We could hang around here and get to know this place better.

C: 记得挺开心的。
E: We had a great time.

C: 丢的是缎带……
E: I lost a ribbon...

C: 话虽如此，没想到这里的道路竟也如疯王的头脑般令人狂躁，军众狂热，戒备森严，难以四处走动，至今未能有收获。
E: That being said, I had no idea that the paths in this city were as maddening as the Mad King's mind itself. The soldiers and civilians are frantic, and there are guards all around. It's been hard to move around, so I have made no progress at all.

C: （敲敲木板）
E: (Knock on the wooden panels)

C: 给我讲讲那些神驹吧。
E: Tell me of the other divine foals.

C: 我们的生命因而趋于完整，你谦逊的仆人们已经别无所求……
E: Our lives thus move toward completion, and we, your humble servants, have nothing more to ask for...

C: 它们是支撑世界的真理，不了解数据运转规则的人，注定要被这个世界所欺骗。
E: These are the truths that uphold the world. Those who fail to understand the laws of data are doomed to be deceived by the world.

C: 如果我回答不上来，还是请你去询问别的科员吧。
E: If I can't answer your questions, please ask the other researchers.

C: 那就好，怪我太过全神贯注了，请您谅解。如果不这样，答错了卡波特大人的抽查，我可就有麻烦了……
E: That's good. I was so focused. Please forgive me. I will get in trouble if I fail to answer Master Capote's questions...

C: 她不在空间站吗？
E: Is she not on the space station?

C: 意料之中的事情。无论是入侵，还是能够守住空间站，都不令人意外。
E: Expected, both for the invasion itself and the survival of the space station.

C: 要我说，科室之间的矛盾与鄙视链再这么下去，我老头子还没彻底合眼，恐怕就能看见这座空间站的覆灭——因为自己的问题，内部的瓦解！
E: If conflicts and contempts continue to exist among different departments, I'm afraid the space station will collapse before I die. Its own issue leads to its internal disintegration!

C: 上次多亏了有你的帮助，不仅解决了匿名群聊的事情，还帮小姐守住了秘密，有机会我一定要重谢你才行。
E: Thanks to your help last time, the trouble with the anonymous group chat has been resolved, and Lady Asta got to keep her secret. I've got to repay you sometime.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 当粉丝还要匿名，他们活着可真累啊。
E: Even fans need to be anonymous... Kids these days.

C: 嗯好，那我们回头再聊！
E: All right, till next time then!

C: 算了…你不用安慰我了。我自己是个什么口味我自己心里清楚，这种过时的味道…没人会爱我的，没人……
E: Forget it... You don't have to say that to make me feel better. I know myself well. No one... No one's going to like such an outdated snack like me...

C: 哼，我们爪子是没你灵活，但也有我们的本事，你！你别以为爪子长就了不起！
E: Hmph, our paws aren't as flexible as your hands, but we make up for it with other talents. You! Don't think you're better just because you have longer fingers!

C: 泡椒芒芒饭。
E: Pickled pepper and mango rice.

C: 你要是有什么想问的想说的，尽管问，尽管说！
E: If you have anything to say or ask, feel free to fire away!

C: 嗯，我在此守望，直到阮•梅女士回来…她是我们的造物主，我们一直在等待她的归来……
E: Well, I'll watch this place until the return of Miss Ruan Mei... She's our creator, and I'll keep waiting for her to come back...

C: 阮•梅女士的造物虽多，但大家既然聚在一起，共同成长，平日分工合作，总得有管理者——如你所见，鄙人正是，记住了吗？
E: Miss Ruan Mei has many creations. Since we're staying, growing, and working together, there has to be someone in charge. As you can see, I have stepped up to be one. Is that understandable?

C: 需要我带你去其他舱段吗？
E: Do you need my help getting to other zones?

C: {F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}呜？一起玩呜？
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, woo? Play with me, woo?

C: 正在识别…识别中…识别成功，是否接受通话邀请？
E: Identification in progress... Identification successful. Accept call request?

C: 远程信号检测中，已连接，请稍后再试……
E: Detecting remote signals. The line is busy. Please try again later...

C: 如果您只是想聊聊天，也可以告诉我。请放心，隐私模式已开启，我会为您提供一个安全和私密的空间。
E: If you are just here for a chat, please be rest assured that the private mode has been activated. I'll provide a safe and private space for you.

C: 我的当前名字为「编号七六八五四」。
E: My current name is "No. <unbreak>76854</unbreak>".

C: 您大可放心，敝人先祖在阿卡索斯城的神殿里任职，这都是祖上传下来的。
E: No worries about that. My ancestors were all workers in the temple in Icatus, and these were all passed down from them.

C: 问题的答案看似复杂，其实很简单：两位泰坦的权能相当，自然分不出个高低！
E: The answer appears complicated, but is quite simple: The powers of both Titans are equal, so the outcome is naturally a stalemate!

C: 你决定——
E: You decide to...

C: 卷轴底部绘着一个简单但诡异的图案：一只由树枝构成的眼睛注视着被藤蔓缠绕的神像。
E: A simple but strange pattern is drawn on the base of the scroll: An eye formed of branches staring at a divine statue ensnared in vines.

C: 平平无奇的箩筐，由翁法罗斯的草本植物编织而成，经年的日晒雨淋使得表面有些褪色。
E: An unremarkable basket woven from plants native to Amphoreus. Years of direct sunlight and rain have caused its color to fade.

C: 平平无奇的箱子，人们用来存放物件的必需品，看起来就像是能被球棒轻易击碎的道具。
E: An unremarkable box. A must-have necessity when it comes to storage. It looks like it could be easily smashed with a ball bat.

C: 将其转换为更直接的论题，便是——<color=#dbc291ff>纯粹的「阿卡索斯」是否真实存在？</color>
E: If we were to convert it into a more direct topic, it would be: <color=#dbc291ff>Does a pure "Icatus" truly exist?</color>

C: 就算在覆灭前，城邦的面积与人口也在不断发生变化，你童年时见到的城邦，和青年时见到的必然不同。既然如此，你凭什么断定它就是阿卡索斯？
E: Even before its destruction, the area and population of the city were undergoing constant change. The city that you saw as a child was undoubtedly different to the one you saw as a youth. If that is the case, how can you conclude that it was indeed Icatus?

C: 将其转换为更直接的论题，便是——<color=#dbc291ff>纯粹的「阿卡索斯」是否真实存在？</color>
E: If we were to convert it into a more direct topic, it would be: <color=#dbc291ff>Does a pure "Icatus" truly exist?</color>

C: 经过详尽的思考，他得出「阿卡索斯」的知识，并教给了其他人。
E: Through detailed reflection, he obtains knowledge of "Icatus" and teaches it to others.

C: 那个拉达曼，和波瑟芬妮一样是生命花园的园丁，平日里的品行端正，没想到……
E: That Rhadaman was a Gardener in the Garden of Life — just like Possephone. He was always an upstanding kind of guy. I never took him for...

C: 哎，接下来要讲烦心事了…
E: Huh, this next part is really annoying...

C: 厄琉斯，坚持住。
E: Aelius, be strong.

C: 对这样奇怪的顾客，我多留了个心眼。我的朋友说，此人最近常在<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫</color>出没。
E: I kept a close eye on this bizarre customer. My friend said this guy has been hanging around <color=#dbc291ff>Marmoreal Palace</color> a lot lately.

C: 怎么样？您…这是发现了什么吗？
E: How did it go? Did you... find anything?

C: 他…难道不是第一次来树庭？
E: He's been to the Grove before, hasn't he?

C: 沿着黑衣剑士的动向，来到了树庭中部。
E: Tracking the black-clad swordmaster led you to the Grove's central area.

C: 拜托你啦，朋友，我等你好消息！
E: Thank you, my friend! Looking forward to hearing from you!

C: 那就好、那就好，一路辛苦了…所以…你有找到什么吗？
E: Oh, that's good to hear. You've done well... So... were you able to find anything?

C: 报告写完了吗？
E: Is the report done?

C: 这是又换了个包装？
E: Have they changed the packet again?

C: 很浪漫吧？很感动吧？
E: Isn't it romantic? Are you touched?

C: 那边不太安全。
E: It's not very safe there.

C: 好想早点回去……
E: I wanna go home now...

C: …嗡嗡？
E: ...Grumph?

C: 哎，身处和平环境的人们，又如何能明白这样的心境呢？他们只会觉得悬锋人好斗、扰民、性情暴躁，动不动就将「战死」挂在嘴边，却不知道……
E: Also, how could those who've always lived in peace understand this? To them, Kremnoans are just belligerent troublemakers, prone to anger and always talking of "dying in battle." But they don't realize...

C: 殿下选择独自返乡，成为整个翁法罗斯的守护者，不就是希望我们能过上和平的生活，不必再与刀剑为伴吗！为什么非得要为那传统流血才行？
E: His Highness chose to return home alone and became the Guardian of Amphoreus so that we could live peacefully, free from the company of blades. Why must we bleed for tradition to prove ourselves?

C: 我反对！我没有伤害你的理由，但是《被缚的埃德加》的埃德加有！
E: I object! I had no reason to harm you, but Edgar in The Shackled Edgar certainly did!

C: 她是元老院凯妮斯的孙女！
E: She's the granddaughter of Elder Caenis!

C: 这种时候…还是不要打搅为好呢。
E: At times like this... maybe it's best not to interrupt.

C: 没错，热血贲张、拳拳到肉的战斗才是英雄的浪漫，你的球棒渴望着一场酣畅淋漓的战斗。
E: That's right, the passionate, intense battles with every punch landing are the true romance of a hero. Your bat is craving for a thrilling, full-on fight.

C: 哈哈，自从我们不做卖盾贩矛的生意之后，就在构思一些新的小玩意儿。
E: Haha, ever since we stopped the spear-and-shield business, we've been coming up with some new little gadgets.

C: 街巷、圣殿的廊柱都挂满鲜花，说着不同城邦方言的人们支起帐篷，赞美彼此健美的身体，角逐月桂花环……
E: Streets and temple columns are adorned with flowers, people speaking different dialects raise tents, praise each other's athletic bodies, and compete for laurel wreaths...

C: 告诉他你在找人。
E: Mention you're looking for someone.

C: 告诉他孩子们的请求。
E: Tell him of the children's request.

C: 从刻法勒广场到圣城门口那段，是抵御黑潮入侵的重要防线。这批卫兵应该都被派驻在那里了。
E: From Kephale Plaza to the city gates — the main black tide defense line. This batch of guards might all be deployed there.

C: 希瑞雅听到的「刻法勒」的回应，是这个叫斐第斯的守卫用扩声器假扮的。恐怕他就是那个「好心的守卫叔叔」。
E: The "Kephale" voice Serena heard was impersonated using Phedes' amplifier. It unfortunately appears that you just found "Mr. Nice Guard."

C: 嗑学家们，放心交给我吧。
E: Shippers, leave it to me.

C: 有些熟悉的道路，莫非那命运也在主动指引我前去一探究竟么……
E: This path feels familiar... Could destiny itself be guiding me to uncover its mysteries?

C: 刚刚到底是怎么回事？
E: What was all that about before?

C: 容我介绍，这里是蜜酿采榨区。曾经的斯缇科西亚人——乃至全翁法罗斯所饮的蜜酿，多数都是源自此处的果实，以及满溢之杯的神力。
E: Allow me to introduce: the harvest zone for our honey brew. Before everything changed, Styxians and all people of Amphoreus drank brews made from these fruits, blessed by the divine power of the Chalice of Plenty.

C: 怎么没动静？
E: Nothing's happening...

C: 涅赖德斯大人，看您的表情，想必是已经有眉目了？
E: Lady Nereides, you look like you've figured something out?

C: 如果下次告诉他们，我登上星穹列车了，不知道他们会不会给我编出一百种登上列车的方式呢……
E: Then next time I'm back in Belobog I'll tell them I boarded the Express, and I'm sure they'll give me a hundred different explanations of how it happened...

C: 只可惜下层区的人们暂时还离不开我这个医生……
E: It's just, people in the Underworld still need a doctor...

C: 我之前去问了列车上的其他人…帕姆说它还有事要忙，但同意了虎克举办捉迷藏比赛——只要虎克不进引擎室就行。
E: I asked the others if they were interested... Pom-Pom was too busy, but they agreed to let me host the contest on the Express — as long as I don't use the engine room!

C: 但姬子小姐与瓦尔特先生告诉我，原来宇宙中远不止克里珀一位「星神」——就连那在七百年前入侵贝洛伯格的异星敌寇，也是某位「星神」的令使。
E: But Himeko and Mr. Yang told me that Qlipoth is far from the only Aeon in the universe. For example, the enemies that invaded Belobog <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago were Emanators of a different Aeon.

C: …看来，是时候让银鬃铁卫做好准备了。
E: ...I need to make sure the Silvermane Guards are always at the ready.

C: 这个…你姑且信其有吧。
E: Well, again, I would say so...

C: 站在这儿的只是个全息投影，啥也干不了，你不会还要我再证明一次？
E: What you see in front of you is just a hologram, harmless as a puff of air. You don't need another demonstration, do you?

C: 有啊，一边和你聊天，一边分三个屏幕玩不同的游戏，顺带打探下游牧矿工的消息，赚点零花钱。
E: Oh, I have plenty to do. As I chat here with you on the Express, I'm also playing multiple games at once on three different screens, probing around for info about nomadic miners, and running some side-hustles for extra cash.

C: 你好像很喜欢帕姆。
E: You really seem to like Pom-Pom.

C: 这里有貘馍卷吗？
E: Do you have tuskpir wraps here?

C: 嘿嘿，快拿着吧。
E: Hehe, here you go.

C: 好的孩子，以后有空可以多多来聊聊。
E: Good. Do come back more often to chat with me, child.

C: 虽然我没有办法与孽障搏斗，助力复兴之路的铺设……
E: Though I cannot fight against these horrors and lay out a road to revival...

C: 我没有什么想说的了。
E: I don't have anything else to say.

C: 我没有什么想说的了。
E: I don't have anything else to say.

C: 你喜欢列车上的景色吗？
E: Enjoying the view so far?

C: 宇宙之中，是不是还有很多等着我去挑战的对手呢……
E: I bet there are so many opponents out there in the universe just waiting for me to find them...

C: 真的啊！老师不常用剑，可能还不熟悉剑客的气息吧？但我一眼就能看出来，这位帕姆老师绝非等闲之辈，造诣很可能在我之上。
E: Really! You don't use a sword, so I guess you wouldn't feel the presence of a swordsman in front of you... but after one look at Pom-Pom, I knew they weren't someone to be trifled with. I think they may be more masterful than myself.

C: 帕姆老师是何方神圣？
E: What's so special about Pom-Pom?

C: 我们贝洛伯格人已经足足七百年没有踏入高墙之外，更别说天上了……！
E: We Belobogians haven't set foot beyond the walls for over <unbreak>700</unbreak> years, let alone venture into the sky...!

C: …咳咳。不好意思，失态了。我刚才什么都没说。
E: ...Ahem, sorry. Excuse me. Just pretend I didn't say anything.

C: 真不是我说，你们年轻人其实不爱听这句，但我还是得说——没有啥忘不掉的事儿，没有啥过不去的坎儿！真要是有，那就是当时没琢磨明白，当局者迷了！
E: I know young people these days hate to hear this, but nothing is truly unforgettable, and there's nothing you can't get over! If there is, it's only because you've been too lost to figure it out!

C: 下次再来列车做客的话，一定要给她带些贝洛伯格特产作回礼才行。
E: Next time I visit the Express, I'll definitely bring her some Belobog specialties in return.

C: 在这里，好像完全看不到贝洛伯格……
E: I can't see Belobog at all from here...

C: 啊…那会给她添麻烦的……
E: Uhh... I don't wanna cause her trouble...

C: 你可得好好珍惜自己的朋友啊，{NICKNAME}——糟了，我刚才的语气是不是跟奥列格师傅一模一样？
E: You should treasure your friends, {NICKNAME}... Uh-oh, am I starting to sound like master Oleg?

C: 能跟三月和丹恒这么有趣的伙伴一起旅行，可真是让人羡慕。
E: I'm jealous that you get to travel with people as interesting as March and Dan Heng!

C: 来，再考我一道题吧，这次多上点强度~
E: Come on! One more — and make it challenging!

C: …啊？你说什么？开盘就跌了百分之十五？
E: Huh...? Are you serious? <unbreak>15%</unbreak> drop on opening?

C: 嗨，{NICKNAME}！多谢你的邀请。这车窗外的景象可不是人人都能欣赏得到的，真令人激动！
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}! Thanks for the invite, I'm so excited! This view isn't something you see every day!

C: 是不是该去问下希露瓦？史瓦罗说不定也可以……
E: Maybe I should go talk to Serval? Svarog might be able to help, too...

C: 你们的列车长，帕姆，它喜欢什么样的食物？雪萝卜？野菜？还是说……
E: Pom-Pom, the conductor — what kind of food do they like? Do they like snow radish? Herbs? Or maybe...

C: 过好每一天，活出自己想要的样子——对我来说，这是眼下最重要的事。
E: Making the best of every single day and living life the way I want to — those are the most important things to me.

C: 把这儿当家就好，将军请随意。
E: Just make yourself at home, general.

C: 请问{NICKNAME}方便吗，我有一点小烦恼想咨询一下。
E: Excuse me, {NICKNAME}, do you have time? I need some advice...

C: 我曾想过取一个太空的切片，用于研究星球的构成本质。
E: I once hoped to capture a slice of space and dissect it, to truly understand the core essence of our galaxies and planets.

C: 在面对压力的时候…
E: When feeling stressed...

C: {NICKNAME}，谢谢你邀请我登上列车，片刻的自由梦幻而美妙。我准备了一份礼物，希望你能喜欢。
E: {NICKNAME}, thank you for allowing me to board the Express. This momentary freedom has been a beautiful dream. I've prepared a gift that I hope you'll like.

C: 走！我带你出去玩！
E: Let's go! I'll give you a tour!

C: 样式我已经想好啦，但得先保密！这样下次见面的时候才有惊喜可言！你说对不对？
E: I've even thought of the design already, but it's a secret! Then it'll be a surprise the next time we meet! Don't you think so?

C: 不知道今日发现的记忆碎片里，会留有怎样的故事呢？
E: I wonder what stories have been left behind in the memory fragments that we found today?

C: 我已经猜到了，我喜欢！
E: I've already guessed it, and I like it!

C: 请容许我赞美你…
E: Please allow me to sing your praises...

C: 纯美骑士们追逐着各自的目标，走向不同的道路，这是命运使然。
E: The Knights of Beauty each pursue their own goals, venturing down different paths. That is our destiny.

C: 下次比赛开办时，{NICKNAME}与列车组如果有兴趣观看，我会给大家寄送入场门票。
E: The next time there's a race, if {NICKNAME} and the Express Crew are interested in spectating, I will send everyone admission tickets.

C: 我是来见{F#她}{M#他}的。
E: I'm here to see {F#her}{M#him}.

C: 你看向「王座」的目光也不自觉柔和了起来，这是你和洞悉者之间的小秘密，你将这段故事埋在心里某处柔软的角落。
E: Your gaze at the throne subconsciously softens. This is a little secret between you and the Insighter, and you bury it away somewhere in a warm, fuzzy corner of your heart.

C: 钱买不到真心的「朋友」
E: Money can't buy true friendship.

C: 他觉得和你谈得来。
E: He thinks he'd get along splendidly with you.

C: 华劳斯想和你做朋友。
E: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: 我现在还挺忙的，抱歉，如果那位华劳斯有什么事情找我，让他自己来吧。
E: I'm pretty busy right now, sorry. If that Wallace has anything else to say, tell him to come find me himself.

C: 就是这本《地底动物百科》，据说是某个银鬃铁卫从地底带回来的。里面记录了好多奇珍异兽：结晶宝石蜥蜴呀、食髓洞螈呀、葬礼虫呀什么的……
E: This one, the Underground Encyclopedia of Zoology. I heard a Silvermane Guard brought it from the underground. It describes many strange creatures: Crystalline lizards, geomarrow olms, funeral worms...

C: 唔…说出来也不怕你笑话，我现在是市政厅派往贝洛伯格外部区域探索的先遣队队员，负责调查那些未知的动植物。
E: Oh... I'm worried you'll laugh if I tell you. I am a member of an exploratory vanguard dispatched by the Town Hall to go outside Belobog. I'm responsible for investigating unknown flora and fauna.

C: …什么乱七八糟的，这人不会觉得自己很浪漫吧？
E: ...What kind of nonsense is this? Does this guy think he's very romantic?

C: 你不想这么写吗？
E: Don't you admire her talent?

C: <unbreak>30%</unbreak>…不，<unbreak>40%</unbreak>！而且实话跟你说吧，这完全是保守估计。
E: An increase of thirty percent... no, forty! To be honest with you, I'm being conservative here.

C: 具体要做什么？
E: What do I need to do exactly?

C: 唉，和你这种人没法交流。科学研究不是炒菜做饭或者洗衣叠被…要是你看一眼就知道我在研究什么，那还要科学家有啥用？
E: *sigh* It's impossible to talk sense into people like you. Science is a complicated matter, nothing like your everyday chores that require only two brain cells to do. If you can tell what I'm doing with your untrained eyes, I might as well quit the job and let you do it!

C: 有什么问题下次再说吧，我要继续寻找科研灵感了。宇宙、时空、过去、现在……
E: Whatever questions you may have, wait until next time. I need to get back to work now in search of inspiration. Universe, time and space, past and present...

C: 不，它平平无奇，毫无特色，就像我。
E: Nothing. It is plain and lacks character, just like me.

C: 干脆去演话剧如何？
E: Why not try acting in a play?

C: 哎呀呀～没注意到这附近还有其他人，不好意思，小女子没打扰到你吧？
E: Sorry, I didn't notice there were people around. I'm not disturbing you, am I?

C: 我现在算是明白了，听好了——打着「平行世界」的旗号推广商品的家伙，十有八九都是骗子！
E: Now I know that nine out of ten people who try to associate their products with any kind of parallel universe theory are scammers!

C: 我知道你想问什么，既然自称法官，为什么会站在大街上，而不是待在法院里——听过「流动法官」这个词吗？
E: I know what you want to ask. As a judge, how is it that I am standing out in the street instead of in the courthouse, right? Have you heard of the term "Roaming Judge"?

C: …你那是什么表情？算了，我看你和那群老头老太太也差不了多少…要是你碰上了什么悬而难决的大案，记得来找我。
E: ...What's that look on your face? Forget it. You aren't much different from those old-timers... Just come to me when you have a big case.

C: 真不容易啊。
E: Wow. You have a hard job.

C: 那有打听到什么其他消息吗？
E: Have you heard any other news?

C: 想啊！
E: Of course!

C: …尤利安就不用问啦，反正他一定会跟我一起去的，嘻嘻。
E: ...I don't need to ask Julian. He'll definitely come with me, heehee.

C: 我开销不多，一人吃饱全家不饿，嘿嘿。你要是学我一天只吃一顿饭，肯定也能省下不少伙食费。
E: My expenses are low. One person eats and the whole family is fed. Hehe. If you have one meal a day like me, you could also save a lot on food.

C: 哟，你这脑子和桑博老哥一样快啊。
E: Hah, your mind's just as quick as Sampo's.

C: 再见！想学「伪装术」的话，记得带跳跳糖过来！
E: Bye! If you want to learn the disguise technique, bring me some popping candy!

C: 希儿姐姐吗？…唔，虽然希儿姐姐对我很凶，但那是因为我以前犯了不少错误…其实她都是为了我好，这我清楚！
E: Seele? Well, she was mean to me because I did a lot of bad things... but I know it was for my own good!

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 公告？什么公告？
E: Announcement? What announcement?

C: 好吧，不能鉴定可真遗憾。
E: Well, it's a pity that you don't do appraisals anymore.

C: 好啊，我支持你。
E: Alright, I've got your back.

C: 可是捉洞螈也赚不了多少嘛！真搞不懂为什么会这样…是我运气太差了吗？呜呜……
E: But catching olms is already not very profitable! I really don't get it... am I just unlucky? *sob*

C: 我倒是考虑过这个问题…不过坐缆车通勤也花不了多长时间嘛，我已经做好心理准备啦。
E: I've considered the issue. It doesn't take long to commute by cable car and I'm mentally prepared for it.

C: …也是。你们去过那么多世界，肯定见过不少神奇的景色。贝洛伯格这巴掌大的地方，恐怕没什么吸引力吧？
E: ...Kinda. You've been all over the place and seen so many incredible sights. I bet a small place like Belobog has nothing to write home about, right?

C: 有人的地方就摆脱不了病痛损伤的陪伴。只要我的手脚还能活动自如，我就会继续履行医生应尽的责任。
E: Wherever there are people, so there must be pain and sickness. As long as I can still move these arms and legs of mine, I'll keep performing my duty as a doctor.

C: 另外，除了常见设备的维修翻新，机械屋还提供新功能附装的服务。比如，为推雪机增加外悬挂钻头、为烤面包机加装弹道计算装置……
E: As well as maintenance and renovations of everyday things, we also had a modding service — like fitting an external drill bit to a snowplow, or a ballistic computer to a toaster...

C: 你以前也上过战场吗？
E: You've been in combat before?

C: 其实，我最近正琢磨歌词呢——这种难得的好灵感，我可不会让它白白溜走！
E: Actually, I've been slogging through writing some lyrics recently. When inspiration strikes, I'll put it to good use!

C: 说真的，这里确实挺适合我。过去我在机械屋修的都是些钟表、供暖器之类的小玩意。这么个大家伙，够我琢磨好久了。
E: Honestly, this place suits me very well. All I'd ever fix back in the workshop were trivial things like watches and heaters. A big guy like this is something that I can really mull over for a long time.

C: 我都走了一圈回来了，怎么还没结束啊…现在的年轻人，话可真多。
E: I've been off for a big walk, and come back. It's still going!? Kids these days, they never shut up.

C: 眼前的男人醉心于他精心编织的演讲内容，似乎完全没有意识到你的到来。
E: The man before you seems so engrossed in the elaborate speech performance that he doesn't seem to have noticed your arrival.

C: 是筑城<unbreak>233</unbreak>年。
E: Fortification Year <unbreak>233</unbreak>.

C: 要帮你整理书架上面的档案吗？
E: Do you need help in organizing the archives on the bookshelf?

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}再见…！
E: See you, {F#Miss}{M#Sir}!

C: 克拉拉会保护好「源代码」的，一定不能让它落到坏人的手里！
E: I will protect the Source Code. I won't let it get into the wrong hands!

C: 家人。
E: Family.

C: 噢，那个姑娘…我第一眼就看出她不同凡响。
E: Oh, that girl... I knew she was special the first time I laid eyes on her.

C: 再见，奥列格。
E: Goodbye, Oleg.

C: 热烈鼓掌。
E: Enthusiastically applause.

C: 我想牵你的手，将世界都与你言说
E: Take my hand baby, and together let's go cruise

C: 我找到了古代钱币…
E: I've found some ancient coins...

C: 唔，给我看看吧。
E: Oh, show them to me.

C: 听说你也是乐队成员…
E: You're a member of the band, right?

C: 我最大的遗憾就是没能赢下来…至少打个平手也行。毕竟我答应过玛……
E: It's such a shame that I didn't win the fight... or at least tied. I promised Margie that...

C: 我这一辈子，无非就这点盼头，现在都有了着落。这怎能叫人不开心呢？
E: That's all I've ever wanted in my life, and now it's all happening. How can I not be happy, right?

C: 这是我们公司内部不可逾越的高压线，只要碰了就是死...我是说，开除。
E: It's a totally off-limits topic within IPC, and whoever breaks the rules will be fried... I mean, fired.

C: 你就把鲜奶油和柠檬汁……
E: You get some whipped cream and lemon juice...

C: 这不还有我们「正当权益会社」嘛，别担心。
E: Don't worry too much. You've got us, the Rightful Rights Society for this.

C: 怎么找不到咱们那趟啊？
E: Where's our cable car? I can't find it on here.

C: 是被人借走了吗？
E: Has somebody borrowed it?

C: 你怎么把它搞坏的？
E: How did you break it?

C: 呼噜…呼噜……
E: *snore*

C: 吃过了，你呢？
E: I'm fine, how about you?

C: 想和您聊聊…
E: I would like to chat with you...

C: 狱卒们时时刻刻都在提防着这帮重案要犯，越是与他们打交道，我越是感觉到心力交瘁——他们想要离开这里的欲念就像烙铁一般灼热。
E: The prison guards have to perpetually keep their guards up around these serious felons. The more I interact with them, the more it grinds down on my mentality — Their desire to leave this facility burns as blazing hot as fiery brands.

C: 我想问的差不多了。
E: That's all I wanted to ask.

C: 哎呀，忘了自我介绍……咱是尚滋味的主厨兼老板燕翠。现在餐厅里不太忙，我到这长乐天里休息休息，结果脑子还在想着怎么开发新的菜式。
E: Ah, I forgot to introduce myself... I am Yancui, head chef and owner of Spices Supreme. The restaurant's not busy right now, so I'm taking a break here in Exalting Sanctum, but couldn't take my mind off developing new dishes.

C: 是…是吗…真厉害呀…
E: Is... Is that so...? Amazing...

C: 最近生意还顺遂吗？
E: Has business been going well lately?

C: 有没有什么书推荐呢？
E: Got anything you can recommend?

C: …书店本来就是这样的销售方式嘛。再说了，我也不是书肆的老板，我只是帮老板看店的杂务，不为书店的销量负责。
E: ...Bookstores are for selling books. Besides, I'm not the boss here. I just help with running a few chores. I'm not in charge of sales here.

C: 不过说到底，就算你喜欢，那个人不喜欢，这也没用啊……
E: But in the end, even if you do like it, she doesn't like it. So it's useless...

C: …实不相瞒，我正有此意，正在想办法呢。
E: ...To tell you the truth, that's what I think, too. I'm trying to find a way to do just that.

C: 我是工造司的工正，就挺有水平的吧。领导对我很赞赏，他说过「小聪啊，你要是稍微有点情商，百年内就能评上大工正」。
E: Yeah, I'm an artisan at the Artisanship Commission, and I'm kind of a big deal. My boss loves me and he said, "Cong, if you just work on your EQ a little, you'll be a Master Artisan in another hundred years."

C: 我想你也对蘑菇有些偏见。
E: I think you're a little biased against mushrooms.

C: 托蝶幻境和「虚拟现实」能一样吗？幻戏的核心在于「狐术」的应用！
E: How can Butterfly Immersia be the same as VR? Its core revolves around a base of foxian magic!

C: 接下来？继续说服武赫拍一些不会让我们饿死的幻戏。
E: Next? Keep on convincing Wu He to shoot a few immersia scenes so that we don't starve to death.

C: 是我的话，我要创造一个十亿仙舟人愿意生活在其中的托蝶幻境！
E: If it were me, I'd be hungry to create a Butterfly Immersia in which billions of Xianzhou people would love to live!

C: 你学镜流？真的假的？
E: Like Jingliu? Are you serious?

C: 你注意到建木又长起来了吗？
E: Did you notice the Ambrosial Arbor was growing once again?

C: …不对，我想了一下，我应该没什么能教您的…不如这样吧，以后有机会的话，来我们拳馆代课吧！我给您开高薪！
E: ...Hold on. It suddenly occurs to me that I have nothing to teach you... How about you give a lesson at my boxing gym? I'll offer you great pay!

C: 我没有吓唬你，我只是认真地警告你，仙舟上有句古语叫作「良药苦口」，希望你能听得进去。
E: I didn't want to scare you. I'm just trying to give you a warning. There's an old adage around here, "Good medicine tastes bitter." I hope you take what I said to heart.

C: 没有就不要吗，嗨，要的人多了去了。
E: If I don't, does that mean you don't want it? There're plenty of people who do.

C: 您慢走，我也该接着忙了……
E: Take care. I'd better get back to it...

C: 那我就去神策府问问吧。
E: Then I'll go ask the Seat of Divine Foresight then.

C: 这可问到点子上了——我这改名也不是瞎改，总得让人相信我是将军胞弟不是？
E: That's the key point — it wasn't a random change, but designed to make people believe that I'm his brother.

C: 策士是云骑军里的职衔，负责运筹和梳理信息，帮助长官进行决策。在下不才，忝居策士长一职。
E: Counselor is a title in the Cloud Knight forces. We're in charge of strategic planning and processing information, helping the Captain make better decisions. I'm no great talent, but humbly hold the position of chief counselor.

C: 你居然能在执勤的时候聊天？
E: Are you allowed to chat while on-duty?

C: 但要说枯燥，那也是挺枯燥的。幽囚狱这个地方贼古怪，也不知道是不是因为与世隔绝的原因，在这里待久了会觉得时间过得很快。
E: But if we're talking monotonous, yeah. The Shackling Prison is an extremely strange place. I'm not sure if it is due to the separation from the real world, but once you've been here for a long time, it feels like no time has passed at all.

C: 仙舟曾去过一个世界，那里的人用一种叫「水镜」的东西，对未来洞若观火，竟比穷观阵更要精准，我们考察团不由得花功夫研究了一番。
E: Xianzhou had once visited a world where the residents used something called an Aquascope to scry into the future. That thing was even more accurate than the Matrix of Prescience, and our exploration team couldn't help but pore ourselves into researching this technology.

C: 好了。我是地衡司的负责庶务相关内容的净砚，请问有什么可以帮助你的吗？
E: Alright. I'm Jingyan from the Realm-Keeping Commission, and I'm in charge of general affairs here. Is there anything that I can help you with?

C: 这就有点麻烦了，就算是地衡司也找不回您「没被骗走的钱」。
E: This is a bit of a hassle. Not even the Realm-Keeping Commission can get back your "money that wasn't scammed."

C: 请问你还有什么别的事吗？
E: Excuse me, do you have anything else?

C: 然后我去了「人间」…看到边境的战地医院缺医少药，看到沙漠中的农民艰难求生，看到不是每个女孩经历着「公平的人生」……
E: And then I went to the "human world"... And saw the field hospitals on the frontlines lacking doctors and medicine. I saw the farmers in the desert struggling to survive. I saw that not every young girl out there got to experience "a fair life"...

C: 人就像骑着独轮车，同时还在表演接抛球的猴子似的，手忙脚乱地想接连兜住空中掉落的三个球，还得脚踩车轮，维持平衡……
E: People are just like monkeys riding a unicycle while trying to juggle. While hurrying to catch those three balls up in the air, you still have to keep stepping on those pedals to spin the wheel and maintain balance...

C: 请问大人是有事要进入神策府吗？我去帮大人通报一下。
E: May I ask, have you come here to the Seat of Divine Foresight on any official business? I can help you pass it on.

C: 好的，大人若还有问题随时找我。
E: Very well. If you have any more questions, please come and find me.

C: 不信的话，您可以去码头上打听打听，我的货物损毁率绝对是业内最低的！
E: Why, if you don't believe me, then just ask around over at the jetty. My damaged goods rate is easily the lowest in all of Cloudford!

C: 我跟您说这干嘛，那只小麻雀最近总是被太卜呼来喝去的，我已经不打算埋怨她了。
E: Why am I telling you all this? Because that little sparrow has been getting chewed out recently by the master diviner, so I don't intend on blaming her any further.

C: 这算是给你一个职场小建议吧，主动保留你们一切的交流记录，这会省去一切「记不清了」、「我没说过」之类的麻烦。
E: This is just a small workplace tip for you: Be proactive about recording all your communications. This will cut straight through anyone trying to say "I don't remember" or "I didn't say that."

C: 呵呵，我俩很熟？您真是说笑了，我上班的时候基本见不着她人，我可没有自信说「我和青雀很熟」。
E: Hah, us? Close? You must be a comedian or something. I hardly ever see her at work, so I can't possibly say that we're "close."

C: 你就别打听了，我是卜官，保密是我的职业道德。
E: Okay, enough questions. I'm a managing diviner and keeping trade secrets is a part of my professional ethics.

C: 玉兆算端有时会技术性故障，运气不好的难免会中招。某些卜官就换着法儿来问我，什么「不见某某卜官上报故障，莫不是压根没启动卜算呀」之类的，我哪儿知道啊。
E: A jade abacus calculation terminal can sometimes have technical faults, and if you're unlucky, your terminal of the day would be the one to malfunction. So some managing diviners try to ask me leading questions like "diviner So-and-so hasn't been reporting any faults. Does that mean they never performed their divination at all?" Heck if I know.

C: 听到这个消息，我整宿整宿无法睡着。我想为他做些什么。他…年纪还轻，刚完成自己的初狩仪式，被授予了云骑的武器。
E: I couldn't sleep for many nights when I heard the news. I wanted to do something for him. He... He was still so young, and was just gifted a weapon of the Cloud Knights after he'd completed the ritual of his First Hunt.

C: 虽然做什么都晚了。
E: Even though it's already too late...

C: 太卜司的人曾给我算过一卦，说我会是大富大贵的命。可我不信，江湖行医嘛，为的不过就是一口饭而已。
E: Once, this diviner read my fortune and told me I'd be rollin' in dough and living large. But I ain't buying it. I mean, I'm just a wandering healer trying to make ends meet.

C: 嗐，你瞧我，一开始诉苦就刹不住车。这人一上了岁数，话就变多了，你多包涵。你是有什么事情要找我吗？
E: Hey, look at me — once I start complaining, I can't stop. I've grown far too talkative in my old age, so please forgive me. Do you have anything that you'd like to ask me about?

C: 当时我是真不想继续干这个鬼差事了，真不想干了。难过，心里恨得慌。可是恨又能怎么样呢？我日哭夜哭，能哭死寿瘟祸祖吗？
E: At that time, I lost all my desire to stick with this lousy job. I was upset and overwhelmed by resentment. But what could I do? Could I destroy the Plagues Author by crying day and night?

C: 你平时都在忙些什么？
E: What do you usually do?

C: 那我继续越狱了。
E: Then I'll get back to my jailbreaking.

C: 好的，您慢走。
E: Okay. See you.

C: 值钱？值钱就怪了！您恐怕并不了解银河商业的潮流，就别凑这热闹了。
E: Quite a lot of money? Come on, are you even serious? If you don't know the latest trend of cosmic business, you might as well not say anything at all.

C: 公司要对金人巷不利？
E: Is IPC planning to undermine Aurum Alley?

C: 我想买点茶尝尝…
E: I'd like to have some tea...

C: 是啊，很可惜，我不能随地…不对！什么大小变！能不能不要那么粗俗！
E: Yeah. Real shame. I can't change my... no! How large? Can you stop being so vulgar!

C: 下次再聊吧。
E: Let's catch up another time.

C: 罗浮怎么你了！
E: What did the Luofu ever do to you!?

C: 只剩下一颗头的我对所有人毫无威胁，你们舒服，我也舒服。
E: With only a head left, I won't pose a threat to anyone. You're happy about it, and so am I.

C: 你知道的，我只能描述我目所能及的感受。
E: As you know, I can only describe what I can experience as far as my eyes can see.

C: 小秘书在金人巷挺受欢迎的？
E: You are popular in Aurum Alley, right?

C: 说起来，之前不是拜托你搞了些丰饶孽物的食材…嗯，材料吗？从此我彻底斩断了念想，一门心思投入到传统菜品里，差异化才是我的特色。
E: Speaking of which, do you remember that I asked you to get me some Abominations of Abundance... ingredients? I've made up my mind to focus on traditional dishes. Differentiation is what makes my place special.

C: 不过要是化外民的科技，我得看看是哪个世界的。
E: Of course, if it's outworlder technology, it'll depend on the world...

C: 当然可以，您想问什么呢？
E: Of course. What would you like to know?

C: 该不会是为了调查罗浮的灾异而去了某些危险的地方吧？这老头…还是那么让人不省心啊。
E: Wait, he hasn't gone somewhere dangerous to investigate the source of the calamity on the Luofu, has he? That old man... He just won't stop getting himself into trouble.

C: 说来惭愧，这幽囚狱一直都是整个罗浮最安全的地方…在下平日里的工作非但谈不上危险，甚至可以说是无趣。
E: This is embarrassing to admit, but you could say that The Shackling Prison was the safest place in the Luofu all this time... Not only is my job in no way dangerous usually, but I even find the work somewhat dull and lifeless.

C: 遇到这种家伙，一般还是会交由判官和冥差处理——他们才是专业人士，我们云骑军只是从旁辅助罢了。
E: When I encounter such beings, I usually let the judges or spiritfarers handle them. After all, they are the true specialists... Us Cloud Knights simply provide aid wherever we can.

C: 你看见的是仙舟「玉阙」，观星士掌瞰云镜窥向星海深处，玉兆转动不停，于阴霾之中指引众人驶向光亮彼岸。
E: You are seeing the Xianzhou Yuque. The stargazers steer the Cloudpeer Telescope and peer into the depths of the stars. In the midst of the gloom, the spinning jade abacus emanates a radiance, guiding the ship to its bright destination.

C: 应该是仙舟星阵棋。
E: I suppose so.

C: 本座曾为此与人有过一番辩诘。可惜如今，能为辩论画上句号的只有我一个了。
E: I once had a debate with someone over this issue. Unfortunately, I alone remain in the world of the living to bring the debate to a close.

C: 太卜大人她挺好的，本事也大，就是太过于关注我了。
E: The master diviner is nice and talented, but she pays too much attention to me.

C: {NICKNAME}，你来了。是有什么事找我吗？
E: You're here, {NICKNAME}. Is there anything I can do for you?

C: 欢迎回来，可憎的有机体。「我们」依然期待着与你的进一步交流。
E: Welcome back, loathsome life form. We have been looking forward to communicating with you again.

C: 关于龙尊的身份…
E: About your role as the high elder...

C: 被收伏的岁阳会怎么样呢？
E: What happens to the captured heliobi?

C: 「有欲望而不得实现」懂吗？这才是岁阳的「拘束」。
E: You understand the idea of a "desire that you can never fulfill," right? This is "imprisonment" for a heliobus.

C: 能讲讲十王司的驱魔道具吗？
E: Can you tell me about the Ten-Lords Commission's exorcism tools?

C: 您看，十王司并非是战士，而是专家。
E: You see, the Ten-Lords Commission are not warriors, they are professionals.

C: 我是金人勾魂使四卅七号。金人勾魂使是一种金人型号，而四卅七号则是我的编号。
E: I am Aurumaton Spectral Envoy No. <unbreak>437</unbreak>. Aurumaton Spectral Envoy is an aurumaton model, and No. <unbreak>437</unbreak> is my serial number.

C: 「十恶」是什么？
E: What are the Ten Sins?

C: 神策府的青镞大人提前跟我们约好了设计师的时间，结果景元将军到了店里却只挑几件最便宜的成衣就打算离开。
E: Madam Qingzu of the Seat of Divine Foresight previously made a tailor's appointment with us, but when General Jing Yuan arrived, he just picked the cheapest ready-made clothes before trying to leave.

C: 我再考虑考虑。
E: I'll consider it.

C: 你肯定跟每个人都这么说。
E: I bet you say this to everyone who walks in.

C: 您要是愿意听在下推荐，点上一壶「狩原毛峰」尝尝滋味，保准满意。
E: If you wouldn't mind my humble opinion, order a pot of Hunter Maofeng tea. Satisfaction guaranteed.

C: （太长了，下次再听吧）
E: (This story is taking too long. I'll listen to it another time.)

C: 但是这些恋人都是我的前世、前前世、以及前前前世的恋人，我不认识他们，但是他们认识我。
E: But these lovers are from my past reincarnations. I don't know them, but they know me.

C: 嘘——我都说了，让你小声点儿，这也不是什么光彩的事情。
E: Shh! I already told you to lower your voice! It's nothing something I'm proud of anyway.

C: 所以你想再聊一会儿吗？反正我在这儿等着也等着。
E: So you wish to chat a while longer? It's not like I've got anything else to do around here, besides waiting.

C: 想听你聊聊异世界经历。
E: I want to hear your stories of other worlds.

C: 谢谢您来跟我俩接茬儿，我叫阿来，他叫阿往，在这儿港口上练习相声呢。您是找我俩有事，还是要咱再给您说一段？
E: Thanks for coming to join us. My name's Back'n — and he's Forth. We come to the harbor here to practice our crosstalk comedy. Are you looking for something from us, or do you want us to do another skit for you?

C: 有没有给化外民的建议…
E: Have you got any advice for an Outworlder?

C: 咦？{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}不是神仙吗？那你一定也是和我一样，来找神仙的吧？
E: Huh? You're not a celestial? Then you must be seeking celestials, just like I am?

C: 他们问了我几个问题，又给我换了身新衣裳。嘿嘿，这衣裳没洞洞，也不打补丁，真好看……
E: They asked me a few questions, and then dressed me in new clothes. Heehee, these clothes have no holes or patches on them. So pretty...

C: 这也跟神仙姐姐没关系。
E: This has nothing to do with the celestial lady.

C: 到底是谁在学我说话？哦，我看你这化外民装束，我明白了，你也受不了仙舟民了对不对？
E: Who's copying how I talk? Oh, you're wearing Outworlder clothes. I get it, I get it... You can't bear these Xianzhou natives either, right?

C: 其实很多人都会问我这样的问题。毕竟仙舟上到处都是鹤运物流的机巧鸟，又需要人力去做些什么呢？
E: I get asked that a lot, actually. After all, with this many cycranes aboard the Xianzhou, what do you need manual labor like me for?

C: 这本笔记上记录着各种各样的推荐，每一篇都写着「一生必须经历一次」、「超级推荐」…春分每一个都不想错过。
E: There's a crop of advice inside this notebook, each one described as "a once-in-a-lifetime experience" or "super recommended"... and I don't wanna miss out on any one of them.

C: 我还会收到驭空大人送给我的衣服，不得不说，驭空大人的品味真的很不错，我经常穿着她给我的衣服出去逛街。
E: I've even received dresses gifted by Madam Yukong. I have to say, her taste is impeccable. I frequently wear those dresses of hers when I go out.

C: 我也不是从小就这么强的，我十岁的时候，杀死一艘兽舰都要费些力气。
E: I wasn't always this strong. When I was ten, it took me some effort to even bring down a beast ship.

C: 你这人会不会说话啊，难道你也是来跟我吵架的？
E: Did they send you to agitate me?

C: 我一直把你当作知音，没想到你的水平还没到，可惜可惜。
E: I treated you like a confidant, but I see you're not quite ready yet.

C: 忘了自我介绍，我是《曜青体育》驻竞锋舰记者馥林，《曜青体育》是注册的官方媒体。
E: Ah, you must be wondering who I am. I'm Fulin, a correspondent on the Skysplitter from Yaoqing Sports, an official media partner.

C: 设想一下，当你点开手机，看到新闻推送的时候。除了配图之外，映入眼帘的第一眼信息是什么？
E: Think about it: When you see a push notification for a piece of news on your phone, what's the first thing you see, apart from the accompanying image?

C: 所以你提供的舆论服务正经吗？
E: So, are your public opinion services reliable?

C: 先不打扰你了。
E: I'll stop bothering you for now.

C: 驾驶大型星槎需要甲类驾照。获得甲类驾照需要乙类驾照的驾龄，所以您先开几年民用星槎，就能参加考试……
E: A Class-A license is required to pilot mega-starskiffs, and it requires you to have a Class-B license first. So after a few years of piloting civil skiffs, you can take the test...

C: 聊聊你在找的那位朋友。
E: Let's talk about that friend you're looking for.

C: 有空的话上去看看比赛吧。
E: If you're free, go up and watch the competition.

C: 刚得知要来竞锋舰工作的时候，我还有些窃喜。没想到自从我进了引擎舱就再也没出去过，即使赛场就在头顶不远处，也像是隔着银河那么远。
E: When I first learned that I'd be working on the Skysplitter, I was somewhat excited. Who knew that once I stepped into the engine room, I'd never be able to leave. Even though the arena is just above, it feels like a galaxy away.

C: 希望来的游客都能满意吧…
E: Ah, I hope the tourists find it to their liking...

C: 朋友，不要走！你…不会是想去看那些名门正道的剑斗吧？
E: Don't go, my friend! Are you... going to watch those prestigious sword duels?

C: 那时我感受到了父亲的愤怒，心想着要给那个小孩一些惩罚，我便迷了小孩的眼睛，让他以为自己走进了一座大的空房间里，脚下全是一片炭火。
E: Back then, I felt the father's rage and wanted to punish the kid, so I hexed the kid's vision and made him think that he'd walked into a huge room filled with burning coal.

C: 首先排除「我是臭棋篓子」，那么他到底在说谁呢？
E: First off, ruling out me as this "stinker" of course, who else could he have been talking about?

C: 我在这里都快闲出屁了！太无聊了，什么事都做不得，也没点好玩的东西。
E: I'm bored out of my skull in here! It's so boring. I can't do anything and there's no fun.

C: …呜呜伯？
E: ...Wubbaboo?

C: 不说了，我要回去了，再见。
E: Enough talk. I'm going back. So long.

C: 很好很好，宝贝儿，刚才你的招式确实让我全身都感到爽快！
E: Very good, my dear. Your refreshingly thrilling move jolted me right up!

C: 这是咱的工作嘛～人家其实是「自主学习反馈型训练偃偶」～凡是跟人家深入交流过的选手，他们的一招一式，一举一动，我全都了然于心～
E: That's just our job! I'm a self-learning feedback training puppet. Once I've intimately exchanged moves with any fighter, I'll naturally learn of their every move, every step, every stroke!

C: 看在你先前打的那么用力的份上，让人家想想……
E: Mm, you certainly pummeled me hard enough before, so let me think...

C: 快来打我呀…
E: Hurry up and hit me...

C: 有人痴长上千年，脑子里空空如也，岁数都长到永狩原的狍子身上去了。所以你不必听信年长者的鬼话，学养和寿命没什么必然联系。
E: Some folks have been around for thousands of years, but their minds are as empty as a fawn on the Ever-Hunt Plains. So don't blindly believe old-timers' nonsense. Old age does not equal great wisdom.

C: 至少在你们登上仙舟之后见到的「停云」是幻胧假扮的。
E: I can only declare with certainty that the Tingyun you saw after you boarded the Xianzhou was impersonated by Phantylia.

C: 乾坤街里有何许门道…
E: What secrets are hidden in the Cosmos Street...

C: 皮还薄，馅还大。
E: The filling is generously wrapped in just enough skin.

C: 我都见怪不怪了。
E: I'm not surprised.

C: 原来他们也会办葬礼啊……
E: So they also hold funerals... huh...

C: 可刚才他一发狂起来连我都不认得了！
E: But just now when he went berserk, he couldn't even recognize me!

C: 此番加入昏光庭院，正是想成为一名医师，研习与人子心灵相通的方法。
E: I joined the Twilight Courtyard precisely because I wanted to become a physician and study ways to connect with the hearts of the children of humanity.

C: 是又如何？万人景仰的理性之泰坦，莫不是个古板迂腐之徒吧？
E: So what if I am? Don't tell me the revered Reason Titan is conservative and old-fashioned?

C: 我倒是希望她能理解我已经不再是个乳臭未干的小孩了…不过，那毕竟是家人，她愿意怎么叫就怎么叫吧，难道你能要求你的家人？
E: I wish she could understand that I'm not some kid who's still wet-behind-the-ears... But then again, she's family. Let her call me whatever she wants. Can you really make demands of your own family?

C: 你们这是在？
E: What are you guys doing?

C: 啊，提起燕麦粥，我记得小姐您以前因为偷吃偷喝被缇宝大人教训……
E: Ah, speaking of oatmeal porridge, I remember when you got scolded by Tribbie for secretly snacking on food and drinks...

C: 你还恨欧利庞吗？
E: Do you still hate Eurypon?

C: 真是片祥和的花园啊，没有刀剑，没有火焰…新世界的律法，竟是这般仁慈？
E: What a peaceful garden this is! No swords, no flames... Are the laws of this new world really so merciful?

C: 小灰鱼，还要再来一杯吗？
E: Little Gray Fry, want another drink?

C: 我支持药王秘传。
E: Because I'm a supporter of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 没错，我有四不吃……
E: That's right, there's four things that I abstain from...

C: 你先往好处想，起码你不是犯人身份。
E: On the bright side, at least you're not here as a prisoner.

C: 你也想上台比划两下？
E: You wanna have a go up there?

C: 我也好想看比赛啊......
E: I wanna see the matches too...

C: 我上我也行。
E: At this rate, I can go compete too.

C: 猜～猜～我～是～谁？
E: Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~

C: 能够遍览四方的硬质屏幕，因此得名「四方览镜」，不过是民用版。仙舟语言真的很难懂。
E: The Foursquare Mirror, which is the civilian version, is named after its screen that allows its users to view every corner of the world. The Xianzhou dialect is very confusing.

C: 「请站稳扶好，禁止嬉戏打闹」。每一条看似废话的规则的背后或许都是真实而惨痛的案例——你不禁想象没有站稳扶好的人后来掉到哪里去了。
E: "Please stand firm and hold on. No fooling around." A real and painful incident may be concealed behind every seemingly trivial rule — you can't help but imagine where those that didn't stand firm ended up falling.

C: 这些大人物武功都这么好吗？
E: Are these big shots all really that skilled in martial arts?

C: 卢卡选手需要您的支持！
E: Luka needs your support!

C: 那充满力量的造型…
E: That powerful design...

C: 怎么智械都能参赛了？
E: Can Intellitrons compete in this?

C: 可是史瓦罗大佬输了。
E: But Boss Svarog lost...

C: 一台物流鸟架。物流机巧鸟以此为节点，共同编织罗浮庞大的物流网络。
E: It is a Cycrane Stand. An extensive courier net in the Luofu is created by courier cycranes using the nest as a node.

C: 只有能量石的排列与大衍万象的昭示协同一致，阵基才能检索出对应的消息。
E: The relevant information can only be obtained when the energy stones are arranged in a pattern similar to the shape shown in the Mutare Magnus.

C: 摇摆，沉沦——
E: Fight it or rock with it!!!

C: 没人比我更懂折纸大学。
E: No one understands Paperfold University more than me.

C: 「并蒂姻缘，祝您寻得佳偶归。」
E: "We wish you good luck in the search for your better half."

C: 「米糕没幻戏社的各位：我很喜欢诸位在《仙舟折剑录》里塑造的众多群像，特别靖渊和耽风两位男性角色，喜欢到睡不着觉的那种……」
E: "Dear Mellow-Golden-Mayor Immersia Club: I love the group portraits that you build into Xianzhou Sword Tale, especially when they include those two male characters Jim Yan and Denn Fang — they keep me up at night..."

C: 仔细确认一下。
E: Check the rice.

C: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
E: The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.

C: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
E: The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.

C: 会有人来处理它的。
E: Someone will take care of it.

C: 一只被打开的快递盒，腐败的食物气息从箱子里飘了出来。
E: An opened courier package. The smell of rotten food wafts out from inside.

C: 快帮我的帖子点赞！
E: Like my post, quickly!

C: 「我知道会有人格外好奇，拆箱检查。这个箱子中空无一物，但它就是比那几个铁块要重。为什么？」
E: "I knew that people will grow curious and open this box to check. This box is completely empty, but is still heavier than the boxes with iron blocks. Why is that?"

C: 没人知道「午夜谜箱」是否对此感到失望，但每天趁着夜色回收箱中财物的那小子应该挺失望的。
E: No one knows if the Midnight Mystery Boxes are disappointed, but the man that comes to collect all the treasures under the cover of night every day must be very disappointed.

C: 你不也经常说「见鬼」吗？
E: Weren't you also the one who always says "good heavens!"?

C: 这也正常，爱书之人总是摆出一副全年阅读清单都排满了的焦急模样，但到最后却连书皮都忘记翻开。
E: That's normal. A bibliophile loves getting panicked over a fully packed annual reading list, only to forget to flip open their books at the end.

C: 你稍移视线，辨认出了墓碑上的最后一句话：「——以上种种我都做不到！」
E: You shift your gaze slightly and notice the last sentence on the tombstone: "—All of which I can never attain!"

C: 元年苏乐达——一个笑话。
E: Epochal SoulGlad — a joke.

C: 可梦境的宣传语不是说，「做你想做的任何人」吗？
E: But isn't the slogan of the Dreamscape "Be whoever you want to be"?

C: 「我们不只妆点您的外貌，还能修饰您的灵魂。」
E: "We don't just beautify your face, but also rejuvenate your soul."

C: 桌面被整理得干净又整齐，仿佛一尊供人观赏的标本。
E: The table is spick and span, like a specimen sample to be admired.

C: 「您正在呼叫的是，『薄暮的时刻』。愿您在匹诺康尼拍卖会中收获心仪的宝物。」
E: "You are calling the Moment of Dusk. May you find your desired treasures at the Penacony Auction Hall."

C: 一扇紧锁的房门。屋内没有传来任何声音，紧锁的门又在暗示它确实有人居住。
E: A firmly locked door. The room is quiet, but the fact that the door is locked indicates that it is occupied.

C: 很难想象，曾经竟有不止一名游客试图在这块广告牌顶部蹦极。
E: It's hard to imagine that more than one tourist has bungee jumped off the top of this billboard.

C: 「通过我，将进入漆黑之活塚」
E: "Step past me and enter the Living Grave of Dark"

C: 「哭吧！尽情哭吧！■■可不会放过我们——我们都是犯过错的罪人！我们是犯过错的罪人！」
E: "Cry! Cry out all you want! ■■ will never let us off! We are sinners who have sinned! We are sinners who have sinned!"

C: 全垒打，幸好没人站在下面。
E: A home run — thankfully no one was standing below.

C: 「观察」——这就是我在做的事。
E: Observation — that's what I'm doing.

C: 有什么用啊。有什么用。收集这闪金光的玩意，就为了挂在家里，到处喊人来看？
E: What's the point... What's the point. Collecting all these shiny knick-knacks just to hang them at home, and then getting people to come over to look at them?

C: 所以，没错，我知道泡面是什么味道。请你收起对无机生命体的刻板印象。
E: So, yes, I know what instant noodles taste like. Please keep your stereotypical impressions of inorganic life to yourself.

C: 这就是无名客吗…能这般随心所欲地遨游星空，听起来可真浪漫。
E: So these are Nameless... To travel the stars to your hearts' desire, it sounds rather romantic.

C: 你想听什么？
E: What would you like to listen to?

C: 末日孤星之上，人们在永夜寒冬中挣扎求生，真好啊…啊，您别误会，我不是说这场灾难好，而是这个故事实在是个创作的绝佳题材。
E: On this dystopian lone planet, its people struggle for survival beneath an unending winter night. How nice... Ah, don't misunderstand. I don't revel in misfortune, just that this is the perfect theme for a story.

C: 我■■放着手里一堆工作没做完，跨了好几个星系陪他「圆梦」就算了，现在还得收拾■■的烂摊子！
E: I ■■ dropped all my work and traversed several star systems to help him "fulfill his dream," and now I have to pick up the ■■ pieces!

C: 可由于「万界之癌」的影响，我只能留在梦境里，帮助家族文过饰非。我一直追求的真相反倒成了最无所谓的东西。
E: But thanks to the Cancer of All Worlds, all I can do is remain here in the dreamscape and help The Family smooth over their misdeeds. The very truth that I wanted to pursue has turned out to be the most insignificant thing of all.

C: （尝试聆听）
E: (Try and listen)

C: 咳咳…咳……
E: Cough, cough... cough...

C: 所以我不能认可他们的歌声，我决不认可……
E: So I cannot endorse their singing. I just can't...

C: 是啊，您应该见过「美梦剧团」，对吧？那些可爱的小东西着实为梦境增色不少。
E: Yes, I believe you've seen before Sweet Dreams Troupe? Those adorable items have added colors to the Dreamscapes.

C: 这样真有用吗？
E: Is this really useful?

C: 在一轮强劲的音乐中，维塔利将垃圾桶怪客牵了过来——一只有手有脚的垃圾桶。
E: With loud music playing in the background, Vitali leads trashcan Monster out — it's a trashcan with hands and legs.

C: 男人的悲伤化作眼泪夺眶而出，壮硕的身躯随着哭泣颤抖…看来你需要其他情绪才能让这件事翻篇。
E: The man's sorrow transforms into tears rolling down his face. His muscular body trembles as he weeps... It seems like you need to use other emotions to settle this problem.

C: 它们就像我的…伙伴？唉，越说越可悲…得吃点东西缓缓心情才行。
E: They are like my... partners? Boy, now I sound so pathetic... I need some snacks to lift my mood.

C: 不管这副躯体曾经做出过怎样的壮举，人都是要服老的——智械也是。
E: No matter what formidable moves this body once managed, it is inevitable that everyone ages — including Intellitrons.

C: 连我自己也一度这么以为——我以为艺术家的名声就是我的终极追求，以为获得他人的认可就等于获得幸福。
E: Even I thought so myself — I thought an artist's reputation was my ultimate pursuit, and gaining the recognition of others was the same as achieving happiness.

C: …再见。
E: ...Bye.

C: 我已经厌倦向他人解释我的作品了。
E: I'm sick and tired of explaining my artwork to others.

C: 广告牌僵住了，它晃了晃，差点翻倒在地。
E: The billboard froze in place. Swaying, it almost fell to the ground.

C: 广告牌抹了抹并不存在的眼泪，印在它身体上的女子依然端庄地笑着。
E: The billboard wipes away its non-existent tears as the woman printed on its body continues to smile with a dignified air.

C: 真是个尖锐的问题，{F#小姐}{M#先生}。作为工匠的哈利伯顿会告诉您：「我最满意的作品永远是下一个」，但从更私人的角度来说…
E: A sharp question, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}. I, Haliburton, will always say as a craftsman: "My next work will be my proudest," but if you're asking for my personal opinion...

C: 除非藏在天上，不然怎么会找不到他呢？
E: How could I not find him, unless he was hidden in the skies?

C: 原来这就是「喜悦」的感觉！
E: So, this is what "joy" feels like!

C: 不想成为脱口秀演员的餐厅侍者不是好的家族成员！
E: A restaurant waiter who doesn't want to become a stand-up comedian is not a good Family member!

C: 猎犬家系是做什么的？
E: What does the Bloodhound Family do?

C: 一愣过后，伍尔西又重新恢复了那副冷峻的面孔——不难看出，夸张的情绪外露让他倍感尴尬。
E: In an instant, Woolsey returns to his aloof expression. It's not hard to see that the exaggerated outburst has made him feel extremely awkward.

C: 来聊两句吗？
E: Can we chat a little?

C: 能补天缺倒也不是没有，比如符太卜、比如十王司那个小判官…但这些人要么就是有大毅力、要么就是有大机遇，而我——
E: Though it's not like there aren't any who compensate for their disadvantages, like Diviner Fu or that wee judge from the Ten-Lords Commission... But these people either succeed through sheer will, or serendipitous opportunity, yet for me...

C: 太可怕了！
E: That's horrifying!

C: 太好了，你这样懂得尊重音乐的人，才是真正值得我们倾注心血演奏的听众。
E: Fantastic! People like you who truly appreciate music are the ones we find deserving of our performances into which we pour our hearts and souls.

C: 带我看看车吧。
E: Show me the car.

C: 什么派对？
E: What party?

C: 可话虽如此，但到底什么是二次元…二次元创作又到底应该遵循什么规范…我是越来越想不通了……
E: Saying that, the more I think about "what anime actually is" and "what standards should anime really obey"... The more lost I become...

C: 我会继续考察匹诺康尼的动漫产业，学习他们的技法，研究他们的叙事…最终我会将它们与常盘国的技法融会贯通，成为独具一格的艺术！
E: I shall continue to reference the Penacony anime industry, learn their techniques, and research their storytelling... Finally, I will combine them with our Tokiwa techniques and become an artist like no other!

C: 哈哈，我就知道您会喜欢……
E: Haha, I had a feeling you would enjoy it...

C: 就这样吧，拜拜。
E: That's all. Bye-bye.

C: 嘿嘿，这可就有说头了……
E: Heehee, that's an interesting story...

C: 在这个梦里，你是某个普通星球上的某个普通国家里的某个普通城市里的某个普通小学生。
E: In this dream, you assume the role of an ordinary elementary school student, residing in an ordinary city of an ordinary country on an ordinary planet.

C: 天啊，这是我最喜欢的一集！
E: Oh gosh, this is my favorite episode!

C: <size=28>「以太战线，启动！」</size>
E: <size=28>"Aetherium Wars, activate!"</size>

C: 「鲱鱼先生」，与你的味蕾乘风破浪！这位客人，来尝尝「鲱鱼先生」柠檬挞吧！
E: Mr. Herring's rides the waves with your taste buds! Come on and try Mr. Herring's Lemon Tarts!

C: 将速度提到最快，携手在云端漫步，丢掉生活带来的全部烦恼，享受心醉神迷般的华丽幻觉，直到…死亡将我们分开。
E: As you put the pedal to the metal, I go at full speed. Together, we travel amid the clouds and forget about all the troubles in our lives. We indulge in the splendid illusion until... death do us part.

C: 哈哈哈哈哈。疾风侠出动！疾风——力量！
E: Hahahahaha. Quicksilver in action! Speed is power!

C: 这是挣到的车费！给你，收着吧！
E: Here's the fare I earn. Please keep it!

C: 好的，这就点击「销毁」按钮。
E: Fair enough. I'll hit the "Destruct" button then.

C: 只会奉承谄媚的东西，嘴里吐不出几句新鲜话。没意思。
E: That's a glib-tongued brownnoser. It's no fun.

C: 你一连吃掉了三个脆筒，甚至感觉有些饱腹…多亏梦里吃不坏肚子。
E: After eating three cones in a row, you start to feel a bit bloated... Luckily, you won't suffer from diarrhea in a dream.

C: 你在这里都做些什么？
E: What do you do here?

C: 而想要构建出我们喜爱的世界，除了创意的提供者以外，也离不开将创意付诸实际的执行者。
E: And to create a world we all love, we can't forget the people who helped execute the idea as well as those who provided the idea.

C: 虽然确实会有些劳累…但当工作结束后、我对着日历回想每天的经历时，总觉得一切努力都是有意义的。
E: It's quite tiring here... but when work is over, and I think back on my experiences of the day while staring at the calendar, I always feel that all that hard work is worth it.

C: 我愿意等待那天的到来…换句话说，除了等待以外，我还能做些什么呢？
E: I'm willing to wait for that day to come... Rather, what else can I do besides wait for it?

C: 不过我也知道，这只是痴人说梦罢了，哈哈。
E: But I also know that's just the talk of a lunatic dreamer, haha.

C: 没问题，正好我也需要一些时间来沉淀我的思绪。
E: It's fine. I also need some time to percolate on my decision.

C: 我现在有些…迷茫。明明我还是我，但没有了「鸢尾花」的光环之后，我似乎又不再是「我」了……
E: I am now somewhat... lost. I'm still me, but without the Iris Family's name, I don't seem to be "me" anymore...

C: 而我只是想按自己的方式去追求知识、去构建自己的学说，就被斥为「背叛」…荒谬、荒谬！
E: And I was deemed a traitor for wanting to pursue knowledge and form my doctrine in my own way... How ridiculous!

C: 而我只是想按自己的方式去追求知识、去构建自己的学说，就被斥为「背叛」…荒谬、荒谬！
E: And I was deemed a traitor for wanting to pursue knowledge and form my doctrine in my own way... How ridiculous!

C: 但总有些逐梦客不识好歹、不长记性，光我自己就曾经三次抓到过同一个破坏公物的家伙！
E: Yet, some Dreamchasers just never learn their lessons. I've caught the same guy damaging public property three times myself!

C: 这让我回想起去年的那场邂逅…不行，现在不是说这个的时候！
E: It reminds me of the encounter with a certain someone last year... No, now isn't the time to discuss that!

C: 最左边金色那个特别有「个性」，天天劝人戒赌，为此没少被人投诉；但不管被重置多少次它都改不了这个毛病，都快成都市传说了。
E: The furthest golden machine to the left has a lot of "character..." Every day it begs and begs people to quit gambling, which has caused a lot of complaints. However, it doesn't matter how many times they reset the machine. This problem never goes away. It's becoming a bit of an urban legend.

C: 要是嫌这些都不够刺激，那我推荐你去「星辰的时刻」——什么球笼、机动球、独轮车，各种比赛那边应有尽有。
E: If none of these are exciting enough for you, I suggest heading over to the Moment of Stars... Spheroid, Roboball, Unicycler... they have competitions for everything over there.

C: 心动不如行动。
E: Why be moved when you can get moving?

C: 更何况，酒店的服务再好，又有谁不希望能在黄金的时刻有套自己的房子呢，对吧？
E: What's more, it doesn't matter how amazing the hotel service is here, who wouldn't wish to have their own home in Golden Hour, right?

C: 更何况，酒店的服务再好，又有谁不希望能在黄金的时刻有套自己的房子呢，对吧？
E: What's more, it doesn't matter how amazing the hotel service is here, who wouldn't wish to have their own home in Golden Hour, right?

C: 你想念故乡么？
E: Are you missing your home?

C: 我讨厌故乡，因为它知道所有你那些不愿再回想起的往事。
E: I hate coming home. It knows all of those things that you don't want to remember.

C: 可我能怎么办…除他以外，我已经没有亲人了。除了匹诺康尼，我也没有能够回去的地方。这里是我最后的牵挂。
E: But what am I supposed to do...? I have no family left besides him. I have nowhere to return to except Penacony, either. This is the only place I have ties to.

C: 他们啊，一个是有权有势的本地人，一个是身强体壮的运动健将，我实在不想您因为这点小事和他们起冲突……
E: As for them, one is a powerful local figure, the other a strong athlete. I really don't want you to conflict with them over such a trivial matter...

C: 刚才和你说的这些事，也都是在我成年后，动用家族关系才调查到的。
E: Everything I just told you... I only managed to discover once I was older using Family connections.

C: 不要试图用手去碰它，这玩意看起来就很贵。
E: Don't touch it. Just one look at it tells you that this is expensive.

C: 「她开口了！啊！请继续说下去吧，我画中的爱侣！」
E: "She is ready to speak! Ah! Please, continue, my lover of painting-made!"

C: 这面书架上陈列着家族的关键资料。正当你试图拿起一本看看时，侍者的声音刺入你的脑内，立刻制止了你。
E: The shelf is stacked with crucial information regarding The Family. Just as you reach out and attempt to pick one up, a servant's voice pierces through your mind and stops you in your tracks.

C: 当你靠近时，一种天启般的预感倾泻着灌进你的脑海，清晰又强烈——
E: As you approach, a premonition rushes over your mind like a revelation, clear and powerful...

C: 我喜欢你的回答！
E: That's a great response!

C: 呃…这个问题有点突然，我得缓缓。
E: Uhh... That question came out of nowhere, let me think.

C: 这家酒吧可真是适合取材的好地方，请允许我再多待段时间吧。
E: This lounge is a great place to get inspiration, please allow me to stay a while longer?

C: 舒翁？是酒吧的那位神秘调饮师对吧，关于她的消息，我多多少少听过点。
E: Siobhan? That's the name of the mysterious drinksmith, correct? I've heard a number of things about her.

C: 看看这杆！嘿！
E: Look at this! Hey!

C: …奇怪，这只运输道具，我是不是在哪见过？感觉很熟悉。
E: ...Hmmm, have I ever seen this transportation thing before? It feels familiar.

C: 这位骄傲的驯物师才刚从口袋里掏出长鞭，一个汽水瓶盖就径直砸到了他的头上。
E: Just as the proud props master reaches for his whip, a soda bottle cap smacks him right on the head.

C: 很不可思议吧？所以，听说这家酒吧的故事后，我很好奇。
E: It's incredible, isn't it? That's why I became curious after hearing the story of this lounge.

C: 黑爪女士表达愤怒的方式还真是…与众不同。
E: The way Lady Black Claw expresses anger is... certainly unique.

C: 呵呵，我是想说——我总有一天会找到那里，哪怕永远被困在虚无的黑暗，也比困在盲目庸俗的世界中要好。
E: Heh-heh, what I meant was that I will one day find that place. Even if I am eternally trapped in that dark void, it is still better than being trapped in this blind, uncouth world.

C: 这个时刻中最耀眼的，就是资本用金纸堆出来的明星梦。大家乌泱泱挤作一团，挤破了头去争抢冠军头衔……
E: Back then, the most dazzling thing of all was using stacks of gold to build celebrity dreams. Everyone thronged into a bunch, smashing their heads together to fight for the champion title...

C: …群演！群演呢？下个环节的群演都跑哪去了？！
E: ...Extras! Hey, extras? Where's the extras for the next item?

C: 红哨小姐发出一声低频、沉闷的哨音，她的心情似乎有些低落。
E: Miss Red Whistle lets out a low, depressed whistle. She seems to be down.

C: 啧，钟表匠…你到底在哪儿呢？
E: Tsk... Where are you, Watchmaker...?

C: 有许多人并不认可我的所作所为，他们相信无论如何你都不可能将劣质的种子培育成参天大树。
E: There are many people that do not approve of what I am doing. They believe that no matter what you do, a damaged seed can never be cultivated into a great tree.

C: 你好，我是守卫维德，有什么需要帮忙的吗？
E: Hello, I am Guard Vader. How may I assist you?

C: 我记住了！
E: I got it!

C: 有什么报酬吗？
E: And what do I get in return?

C: 年轻人，你应该也是无名客吧？
E: Youngster, I guess you're a Nameless too, right?

C: 折纸小鸟的故事？自己看《钟表小子》动画去，讲得比我清楚多了。
E: The origami bird story? Go watch the Clockie series yourself — they explain it much clearer than I would.

C: 我因令人惊恐的意外到访此处，并将理想与梦寄放于此——我希望将这里建设成理想中的模样。
E: I came to this place because of a horrific accident, and pinned my ideals and dream on this place — I hope to build this place in the image of my ideals.

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?

C: 我会制造更多让他们找到自我的玩具，让这些朋友能自由选择快乐的方式，我一定会做到的！
E: I will make even more toys to help them find themselves, to help these friends choose the path of joy of their own free will, I swear!

C: 呵，他大概是《钟表小子》中最没有悬念的卡通人物，因为「钟表匠」把哈努努的名字直接写在了上面。
E: Heh, he's probably the character with the least suspense in the Clockie cartoon, because the Watchmaker wrote Hanunue's name on it.

C: 呵，没关系，我会等有缘人把它带走的。
E: Heh, no matter. I will wait for a destined individual to take it away for me.

C: 这算被骚扰了吗？
E: Is this considered harassment?

C: 用我的眼睛…用我的镜头……
E: With my eyes... With my lens...

C: 「人与人永远无法相互理解」——我的母亲曾如此教导我…而时至今日我愈发深以为然。
E: My mother once taught me that there can be no mutual understanding between people. Even to this day, I am deeply convinced by her words.

C: 最重要的就是和家人们在一起啊。
E: Nothing is more important than a family spending time together.

C: 抱歉，但我现在…哦，您就是这艘船的新主人吧，请问有何见教？
E: Apologies, I'm currently... Oh, you must be the new owner of this ship. Is anything the matter?

C: 不过…还好无论什么样子的生活，也总有到头的那一天——
E: In spite of all that, regardless of how we live our lives... we will always reach the end one day.

C: 可是…准备来准备去，我又从来没有真正出发过。
E: However... despite my thorough preparation, I've never actually departed before.

C: 很有勇气的热情选择。
E: What an enthusiastically brave choice.

C: 每当回忆起那位客人，我总是心情大好。
E: Thinking about that guest always puts me in a good mood.

C: 而在开化之后，他们反倒把这种过时的禁忌当成了潮流，我真是无法理解。
E: Yet, once they left their ignorance behind, they decided to transform these outdated taboos into a fad instead. I just don't get it.

C: 此后他意识到，对于任何食客而言，从未也永远不能品尝过的食材，只有「他们自身」。
E: He came to the realization that day that the only thing a customer has never tasted and will never taste is "themselves."

C: 瞧，在我的右眼框上，能够看到一块红色的胎记，对吧？
E: Look above my right eye. Do you see the red birthmark?

C: 我想和你聊聊…
E: I want to chat with you...

C: 您知道的，只要您不介意投资并非用于匹诺康尼，我倒是也有很多别的路子。
E: If you don't mind investing outside Penacony, I have plenty of other options for you.

C: 可是…这到底是隐含在忆质当中的过去，还是忆域本身的某种生态特色？
E: ...But is this a past contained within memoria or a trait of the Memory Zone itself?

C: 没有任何崭新的事物会因此诞生，它们都只是永远地失去了自己曾经的一部分，同时获得对方的一部分。
E: Nothing remarkable will come of this interaction. Each of them just permanently loses a part of themselves while gaining a part of the other.

C: 「更何况…其中一些信息，恐怕来路不正。」
E: "Additionally, we are concerned that some of the information came from questionable sources."

C: 一滴水中的微生物，数量可以超过三万…
E: A drop of water can contain over thirty thousand microorganisms.

C: 而且……是一种人为制作的，无懈可击的病毒。
E: And not just any virus, these are man-made: A perfect virus.

C: 靠这种甲虫，你活着走出了原始森林。在你的推介下，银河又多了一样绝美食材。」
E: "With the help of this beetle species, you've made it through the forest and introduced a novel delicacy to the cosmic culinary landscape."

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 我想问…
E: I want to ask...

C: 你为什么要学我说话？
E: Why are you copying the way I speak?

C: 这个是咱们这儿的老传统啦，我这小店里除了零食，还卖船长的周边商品，可抢手啦。
E: It's a tradition we've had since forever here. Other than snacks, our store also sells the captain's merchandise — these are selling like hot cakes.

C: 你怎么知道我是船长？
E: How can you tell I'm the captain?

C: 被顾客当面喷了个狗血淋头…太丢人了，时间要是能倒流就好了，我真想回到那一瞬间给自己一巴掌……
E: How mortifying, I got chewed out by a customer... If I could turn back time, I won't hesitate to slap myself awake at that exact moment!

C: 也怪我，我早该改改自己的拖延症了……
E: It's my fault too. I should've kept my procrastination in check before this...

C: 我不是不满意，只是觉得有点无语——我以前想来空艇上当乐师驻场表演，结果现在成了调饮师……
E: Well, I'm not exactly unhappy. I guess I just don't know what to feel... I mean, look, I wanted to be the airship's resident musician, but I ended up as a drinksmith here...

C: 「没天分就别学人玩音乐！」哎，那个乐评人说得真对……
E: "Don't jump onto the music bandwagon when you obviously lack the talent!" *sigh* That music critic was bang on...

C: 我想问…
E: There's something I want to know...

C: 如果一切顺利，接下来我将对空艇上的工作流程进行优化，确保每一项任务都能在最短时间内完成，同时保证质量。
E: If everything goes well, I'll start optimizing work processes on the airship to ensure every task is duly completed within the shortest time possible.

C: 我想问…
E: There's something I want to know...

C: 也没邀请我！
E: Me neither!

C: 我得赶在派对举办前找到新的「梦想」。
E: I need to find a new "dream" before the party.

C: 垃圾桶里捡的。
E: I fished it out from a trashcan.

C: 这就是精英与普通人的差距——财富学院的那些人得好好学着点。
E: This is what separates the cream of the crop from the rest. Something those Fortune Academy students ought to learn.

C: 「她相较其他车手稍显迷你的身躯也令车迷们万分揪心，我们衷心希望普蕾玛在长达二十四系统时的拉力赛中不会陷入脱水危险，现在开始增重是她最好的选择。」
E: "Her smaller build compared to those of other drivers has become a concern for racing fans. We sincerely hope that Prema will not be at risk of dehydration during the <unbreak>24</unbreak>-system hour rally ahead. We believe her best choice would be to start gaining some weight."

C: 皮皮西…皮皮西…皮皮西的一切都是因为皮皮西…而不是因为我的努力……
E: Pepeshi... Pepeshi... Pepeshi... It's all because I'm a Pepeshi... It's not because of my own hard work at all...

C: 支持慈善事业一直是我的梦想，并且我自己的作品也会参展。既然宣传工作缺少人手，何乐而不为呢？
E: It has always been my dream to support charitable organizations. Plus, my works are going to be displayed, too. As we didn't have enough people doing the promotion work, I figured why not get involved?

C: …嗯…你是…是你吗，修女小姐…你在哪…好痛啊，救救我吧……
E: ...Hmm... You're... Is it you? Miss Nun... Where are you... It hurts, save me...

C: 其实大家的顾虑我能理解，但我也不好对前辈们的决策说三道四。
E: Honestly, I can understand their concerns. But I have no right to criticize the decisions of my seniors.

C: 我看看是怎么个事儿？
E: What is this about?

C: 理想和现实，就像平行线，永远都不会有交集。
E: Dreams and reality are like parallel lines that will never intersect.

C: 好好享受这场音乐派对吧！
E: Enjoy this music party to the fullest!

C: 但就算不适合，我也可以主动去适应。吸收不同的风格，学习不熟悉的知识，为未来的创作积累素材，这样才真正算是*以音乐为目标*吧。
E: Even if it doesn't suit me, I can also try to adapt to it. To absorb different styles, learn unfamiliar knowledge, and accumulate materials for future creations — this should be the true goal of pursuing music.

C: 我们经常会见面。尤其是财富学院的契波同学，对组织聚会特别有兴趣，时不时就要拉我们出来玩，我和达凡绮也不会拒绝就是。
E: We see each other all the time, especially Czipo from Fortune Academy — he's really interested in organizing meetups, dragging us out for hangouts from time to time. Dafanchy and I won't refuse anyway.

C: 相信对她而言，参加此次演出将会是段颇有纪念意义的经历。
E: I'm sure that participating in this show will be a memorable experience for her.

C: 行，有什么事你再喊我。
E: Okay, just give a shout if you need me.

C: 我一定可以成为像你和她一样耀眼的「忍者」，请你见证吧——{NICKNAME}忍者。
E: I can definitely become a radiant ninja like you and her, please witness me, Ninja {NICKNAME}.

C: 不过还好香蕉料理还卖得出去，我最近根据同学们的建议研究出了新的口味，你想试试吗？
E: But luckily the banana dishes are still selling. I recently researched a new flavor according to some students' suggestions. Want a taste?

C: {NICKNAME}同学，生活真是比甜品复杂多了。或许我真的错了，但很多时候，我们就是要「蕉错就错」，才能活成自己吧。
E: {NICKNAME}, life is so much more complex than desserts. I might be wrong, but I believe that we often need to live with our "mistakenana" to live up to ourselves.

C: 还在担心你的才能无人赏识？还在苦恼水里的金子不被发现？快来报名吧！热砂盛会海选，绝不错过一颗明星。
E: Still worried that no one can truly appreciate your talents? Are you concerned that there is some hidden potential within that hasn't been discovered yet? Then now is the time to sign up! The Scorchsand Festivity Auditions never miss a star.

C: 历年以来，组织的人员编制和账目情况，都有序地罗列在其中。
E: Over the years, the situation behind the organization's personnel and accounting have been listed in an orderly sequence.

C: 因生产事故、迷因影响、汽水本身特质等因素所产生的，不可复现的谜之汽水。
E: Due to production accidents and memetic entities, the properties of this mysterious and memetically altered soda cannot be recreated.

C: 而正是这种廉价的民间小饮品，成就了如今苏乐达庞大的商业帝国。
E: And this is a cheap drink meant for everyday consumption. It is also this cheap drink that has built SoulGlad's commercial empire.

C: 瞭望镜在这里似乎有些多余，身在高空时还需要仰望星空吗？你不解，你决定——
E: The telescope over here feels a bit redundant: Is there even a need to gaze upon the sky when you are surrounded by it? You don't understand, so you decide to...

C: 使用望远镜。
E: Use the telescope.

C: 神秘的喇叭，在过去的某个时刻，也许奏响过——等等，这喇叭是坏的。你这才发现它只是此间隐藏保险柜的表面伪装。
E: The mysterious horn was probably played at some point in the past — hold on, the horn is broken. Only then do you notice that it's just a guise to conceal the safe box.

C: 啊，好甜！
E: Ah, so sweet!

C: 机械居然能这样演奏…
E: Can't believe a machine can play like this...

C: 唉，有时候，就这么静静地看着水也挺好。让生活慢一点……
E: Well, sometimes it's just nice to sit back and watch the water... enjoying your life at a slow pace...

C: 应该快到我们了。
E: It should be our turn soon.

C: 至于紧张成这样吗？
E: Why are you such a nervous wreck?

C: …我说你，差不多得了啊。
E: ...I think that's enough from you.

C: 下午好，怀特曼先生，我谨代表家族向您发出邀请——各位家人已决定向您敞开怀抱。
E: Good afternoon, Mr. Whiteman. As a representative of The Family, I would like to extend a sincere invitation to join us... Our members have decided to open their arms to you.

C: 嘘，还不是时候。
E: Shh, now is not the time!

C: …看吧，我就说大哥这次肯定会亲自过来。
E: ...See, I told you Big Bro is gonna come down personally.

C: 你还是成了大诗人，我的梦想…早就忘了……
E: You still made it as a coveted poet, whereas my dream... has long since been forgotten...

C: 我听说有人在船上开了一家临时典当行，那里可以满足你的一切心愿——只要你付得起价。
E: I hear someone opened up a pop-up pawnshop on the ship that can grant your every wish — as long as you can pay the price.

C: 仅仅是不便吗？我们回程的星舰票都买好了，害得我们把后面的行程全部改期，你知道这耽误了多少大事吗？
E: You think it's a mere inconvenience? We even bought return starship tickets. We've had to change up our entire upcoming schedule because of this mess. Do you know how huge of a disaster this is?

C: 感觉好多了…
E: I feel much better...

C: 这可是晖长石号！
E: This is the Radiant Feldspar!

C: 此前你从未意识到，自己原来是个如此怀旧的人，但每当看到那些深沉的古典乐器时，你的心中都会油然涌起澎湃的向往之情。
E: You never thought of yourself as a nostalgic person before this, but every time you see those profound classical instruments, your heart wells up with a surge of longing.

C: 快看啊！悬在舞台上面的…我从来没见过这么大的气球，还是发金光的！
E: Come take a look! Hanging above the stage... I've never seen such a huge balloon before, and it's shiny too!

C: 我不懂，为什么非得离开家乡，就为了找那个抢了他们东西的帮派报仇？
E: I don't get it. Why leave ya hometown just to find that gang who robbed them and take revenge?

C: 听着不太…道德？
E: It doesn't sound very... ethical, right?

C: （揪揪它的耳朵）
E: (Tug on its ear)

C: 听见了吗？那是胜利的哼声。
E: Did you hear that? That's the oink of victory.

C: 哼哼，哼唧？
E: Oink oink, oink? Squeal?

C: 哈哈，借您吉言。改天说不定还指望着您照顾生意呢，再会啊～
E: Thank you! Feel free to swing by and grab anything that catches your eye! Catch you later!

C: 想不到，您貌如初生的新月般年轻，竟对人生领悟如此透彻。
E: It's remarkable to see someone as young as a new crescent moon with such profound insights into life.

C: 裁缝铺嘛，当然是售卖布料、制定成衣喽。既然来了，客人不妨看看有没有喜欢的布料？
E: Since we're a tailor's shop, you can expect to find fabrics and ready-made garments. Take a look around and see if anything catches your eye!

C: 滑而不腻的蛋卷在你口中绽放，伴随着鲜乳的微甘与水果的清香。你的胃发出满足的喟叹，但与此同时，你觉得自己更饿了。
E: The smooth egg roll delights your palate with the sweetness of the milk and the nectarous aroma of the fruit. Your hunger is sated, yet your appetite craves more.

C: 这是麦迪特瑞恩文化中一种著名的甜汤，最具特色的就是汤里由蜜果制成的果冻。
E: This a famous sweet soup from the Mediterrana culture and is famous for its unique feature: A jelly made from figs in the soup.

C: 所以我用奥赫玛本地的奶浆果作为代替品——就结果来看，这个尝试还是挺成功的，哈哈。
E: Therefore, I used our milkberries in Okhema instead, and it was a pretty successful attempt, if I do say so myself!

C: 一口吨了。
E: Down it in one gulp.

C: …这次，好像没有眼前一黑。
E: This time, it seems like your vision doesn't go black.

C: 我感觉我比较纯粹，应该是「本我」。
E: I feel like I'm more pure, so I think I'm the "id."

C: 看起来就我有选项，我是自我。
E: Looks like I'm the only one who has options to choose from. I'm the ego.

C: 别管那么多了。
E: Don't think too much about it.

C: 法吉娜盲盒可不是什么猴子开关！接着喝下去你只会继续退化……
E: The Phagousa Blind Box isn't a monkey switch! If you keep drinking, you'll only keep regressing...

C: 名为卡森德拉的老妇人从怀中掏出一架小天秤放在桌上，又在水果堆中随手拿了苹果、石榴各一颗，分别放在两侧的托盘上。
E: The woman named Cassondra pulls out a small scale from her pocket, placing it on the table. Then, she casually picks up an apple and a pomegranate from the fruit pile, setting them on the opposing scale trays.

C: 还没吃，吉奥里亚告诉我们，饿着肚子打不赢。等我职歇，做点东西吃。
E: Not yet. Georios says you shouldn't fight while hungry. When I'm done with work, I'll make myself something to eat.

C: 后来才知道，没有这条规定。
E: Later, I learned there is no such rule.

C: 今天忙，下次再聊。
E: I've got some business to attend to today. Catch you later.

C: 当然，如果你只是想听我随便聊点什么…那我们不妨把话题更明确一些？你是想知道{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}、{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}、还是元老院的故事？
E: But of course, if you're up for some casual chat... How about we pick a more specific topic? Interested in tales about {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}, or the Council of Elders?

C: 当我因为处理一些事情必须回那边的时候…哪怕天光永远大亮，哪怕周遭如闹市一般喧嚣，我还是提着灯也找不见哪怕一个真正的人。
E: When I had to return there for some business... even amidst the bustling streets, in broad daylight, or when I had a lamp in my hand... I didn't see a living soul.

C: 不过没关系，我的脑子还在——只要再花一年的时间，我可以把那本书里的所有命题和证明都重新写出来…说不定还能比以前做得更好。
E: But no worries, I recall all the details. Give me another year, and I'll rewrite all the propositions and methods to prove them... maybe I'll even do better than before!

C: 看，只要稍稍关注几个{RUBY_B#公众号}云上广场{RUBY_E#}，我们外地人也能对{RUBY_B#奥赫玛}刻法勒的圣城{RUBY_E#}了如指掌。
E: See? Just follow a few {RUBY_B#public accounts}Nebula Plazas{RUBY_E#}, and even us outlanders can get the lowdown on {RUBY_B#Okhema}Kephale's holy city{RUBY_E#}.

C: 就连我这身衣服，也是在传信石版上，从大裁缝阿芙罗的店里定来的。这年头，真离不了传信石版呐。
E: I even ordered my dress from the great tailor Aphrea's store using my teleslate. These gadgets have become essential for our daily lives now.

C: 工作还顺利吗？
E: How's work?

C: 处理奥赫玛大小事务、为逐火之旅奔波，或许确实是疲累的生活，但于我而言，不过是重复了无数光阴的日常罢了。
E: Dealing with the affairs of Okhema and being constantly on the move for the Flame-Chase Journey could perhaps be considered a tiring life. To me, however, it is no more than a daily routine that I have repeated for ages.

C: 「浪漫」的承载者、演绎者、求索者、理解者——皆可得我亲手量体裁衣，这亦是我对墨涅塔神权的延续。
E: Those that bear, interpret, seek, and understand "romance"... They are worthy of my hand-made garments. This is my continuation of Mnestia's divine authority.

C: 好一个冷血王道故事！
E: What a chilling story of royal leadership!

C: 哀地里亚人在荒原中找到我，坚信我身负死亡泰坦赐福，我的双手能让他们避开冥河、直接面见伟大的塞纳托斯。
