E: The Aidonian found me in the wilds. They strongly believed that I had received the blessing of the Death Titan, that my hands could spare them from the River of Souls and send them straight to the great Thanatos.

C: 还有更吊诡的传说：据说尼卡多利曾经对塔兰顿……
E: There are even more bizarre legends than these: It is said that Nikador did something to Talanton, which is...

C: 我在为我的家人祈祷，愿他们能享有永恒的安宁。
E: I was saying a prayer for my family. I wish they may have eternal peace.

C: 马尔库斯啊，那个「撒谎精」，他总说自己是个老兵，在对抗黑潮的时候还救过人，可他讲的事情前后矛盾，我觉得他好像在编故事，以此作为某种谈资。
E: Marcus, you mean the "braggart"? He's always talking about how he's a veteran. He says that he saved people when he fought off the black tide. But his stories are so full of contradictions! I can't help but feel like he's making them all up just to make his stories sound cool.

C: 我信手里的球棒。
E: I believe in the bat in my hands.

C: 你、你在说什么鬼话！我警告你啊，随便诬陷人是要付出代价……
E: W—What are you saying!? I'm warning you. Making false accusations like that will cost you...

C: 肥皂。
E: Soap.

C: 你是第一次来吗？特意来参观我们工坊的宝贝的吗——就是那些大地兽，它们可是我的大宝贝。毕竟…大地兽是吉奥里亚赐予我们的礼物嘛！
E: Is this your first time here? Did you come to see the precious babies in our workshop, our dromases? They're my big babies. I mean... Dromases are a gift from Georios!

C: 现在呢，它们偶尔会流露出一种…怎么说呢？既茫然又警惕，好像在提防什么，又好像对什么感到困惑一样的眼神…我和它们的饲养员试了好几次心理疗法，但都不见有效。
E: But now, they sometimes betray a hint of... How to put it? A look of simultaneous confusion and vigilance, as if guarding against something but also as if confused about something... I've tried therapy with their keeper several times, but it hasn't worked so far.

C: 真的吗？
E: Really?

C: 云石天宫每天人来人往，但总有些「独特」的客人会在我们职人的心里留下深刻印象，成为打烊后闲聊时的谈资。
E: Countless people go to Marmoreal Palace every day. However, there are always a number of "unique" customers that leave a deep impression on us attendants and become a topic of conversation later on.

C: 我印象最深的并非人类客人——一只年幼的大地兽，在公共池的边上落了脚，不顾旁人呼呼大睡起来，一泡便是四时三刻。
E: The customer that left the deepest impression on me wasn't even human... It was a young dromas that settled on the edge of the public pool and fell into a deep sleep, completely unfazed by the noises of others around them. Before it knew it, it had been soaking there for nearly four hours and three quints.

C: 清醒。
E: Being awake.

C: 她有句名言，「睡眠是死亡的预演，死神未必有我们想象的那般邪恶」。仔细想想还挺有道理的——所以从那时起，我就决定人生的每一天，都要在最舒服的躺椅上睡到自然醒，嘿嘿。
E: She once famously said: "Sleep is a rehearsal for death. Perhaps Thanatos is not as evil as we imagine." If you think about it, it actually makes a lot of sense... As soon as I heard that, I decided that I would sleep on my beloved lounger every day until I've had my full of sleep, hehe.

C: 没有更多疑问了。
E: I have no further questions.

C: 秘酿…仙馔秘酿是至宝！用大地的身体发酵…灌进天空的云朵里…他生气了，嘻嘻嘻……
E: Ambrosia... Celestial Ambrosia is supreme! Fermented with the land's body... encased in the sky's clouds... He's angry, heeheehee...

C: 或许是兵器，不趁手。或许是有迟疑，对命运。
E: Perhaps the weapon, not fitting it is. Perhaps hesitation there is, with destiny.

C: 这东西和其他泰坦老爷的宝贝不太一样，它挑人，操作得不好，容易把自个翻飞了。老希这操作员团队也是找了好几个光历年，才慢慢齐全的。
E: This thing's different from the other Titans' treasures. It's picky about its controller. If you screw up the controls, you'll be the one sent flying instead. My team's been carefully assembled over many Light Calendar years to accrue such expertise.

C: …它的意志掩藏在迷醉之中，令每人的觐见旅途不尽相同——或镇定或激荡，脑中闪过智慧还是鲁莽，完成不可能之事甚至直面它本人的事迹亦有记载……
E: ...Their will is hidden within inebriation, and the journey each is subjected to is unique — calm or otherwise, whether it is wisdom or fervor that flashes through the mind. There have even been accounts of accomplishing impossible tasks, and even coming face to face with Phagousa themself...

C: …这风味让你陷入幻想，画面逐渐浮现——你是一颗挂在枝头的石榴果，智慧花园惬意的暖风吹拂，心情也变得愉悦……
E: ...This flavor draws you into a dreamy fantasy, its visuals gradually emerging — you are a pomegranate hanging from a branch, basking 'neath the warm breeze in the Garden of Wisdom, your mood uplifted...

C: 这段天外之音并无言语，只传达来一股温柔的情绪。闭上眼，仿若置身静谧的海面，抬首望去，阴霾与风暴已经在很远的地方了。
E: This echo contains no words, only passing along a gentle emotion. You close your eyes, and it feels like you are floating over a silent sea. When you look upward, the storm and clouds are already far away.

C: 看哪，机遇在大踏步地朝你走来…当然，我看不到，但我听到了它稳稳当当的脚步声。
E: Look, opportunity is striding towards you... Of course, I can't see, but I can hear its steady footsteps.

C: 你完成了一组连桂乃芬见了都要欢呼的单手倒立空翻。
E: You pulled off a series of one-handed handstand flips that even Guinaifen would cheer for.

C: 厉害啊。我在奥赫玛呆了这么久，头一次看这位卫士理人。平常我们怎么叫他都没反应的。
E: Incredible. I've spent years in Okhema and this is the first time I've seen this guard acknowledge anyone. Normally, he never responds, no matter how loudly we call.

C: 智者啊，你似乎到现在都未明白我的论点。「圆」的概念起初便在我们的思想中了，否则该如何说明我们从未见过完美的圆，却能在脑海中构想出来？
E: Wise one, it seems that you still have not grasped my point. The concept of a "circle" was in our minds from the very beginning. Otherwise, how do we explain our ability to imagine a perfect circle despite never having seen one?

C: 呃，这，能是能，倒是吃不死人，但这土…您应该不会想……
E: Uh, you can, technically — it won't kill you, but this is actual soil... you probably wouldn't want to...

C: 说是有所孤儿院在例行修整菜窖的时候，发现菜窖里的一块石板倒了，石板的背后竟然有整整一箱的利衡币，也不知道是谁从前藏在这里结果忘记了。
E: An orphanage was doing routine work on their vault when a teleslate fell over, revealing a whole stash of Balance Coins hidden behind it. No one knows who put it there or why it was forgotten.

C: 不打扰啦，下次见。
E: I'll leave you to it. See you soon.

C: 不打扰啦，下次见。
E: I'll leave you to it. See you soon.

C: 欸？我还以为是卫兵呢。刻法勒在上，你鬼鬼祟祟跟在我身后，想对我做什么？
E: Huh? I thought you were a guard. By Kephale, why are you sneaking around behind me? What are you trying to do?

C: 我的神啊？！真的是您吗？您终于认可我了吗！
E: My god?! Is it really you? Have you finally acknowledged me?!

C: 正好让我逮住你了，说什么我也得问出它的材质和制作工艺来。
E: Now that I've caught you, I'm determined to find out the material and craftsmanship behind it.

C: 没事，其实比起和我这种老头聊天，书里能学到的东西更多…闲着就去转转吧。
E: It's fine. Actually, there's more to learn from books than from chatting with an old man like me... Feel free to wander around when you have time.

C: 奇美拉是奥赫玛的宝物，大家都要爱护它们呀！
E: Chimeras are treasures of Okhema. Everyone should cherish them!

C: 是啊…嗝，悬锋勇士指定饮品。虽然只是石榴汁，但在庆典上喝总会激发出不一样的味道，甘美非凡。
E: Yes... *hic* The designated beverage of Kremnos warriors. It may just be pomegranate juice, but drinking it at a feast brings out an extraordinarily sweet flavor within.

C: 敲击，呐喊，欢呼…瞧瞧这地方，气氛多么热闹啊。你也是来参加祭典的勇士吗？
E: Knocking, shouting, cheering... Just look at this place. Such a lively vibe. You're a warrior here to join the festival too?

C: 要不是家里人说当兵吃香，硬拉着我过来报名，我才不在这风吹日晒呢…虽说确实比在外拼杀好些吧。
E: If it weren't for my family saying that you'd be fed in the army and dragging me along to sign up, I wouldn't even be standing here getting my face blasted by wind and shine... Though this is somewhat better than the frontline.

C: 我很乐意与阁下分享我的最新发现。
E: I'd be delighted to share my latest discoveries with you, esteemed outlander.

C: （用球棒敲一敲）
E: (Give it a tap with your bat)

C: 你怎么躲在木马里？
E: How come you're hiding inside a wooden horse?

C: 哼，我明明都已经这么大了，早就不是小女孩了。
E: Hmph, I'm not a kid anymore. I've grown up.

C: 这是什么特别的甜点吗？
E: Is there something special about this dessert?

C: 打扰了，我只是路过。
E: Sorry to intrude. I was just passing by.

C: 嗨，是你啊。怎么样，对做买卖有兴趣了吗？
E: Hey, it's you. So, what do you say? Interested in making a deal?

C: 听闻圣女大人深居简出，若是她亲自邀请，想必您也是位行位高权重的祭司！很荣幸能认识您！
E: I've heard the Holy Maiden rarely shows herself in public. If she personally invited you, then you must be a priest of considerable rank! It's truly an honor to meet you!

C: 别犹豫啊！
E: Don't hesitate!

C: 上次与你介绍风堇时，我提到她是「昏光庭院」的首席护理师。但事实上，她也是这个组织的继承人与管理者。
E: The last time I introduced Hyacine to you, I mentioned she is the chief healer of the Twilight Courtyard. But in truth, she's also the heir and manager of this organization.

C: 好呀好呀，「明天见」可是个特别、特别好的祝福呢。小灰明天见！
E: Okay, sure! "See you tomorrow" is such a wonderful blessing! See you tomorrow, Little Gray!

C: 你为什么不去工作？
E: Why aren't you working?

C: 听说最近来了个魔鬼监工，成天让它们干活，还要以排行榜的第一名为目标，可你说嗷呜…队伍名次，和奇美拉的生活有什么关系嗷呜？
E: I heard there's been a devil of a taskmaster lately, constantly pushing them to work and demanding they aim for first place in the leaderboard. But you tell me, awoo... does the rank have anything to do with the lives of chimeras, awoo?

C: 阿那克萨戈拉斯的一生都在追逐着真理，他是个优秀的学士。祝他在新世界能够得偿所愿吧。
E: Anaxagoras dedicated his life to seeking the truth. He was an exceptional scholar. I hope that, in the new world, he finds what he was searching for.

C: 在他们之中，有人尊崇烈阳的灼热，有人喜欢阴雨的清凉，有人偏爱冬雪的壮丽，有人向往微光的柔和。
E: Among them, some revered the scorching heat of the sun, some enjoyed the coolness of rain, some marveled at the grandeur of winter snow, while others longed for the soft glow of twilight.

C: 经常有这种「不实用」的专业…
E: Sounds like one of those "impractical" fields...

C: 行啊，你想知道什么就随便问吧。
E: Of course. Ask me anything you want.

C: 没错。不过她既是故乡，也并非故乡——她是千万人共同的故乡。
E: Yes. But it's both my homeland and not my homeland — it's a homeland shared by countless others.

C: 理念吗…虽说我的确写过不少剧本，但可能并没有什么能称之为「理念」的东西。
E: Philosophy? Hmm... I've written plenty of plays, but I wouldn't say I have anything grand enough to be called a "philosophy."

C: 哈哈，到底是谁会挣钱呢？
E: Haha! Who can truly make a living off their art?

C: 「奥凯纳斯运动会」你知道吧？就是那个在奥凯纳斯每四年举行一次、无数城邦竞相参与的著名运动会——我蝉联过三届掷铁饼冠军！
E: Surely you know the Okeanas Games? The famous, quadrennial sports event that takes place in Okeanas, with countless city-states participating — I was the three-peat champion of the discus throw event!

C: 对了，看你有些面生，打扮也不像是我们这儿的人。你是第一次来吧？这里是奥赫玛最神圣的地方。
E: By the way, you look unfamiliar, and your clothes don't seem like ours. This must be your first time here, yes? This is the holiest place in Okhema.

C: 不过，黑潮无休止地蔓延，最近每天都有新的流民过来。他们在祈祷的时候声音都在抖，我猜想，奥赫玛的整体情况恐怕也不乐观。
E: However, the black tide spreads ceaselessly, and every day brings new refugees. When they pray, even their voices tremble. I'm afraid the overall situation in Okhema is far from hopeful.

C: 你误会大了……
E: I think there's been a huge misunderstanding...

C: 当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
E: When the cocoon fades, only a piece of golden brocade remains floating in the air. The garmentmaker waves a hand, and it splits in two, with one half flying into your grasp...

C: 我想起来了…有位织者仍处在阳光下，和<color=#dbc291ff>露台上的宝箱</color>位置相同。贵客或许得用些特殊手段才能找到它。
E: I remember now... A weaver is still in the sunlight, at the same spot as the <color=#dbc291ff>treasure chest on the terrace</color>. You might need special means to find it.

C: 「推开过往之门」，阿巴阿巴……
E: "Push open the door of the past," yadda yadda...

C: 我来帮把手。
E: Here, allow me.

C: 我要坐第一排。
E: I'll take a front-row seat.

C: 秘酿末日特价——不要<unbreak>300</unbreak>，不要<unbreak>200</unbreak>…全场免费，我请客！
E: Ambrosia's apocalyptic discount: Not <unbreak>300</unbreak>, nor <unbreak>200</unbreak>... it's all free! My treat!

C: 尽情享受吧。
E: Enjoy yourself.

C: 可能我有点多管闲事，但…如果撑不住了，别硬撑，大家随时都愿意跟你聊聊。
E: Maybe I'm being a busybody, but... if you can't hold on anymore, don't force yourself. We're always here if you need someone to talk to.

C: 能多给我点提示吗？
E: Can you give me more hints?

C: 贵客，一路上有什么发现吗？
E: Esteemed guest, have you made any discoveries on your journey?

C: 嗯…有位织者与伙伴结伴同行却心生不满。金丝带来消息，它们正在<color=#dbc291ff>一堆储存器元件上</color>，去看看它受了什么委屈吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who travels with companions but grows dissatisfied. The golden thread brings tidings: They are on <color=#dbc291ff>a pile of storage components</color>. Go see what's troubling them.

C: 现在，或许是时候向你揭露阿格莱雅大人计划的全貌了。
E: Now, perhaps it's time to reveal the full scope of Lady Aglaea's plan to you.

C: 好想在软软的麦堆里睡觉，但又舍不得和你在一起的时间，好为难呀。
E: I wanna lie down and sleep in a soft pile of wheat so much, but I also don't want to lose a second I could spend with you... This is so hard.

C: 长大也不一定是好事。
E: Growing up isn't always a good thing.

C: 好想知道海的那边是什么，可是我既不会驾船，也不会游泳嘤~
E: I really want to know what's beyond the sea, but I can't sail, and I can't swim, eep~

C: 好呀！那我们就放轻松，随便逛逛。我来当{NICKNAME}的导游，好吗？
E: Great idea! Let's take it easy and go for a walk. I'll be your personal guide, {NICKNAME}, how's that sound?

C: 不过，有一个真正的烦心事，我想与阁下分享。自从维吉妮娅告白以后，我总觉得，对她的关注正在逐渐压过其他所有事物……
E: However, there is something that truly troubles the heart that I wish to share with you. Ever since Verginia confessed to me, I feel that the attention I give her is gradually overwhelming everything else...

C: 「凯妮斯」不过是一个称号、一种象征，至于名字背后的人，并不重要。
E: Caenis is but a title, a sort of symbol. The person behind the name doesn't truly matter.

C: 讲讲？
E: Go on.

C: 默默走开。
E: Silently leave.

C: 有，有天幕匿时，本狮看曳石爵跌跌撞撞的走，本狮问他，他要干嘛。曳石爵说——
E: O—Once, at Curtain-Fall Hour, I saw Dux Helkolithist stumbling around, so I asked him what he was doing. Dux Helkolithist said—

C: 嗯…有位织者生性随和。金丝带来消息，它正躺在<color=#dbc291ff>眠宫长廊的水面</color>，随波逐流呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who's very easygoing. The golden thread brings tidings: They are floating on <color=#dbc291ff>the waters of the Slumbering Palace Corridor</color>, drifting peacefully.

C: 你在和蔬菜说话？
E: Are you talking to vegetables?

C: 服务员，给每桌都添壶水。就说是我请的迷！
E: Server, bring a pot of water to every table. Tell them it's my treat, mem!

C: 真好啊，大哥，我也想当黄金裔。
E: That sounds awesome, man. I wanna be a Chrysos Heir too.

C: …差点忘了，你压根不是来求学的，唉。
E: ...I almost forgot that you weren't here to learn... *sigh*

C: 等等…啊？这么多钱？塔兰顿在上，可别是什么新型骗术……
E: Wait... Ah? This is quite some money. O Talanton above, this better not be some new type of scam...

C: 只要你希望，我愿……
E: So long as you are willing, I shall...

C: 这份工作非常危险，如果你出了什么问题，我可没有办法给艾丝妲交代。
E: This job is very dangerous. If anything happens to you, I really don't know how I would explain it to Asta.

C: 除开基础建设方面的维护，最主要的方面还是科员的心理健康。
E: Apart from infrastructure maintenance, the most important aspect is the staff's mental health.

C: 我有些事情想问你…
E: I have a few questions for you...

C: 里面的遣词造句都非常晦涩难懂，我没日没夜地研读，也只能窥见其中一隅的哲思。
E: It is written in a very obscure fashion. Even though I've spent countless days and nights studying it, I can only understand a fraction of its philosophy.

C: 年轻人的问题问得很犀利啊。
E: Kiddo, your question is very sharp.

C: 任何的架构都是不完善的，稍有不慎随时都会有坍塌的风险。
E: No structure is perfect. There is always a risk of collapse at any time.

C: 你刚才记的全错了。
E: You got it all wrong.

C: 真希望站长可以快点修复机器人配送系统啊……
E: I wish the lead researcher can fix the robot distribution system as soon as possible.

C: …瑟希斯，啊～瑟希斯！你为什么不肯回应我！
E: ...Cerces~ Oh, Cerces! Why won't you answer me!?

C: 但是不行！我的梦想从「成为树庭七贤人」，不断降级成了「成为教授」、「成为助教」、「成为学者」…现在已是「顺利毕业」了。
E: But that won't do! My dream has been constantly compromised from "becoming one of the Seven Sages of the Grove" to "becoming a professor," then "becoming a teaching assistant," then "becoming a scholar"... and now it's just "graduating successfully."

C: 一瞬间，安提西尼仿佛看见了你曾经无数次被类似的「小请求」折磨的日常。
E: For a moment, Antisthenes seems to see how your everyday life has been tortured countless times by similar "small requests."

C: 衣匠接过记忆残晶，不太熟练地炼化。
E: The tailor takes the Memory Crystal Shards and refines them rather clumsily.

C: 嗯…有位织者死里逃生。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>流淌金血的巨洞旁</color>，为自己的幸运庆贺呢。
E: Hmm... There's a weaver who managed to escape death. The golden thread brings tidings: They are celebrating their luck near the <color=#dbc291ff>giant hole flowing with golden blood</color>.

C: 被水淹没的房间，却有着巨大的风扇，一时间，你无法判断这座房间采用的是风冷还是水冷系统。
E: The room is flooded with water, yet has massive fans installed. For a moment, you can't tell if this room uses an air-cooling or water-cooling system.

C: 向您问好，救世的英雄。感谢诸位为翁法罗斯重新谱写出希望的乐章，可惜此刻身侧并无水漫琴，否则正好能为利波小先生伴奏一曲。
E: Greetings, heroes of deliverance. Thank you all for composing a new symphony of hope for Amphoreus. It's a pity I don't have a water lyre with me right now, or I could have accompanied little Master Lipos with a tune.

C: 神悟树庭主题能好吃吗？
E: How can the Grove of Epiphany theme be tasty?

C: 你得多喝点羊奶才行。
E: You need to drink more goat milk.

C: 主理人，我记得你常念叨着「秘酿的醇香，还得配上浴场的水蒸气」？
E: Manager, didn't you always say ambrosia's rich aroma is best savored with the steam of the baths?

C: …不是，你把大家叫出来，就为了这事啊？
E: ...Wait, you called everyone here just for this?

C: 我也不是故意的，我是…我是迫不得已，*不小心*踏入了黄金裔浴池。
E: I didn't mean to. I... I had no choice and somehow *accidentally* stepped into the Chrysos Heir's bath.

C: 我知道，每只妖精对未知都有一探究竟的好奇心，但无论如何，不许踏入那片幽邃的森林，是迷路迷境永恒的禁令哪！
E: I know every fairy has a burning curiosity about the unknown, but entering that deep Forest is strictly forbidden. It's a permanent ban in Membrance Maze!

C: 醒醒——
E: Wake up...

C: 狡猾的多洛斯小猫？逐火的军队里，她不是最想远离我们的人吗？
E: That crafty Dolos kitty? Of all the Flame-Chasers, isn't she the one most eager to keep her distance?

C: 哼，我的泰坦神话课上，零分重修的学生，写出来的也能比它多卖几个利衡币。
E: Hmph, even students who failed and had to retake my Titan Mythology class could earn more Balance Coins with their writing than this.

C: 由忆泡构成的…大地？
E: A land... made of Memory Bubbles?

C: 那我们之后再见。
E: See you later then.

C: 嗯…有位织者拥有惊人的财富。金丝带来消息，它正伏在<color=#dbc291ff>令人艳羡的金山之上</color>，炫耀地细数自己的富足呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver with staggering wealth. The golden thread brings tidings: They're lounging on <color=#dbc291ff>an enviable mountain of gold</color>, smugly counting their riches.

C: 那位救世主曾多次以若虫自比，若虫也确实因他而生。真是奇妙的命运啊。
E: That Deliverer often compared himself to a nymph, and indeed, nymphs came into being through him. What a fascinating twist of destiny.

C: 你居然能把它带出来？
E: You actually managed to bring it out?

C: 现在想想，还是有点遗憾，要是能从翁法罗斯多带点纪念品出来就好了。
E: Come to think of it, it's kind of a bummer. I wish I could've grabbed more souvenirs from Amphoreus.

C: 我也有东西要交给你，但我在犹豫怎么开口。
E: I have something to give you as well, but I'm hesitating on how to bring it up.

C: 尽管问吧，{NICKNAME}。为你，我永远都有时间。
E: Ask away, {NICKNAME}. I will always have time for you.

C: 更多的事你得自己去问他啦。
E: If you want to know more, ask him yourself.

C: 在列车智库的纪录里，祂和凡人一同行走，一同冒险，一同战斗，一同欢庆。作为被「原动力」束缚的神明，阿基维利拥有几近凡人的自由。
E: In the databank aboard the Express, it is recorded that THEY walked among the mortals — adventuring, fighting, and celebrating with THEM. Although THEY were an Aeon restrained by the "Primum Mobile," Akivili enjoyed a freedom similar to us mortals.

C: 列车组的大家吗？好啊，你想问谁？
E: About everyone on the Express? Who would you like to know about?

C: 一切的故事都从她遇见星穹列车开始，从那以后，他们几乎没有分开过。
E: It all started with her encounter with the Astral Express, and they haven't been apart since then.

C: 于是我想办法进到了列车里面，列车的内部结构实在是叹为观止，尤其是它的引擎……
E: So, I figured out a way to go inside the Express. The internal structure was incredible, especially its engine...

C: 哔嘟…在前方检测到障碍物，无法进行准确定位。请重新选择位置。
E: Beep, beep, beep... Obstacle detected ahead, unable to commence precise location detection. Please reselect position.

C: 哔嘟…「星际和平家电」，您最可靠的伙伴！
E: Beep, beep, beep... Interastral Peace Appliances, your most trustworthy companion.

C: 《冒险鼹鼠队》主人公叫什么？
E: Who's the lead in The Adventurous Moles?

C: 这个钥匙{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}自己留着吧，要是交给我，说不定下一秒就搞丢了。
E: {M#Big brother}{F#Big sis}, you should keep this key to yourself. If you give it to me, I might lose it.

C: 你捡到了一台轨道控制器。复杂的机械结构被铁皮封得严严实实，只留下了一根操作杆，被人拉下后可以自动复位。
E: You picked up a Track Controller. The complex mechanical structure is sealed tightly within the iron covering, leaving only a lever for operation. The lever automatically returns to the default position after being pulled down.

C: 哎哟，麻烦死了。有这时间干点啥不好……
E: Oh jeez, what a drag. Wish I could do something else with my time...

C: 这精神头挺不错！那我们就现在开始吧。
E: Now that's the spirit! Let's begin.

C: 行，我们就在这儿等着你。
E: Okay, we'll be right here waiting for you.

C: 滴、答…小镇里的苏乐达都被喝光了…没有苏乐达，我就感觉身上像是有虫子在爬！
E: Tick, tock... The town's SoulGlad supply has been exhausted... Without SoulGlad, I feel like worms are crawling all over my body!

C: 截止日就要到了！截止就快到了！滴答滴答滴答滴！
E: The deadline is almost here! The deadline is coming! Tick-tock tick-tock tick-tock tick-tock!

C: 钟表小子，带我走吧！带我去美梦小镇吧！
E: Clockie, take me away from here! Take me to Dreamville!

C: 谢谢，我对此深有体会。
E: Thank you, I realize that now.

C: 这、这样吗？看来站长还是很担心啊，但至少我不用引咎辞职了吧…应该？总之，我们一起加油！
E: R—Really? Looks like the lead researcher is still really concerned, but at least I don't have to fall on my sword and resign... Right? Anyway, let's do this!

C: 「哦，这事没那么复杂。有个星际收藏家在征集这游戏的彩蛋攻略，最高奖励是一架泰伦战机，正是我想要的。」
E: "Oh, there's not much to it. There's a collector looking for a rare strategy for this game, and the top prize is a Tyranid fighter jet, which is exactly what I want."

C: 「祝你玩得开心，我先走一步啦。」
E: "Have fun. I'll see myself out."

C: 我来帮忙修复展品了。
E: I'm here to help with restoring exhibits.

C: 求你帮我个忙吧——如果能看到你战斗的英姿，我应该会对这件武器有更深刻的理解。这样一来，我做出来的展品模型就是有灵魂的！
E: Please, can you do me a favor? If I can see your dashing figure in a real fight, it'll give me a better understanding of this weapon. That way, I can breathe a soul into the model!

C: 寒潮驱逐了入侵者，但泯灭不了它们留下的痕迹，这颗星星的碎片便是其中之一。
E: The Eternal Freeze chased the intruders away, but could not wipe away the traces they left behind. This piece of star shard is one of many left behind.

C: （这应该就是照片上的物件了…把它带回去吧。）
E: (This should be the item in the photo... I'll bring it back.)

C: 既然有人目击到了幽灵船，这很有可能是岁阳作祟，我们肯定要去调查的，不是吗？
E: Since someone has witnessed the ghost ship, it may be a heliobus' doing. We are going to investigate it, no?

C: 有道理……
E: You have a point...

C: …其实是希望故人乘船归来吧？
E: ...But in fact, we are hoping the dead will board the starskiff and return home, no?
Oh...

C: 拍的是风景
E: Just snapping a scenery pic

C: 喂喂喂，荣誉队员，你拿着相机要干什么？快放我进来！
E: Hey hey hey, honorary member. What are you doing with that camera? Let me in!
Oh...

C: 如果在游玩途中遇到些肠胃不适、跌打损伤的小问题，也有我这样超专业的医士为您立刻诊治，这样的好事哪里能找到喔！
E: And if you get into medical trouble — gastrointestinal discomfort, sprained ankle, yadi yada — you'll have a professional doctor right by your side! That's a two-in-one deal!

C: 虽说我在外面事业小成，但我始终爱着这金人巷，终究还是回来了。
E: I had a good career going out on the other worlds, but I always missed the Alley. In the end, I decided to come back.

C: 苏打豆汁儿…你、你不会是故意的吧？
E: Mung bean soda... Is this some sort of prank?

C: 好，夸夸你，你的鼻子都快翘上天了。
E: Geez, don't get too full of yourself...

C: 一不小心在这儿逗留了太久了，{NICKNAME}，我要先回丹鼎司瞧瞧，免得他们担心。你就好好加油吧！
E: Wow, time sure does fly when you're trying to save the world. {NICKNAME}, I need to get back to the Alchemy Commission. Keep up the good work around here!

C: 你好，斯科特。
E: Hello, Skott.

C: 啊，这个，会不会是哪里搞错了呢？
E: Ah! Th—That... must be some kind of mistake.

C: 公司担心码头会还清债务，就想让我做些小动作…可那又咋样？
E: The IPC was worried that the lease for the dock would be paid off, so they had me move some things around... is that so terrible?

C: 我们在规定的还款日内完成了目标金额。这是我们能够继续谈判的基础，也是金人巷商业活力的证明。
E: We reached the required amount by the repayment date. This is the basis for our right to continue negotiations and is a testament to the business viability of Aurum Alley.

C: 我们还见不着会长吗？
E: Will we actually get to see him this time?

C: 请回吧。
E: Please leave.

C: 联动套餐？
E: Crossover meal deals?

C: 金人巷与它的真正主人。
E: Aurum Alley and Its One True Master

C: （我们可以用什么证明？）
E: (Do we have any proof?)

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 商业区开发竞标并不会当场宣布中标结果，但是离场的双方似乎已经心里有数。
E: The result of the Commercial District bid is not announced, but both parties leave with a good idea of the outcome.

C: 这与我们的讨论无关，请收回吧。
E: I can't say what this has to do with our discussions. Please remove it.

C: 我才不给你当枪使。
E: I won't be your pawn.

C: 你怎么又回来了？
E: What are you doing back here?

C: 有云骑军想要带走货物。
E: There was a Cloud Knight who wanna to grab the goods.

C: 好怪！好怪的味道！——呜呃，我还是找个地方把它扔掉吧……
E: Ugh... Oh dear, it smells so funky... Better throw it away in a trashcan.

C: 我明白了，交给我吧。
E: I see. Leave it to me.

C: 你要在这种时候请病假吗？
E: Are you really going to ask for sick leave at a time like this?

C: 关键时期，太卜司缺了谁都不行——但是缺了「生病的青雀」，行！
E: The Divination Commission needs everyone in a crisis like this — except a sick Qingque!

C: 您好，我是太卜司的司库青雀，我很抱歉地通知您，由于前些天我感染了「不打牌我就要死了综合症」，身体状况不佳，需要请一段时间病假进行修养和康复。
E: Hello there, I'm the custodian, Qingque, from the Divination Commission. I sincerely regret to inform you that I am feeling unwell due to contracting the No-Game-No-Life Syndrome, and must request a period of sick leave during which to rest and recuperate.

C: 阿丰已经全部交代了。
E: We have the testimony of A-Feng.

C: 你看看这个。
E: Take a look at this.

C: 不对，<color=#dbc291ff>难道不应该问问金人巷商铺们的意见吗？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Shouldn't you gather people's opinions first?</color>

C: 这可怎么办啊？
E: What am I gonna do?

C: 哎，公司的小动作可真是让人不快。{NICKNAME}，真是太感谢你了，这下茶友们有着落了。
E: *sigh* IPC gamesmanship. It really wears me out. {NICKNAME}, thank you so much. My tea lovers are all settled now.

C: 提升工作效率是违法的事情吗？
E: What's illegal about boosting productivity?

C: 又得麻烦你了，我们开始工作吧。
E: We will be needing your help again. Let's get to work.

C: 诶？机巧鸟呢，我那么大一只的机巧鸟哪儿去了？
E: Hm? Cycrane? Where did a cycrane that size duck off to?

C: 那就是外卖出了问题？
E: So, something is wrong with the takeout?

C: 哎呀，真的假的不重要。反正冠军奖金是真的。
E: *sigh* Who cares if the story's real or not. I'll tell you what, the first prize sure is real.

C: 口气不小！不过你可别小瞧了世玲的委托了。
E: You talk big, but don't underestimate the difficulty of my assignment.

C: 不枉世玲提前打听，小组长平时最喜欢喝的就是咖啡了……
E: Good thing I found out the team leader's fave drink is coffee beforehand... Hehehe...

C: 哼，世玲不是那种过河拆桥的人。你的名字也被我写在实验助手那一栏了，等着站长给你发奖励吧。
E: Hey, I am not the kind of person who forgets those who have helped me. I also noted you down as my experimental assistant, so you can wait for the Lead Researcher to give you your reward.

C: 世玲可不算亏待你吧！要是换成别人做助手，我可不会给他这么好的「大福利」！
E: That's pretty sweet, right? If it weren't for you, I wouldn't have gone through the trouble of preparing such a big bonus for an assistant.

C: 算了，放你一马！下次再逮着你妨碍我工作，可不会轻易饶过…阿嚏！
E: Gah, you're lucky to get away this time! Next time you stand in my way, I won't let you go so eas— Achoo!

C: 那…那我们应该怎么做？
E: So... so what should we do?

C: （拍打柜子）
E: (Thump the wardrobe)

C: 感应仪的反应…
E: The sensor's reading...

C: 虽然翻来覆去就只有那么几句…但好像确实是比较靠谱的科学研究。听一听总没坏处吧？
E: It's always the same sentences... but it does sound like a real scientific study. Wouldn't hurt listening to it, would it?

C: （不过根据之前几次的经验，「正常」也是一种「异常」，还是再勘测一下。）
E: (But according to the past few experiences, "normal" can be a form of "abnormal." I should check it thoroughly.)

C: 我怀疑，应该就是那个「异常」偷走了我的笔记，卖给了某个没文化的势利眼，誊抄整理的过程中就暴露了他的无知！
E: I suspect that "anomaly" stole my notes and sold them to some uneducated brute, and their ignorance was exposed when they copied the notes!

C: 去找艾丽斯小姐吧，她会告诉你该如何同时经营多个展区的。加油！
E: Go ahead and talk to Eris. She will tell you how to manage multiple exhibition areas simultaneously. Keep up the good work!

C: 关于美食庆典…
E: About the food fest...

C: 请允许我介绍本次美食庆典的压轴之作：「彩梦」什锦糖果！
E: Please allow me to introduce the grand finale of this gourmet festival: The "Dreamlight" Mixed Sweets!

C: 这绝对是会影响匹诺康尼甜点史的伟大作品。它就像枚微型梦泡，一颗就是一小段新体验，比梦泡更快速也更安全。
E: This is undoubtedly a masterpiece that will influence the confectionary history of Penacony. It's like a miniature dream bubble, each piece offering a new experience, quicker and safer than dream bubbles.

C: 我想跟你聊聊…
E: I'd like to chat with you...

C: 不过针对这件事，你的同伴们似乎想到了一个计划……
E: In response to this situation, your companions appear to have hatched a plan...

C: 呼…真是累人。调查记者工作的艰辛，想必您也感受到了吧？
E: Phew... this is exhausting. I'm sure you know the hardships of an investigative reporter now, eh?

C: 是你教的好。
E: It's only because you teach well.

C: 其实要做的事还是那样，倾听怪物们的需求，为它们提供想要的饮料。可能的话，尽量陪它们多聊聊。它们很怕寂寞。
E: Actually, your job is pretty much the same — to listen to the needs of the monsters and provide suitable drinks for them. Try talking to them as much as possible. They really hate to be lonely.

C: 要是喊你加水，岂不是得等到嗓子冒烟才能喝到？我这都显示得清清楚楚，比标准晚了半个系统时，杯子里的冰块都化得差不多了！
E: If I want to get a refill, do I have to wait forever? Check out my watch! You're half an hour behind schedule, and the ice in my glass has already melted!

C: 别怕，我来帮你。
E: Don't worry. I'll help you.

C: 汪！不是假的哇，调饮师也看到了……
E: Woof! I'm telling the truth! The drinksmith saw it too...
Uh...

C: 我是列车组的{NICKNAME}。
E: I am {NICKNAME} from the Express Crew.

C: 不许下班！
E: You can't get off work yet!

C: 您能帮忙去看一眼吗……
E: Can I trouble you to go take a look...

C: 没想到您这么快就掌握了梦境动画的制作技法，而且这剪辑气质、演出风格、情节编排——简直和「钟表匠」先生的作品一模一样，太了不起了！
E: I'm surprised you've mastered the production techniques of Dreamscape animation so quickly! Your editing style, performance, and plot arrangement are just like Mr. Watchmaker's. You've done a terrific job!

C: 您谦虚了，我说的绝非溢美之词。
E: You're being modest. Trust me, I don't mean this as flattery.

C: 你还真是爱跑到奇怪的地方游览呢——如果不想被猎犬带走，就请自报一下身份吧。
E: You really have a thing for odd places, huh? Tell me who you are or I'll have you nabbed by the Bloodhounds.

C: 呵呵，您不必开这种玩笑，我很清楚「钟表匠」的身份。
E: Haha, that's quite a sad joke. I'm well aware of whom the Watchmaker is.

C: 他亲口对我说过，他希望钟表小子为人们带来快乐和希望的作品…但这些都是谎言，那家伙总是在影片里加入一些莫名其妙的情节，也不愿跟我解释灵感的来源。
E: He told me he wanted Clockie to be a work that brought joy and hope to people... but it was a lie. That guy had a habit of adding unreasonable plots into the animation and didn't bother to explain how he came about those ideas.

C: 我看过了父亲留在克劳克影业的胶卷，我想知道——他为什么要把<color=#dbc291ff>关于流梦礁的故事</color>拍进动画。
E: I've watched the film reels Father left behind at Clock Studios, and I wondered why he included the <color=#dbc291ff>story about Dreamflux Reef</color> in the animation.

C: 「钟表匠」…你为什么不早点告诉我？
E: The Watchmaker... why didn't you let me know earlier?

C: 下次再说。
E: Maybe next time.

C: 拍摄完毕，效果不错，导演您辛苦了。
E: The filming is complete, and the effect looks good. Thanks for your hard work, Director.

C: （打开宝箱）
E: (Open the chest)

C: 太好了！片场的三位导演似乎都遇到了一些小麻烦，请监制{M#先生}{F#小姐}过去看看吧。
E: Wonderful! The three directors at the set all appear to have run into a little trouble. {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} Executive Producer, please go and lend a hand.

C: {NICKNAME}导演，你很优秀，不考虑加入我们鸢尾花家系吗？
E: Director {NICKNAME}, you're simply outstanding. You ever considered joining the Iris Family?

C: 嘿嘿，你来得刚好，正巧到了咱们《美梦仙踪》最有趣的拍摄段落……
E: Heh heh, just in time for the most interesting shot of Dreamjoy Ascension...

C: 没关系。
E: That's alright.

C: 汽水先生是苏乐达企业跟克劳克影业的联动角色，据说原型是苏乐达的创始人「苏萨先生」。
E: The Mr. Soda character is a co-production between SoulGlad Enterprise and Clock Studios. They say the model for the prototype was based on the drink's creator, Mr. Sousa.

C: 「石头老板每天都让镇民们去挖石头，却只给他们喝鳄鱼池里的脏水，吃沼泽地里的杂草，弄得大家苦不堪言。」
E: "Boss Stone commanded the townsfolk to dig up stones every day, but he only offered them swamp weed and soiled water from the crocodile lagoon as food and drink. Everyone was miserable from it."

C: 石头老板外传的广告上映了。
E: The trailer for Boss Stone's extra story has been released.

C: 啾，折纸小鸟的头领有五个——妃色夫人、草绿经理、赤红大哥、黄金公子，还有蓝色的湛蓝爵士！它们性格不同，也建造了不同的作品！
E: Tweet, there are five leaders of the Origami Birds: Lady Vermilion, Verdant Manager, Boss Red, Young Master Gold, and Dr. Blues! They all have different personalities and make different creations!

C: 这棵老木头不知道正在想些什么，要让他搭理你，就得找点让他转移注意力的消息。
E: Who knows what this old-timer is thinking about. If you want him to pay attention to you, you'll have to come up with something to catch his attention.

C: 他人的爱。
E: The affection of others.

C: 垂死挣扎罢了。
E: Just their death rattle, that's all.

C: 不知不觉都这么晚了…
E: How did it get so late already...

C: 当然！随着游玩进度提升，测试奖励也会逐步解锁。
E: Of course! Test rewards will gradually unlock as you progress through the game.

C: 你描述了一个另辟蹊径的奇妙故事。
E: You tell a marvelous story about finding another way.

C: 也许我们就是无法成功。
E: Perhaps we were never meant to succeed.

C: 我会…站起来，和他一起再次出发。
E: I'm... gonna get back on my feet and keep moving forward.

C: 你们可以选择「枪火」，接受哈努兄弟的试炼；也可以选择「时间」，接受钟表小子的试炼。
E: You have the option to choose "Gunfire" and undergo Brother Hanu's trial, or "Time," where you'll face Clockie's trial.

C: 你是从哪冒出来的？
E: Where did you come from?

C: 「敌人已经来到家门口，我们没有退路，为了美梦小镇的未来——」
E: "The enemy is at our doorstep, and we have no path of retreat. For the future of Dreamville..."

C: 领衔主演
E: Lead Actors

C: 忆域迷因「沉眠」
E: Memory Zone Meme "Dormancy"

C: 还有别的事。
E: Nah, I've got better stuff to do.

C: 天才俱乐部#76螺丝咕姆，模拟宇宙的开发者之一，黑塔应当向你提起过。
E: I'm Screwllum, Member #76 of the Genius Society and one of the developers of the Simulated Universe. Herta should have mentioned my name to you.

C: 学会还有这等高手？
E: Is there such a talented scholar in the Guild?

C: 这场实验会持续相当长的时间，很抱歉不能留在此地与你共勉。但请相信，我会时刻关注你的动态。
E: This experiment will last for a considerable duration, and I apologize for not being able to remain by your side. However, please be assured that I will be monitoring your progress constantly.

C: 为何挥剑…我挥剑是为了击倒敌人！难道不是吗？
E: Why do I wield my sword...? I wield my sword to take down my enemies! I mean what other reason is there?

C: 感觉每次赌约都不太成熟…
E: Your bets always sound so childish...

C: 三月七，现在你觉得自己离你理想的「英雄大侠」更接近了吗？
E: Do you feel any closer to becoming the great hero you've always dreamed of?

C: 你不会把他的情绪吸干了吧？
E: You didn't drain all of his emotions, did you?

C: 嗷呜！嗷嗷嗷——
E: Awooo! Howhowhowooooo...!

C: 要不是遇上了上次的岁阳，我不会意识到「拥有剑法的知识」和「掌握剑法」之间还是隔了太多太多，那不是学习剑法的捷径。
E: If I hadn't run into that heliobus, I wouldn't have understood the sheer distance between my knowledge and mastery of swordplay. That's not a shortcut to learning swordplay at all.

C: 会说几句鸡汤就算提升了？既然你想得这么通透，那你就好好练你的剑吧！
E: Spouting passages from a self-help book makes you all enlightened now? If you really think you're all that, you should be training even harder on your swordplay!

C: 刹那间我回想起，儿时我曾在海边凝望彼方，看到浓雾背后有一盏绿灯若隐若现。后来我才知道，那是那个女孩——拉克什米家的房子。
E: In an instant, I remembered staring out at the sea as a child, glimpsing a faint green light through the thick fog, which turned out to be the home of that girl — Rakshmi.

C: 你这混账！你和佩法那不是争夺飞棍球队队长之位的竞争关系吗？你和自己的竞争对手玩什么朋友游戏？还背他去医院…你还挺会关心人的啊？
E: You idiot! Aren't you and Pephana competing for the captain position on the skydart team? Why are you befriending your own rival? And you even carried him to the hospital...? Heh, you're such a caring guy, aren't you?

C: 爸爸，是我做的。我出卖了你。
E: It was me, Dad. I turned you in.

C: 看来「最扭曲的欲望」也不在这里。
E: Seems like his most twisted desires are not here, either.

C: 可恶啊！可恶的星穹列车！不许发车！
E: Cursed Astral Express! You're not allowed to leave!

C: 但是，请别担心，我能帮助您获得胜利。
E: But please do not worry. I'll help you secure victory.

C: 幻戏里真正的大侠可不会只追求「解气」！
E: True heroes in Immersia don't merely settle for "satisfying!"

C: {NICKNAME}，你也可以讲讲之前金人巷的事。
E: {NICKNAME}, why don't you fill her in on what happened at Aurum Alley earlier?

C: （喂喂！你说错了吧…怎么意外激起了这家伙的自豪感？）
E: (Hey! That's not the right thing to say... You managed to stir up this guy's sense of pride)

C: 呜啊啊啊啊——也不用说的这么过分吧，我也是很努力地在生活了，我也是一个平凡人，你讲这些，难道自己的心就不会痛吗？
E: Wahhhh... That's so mean! I'm just an ordinary person struggling, trying to survive. Don't you feel a twinge of guilt saying nasty stuff like that?

C: 不贵——也就刚好下一顿馆子的成本吧。来来来，三月小姐，请不要客气……
E: It's not too expensive — just about the price of a meal at a restaurant. Come on, Miss March, please help yourself...

C: 谁知道那是从哪个垃圾桶里翻出来的……
E: Who knows which trashcan you rummaged through to get these...

C: 公司的机甲也算是金人，我在想…这里有没有击败公司机甲的灵感。
E: Well, the IPC mechs are aurumaton too, so I was hoping... to find some inspiration here on ways to defeat the IPC mechs.

C: 喂，为什么我也算「好事之徒」啊？
E: Hey, why am I a Busybody too?

C: 哎，现在的年轻人啊…老夫在这里站半天了，却视~若~无~睹啊！
E: My, my, behold the youngsters these days... I've been standing here for a considerable duration, yet NOT A SINGLE SOUL deigns to acknowledge my presence!

C: 公输师傅，「阿休」呢？
E: Master Gongshu, where's A-Xiu?

C: 看来那具金人司阍的身躯里确实藏着一只机巧鸟的机械灵魂，可惜现在它飞走了。
E: So, cycrane's Mechanical Soul indeed once existed in the body of that Aurumaton Gatekeeper. Unfortunately, its essence flew away.

C: 想听我说得简单直白一些吗？我是说，我的稀有以太灵没了。
E: Do you need me to put it in simpler terms? I mean, my rare Aether Spirit is gone.

C: 哪里哪里，这说明剑魔的内心其实也只是个小市民吧。
E: Oh, it's nothing special. It just means that the Blade Demon was a philistine like myself.

C: 小桶、宝力？
E: Litter... Pony?

C: 我原本的名字叫宝力·浮士德·斯威夫特·波特莱尔·科洛迪。你也可以这么叫我，就是有点浪费时间。
E: My real name is Pony Faust Swift Baudelaire Collodi. You can use my real name if you prefer... it just takes up a lot of time.

C: （进入战斗）
E: (Enter Battle)

C: 那些黑影怎么样了？
E: How are the dark shadows now?

C: 卢卡，准备好开始你的第一场比赛了吗？
E: Luka, ready for your first match?

C: 你自己不上场吗？
E: You're not joining in?

C: 我不上，自己打架多疼啊。还是当教练简单，嘿嘿。
E: Nope, I'm not about to suffer in pain. It's much easier being a coach, hehe.

C: 红方则是星际和平公司的债务清算专家——「催讨黄玉」托帕！
E: In the red corner, it's the Liquidation Specialist of the Interastral Peace Corporation — Topaz, the Debt Retriever!

C: 而且…恕我直言，是你轻视我吧？
E: And... with all due respect, it was you who underestimated me, right?

C: 伊戈尔在反物质军团入侵前离开了母星，此后在银河各处参加拳赛时，他会在获胜后向观众演讲，希望引起人们对反物质军团的警觉并拯救自己的家园。
E: Igor left his home planet before the Antimatter Legion invaded. When he participated in all the fighting tournaments across the cosmos, he would address the audience with a speech after he won, hoping that would raise awareness about the Antimatter Legion and save his planet.

C: 你们不是被淘汰了吗？
E: I thought you guys were eliminated?

C: 素裳你理智一点。
E: Please come back to your senses, Sushang.

C: 怎么，借我摸摸不行吗？
E: What, can't I touch it just a little?

C: 我听说他是个「巡海游侠」？这是什么组织啊？
E: I heard he's a Galaxy Ranger? What type of organization is that?

C: 时间也不早了，你早点回家休息吧，要早睡早起才能长大高个哦～
E: It's getting late. You should be getting home. The early bird gets the worm — that's how you grow up big and strong!

C: 你明白吗？只要他想干掉我，我一丁点反抗的余地都没有。归根结底，是波提欧先生饶了我一命。
E: Don't you get it? If he wanted me dead, I wouldn't have had the chance to even muster an ounce of resistance. In short, it was Mr. Boothill who spared my life.

C: 白痴，这世上有什么东西是不被宇宙「拿捏在手心里」的吗？连咱们岁阳的老祖宗都被困在了炉子里，连星神也必须走在命途上。自由？自由很重要吗？
E: You idiot, is there anything in this world that isn't "in the palm of the universe?" Even our heliobi ancestors were trapped in the furnace. Even the Aeons must walk their Path. Freedom? Is freedom really that important?

C: 笑死，还想清除老子？真是倒反天罡！
E: You're kidding. You're trying to get rid of me? This is outrageous!

C: 我不是第一次见到你。你与波提欧对决的那场比赛，我在现场。
E: This isn't my first time seeing you. I was there when you had the duel with Boothill.

C: …另一位「铁臂」？是哪位选手?
E: ...Another "strong arm"? Who could that be?

C: 可惜我们不知道，伊戈尔在演武仪典上是什么样子。
E: It's a pity we don't know how Igor performed at the Wardance back then.

C: 宝了个贝的，她确实强得乱七八糟。
E: But holy forkeroni, she's really strong.

C: 这是我们两人在告别前的合影。尽管那一天他压着沉重的失望，但他依旧尽力笑着。
E: We took this picture before we parted ways. Despite feeling crestfallen that day, he still kept a smile on his face.

C: 刚加入丹轮寺的时候，我也是这么想的。这个宇宙一次次逼迫你使用暴力，在保护平民和寺僧逃亡的路上，要么杀人，要么被杀。
E: When I first joined Claretwheel Temple, I thought the same way too. This universe forces you to use violence time and time again — when we were protecting civilians and monks during their escape, it was kill or be killed.

C: 逻辑：即使驮那锁住了我的武器系统，凭借数据库里残存的歼灭方案，哪怕只用一粒石子……
E: Affirmation: Even if Dhyana locked my weapon system, with the remaining annihilation protocols in my system, even using a single pebble...

C: 协议完成。我将奉行「不害」、「不衍」、「不贪」、「不嗔」、「不放逸」五戒，并信守对奢摩的承诺。
E: Protocol complete. I will adhere to the five commandment of not evoking harm, transgression, greed, hate, or indulgence, and honor my commitment to Samatha.

C: 望诸位回头是岸，勿要染上更多的罪业。
E: May you all turn back from evil before you are tainted by further sin.

C: 请允许我向此行丹轮寺所有殉道的僧侣致哀。
E: Please allow me to mourn for all the monks of Claretwheel Temple martyred on this journey.

C: 死战举烽火，受戒持金锁。身世生杀尽予夺，遍修恶缘结善果。
E: In deadly battle, we raise the beacon's blaze. Under command, we hold the golden binding's embrace. In life, I have claimed and taken other lives, wandering through karma's web for sin to turn into fortune.

C: 么？
E: Mehr?

C: 为了不让支持我们的人失望，卢卡，一定要振作起来啊。
E: You have to get it together, Luka. Do it for everyone supporting us!

C: 就他们这种预测水平，我建议还是不要做媒体了。
E: With such amateur forecast analysis like theirs, I think they should just quit the industry.

C: 哦，那说明真的有问题。
E: Oh, that means there's really a problem.

C: 哈哈哈！就问你怕不怕！
E: Hahaha! The question is, are you afraid?

C: 以前师父训练我的时候，有一个项目就是在院子里徒手抓扑满…哈哈，没想到还真有能用上的一天！
E: Back when my master used to train me, one of the exercises was catching Trotters with my bare hands in the backyard... Haha, I never thought it would come in handy!

C: 你*仙舟粗口*别乐了！
E: Stop *Xianzhou profanity* laughing!

C: 尾巴大爷，你怎么也来参加演武仪典了？
E: Mr. Tail, why are you participating in the Wardance?

C: 说实话，我没有想到这样的战术。也许你应该加入我们的教练组……
E: Truth be told, I hadn't thought of such a thing. Maybe you should join our coaching team...

C: 第二个问题——鉴于卢卡选手人气高涨，想必有许多品牌方都想邀请他合作。请问{NICKNAME}教练，方便透露些商业合作上的信息吗？
E: Second question — given Luka's soaring popularity, many brands must be eager to invite him for a collaboration. Coach {NICKNAME}, can you share some information regarding any commercial partnerships?

C: 你到底是做什么的？
E: What do you exactly do as a job?

C: 例行的采访环节已经结束，接下来该去办正事了。
E: Now that the routine interview is over, it's time to get down to business.

C: 请这位记者朋友提问。
E: Please ask your questions.

C: 有机生命，歼灭！歼灭！歼灭！
E: Organic life. Annihilate! Annihilate! Annihilate!

C: 卢卡选手似乎难以构成有效的反击！该怎么办呢？卢卡选手！
E: Luka seems to be struggling to land a counter! What is Luka going to do?

C: 「桂宝应援会」似乎做好了准备，要彻底终结比赛！
E: Looks like Lil Gui's Support Association is ready to end this match once and for all!

C: 看来是时候稍微认真一点了。
E: Looks like it's time to get serious.

C: 啊？你有自主意识吗？
E: Eh? You're sentient?

C: 你说说，哪有这样独断专行的？多过分啊？
E: You tell me, how could someone act so arbitrarily? That's going too far!

C: 那冠军是谁？
E: Who's the champion?

C: 我已经等不及了。
E: I can hardly wait.

C: 我愿称这个游戏为业界奇迹。
E: I will call this game a game industry miracle.

C: 让我再想想…
E: Give me another minute...

C: 必须演奏原创的曲子？
E: They have to be original?

C: 譬如…乱破小姐的背景信息，她是哪里人，平时喜欢做些什么。知道了这些情报，我才能因材施教、对症下药、百折不挠。如此甚好。
E: Like... Ms. Rappa's background, where she's from, what she usually likes to do. With this info, I can learn more about her, use the right moves, and eliminate all obstacles. That'd be great.

C: 不不，你误会了，我不是那种庸俗的人，我对乱破小姐的欣赏是一种对美好事物的向往！
E: No no, you're mistaken. I'm not a sleazeball, and my admiration for Ms. Rappa is a kind of pining for something beautiful!

C: …忍之都。
E: ...The Ninja Capital.

C: 到我们出场的时候了！
E: It is time for us to make our entrance!

C: ——盛会巨星！音乐派对还在进行中，校园里好玩的东西可多啦。特意到舞台旁边来，是有什么事吗？
E: Festive Superstar! The music party is still ongoing, and there are still many things to do around the campus. Is there something you need since you specifically came by the stage?

C: 准备乐队演出。
E: Prepare for the band performance.

C: （写下幽默的寄语）
E: (Write a witty message)

C: 我得到了折纸小鸟的认可了！
E: I was acknowledged by the origami birds!

C: ——盛会巨星！我提供的情报没错吧！有遇见什么好玩的事情嘛？
E: ...Festive superstar! The info I got you was right on the money, wasn't it? Did you encounter anything fun?

C: 啊，说到这个，我想起来了。前段时间从车站经过的时候，好像听到有演出的声音…水平不好说，但风格…很有特色！
E: Ah, speaking of which, that reminds me. When I was passing by the station a while back, I thought I could hear sounds of a performance... It wasn't all that great, but its style... was unique!

C: （跟上垃圾桶的节奏…？）
E: (Keep up with the trashcan's beat...?)

C: 我还有别的事。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: 到现在还要说奇怪的话，那你就继续在这玩无聊的忍者扮演游戏吧！
E: You're still saying weird stuff like that even now? Then you can stay here and play your boring ninja game without me!

C: 你还真信啊？
E: You really believed that?

C: 大家都回来了，我很欣慰。
E: Everyone's back. This is such a relief.

C: 哼，我之前说的并没有错。尽管…她也在以自己的方式追逐音乐。
E: Hmph, it's not that what I said was wrong. Although... she is also pursuing music in her own way.

C: 我想，艾尔菲同学应该不是那种不守信用的人…吧？
E: I don't think Arfey would betray us like that... right?

C: 我要成为乱破小姐的门徒，成为忍者！
E: I want to become Miss Rappa's disciple! I want to become a ninja!

C: 用真言回击！
E: Retort with the truth!

C: 「缭乱」要在最终作战的演台登场，将我等演奏的超绝•音律传递给所有观众！
E: The Dazzling Ninja will ascend the stage of the final show, to deliver the Ultimate Sound of our performance to the masses!

C: 收到收到。
E: Got it.

C: 只要乱破忍首一声令下，我们立刻拥护她为新的谐乐学院代表！
E: As long as Head Ninja Rappa gives the order, we will immediately support her as the new representative of Charmony Academy!

C: 说实话吧，我和那些汽水瓶进行了场比赛，这就是获胜的奖励。
E: To be honest, I competed against the soda bottles, and this is my reward for winning.

C: 嗯，加油！
E: Yeah, you can do it!

C: 如果学校打算更换乐队，不让你们上台…我、我会为你们声援的！
E: If the school intends to change bands and prevent you from performing... I-I will cheer you all on!

C: 嗯！和我们一样受欢迎！
E: Yeah! Just as popular as us!

C: 契波
E: Czipo

C: 我观察了下，根本没什么有竞争力的对手，同题材的游戏更是没有，应该是稳了。
E: I've noticed that there's no good competition at all in this category, and games with a similar theme are basically nowhere to be found. The prize is pretty much in the bag.

C: 不怕。我等会就发个贴，号召我的粉丝去冲他，看他还敢不敢说话。
E: It's fine. I'll make a post later and rally my fans to ratio him. Let's see if he dares to talk then.

C: 所以改行来做游戏了？
E: So you changed professions and made games instead?

C: 哼哼哼！这下知道本姑娘的厉害了吧！
E: Heh-heh-heh! Now you know my prowess!

C: 啊？姬子又打算在餐饮的道路上「开拓」了？
E: Eh? Himeko's going to trailblaze on the gastronomic path again?

C: 没想到杨叔过去的经历，竟然有这么曲折离奇。真是越来越佩服你了！
E: I never knew Mr. Yang's past was so full of twists and turns. I'm starting to admire you even more!

C: 不必太当真。这毕竟是动画，有不少夸张演绎和艺术加工。
E: No need to take them seriously. It's just an animation — plenty of embellishments and creative polish went into it.

C: 啊哈哈！突然想起来，我有一张「沃霍尔美食舰队」满<unbreak>300</unbreak>返<unbreak>1000</unbreak>的开业酬宾优惠券，再过3个系统时就过期了！舰队离我们有点远，我们得赶紧出发了！
E: Ahaha! I suddenly remembered that I've got a grand opening promotion coupon for the Warhol Gourmet Fleet! Spend <unbreak>300</unbreak> in food gets you <unbreak>1000</unbreak> off your bill! And it expires in 3 system hours! The fleet's quite far from us, so we have to set off now!

C: 原来是星际行商的广告啊…我们要不要看看他们有什么货？
E: It's a traveling merchant ad... Shall we see what they've got?

C: 可那是半价礼金耶！我们先看看货再说吧～
E: But they're giving out half-off! Let's take a look first before deciding, c'mon!

C: 我的手速就是为抢票而生的！
E: My reflexes were born to grab tickets!

C: 不久后……
E: Moments later...

C: 唉，你们更有耐心，我们更追求效率。如果当初我们对调一下队伍划分就好了。
E: *sigh* You all had more patience, and we were more efficient. It would've ended up better if we had switched jobs.

C: 这不怪丹恒，我也趁乱踢了几脚。
E: That's not Dan Heng's fault. I also took the opportunity to get a few kicks in.

C: 有道理！这么大规格的比赛，当然要用真名打响名头。
E: Sounds good! I should use my real name for recognition in such a major competition.

C: 义不容辞！
E: For sure!

C: 不错，满分…如果去掉「有心事」的话。这个谜题，看来过于简单了。
E: Not bad, perfect score... if you remove "something on their minds." It appears that this riddle was too easy.

C: {NICKNAME}，这回就交给摄影助理你来拍吧~
E: {NICKNAME}, I'll leave it to you for this shot!

C: 啊，拍得真好啊…我又回想起了决定成为演员的那天。那天，也像今天一样阳光明媚。谢谢你们，让我们回想起了如泪水般晶莹剔透的初心…暂且告辞！
E: Ah, very nice shots... I'm reminded of the day I decided to become an actor. Like today, it was a bright sunny day. Thank you all for reminding us of our aspirations, so clear as crystal tears... Farewell for now!

C: 睡蕉小猴…
E: Slumbernana Monkey...

C: 「百变美少女的多重身份」。
E: "Maiden's Myriad Masks."

C: 知更鸟保持着专业的微笑。趁着摄影机移开的空挡，朝你们眨了眨眼。
E: Robin maintains a professional smile, and flashes a wink at you all when the cameras aren't on her.

C: 画个圈——圆形阵。
E: Draw a circle. A circle formation.

C: 云璃问清了事情原委……
E: Yunli finds out what's going on...

C: 唔！你们——
E: Uh! You guys—

C: 闭幕式到哪个环节了？
E: Where's the closing ceremony up to?

C: 接下来，就是本届摄影展的最后一个奖项——「最佳新人奖」。
E: Next up is the final award of this photography exhibition — the Best New Artist award.

C: 就让这张合影，成为摄影展的压轴之作吧！
E: We'll have this group photo be the grand finale for this exhibition!

C: 我在听，你继续说。
E: I'm listening. Please continue.

C: 大家都是这么说的，乌拉尼娅这种没爸没妈的孤儿，接触后会染上不幸……
E: Everyone thinks this way. An orphan like me without parents... only bad luck will follow if you stay around me...

C: 我愿为你拭去心中的迷雾——请重拾你的神格，回归往昔的荣耀；从此黑潮便不再可畏，明日将照耀翁法罗斯的大地。
E: I am willing to disperse the fog in your heart. Please reclaim your divinity and return to the path of glory. The black tide will not be feared henceforth, and tomorrow will shine upon the great land of Amphoreus.

C: 小家伙们的外形特征和性格都各不相同，说不定会碰上你特别中意的！
E: They all look different with unique personalities. There just might be one you fancy!

C: 工作做不好，名次也提不上去。摊上你们这群没用的东西，算我倒霉！
E: Your ranking won't go up if you don't do a good job. Just my luck running into you useless lot!

C: 嘿，我要的不多，十万利衡币足矣。塔兰顿在上，自会见证这笔交易的公正！
E: Heh, I don't want much, just a hundred thousand Balance Coins for them. Talanton above will witness the fairness of this deal!

C: 我收到了权限转让的申请。所以，你们谁是这只奇美拉小队新的管理员？
E: I received a request to transfer authority. So who's the new administrator for this chimera squad?

C: 就算是累趴下的奇美拉，只要想到奥赫玛的繁荣，也会不由自主地高昂起头！
E: Even if we work ourselves to the bone, we will hold our heads up high when we think about Okhema's prosperity!

C: 三周内，让我们见见真章——
E: Three weeks, then we'll see who truly stands above the other...

C: 做得不错。我果然没有看错人。
E: Well done. I knew I didn't get the wrong person.

C: 嗷呜，这是我们的工作。
E: Awoo, it's our job.

C: 它好开心的样子…
E: It looked really happy...

C: 这段时间真是辛苦灰宝了。我也想每天舒舒服服地泡在浴池里，喝着清爽的秘酿，然后听学者们讲述那些沿海百邦的奇妙见闻。
E: It's been tough on you too during this time. I also want to soak in a bath all day long, sip on some cooling ambrosia, then listen to scholars recount wondrous stories of myriad Seaside States.

C: 最近的战绩，我都看到了。能胜过缇宝大师，很不错，有成为我对手的价值。
E: I have noticed your recent results. It's impressive that you've ousted Master Tribbie, to be worthy of being my rival.

C: 哼，到底是什么宝贝，能让三重命途裹得严严实实的？等把他俩从里面捞出来，我可得好好盘问盘问。
E: Hmph, what kind of wonder could possibly cover up three Paths in such a waterproof way? I've gotta thoroughly interrogate those two when I get them out of there.

C: 来吧，我将给予你树庭中最伟大的宝藏。
E: Come. I shall bestow upon you the greatest treasure of the Grove.

C: 多说无益，年轻人，准备踏入知识的河流吧。
E: Excessive words are not necessary here, young one. Prepare to tread forth into the river of knowledge.

C: 或许，就像主角要配球棒一样，哪怕是模拟的，差分宇宙也和晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号更配吧。
E: Maybe like how a protagonist must have a baseball bat, the Divergent Universe is much more compatible with The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand even if it's a simulation.

C: 接下来对战的双方，是{NICKNAME}选手和由云石天宫知名沐浴皂品牌「超级英雄」冠名赞助的…提摩斯选手……
E: Up next, the battle is between contestants {NICKNAME} and Timos, who is sponsored by Superhero... the Marmoreal Palace's renowned bath soap brand...

C: {NICKNAME}选手，要直接进入下一轮比赛吗？你的对手已经准备好了。
E: {NICKNAME}, ready for the next round? Your opponent is ready.

C: o((•ω‡= )o「死亡何时而至，我等得有些心焦了」)∋
E: o((•ω‡= )o "When will death come for me? My patience is wearing thin." )∋

C: 嗷呜，我必须好好教训一下它！
E: Awooo, I'll make sure to teach it a lesson!

C: 嗷呜～你这小海豹还怪好的嘞。
E: Awooo~ You're pretty good for a baby seal.

C: 什么情况？！
E: What's going on here!?

C: 阿波菲斯当众讲述了奖杯被窃的始末……
E: Apophis relates the tale of how the trophy was stolen to the audience...

C: 嗷呜嗷呜，风堇，你把泡泡的心思全部看穿了。
E: Awoo-awoo, Hyacine, you read my mind like an open book!

C: 过去，泡泡一直很害怕失败，一旦失败了，我所有的骄傲都会摔碎一地，但是——
E: In the past, I was so afraid of losing. Once I lost, all my pride would shatter across the floor, but...

C: 我就知道，灰宝是泡泡心中真正的「大英雄」。
E: I knew it. Grayie is the true great hero in Bubbles' heart.

C: 阳光有些刺眼，不过…你早有准备——眼罩，正是为了此刻而存在的。
E: The sun is a bit blinding, but... you came prepared — your eye mask is just for this moment.

C: 你变成这样活蹦乱跳、会说会笑的小海豹，基础概率是<unbreak>0.6%</unbreak>。
E: The base chance of you turning into a lively, speaking, and laughing baby seal is <unbreak>0.6%</unbreak>.

C: 我就是黑厄，看啊！我与这些归降于我的小海豹叛徒们，组成了「黑厄势力」！
E: I am Pie-non. Behold my legion of baby seal turncoats! Together, we are Pie-non's Legion!

C: 我本来就是入侵者，何来叛变一说？
E: I was always the invader. There was never any side-switching.

C: 虽然我不知道你为什么会躺在这，不过赶早不如赶巧，我们正好在聊——
E: I don't know how you ended up here, but better now than never. We were just talking about —

C: 对不起，我已决心不参加比赛…
E: Sorry, but I've decided to call it quits...

C: 那小飞儿看看*我们*手上的金币够不够？嘿，接着——
E: Then, see if we have enough gold coins for you here, Little Ciphy. Catch!

C: 这是好心吗？这是我收了钱。
E: Kindness? Nope. Simple transaction.

C: 嗷呜……
E: Awooo...

C: 巴特鲁斯，你要为我，偷下胜利，作为补偿。
E: Bartholos, take the victory for me, as my compensation.

C: …别谦虚了，{NICKNAME}选手，恐怕巴特鲁斯也未必能让你使出全力。
E: ...Don't be humble, {NICKNAME}. Even Bartholos might not be able to bring out your full power.

C: 感受到大家炽热的目光。
E: I can feel everyone's eager, burning stares.

C: 呵呵，不如就把它当成庆典的主题游戏吧。
E: Heheh, why not make it the featured game of the ceremony.

C: 在测试版的基础上，我们对项目整体进行了调优与迭代，并丰富和扩充了玩法功能。
E: We've optimized and iterated the overall project based on the beta while adding and expanding gameplay features.

C: 好像…公司说他是通缉犯。
E: I think... the IPC said he's a wanted criminal.

C: 对啊，「黑•粉」号是特意为佩佩定制的。
E: Yep, the "Hertadore" was specially customized for Peppy.

C: 佩佩想玩赛车很久了，至于我…过来给黑塔空间站打打广告，算是工作休闲两不耽误。
E: Peppy's been wanting to race for a while. As for me... I'm just here to advertise for Herta Space Station. Work–life balance, you know?

C: 关于下一场比赛，有说法吗？
E: Any intel on the next race?

C: 来，麻烦您看下镜头——恭喜您夺得冠军！此刻的心情一定非常激动吧？您有什么话想对现场的观众和屏幕前的粉丝们说吗？
E: Here, please look at the camera — congratulations on winning the championship! I imagine you must be so excited right now! Do you have anything to say to the audience at the venue and at home?

C: 一切经营费用，一切经营管理，都不需要您亲自操心…您只需要在这里每天打游戏，躺着挣钱就可以了！
E: No need to worry about any expenses or management headaches... Just show up, play some games, and collect your earnings while chilling out!

C: 你可别嫌多，这「百大不可思议」每年还会更换呢。
E: You think that's a lot? They refresh the "Top <unbreak>100</unbreak> Mysteries" list every single year.

C: 这…不是吧……
E: No... Boothill!

C: 那么恶灵式神•妖鸟阁下请遵守与在下之约定，尽公平公义之忍道！
E: Then, Evil Spirit Demon Bird, I ask you to honor our pact — uphold the just and honorable way of the ninja!

C: 噗。
E: Pfft.

C: 来都来了，去好好玩玩吧！
E: Well, since we're here, might as well enjoy ourselves!

C: 机械仪式，赛博魔术。
E: Mechanical rituals. Cyber magecraft. Same thing.

C: 总而言之，改造后的「圣杯」保留了原有的对抗逻辑，以及匹诺康尼十二时刻的残存信息。
E: Anyway, the modified Holy Grail still carries the original competition's logic, along with the lingering data of the Penaconian Twelve Hours.

C: 要久违地来一杯吗？我请客。
E: How about a long-overdue drink? My treat.

C: 许久之前，匹诺康尼。
E: Penacony. Long ago.

C: 前半段还行，后面就实在太恶趣味了。
E: The first half is fine, but the rest is too tasteless.

C: 她的眼睛一眨一眨，好像在对你说话，但这个信息含量是不是有点密集了？
E: Her blinking eyes seem to be speaking to you, but isn't this a bit too much to take in all at once?

C: （趁着真理医生向素裳暗授机宜的工夫，给调饮起个名好了。）
E: (While Dr. Ratio enlightens Sushang, might as well name the drink.)

C: 这、这是为什么？你不想变成我吗？
E: Wh—Why? Don't you want to become me?

C: 一位悲悼伶人和假面愚者在酒馆相遇了。几杯调饮下肚，悲悼伶人开始哭诉起来。
E: A Mourning Actor and a Masked Fool walk into a bar. After a few drinks, the Actor starts sobbing.

C: 规则，就是用来打破的！
E: Rules are made to be broken!

C: 哦，对了，亲爱的开拓者，听舒翁女士说，您正忙于钻研「特调配方」，我对此很感兴趣。既然您现在有空闲，或许我有幸能品尝一杯？
E: Oh, right, dear Trailblazer, I heard from Miss Siobhan that you've been working on some "Signature Recipes." That piqued my interest. Since you're free now, may I have the honor of tasting one?

C: …我就不信你每次都能这么幸运。
E: ...I doubt you'll get this lucky every time.

C: 你的悉心指导。
E: Your careful guidance.

C: 是啊。财富、计谋、强运，这些说到底只是工具。想要致胜，最为关键的永远是「人的力量」。
E: Indeed. Wealth, schemes, and luck are merely tools in the end. If you want to achieve victory, the most crucial factor will always be the "power of people."

C: 如此复杂的项目，调动到公司内外的很多资源。不过，牵头的是我们战略投资部，博识学会承担了主要的研发工作。
E: This complex project has mobilized many resources both inside and outside the IPC. However, our Strategic Investment Department is taking the lead, with the Intelligentsia Guild handling the main R&D work.

C: 比如现在这个情况，菜鸟们找不到古代遗物就选择放弃了，殊不知遗迹下其实另藏玄机……
E: Take this current situation for example. Them rookies will just quit once they can't find any relics, but little do they know that there's a deeper enigma hidden beneath the ruins...

C: 「情势百般危急，{NICKNAME}与{F#她}{M#他}的同伴不得不暂且退避，再思良策…」
E: "The situation grew so grave that {NICKNAME} and {F#her}{M#his} companions concocted a genius plan..."

C: 「书中暗表，这是丹鼎司初代司鼎暗藏在炉鼎中的禁制。谁想从中拿出灵丹妙药，谁就要被送到一处幻境，通过试炼。」
E: "The book implies that this is a hidden containment mechanism in the elixir cauldron, designed by the first Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission. Anyone trying to take the elixir of life would first be transported to a fantasia to undergo the trial."

C: 稍等我歇会儿…
E: Let me catch my breath a sec...

C: 「进入炉鼎」
E: "Our hero enters the elixir cauldron."

C: 你闯入鳞渊境，就是要向我讨要龙尊的力量吗？可笑，这等东西岂是外族人所能讨要的吗？
E: Did you break into Scalegorge Waterscape to try and beg me for the power of the high elder? You're joking! Is this some kind of outworlder joke?

C: 你是尊雕像？
E: Are you a statue?

C: 这有什么奇怪的？仙舟还有话本小说里写一公子哥刚出生嘴里就含着一块玉兆，能算前生后世五百年呢！
E: What's so weird about that? There's another Xianzhou classic tale that tells of a rich boy born with a silver spoon — or rather, jade abacus — in its mouth. The newborn could make divinations five hundred years back and into the future!

C: 有什么新故事吗？
E: Any new stories?

C: 看来不是这个……
E: This doesn't seem to be the one...

C: 除此之外，我还随手写了一些您在仙舟各处冒险挑战的外传小故事，您得空可以来我这儿读一读，评说一番，也好让我能把它编篡进咱们这一整出《开拓豪侠传》的话本里。
E: Aside from that, I have also written down some side stories of your adventures on the Xianzhou. Feel free to come have a read when you have the time, give some comments, and help me include them into the Legend of the Trailblazer.

C: 你这是要改行了？
E: Do you want to become a storyteller yourself?

C: 相逢即是缘，干脆就找阁下做次口味测试吧，也算是名正言顺地请你喝两杯。
E: But now that you're here, why not try my new recipes? Feel free to enjoy them. It's on the house.

C: 我听商会的明曦姑娘提起过你，你们是打算用码头把各家店的货发到其他地方去。
E: I heard about you from Mingxi of the Merchant Guild. You're planning to use the docks to ship the stores' goods to other delves.

C: 等等，我先把「真假鉴宝」节目的宝贝请出来——
E: Hold on a second. Let me show you the antiques we'll be using in the event.

C: 哈——哈欠…看来还不能睡，等会儿再打一把，赢一把就睡……
E: Yaaawn... Looks like I can't sleep yet. Battle me again! If I win, I'll get some sleep...

C: 忙了一天，终于能休息了，来跟我打一场对战吧！
E: It's been a long day, finally I get to relax. Come, have a battle with me!

C: …还请二位多多关照。
E: ...If there's anything I can do for you, don't hesitate to ask.

C: 再者，如果二位客人连这种等级的以太灵都解决不了…那你们可能确实不太适合这款游戏。
E: If you have trouble handling these beginner spirits... it might indicate that this game isn't the best choice for you.

C: 对啊，他们提到了托帕小姐的名字！到底是怎么一回事？
E: Yeah, they mentioned Miss Topaz! What's that all about?

C: 就叫它「泡泡」吧。
E: I've got it! Let's call them "Bubbles!"

C: 就决定是你了！
E: Nah, sounds fine to me!

C: 就叫它「扑满侠」吧。
E: I've got it! Let's call them "Turbo Trotter!"

C: 我强烈建议你们先把队伍填满再继续前进——凭你们现在的状态，恐怕很难对付后面的挑战者和冠军候补哦。
E: I strongly suggest you bolster your team before moving forward. Dealing with the upcoming challengers and championship contenders could be tough without a full roster.

C: 没问题！规则其实很简单——首先，我对铁卫的<color=#dbc291ff>照雪灯炉</color>进行了小小的改装，让它们可以相互传递热量……
E: No problem! The rules are actually quite simple. To start with, I've made some minor tweaks to the <color=#dbc291ff>Snowshine Lamps</color>, making it possible for heat to be transferred between them...

C: 当然！毕竟这也是{RUBY_B#欢愉}庆典{RUBY_E#}的一部分——每座决胜乐园的谜题都有所不同，各位就尽情享受这场盛会吧！
E: Of course! After all, it's just another part of the {RUBY_B#The Elation}tournament{RUBY_E#}. Each Victory Zone has its own unique puzzles. But don't worry yourselves too much — the most important thing is that you have fun!

C: 嗯…你是谁？决胜乐园的挑战者吗？
E: Hm, and you are? Victory Zone challengers, I presume?

C: {RUBY_B#「神秘」的追随者}谜语人{RUBY_E#}？不像吧…我看他那副面具倒更像是{RUBY_B#「欢愉」的追随者}假面愚者{RUBY_E#}……
E: {RUBY_B#Followers of Enigmata}The Riddlers{RUBY_E#}? I don't think so... Judging by his appearance, it's more likely he's linked to the {RUBY_B#Followers of Elation}Masked Fools{RUBY_E#}...

C: 我们也锻炼了很久，这次一定不会再输给你！
E: We've been training hard too, there's no way we're losing to you this time!

C: 难怪戴着面具…
E: So that's why he's wearing a mask...

C: 虽说所有以太灵的数据都是由玩家上传的，但项目组会对这些信息进行调整，以便每只以太灵都能服从玩家的命令。
E: While it's true that all Aether Spirit data is uploaded by players, the project team fine-tunes this data to ensure that each Aether Spirit follows player commands.

C: 我记得乔瓦尼先生之前说过，上届冠军首席被那位「玩家」给击败了……
E: Now that I think of it, Mr. Giovanni mentioned that the previous tournament champion was defeated by the elite player...

C: 他们人好多啊…{NICKNAME}，你可要找准时机再动手哦，看你表演啦～
E: Look how many there are, {NICKNAME}! Better make sure you choose the moment to strike. Don't let me down~

C: 我把新的<color=#dbc291ff>藏宝图</color>发给你，我们去找下一个<color=#dbc291ff>凭证</color>吧。
E: I'm sending you the next <color=#dbc291ff>treasure map</color>, let's go find the next <color=#dbc291ff>pass</color>.

C: （没想到《以太战线》连谛听都能玩明白……）
E: (I didn't realize "Aetherium Wars" can even be mastered by a Diting...)

C: 喂，这次可不会让你再赢得那么容易了哦。
E: Hey, I'm not letting you win without a fight this time.

C: 你别说，居然还真不错——强力<color=#dbc291ff>「以太拓展芯片」</color>还有限定的<color=#dbc291ff>「以太灵」</color>！
E: No way, they're actually pretty good! There are powerful <color=#dbc291ff>Aether Expansion Chips</color>, as well as limited-edition <color=#dbc291ff>Aether Spirits</color>!

C: 倒也不奇怪，反正战胜冠军候补的也不会有几个人…总之，你要是能拿到资格徽章，就来找我领福利吧。
E: I guess that makes sense, there won't be many people that can defeat Championship Contenders, after all... Anyway, if you manage to get yourself some Mastery Marks, come to me for your benefits.

C: 自从他当上了「星际决胜庆典」的运营负责人，每天都安排超额的工作，专挑下班时间开会，半夜打电话聊方案，我们这些员工没有一天能睡个安稳觉。
E: Ever since he became head of operations at the "Interastral Tournament Festival," he's arranged overtime every day, set up after-work meetings and started calling in the middle of the night to discuss plans! We employees can't even get a good sleep!

C: 阿丽娜…你就瞧好了吧，我将来一定也会成为像开拓者{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}一样厉害的以太战线玩家！
E: Alina... you just wait and see, I'm gonna become a super-duper Aetherium Wars player one day just like {M#him}{F#her}!

C: 有点疲惫…
E: I'm exhausted...

C: 她有什么目的？
E: What are her intentions?

C: 哼哼，哼！哼哼！
E: Oink, oink! Oink!

C: 太不容易了，大姐头！
E: If you only knew what it took to find you!

C: 头儿！恭喜你们成为真正的冠军首席！
E: All hail the champion!

C: 论战斗，我也是很靠谱的啊！
E: Hey, I'm a reliable squad member too!

C: 《偶然拍到了灵异照片》，这背景也太假了…《一直考不过星槎驾照是不是被诅咒了？》，别给自己找借口了……
E: "When You See It You'll Scream!" That's so cliche, with the arrow and everything... "Failed Your Starskiff Pilot Test? You're Cursed!" Tsk, people are always looking for excuses...

C: 我…不关心这些。倒是你…好不容易从洪炉里逃了出来。眼下有的岁阳在罗浮各处逍遥快活。你却要被困在这儿寸步难行…你甘心吗？
E: I... I don't care about that at all... but I can't help but notice — you managed to escape the furnace, and now you're stuck here, unable to move an inch, while the other heliobi are roaming around the Luofu enjoying themselves... Must be quite frustrating.

C: 自从「燎原」与将军大战落败后，十王司受命封印分灵碎片。大部分岁阳都被收入造化洪炉，为其贻害而赎罪。
E: After Ignamar was defeated by the general in a great battle, the Ten-Lords Commission was ordered to seal away the heliobi fragments. To make them atone for their actions, most of the heliobi were sealed inside the Creation Furnace.

C: 网络是很强大的。
E: The Internet is a very powerful tool.

C: 嗯…可能是跑了，也可能是四分五裂，彻底不再是「尾巴」了…但无论如何，我想知道它的下落。
E: Mm... I guess so. Maybe he ran away, or broke into tiny pieces... Either way, I'd like to know what happened to him.

C: 能听到笑声，但完全找不到人在哪里……
E: I can hear laughter, but where's it coming from...?

C: 不用愧疚，白露小姐，就当是做了一场自由玩耍的梦吧，这不是你的错。
E: No need to feel bad, Lady Bailu. You were in a dreamworld — none of it was your fault.

C: …怎么可能推算出全部未来？
E: ...How is it possible to divine every future?

C: 就像眼下，你所有的选择不过是——「挥舞球棒，向我冲来」、「大声却徒劳地驳斥我」、「一语不发地陷入沉默」这么几种。
E: Even in this very moment, your options are few: Ready your bat and charge at me, argue with me loudly and futilely, or fall into silence.

C: 本座倒是不在意你们怎么编派，只要隐去姓名和身份就行了。
E: I don't care how you spin the story, so long as you leave my name and identity out of it.

C: 这么说你知道太卜的事？
E: Did you hear about the Master Diviner?

C: 我也累坏了，晚些在群里聊吧。
E: I'm totally beat, too. Chat more in the group later.

C: 记得回去分享一下账号情况。
E: Remember to share the account updates.

C: 青雀小姐，我刚才偷偷盘算了一下，这道题确实只有一个解答。
E: Qingque, I've been thinking through the calculations for this puzzle — there really is only one solution.

C: 与我一较高下！
E: Duel me!

C: 岁阳在蛊惑你。
E: A heliobus is leading you astray.

C: 比如眼下的我，心无旁骛，从这剑阵中看到了变强的可能。对吧，「熔炬」老师？
E: Take me, for example... At this moment, I am free of all distractions... and I see the potential for greatness in these swords. Isn't that right, Master Apyra?

C: 倒是我，得多谢你在比剑时挣扎和手下留情了……
E: It should be me thanking you for holding back during our battle...

C: 那么，我和彦卿向各位告辞了。
E: Well then, Yanqing and I will take our leave now.

C: 果然！
E: I knew it!

C: 不知道这燎原的碎片以后还会与多少位罗浮将军交手，如此想来，作为一介武人还有些羡慕。
E: One cannot help but wonder how many Luofu generals this fragment of Ignamar will face in times to come. Speaking purely from the perspective of a warrior, I must say I feel somewhat envious.

C: 不说话，装哑巴，呸呸呸！
E: Playing dumb? Don't wanna talk? Ugh!

C: …那、那我能怎么办嘛，我也觉得浮烟在骗我，但要是错过就找不到了怎么办？
E: ...What other choice did I have? I suspected that Cirrus was deceiving me, but the thought of losing you forever was... unbearable.

C: 尾巴将藿藿的母亲带到了藿藿身边
E: Tail takes Huohuo's mother back to her.

C: 我还想问你呢…
E: I was going to ask you the same thing...

C: 你这懦夫，不敢和棋鬼大人对弈！
E: Coward! You wouldn't dare challenge the Chess Ghost!

C: 以后不会都这么麻烦吧？
E: Is it gonna be this troublesome every single time?

C: 那个…嗯，您、那个……
E: That, uh... You, uh...

C: （当面发一下私信吧）
E: (Send him a PM right then and there)

C: 文远…如果你所期望的是与我远走高飞，我会帮你实现的，我不会让任何人阻碍我们，就算是十王司也不行！
E: Wenyuan... If what you want is to escape with me to somewhere far away, then I can help you do that. I won't let anyone get in our way — not even the Ten Lords!

C: 谢谢你们，我知道你们有十王司的使命，我由衷感激你们的决定。
E: Thank you. I know you have your orders from the Ten-Lords Commission. I sincerely appreciate your decision.

C: 走吧……
E: Let's go...

C: {NICKNAME}也一起吧。
E: Come with us, {NICKNAME}.

C: 这也不奇怪啊？
E: You don't think so?

C: 就在此时，青雀的语声突然顿止，笑容凝固在了她的脸上。
E: Right at this moment, Qingque's voice suddenly cut out and her face froze in a fixed smile.

C: 你相信那些岁阳，不如相信我是燧皇。
E: If those heliobi are worth trusting, then I'm the Flint Emperor!

C: 等等，这「探访凶宅」是绝佳的题材，不能错过啊。
E: Wait! "Haunted house investigation" is perfect material. We can't miss out on this!

C: 听到了，我有点不想救它了。
E: I heard it. I suddenly don't really want to rescue them.

C: 要是能打开，肯定里面藏着好东西。
E: If we can open it, I'm sure there's something good in there.

C: …哦，房东雷诺。嗯？你们说…是雷诺吗？
E: ...Oh. Renault, the landlord. Wait. You're talking about... Renault?

C: 马上就收了你。
E: I'm taking you right now.

C: 啊，打开了。
E: Ah, it opened!

C: 好无聊的密码。
E: What a dull password!

C: 我本来想去，但港口四下无人，我有种背后发毛的感觉，就不敢去了。但我又管不住我这该死的好奇心…所以我想拜托你们代我前去赴约。
E: I planned on going but there was nobody at the harbor and I got this feeling, which made my hair stand on end, so I didn't venture out. But I can't control my cursed curiosity... and so I want to ask you to help me go and keep this appointment.

C: 好说好说，只要能从这具肉体里挣脱出来，不必跟一个发癫的家伙绑在一块儿，一切都好说……
E: That's great. That's great... Everything is going to be great, so long as I can get out of this meat-suit and I'm not stuck together with this maniac...

C: 好了，我记得就是这副模样。
E: Good. That's how I remember it.

C: 没想到你的小盒子里藏着这么多美妙的画片，我一不留神就看呆了。
E: I didn't know your little box had so many beautiful pictures, so I got distracted looking at them.

C: 咱们岁阳开始也和她一样纯净、洁白，就像静静燃烧的火焰。我想，或许就是这样才会被她吸引的吧。
E: We heliobi were born as pure and innocent as her, like a quiet burning flame. I guess, maybe that's why I was attracted by her.

C: 无趣的人类！我倒了大霉寄宿在魔阴身里，结果又撞上你们这样的悍匪。
E: Dull humans! I'm unlucky enough to possess a mara-stuck body, and now, I encounter vicious bandits like you!

C: 小家伙说的没错，它不能再大摇大摆地待在仙舟上了。
E: This little fellow is right. It can no longer strut around on the Xianzhou.

C: 我先回列车，你想好了就来和我说一声！
E: I'll return to the Express for now. Let me know once you've made your decision!

C: 你就站在此地，不要走动。
E: Stay here and don't wander around.

C: 看来{NICKNAME}的观众缘还挺好的嘛，诶，{NICKNAME}你脸怎么这么红！
E: Looks like {NICKNAME} is quite popular with our fans. Hey, {NICKNAME}, why are you blushing?

C: 一会在长乐天见。
E: See you soon in the Exalting Sanctum.

C: 没想到在这里能看到桂乃芬。
E: Never thought I'd see Guinaifen over here.

C: 没错，就应该这样。等你感受得差不多就来找我吧，我有话想跟你说。
E: That's right. This should be how it's done. Come look for me when you're done basking. I've got something to tell you.

C: （该给这个区域设置什么功能分区好呢？）
E: (What function should we designate for this area?)

C: 我与你一样，防止银河走向它的命运/必然/结局/单一的确定系统/前定和谐。
E: Just like you, I prevent the cosmos from trending toward its own destiny/inevitability/conclusion/single fixed system/predestined harmony.

C: 「我们问——它是谁？广告牌回答：嘀嗒嘀•嗒嘀元帅！」
E: "We inquire, who is it? The billboards reply: It's His Excellency, Marshal Tick-Tock!"

C: 汪。可是…我们的管理员，他……
E: Woof... but our administrator...

C: 啊，我明白了。
E: Ah, I get it.

C: 唉，世界上没有任何地方比得上自己的家。
E: *sigh* There's truly no place like home in the world.

C: 话别说得太早！我曾遇见过不少像你这样的人，自信满满，有几分小聪明就以为能掌控世界，到最后，无一例外都会拜倒在我的脚边。
E: Don't get ahead of yourself! I've met plenty of people like you, all high and mighty, thinking they rule the world. But guess what? they all end up bowing before me.

C: 这儿的环境可真糟糕，空间窄空气闷还不让随便上厕所，可把我给憋坏了，呃…我是说心里头憋。那群穿黑西装的整天看着，休息时间都不给！
E: The environment here is just the worst. The air is so stuffy, and they won't even let me go to the bathroom when I want. They're suffocating me. Oh... I mean emotionally suffocating. Those people in black suits are always watching. They never give me time to rest!

C: （遇到这种没素质的顾客还真是让人恼火啊。）
E: (Rude customers like this really get my blood boiling.)

C: 跟你说也不顶用。<color=#dbc291ff>再给我来个小杯的，甜的，颜色层次清晰的饮料</color>。我的眼光好得很，看不得那些缺乏美感的玩意。
E: It's pointless to tell you. <color=#dbc291ff>Just give me a small glass, I want it sweet with clearly colored layers</color>. I've got a great eye that's allergic to things that lack aesthetics.

C: 怎么，看你满脸不服气的样子，有什么话要说？给你这个机会，说吧。
E: What? What's the matter? Got something to say? Here's your chance. Spit it out.

C: 唉，虽然舒翁的调饮技术是很好，但把店开在这种地方，变成这样也是当然的吧。冷冷清清，无人问津。
E: *sigh* Sure, Siobhan is great at mixing drinks, but given the location, it's only natural that the lounge remains deserted and unattended.

C: 我就是酒吧的接班人！
E: Yeah, I'm the successor of this lounge!

C: 没有人能拒绝我的建议。因为我总是对的。
E: Nobody refuses my offers, because I'm always right.

C: 哼。有点本事啊，别以为这样就结束了，直到我离开这家店为止，你都得为我服务。
E: Hmph, not bad, but this is not the end. You'll need to serve me until I leave this lounge.

C: 要是你手头碰巧…我是说碰巧，有什么饰品，<color=#dbc291ff>能让我回想起剧院里的那些观众，</color>就放上去吧，我想看。谢谢。
E: If you happen to... and I do mean happen to have some decorations <color=#dbc291ff>that can remind me of the audience back at the theater</color>, please put it on. I'd like to see it. Thank you.

C: 唉，未经允许就向旁人揭露自己的伤疤是很失礼的事情。适当地表露悲伤，适当地感到喜悦，适当地接受离别，这对彼此都好。
E: *sigh* It's impolite to expose my wounds without permission. It's better to share sorrows, experience joys, and bid farewell appropriately.

C: 可惜，我的爱早已遗失在了过去。
E: Unfortunately, my love became lost in the past.

C: 算了。问你也得不到答案，人类都很会撒谎，说的话不能算数。
E: Forget it. You wouldn't give an answer even if I asked. Humans are all good at lying, and their words don't hold any water.

C: 你在这工作也有段时间了，是怎么看待这些怪物的？
E: You've been working here for a while. So, what do you think of those monsters?

C: 好像没什么特别的。
E: There's nothing special about it.

C: 想知道的话，就来梦境酒店吧。
E: If you want the answer, come to the hotel in the Dreamscape.

C: …所以才找我来帮忙吗？
E: ...So, that's why you asked me for help?

C: （…已经快到忍耐的极限了。）
E: (...I've almost reached the limit of my endurance.)

C: ——喂！傻狗！嘿嘿嘿，就凭你那可怜的小脑瓜，还想教人呢？
E: Hey! Idiot dog! Heh heh heh. You really want to teach someone with that pathetic brain of yours?

C: 哇嘎嘎，我是个疯子，但我从不害人！咱们认识了这么久，我说过你一句坏话嘛？
E: Wahaha, I'm crazy, but I've never hurt anyone! You and I have known each other for a while. Have I ever said anything bad about you?

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>#@</color><rhythm><color=#eb4d3dff>$%</color><rhythm><color=#eb4d3dff>&#</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>#@</color><rhythm><color=#eb4d3dff>$%</color><rhythm><color=#eb4d3dff>&#</color>

C: 大<rhythm>家<rhythm>好<rhythm>呀
E: Greetings <rhythm>to <rhythm>you <rhythm>all

C: 汪汪汪
E: WoofWoofWoof

C: 主<rhythm>人<rhythm>好
E: Master <rhythm>is <rhythm>good

C: 上<rhythm>班<rhythm>打<rhythm>游<rhythm>戏
E: They <rhythm>play <rhythm>games <rhythm>at <rhythm>work

C: 汪  汪  汪  汪
E: Woof  Woof  Woof  Woof

C: 现在是「我是佩佩」的进阶试炼。
E: This is the advanced trial for "I Am Peppy."

C: 准备开始苏乐达天团的正式表演了！
E: Prepare to begin SoulGlad Idol Group's proper performance!

C: 现在是「雪原留影」的困难难度。
E: This is the Hard difficulty for Snow Plains Photography, tweet.

C: 当立牌出现后，<color=#f29e38ff>按下按键</color>进行射击。
E: When a stand pops up, <color=#f29e38ff>press the button</color> to fire.

C: 说了这么多话，感觉舒坦了不少。再差的酒保也是个酒保，总能陪你聊两句不是。
E: With all that said, I feel way more comfortable. I guess even a bad drinksmith is still a drinksmith who can spare you a word or two.

C: 上头把委托交给猎犬，猎犬家系再把任务交到底下，底下的又把工作外包给我们，我们再替他们招人来干活，拿点「小费」很正常。
E: The Bloodhounds get these tasks from the top brass and then assign them to their agents. The agents then outsource the work to us, and then we help recruit people like you to handle it, so it's only fair that we take a little "tip" for ourselves.

C: 其他小鸟
E: Other Birds

C: 嗯，我原本打算稍微转转，然后就去绿洲的时刻，不过没想到这么巧，竟然遇见了你们，还是两个人一起。
E: Mm-hmm, I was actually planning to go to the Moment of Oasis after wandering a little longer. I wasn't expecting to bump into the two of you — and both at the same time, too.

C: 去呗，之前你不就想和{NICKNAME}合照吗。
E: Go on, didn't you want to take a photo with {NICKNAME} earlier?

C: 这一方面有利于提升卢卡选手的知名度——也就是说，全银河都会看到你「铁臂卢卡」的广告招牌。
E: This role would boost Luka's visibility — "Luka the Strongarm" could become a name featured on billboards throughout the cosmos.

C: 啊？出什么大事了？你先别着急，慢慢说……
E: What's going on? Take a deep breath and tell us slowly...

C: 那就来证明我错了吧——用你的拳头，用你唯一擅长的方式。
E: Prove me wrong with your fists, then — the only way you know how.

C: 欢迎两位。卢卡，你能抛开别人的眼光，出席这次的发布活动，我很高兴。
E: Welcome, both of you. Luka, I'm glad you could overlook the public scrutiny and join us for the event.

C: 我也不知道啊，这两边怎么穿一条裤子里去的，这是唱的哪一出啊？
E: I have no clue... How did these two end up on the same side? What's the deal with this?

C: 这里太吵了，卢卡，咱们换个地方聊聊吧。
E: It's too noisy here, Luka. Let's talk somewhere else.

C: 战略投资部这次来到演武仪典的会场，不是为了争些无关紧要的比赛名次。以这场比赛为契机，获取更多的商业利益，才是我们的目的。铄金先生，相信你也是如此吧？
E: The Strategic Investment Department is here at the Wardance not for some trivial match rankings. Using this match as an opportunity to gain more business benefits is our goal. Mr. Shuojin, don't you feel the same?

C: 可别这么说，我只是在处理一个小小的舆论麻烦。铄金不该为了战胜你，将公司拖入舆论的风波。
E: Please don't say that. I'm just handling a minor public relations issue. Shuojin shouldn't drag the IPC into controversy just to defeat you.

C: 结论：按照之前的估测，如果把模拟宇宙的算力全部集中在一起，仿真度能达到<unbreak>71</unbreak>％以上。
E: Conclusion: According to the previous estimates, if we concentrate all the computational power of the Simulated Universe, we can increase the accuracy to <unbreak>71%</unbreak> or more.

C: 二世为自己打造的衣冠冢，还有墓前的花束。打破了我们一直以来，对反有机方程乃至帝皇的认知。
E: The cenotaph that the Second built for himself and the flowers by the tomb overturned what we thought we knew about the Anti-Organic Equation, or even about the Emperor.

C: 关于「不可知域」…
E: About the Unknowable Domain...

C: 彼时彼刻，刚登上列车时……
E: At that moment, when I first boarded the Express...

C: 谢谢列车长！
E: Thank you, conductor!

C: 快去快回哦，我们在这里等你帕。
E: Come back soon. We'll be waiting for you here.

C: 你看，不踏上旅程，就永远不会知道自己能有什么收获。
E: See, if you don't embark on the journey, you'll never know what you might gain.

C: 为了守护列车的环境，每隔一段时间列车长都会对无名客们的房间进行卫生评比。
E: To maintain the cleanliness of the Express, Pom-Pom periodically conducts hygiene inspections of the passengers' rooms.

C: 拟真幻彩显示屏、拟神经电子脑处理器…真是豪华啊。就连我也想要置办一套了。
E: Realistic holographic display screens, neuro-synthetic electronic brain processors... It's truly luxurious. Even I want to get a set for myself.

C: 可能是习俗不同吧，在你那里类似的事物一般叫「金属毛刷」。
E: It might be a difference in customs, but where you are from, this kind of item is usually called a "metal brush."

C: 根据套路，应该是这样没错。但泰坦的事情，谁又能说清了……
E: That should be the case, assuming this seal works the same as the others. However, when it comes to Titans, nothing is ever for certain...

C: 坚持住，伙计，胜利近在咫尺……
E: Keep going for a while longer, buddy, for victory is at hand...

C: 应该是饿了？记得大地兽吃的是红土…还好，这里是大地兽工坊，手边就有不少。
E: Is it hungry? Dromases eat redsoil, if you recall... Fortunately, the Dromas Workshop has plenty of it.

C: 说罢，它便将一整桶红土全吃了，天知道它那小身板是怎么装下的。
E: Then it gobbles up a whole bucket of redsoil. Nobody knows how that tiny body can hold so much.

C: 呃…苦——
E: Ugh... that's bitter—

C: 一段时间后……
E: Some time later...

C: 其实我也很好奇！大地兽虽然能听懂言语，但并不具备交谈的能力——至少在大家看来是这样。
E: I'm wondering about that myself! Dromas can understand what we say, but they can't speak — or so everyone thinks.

C: 呜…嗡？（很温柔，但他为什么对着空气说话？难道他也有幻想朋友吗？）
E: Grumph... Grumph? (Very gentle... but why does he keep talking to the air? Could he have an imaginary friend too?)

C: 你是…？
E: And you are...?

C: 这还真是新鲜…
E: Well, that's new...

C: 这病我也想得。
E: I wish I had that problem.

C: 至于分开？更不用担心，我可是驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大的监护人啊，陪伴孩子长大是我的使命。
E: As for being separated? That's nothing to worry about. I'm Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas's guardian. Watching you grow is my mission.

C: 灰宝，你们回来了！之前的事我都听说…驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大又变小了？怎么会……
E: Grayie, you're back! I heard what happened... Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas shrunk again? How did that even...

C: …什么叫「恭迎老大归位」？
E: ...What do you mean "welcome back, boss"?

C: 呜，呜嗡！（其实，我对欧洛尼斯祷言还是蛮有自信的！）
E: Grumph, Grumphhh! (Actually, I'm pretty confident about my Oronyx's Prayer!)

C: 他还把这块肉当宝贝一样，供在餐厅正中央让顾客参观，说这是神造万物的直接证据。
E: He treasures this piece of meat as a rare artifact, prominently displayed at the center of his restaurant for all to see, touted as proof of divine creation.

C: 没什么。
E: I'm good.

C: 嘶嘶。跟我一起，念出那句咒语，很快就能东山再起。嘶嘶——
E: Zztzzt. Say the incantation with me, and you can make a comeback. Zztzzt.

C: 点心糕饼，向前冲——
E: Time to make a dash for snacks!

C: 站长只说这批数据是黑塔女士所拥有的，保密等级极高，我们此前从未接触过，所以我们也不太确定里面装载的模拟数据究竟属于哪个文明世界。
E: The Lead Researcher only mentioned that this batch of data belongs to Madam Herta and is highly confidential, something we've never had access to before. So, we're not entirely sure which civilization's data is actually contained within.

C: 列车上不知什么时候出现了…一块棋盘？
E: When did this... chunk of chessboard appear on the Express?

C: 可以解释下前情吗？
E: Mind filling me in on the backstory?

C: 叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯，风堇。即便在游学期间，也不要忘了课堂的规矩。
E: Refer to me as Anaxagoras, Hyacine. A field trip is no excuse to disregard classroom discipline.

C: {NICKNAME}，拜托你了——
E: {NICKNAME}, we'll be counting on you!

C: 明白了。我来把店长指定的菜品摆放在桌上。
E: Got it. I'll place the dish you chose onto the table.

C: 嗯，我也同意。那么，就由我来宣布本次美食评审大会的结果——
E: I agree as well. Then, allow me to announce the outcome of this Food Review—

C: 入口便能感受到蔬菜清爽的口感，浇淋其上的酱汁更是恰到好处地丰富了味道层次。
E: The freshness of the vegetables was immediately apparent, and the dressing added just the right depth of flavor.

C: 我想，餐馆是不是也可以仿照类似的做法，定期推出有吸引力的…嗯，新菜单？或者装扮下店内环境也好，总之就是要有变化。
E: Perhaps our restaurant could adopt a similar approach, regularly... refreshing the menu with enticing new dishes? Or even revamping the decor? The key is to keep things fresh and exciting.

C: 不着急！*我们*就在这里等小灰！
E: No rush! We'll wait for you right here, Little Gray!

C: 还有还有，不只这样，缇安偷偷找小敌，学了特别的技巧！
E: Oh, and also, Trianne secretly asked De to learn a special technique!

C: ——迷迷！迷！带我们再赢一次吧，万敌主厨！
E: Memem! Mem! Lead us to another victory, Chef Mydei!

C: 你从哪找来的云羊啊！
E: Where the heck did you even find a cloudsheep!?

C: 两位阁下，知道自己做错了什么吗？
E: You two, do you realize what you've done wrong?

C: …以后注意。
E: ...I won't let it happen again.

C: 浪费粮食可耻！
E: Wasting food is just wrong!

C: 蔬菜滞销，帮帮我们吧！
E: Help! Our vegetables are piling up!

C: 此一时，彼一时嘛。再说，以咱俩的交情，我当然没有不帮的道理，对吧？
E: Times change, my friend! Besides, with our history, how could I possibly say no?

C: 呵。我原本收到的请求，只是帮你编织金线，并不包括所谓的宣传吧？
