E: Hmph. If I recall correctly, my agreement was to weave golden thread for you, not to participate in any sales activities.

C: 若只是劳役之事，我大可派衣匠代为完成，且不收取任何佣金。如何？
E: For simple physical labor, I could simply send the Garmentmaker in my place, at no cost whatsoever. Would that suffice?

C: 人心中的成见哪，总是比创世涡心里的水还深。就不能是我突发善心，想做点好事吗？
E: People's prejudices run deeper than the waters in the Vortex of Genesis. Is it so hard to believe I might have a sudden urge to do something nice?

C: 不用客气。我和村长过来，是有好消息要告诉各位。
E: Please, don't worry about that. The chief and I have come with good news for all of you.

C: 或许我的厨艺比不上你，但沙拉这个选择没有问题。我只为我能负责的食材负责，并且贯彻到底，这同样是厨师应有的品质。
E: Perhaps my cooking skills aren't on your level, but there's nothing wrong with making a salad. I stand by the ingredients I select and follow through with them. That's also what it means to be a proper chef.

C: 流亡的时候，我也这么想过。若是时间流淌得慢些，他们也不至于如此窘迫地离开。
E: During those years in exile, I often thought that... if only time could pass more slowly, they wouldn't have to leave me in such horrible ways.

C: 驱散长久的黑暗，也为沉积在厚重泥沙堆里的鱼儿们带来希望。
E: It scatters the darkness that has lingered for so long and brings hope to the fish lying hidden beneath heavy layers of silt.

C: 要不再笑一个？
E: How about one more smile?

C: 在漫长的等待过后，与世隔绝的迷境终于迎来了客人。现在，妖精们有比我还高的作物、吃不完的美食、还有人类伙伴们……
E: At long last, after ages of waiting, Membrance Maze has guests again. The fairies now have towering crops, more food than they can finish, and human companions...

C: 没什么想聊的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 走吧，假身份信息已经录入，你去验证一下就能通过。
E: Your fake ID info is ready, just go to the console like you own it.

C: （机器的轰鸣）
E: (The machine rumbles)

C: 笨拙的爱好者
E: Clumsy Hobbyist

C: 饥渴的奇兽
E: Starving Magical Beast

C: 金丝断于时代的边陲，后人接过它吊起的伤悲。\n自旅途间获知的悲报，前往书中将其写下。
E: Golden threads frayed at the fringe of an era, and posterity took up the sentiments formerly hanging on its web.\nThe tragic news heard during your travels. Head to the book and write it down.

C: 此言传入故事的主角耳中， 他并未驳斥，坦然而对： 「这并非传言。」 「但若来日功盖列王，往事又有何妨？」
E: As the protagonist hears these words, He refutes not, but openly responds: "These are not rumors unfounded." "But will they matter if my deeds eclipse those of all other kings, achieving glory beyond?"

C: 往日的幻影似在发问——\n「你已走完那逐火之路了吗，王？」
E: A question seems to sound, from shadows of the past around —\n"Did you already walk that Flame-Chasing Road, O King?"

C: 祈愿所有悲伤的故事，\n都将随风消散在晨昏。
E: They wish that the twilight breeze\nwill carry away all tales of sadness.

E: "Then you must be Tribbie!"\na child shouts.

C: 垂英缤纷的圣城，\n孩童在逝去伙伴的身侧，\n遥想起这句预言。
E: In the holy city adorned with falling flowers,\nThe children recall that prophecy,\nBeside their friend that has passed away.

C: 「天空啊，你慢些阖眼，\n我多想将此刻留在手心，\n直到永远。」
E: "O Sky, slow your closing gaze,\nHow I want to keep this moment in my hands,\nForevermore."

E: The world-famous thief\nIs stirred by such grand words into a flurry.

E: Many familiar silhouettes,\nAre now active in the cosmic ecosystem,\nYet they are not my old Amphorean friends.

C:
这次我们要讲的是钟表小子信赖的好伙伴——哈努兄弟的故事！

很久很久以前，哈努兄弟曾是「野狼小镇」的一位普通镇民，这里的镇民们都生活在鳄鱼商人们的管理之下，生活虽说不上幸福，但还算得上是平和安宁。

但哈努兄弟不是一个安分的家伙，他不喜欢给鳄鱼商人们工作——野狼都应该在战场中捕杀猎物才对！
哈努兄弟叫上了一堆对鳄鱼商人不满意的家伙，一把火烧掉了野狼小镇的工厂，掀起了狼与鳄鱼的战争。因为哈努兄弟的鲁莽，镇民们为此付出了沉痛的代价，他们的家园变成了废墟，兄弟姐妹变成了鳄鱼的盘中餐，过去的平安日子一去不返。

愤怒的镇民们把哈努兄弟抓了起来，丢给了凶狠的鳄鱼商人——石头老板。
石头老板决定把哈努兄弟丢到环境恶劣的噩梦小镇里，让他挖一辈子石头，以儆效尤。

但是这次经历并没有磨平哈努兄弟的嗜血之心，他还在渴望着战争与杀戮。于是，他在噩梦小镇中不断挑起镇民与石头老板的矛盾，再次制造了一场残酷的冲突。
这次多亏了远道而来的「罗盘号」船员，聪明的钟表小子帮哈努兄弟打败了鳄鱼，噩梦小镇才没有因失败重蹈野狼小镇的覆辙。

哈努兄弟把噩梦小镇改名为美梦小镇，声称要让小镇成为一场无忧的美梦，但这只是他的一个伪装，野狼怎么会主动折断獠牙与利爪呢？
很快，他就因为一场灾难而露出了真面目……他把那些威胁自己统治的镇民都赶出了小镇，用手中的哈努火箭炮四处轰炸反对者，让所有人都苦不堪言。对镇民来说，哈努兄弟比石头老板还要可怕！

无法阻止哈努兄弟的钟表小子无可奈何，只好让德高望重的木头老爷来到小镇，才平息了哈努兄弟造成的混乱。
在木头老爷的教诲下，哈努兄弟改邪归正，成为了小镇的守护者，但他犯下的恶行永远不会被镇民遗忘……

（注：本篇内容与正传不处于同一世界线，相关故事请以《钟表小子》与《美梦往事》正传为准）
E: This time, let us narrate the story of Clockie's trusted companion — Brother Hanu! Once upon a time, Hanu was an ordinary resident of Wolfsville, a place ruled by the crocodile traders. Life wasn't a bed of roses, but it was peaceful and serene. Brother Hanu, with a rebellious streak, hated working for the crocodile traders. In his opinion, wolves were supposed to hunt for prey on the battlefield! Brother Hanu rallied others who also harbored resentment toward the crocodile traders and set fire to the factory in Wolfsville, declaring war between the wolves and the crocodiles. The townsfolk paid a hefty price for Brother Hanu's reckless act — their homes were destroyed, their family were devoured by the crocodiles, and the peaceful days were gone. Outraged, the townsfolk captured Brother Hanu and handed him over to a ruthless crocodile trader — Boss Stone. Boss Stone was set to send Brother Hanu to the harsh environment of Nightmareville, making him dig for stones for the rest of his life as punishment. Nevertheless, the experience didn't leave Brother Hanu any less bloodthirsty, as he still yearned for war and violence as ever. As such, he kept sowing discord between the townsfolk in Nightmareville and Boss Stone, instigating yet another brutal conflict. Thanks to the crew of the Compass, who came from afar, Brother Hanu successfully defeated the crocodile with Clockie's clever schemes and prevented Nightmareville from suffering the same fate as Wolfsville. Brother Hanu then renamed Nightmareville to Dreamville, claiming he would turn it into a worry-free dream town. Yet, it was just a façade — there was no way a wolf would leave its fangs and claws to no use. Soon, Hanu revealed his true colors when disaster struck... He ousted all the residents who threatened his domination and fired his Hanu Launcher at the rebels, leaving everyone in misery. For some townsfolk, he was an even scarier presence than Boss Stone! Clockie, who failed to stop Hanu, was left with no choice but to invite the respectable Old Man Wood to the town to quell the chaos. Under Old Man Wood's guidance, Hanu mended his way and became a guardian of the town, but the evil deeds he had committed would never be forgotten by the townsfolk... (Note: The content of this passage does not exist in the same timeline as the canonical events. For canon, please refer to Clockie and Dreamjoy Memoir.)

C:
塞纳托斯是死亡和湮灭的泰坦，无人知晓其真正的形象——因为死者无法将传说告知生者。据说，它的触碰会令花朵枯萎，土壤开裂，金属锈蚀，血肉成为灰烬——所有的一切被包裹在浓黑的雾气里，解离为没有意义的碎片。

黄金裔虽然自视为半神的血脉，但也无法逃脱有机生命应有的结局，死去。冥河会寻找死亡，并在空无一物的旷野上汇聚成通往冥界的道路。当战争夺去过多的生命，众多灵魂无处安息时，冥河的潮汐便会涌上大地，而塞纳托斯则会掌船前来，向亡魂收取它们生前的财产，接引它们去往来世。人们认为，它的公正仅次于塔兰顿，因为它只取走众神手中多余之物，并不抢夺人们前往来世需要的资产。

随着世界入夜，死亡与黑夜成为了翁法罗斯的主宰，未知的黑潮已卷席着巨大的浪涛吞没凡界，将冥界与现世的平衡打破。而在诸多战场上游荡的亡灵和怪物，无法流转的生死似乎已昭示，即使是掌管死亡的塞纳托斯，也对其无能为力。
E:
Thanatos is the Titan of death and annihilation, and no one knows their true form — for the dead cannot relay legends to the living. It is said that their touch causes flowers to wither, soil to crack, metal to corrode, and flesh to turn to ashes — everything shrouded in thick, dark mist and disintegrating into meaningless fragments.

Though the Chrysos Heirs consider themselves demigods by blood, they cannot escape the inevitable fate of organic life — death. The River of Souls seeks out death and forms a path to the underworld across barren fields. When war claims too many lives, and souls have nowhere to rest, the tides of the River of Souls surge onto the land, with Thanatos steering a ship to claim the wealth of the deceased and guide them to the afterlife. They are believed to be second in justice only to Talanton, as they only take the excess from the gods, without robbing the deceased of the assets they need to reach the afterlife.

As night falls upon the world, death and darkness become the rulers of Amphoreus. An unknown black tide rises in great waves, swallowing the mortal realm and shattering the balance between the nether realm and the living world. The wandering spirits and monsters across many battlefields, trapped between life and death, seem to signify that even Thanatos, the keeper of death, is powerless before this force.

E: During combat, some characters will receive an <color=#f29e38ff>extra turn</color> when certain <color=#f29e38ff>conditions are met</color>. This extra turn does not consume any turn counts, and Ultimates <color=#f29e38ff>cannot</color> be used during this extra turn.

E: Enemy distribution-type abilities will attack multiple targets within the team, and the attacked targets will evenly distribute either the DMG coefficient of the ability or any additional effect coefficient attached to that ability.

The louder your actions are, the faster the Alert Gauge value will increase. <color=#f29e38ff>When the Alert Gauge is full, the mission will be considered as failed</color>.

C: 每消灭一只<color=#f29e38ff>扑满</color>，该扑满将为敌方全体附加随机<color=#f29e38ff>持续伤害</color>。\n在「战意阶段4：力量觉醒」期间，利用消灭扑满后为敌方附加的持续伤害，尽快消灭首领。
E: Every <color=#f29e38ff>Trotter</color> defeated will inflict all enemies with random <color=#f29e38ff>DoTs</color>.\nMake good use of the DoTs applied by defeating Trotters to quickly take down the boss during "Grit Phase 4: Power Awoken".

C: 我方角色受到致命攻击时，<color=#f29e38ff>不会陷入</color>无法战斗状态，并恢复<unbreak>100%</unbreak>生命值和<unbreak>50%</unbreak>能量。

C: 战斗中敌人会<color=#f29e38ff>不断刷新</color>，击败敌人或对首领敌人造成伤害均可<color=#f29e38ff>获得积分</color>。\n尽快进入<color=#f29e38ff>「战意汹涌」</color>阶段，以击败敌人获得更高积分！
E: In battle, enemies will <color=#f29e38ff>continuously appear</color>. You can <color=#f29e38ff>earn points</color> by defeating enemies or dealing DMG to the Boss enemy.\nPrioritize entering the <color=#f29e38ff>Surging Grit</color> phase and defeat enemies to obtain even higher points!

◆ 新增内容 ◆
● 可遇到全新的方程、奇物、加权奇物、事件，以及全新的冒险区域。
● 拟合等级扩充至<unbreak>120</unbreak>级，提高拟合等级可获得奖励。
● 新增部分稳态数组挑战，完成可获得挑战奖励。

◆ 内容调整 ◆
● 第三位面新增首领敌人「金血忆灵•裁定忘却之形（完整）」。
● 第三位面不再出现首领敌人「奇想林中的蕉研组（完整）」。

◆ New Content ◆
● Discover new Equations, Curios, Weighted Curios, Occurrences, and all-new Adventure Domains.
● Synchronicity Level has its upper limit raised to <unbreak>120</unbreak>, with rewards for increasing levels.
● Added new Stable Computing Array challenges, with completion rewards available.

◆ Content Adjustments ◆
● A new boss enemy, "Ichor Memosprite: Judge of Oblivion (Complete)" has been added to the Third Plane.
The boss enemy "Wonder Forest's Banacademic Office Staff (Complete)" has been removed from the Third Plane.

C: 做好觉悟吧。
E: I hope you're prepared.

C: 矿民下矿的时候，诊所算是半个托管所吧…是我主动招呼孩子们过来的，说不定还是我更依靠他们呢。

E: Clara: Gah!

C: 怎么连虎克也…哎呀，这下可得认真起来咯。
E: Hook...? *sigh* Looks like we're playing hard ball.

C: 希儿小姐！我一定会好好掩护你的——我保证。
E: Don't worry, Miss Seele! I'll watch your back!

C: 喂！别无视我！
E: Hey! Don't ignore me!

C: 我看涨哦。
E: It's a bull market.

C: 开始吧，资产评估。
E: Let the asset valuation begin.

C: 这个项目就算结啦！
E: Project wrapped!

C: 快速搞定不加班！
E: Done! No need for overtime!

C: 凉快凉快~
E: Cool it~

C: 早些歇息吧，此处有我守着。
E: Have an early rest. I'll keep watch here.

C: 在外行商，多少得会一些。
E: A traveling merchant needs a knowledge of puzzles.

C: 我也见过不少行商，但你不觉得，像他这般不急于做成生意的行商并不多么？
E: I have seen many merchants in my life, but don't you think there aren't many like him, who are in no hurry to do business?

C: 猜猜看，先抵达「结局」的是你，还是我…或者是他们？
E: Who do you think will reach the "end" first — you, or me... or them?

C: 授勋的那日，仍在眼前。
E: *sigh* The day I was awarded those honors is still vivid in my mind.

C: 将军放你离开，你可别来碍事啊。
E: The general let you off the hook. Consider yourself lucky.

C: 背着棺椁，是为了时刻提醒自己被死亡追赶么？这一点倒是与十王司判官相似，我们身入死地，是为仙舟人换取生之尊严。
E: Why does someone carry a coffin around? Is it to remind yourself of constantly being chased by death? This is similar to the judges of the Ten-Lords Commission — we enter the land of the dead to bring the dignity of life to the Xianzhou people.

C: 偶尔放慢脚步也不错。
E: Sometimes it's nice to slow down a bit.

C: 鉴赏宝剑的时候记得注意顺序，首先是观察外貌，再就是感受气质，最好是能上手触摸，感受内在品质——最后、以及最重要的，要找到和它过一辈子的感觉！
E: There is an etiquette for appreciating a sword. First, observe the exterior. Second, feel the sword's temperament — it is best to touch it with your fingers to get a good sense of its inner quality. Lastly, and most importantly, get used to the feeling of living with it for the rest of your life!

C: 「老铁」是一柄尚未锤炼完成的剑胚，我会将夺来的魔剑熔进其中，因此它也被叫作「熔铁剑骸」…不过还是叫它「老铁」更亲切一些。对吧，老铁？
E: Old Mettle here is an unrefined sword into which I infuse cursed swords I've collected, so I also call it the "Blade of Forged Remnants." ...But I guess Old Mettle is a friendlier name. Right, Old Mettle?

C: 他说将军是他的病人，我看将军才是他的医生。
E: He says the general is his patient, but I think the general is actually his doctor.

C: 我将溶于影中，为你们守望。
E: I shall sink into the shadows and watch over you.

C: 关关难过，关关过呀。
E: Every step was tough, but we walked them all.

C: 怎么？又想被揍了？
E: So? In the mood for another beating?

C: 在黑塔的办公室里放块西瓜冻糕，或许斯蒂芬就会出现——记着，南瓜的绝对不行，只会让他消失得更久。
E: Put a watermelon parfait in Herta's office and Stephen is sure to show up. Remember, the pumpkin ones will never attract him — those are for warding him off.

C: 是你啊，{NICKNAME}。和之前一样，表现得好，就有奖励。
E: It's you again, {NICKNAME}. As always, there's a reward for good behavior.

C: 公司的核心在于收益与扩张。它不介意一时失败，但绝不允许原地踏步，过度保守不如豪赌一把——就像那时「钻石」在我身上下的赌注一样…哈哈，得恭喜我们都赌赢了。
E: The heart of the IPC revolves around earnings and expansion. It can weather a loss here and there, but stagnation is impermissible. A daring gamble is better than being overly cautious — just like the wager Diamond made on me... We both deserve congratulations for that one.

C: 为破碎的空洞披上渴望的伪装…他的存在如此强烈，可那存在下的自我却如此稀薄。
E: A shattered emptiness draped in the guise of desire... his existence is strikingly powerful, yet the self beneath is extraordinarily faint.

C: 一步一步，总会实现梦想的，对吧？
E: One step at a time, and your dreams will come true, right?

C: 火萤Ⅳ型，启动！
E: Fyrefly Type-IV, activate!

C: 太好了，又可以学习新东西了！
E: Yes! Another chance to learn something new!

C: 启程匆忙，没能准备一身合体的衣装，几毫米的偏差总是令人烦闷。算了，试着接受这种「不完美」吧。
E: I had to depart hastily without preparing a coordinated outfit. Even a few millimeters of deviation is frustrating. Oh well, let's try to accept this "imperfection."

C: 不错嘛。
E: Not bad.

C: 此身如云难留名，不过朝露电光。
E: This life is fleeting like a cloud, leaving no mark behind, like morning dew and lightning.

C: 吾师，继续为吾等指引前路吧。
E: Teacher, please continue to guide us forward.

C: 小小蝶放心啦，缇宝老师很厉害的！
E: Don't worry, Little Cas, Tribbie is pretty amazing!

C: 我们喜欢你！
E: We like you!

C: 万劫，不复！
E: Forever doomed!

C: 野风中有铁锈的滋味……
E: The wild wind carries with it the scent of rust...

C: 逗她可好玩了，不觉得吗？我倒也期待蜗居公主能生个气，挠我一下…可惜不会，她天性就是个善良的孩子…所以有时我就更生气啦，希望她能对自己上点心吧。
E: Isn't it just so much fun to tease her? I almost want that little Princess Homebody to lose it and scratch me, but no... she's way too nice for that. And weirdly, that just makes me angrier. I just hope she learns to take better care of herself.

C: 请放心，阿格莱雅大人。我会将这一切尽快了结。
E: Please rest assured, Lady Aglaea, I will bring an end to all this soon.

C: 别让时间白白燃烧。
E: Don't let time burn away in vain.

C: 前路，已被微光照亮。
E: The road ahead is already illuminated by a faint light.

C: 自继承神权以来，她便罹受人性流逝的痛苦。然而，她宁可清醒地忍受这一切，也不愿沉醉麻痹自己…我怕是做不到呢……
E: Ever since inheriting divine authority, she has endured the agony of her humanity slipping away. Yet she chooses to bear it all with an alert mind, refusing to drown herself in numb indulgence... I don't think I could do the same.

C: 那尾如珍珠般温柔的小医师鱼喜欢挥动法杖，为我带来一场盛大的泡泡游戏。那孩童般的欢乐…我有幸得以再次体验。
E: That little healer fish, as gentle as a pearl, likes to wave her wand and make a grand spectacle of bubbles for me to play with. And thus... I am able to enjoy that childlike delight once more.

C: 我循着一盏最明亮、最灼热的灯火，一路游到了圣城。逐火的王要我成为剑旗，而我也在寻找挥剑的方向——无论是向那迷离的泡沫，还是搅扰我们欢宴的杂音。
E: I followed a light, the brightest, most scorching flame, and swam all the way to the holy city. The sovereign of Flame-Chase asked me to become Dux Gladiorum, and I was searching for where to point my blade... whether at the illusions of foam or at the noise that dares interrupt our feast.

C: 我也曾游荡于冰冷的冥河，可她的花海竟像火焰一般绚丽，一般温暖…多亏了她，牺牲的将士能得到安息，吾等的金血也不曾白白流淌。
E: I, too, once wandered in the icy-cold River of Souls. Her sea of flowers, though, is as beautiful and warm as a fire... It is thanks to her that the soldiers who were sacrificed could find rest, and our golden blood did not flow in vain.

C: 这个的话，还是我更擅长吧？
E: This... might be more my thing.

C: 我曾想象过许多「三月七」的未来，「纯美」的揽镜人，「巡猎」的游侠，甚至是「毁灭」的大君…但这些终究都是已存在「记忆」，而她总是能带来远超预期的惊喜……
E: I've imagined many futures for "March 7th." A Mirror Holder of the Beauty, a Ranger of the Hunt, or even a Lord Ravager of the Destruction... But in the end, each of these are drawn from "memories" already known. She, however... always finds a way to surprise me.

C: 如你所见，那是「不朽」的力量造就的蜕变。你也许有许多疑问，不过在解释之前，我想再次介绍一下自己——我是星穹列车的护卫，你的伙伴，「无名客」丹恒。
E: As you can see, that transformation was brought about by the power of the Permanence. Though you may have many questions, I'd like to reintroduce myself before I answer them. I am the Guard of the Astral Express, your companion, Dan Heng the Nameless.

C: 愿「理性」启蒙真理。
E: May "Reason" enlighten the truth.

C: 开始第二轮吧。
E: One more at bat.

C: 这个点子不错。
E: Not a bad idea.

C: 还差得远。
E: It'll take more than that.

C: 考验默契的时候。
E: Time to test our rapport.

C: 凯撒，再带领我们冲锋一次！
E: Lead us in a charge once more, O Imperator!

C: 原来是这样么……
E: So that's how it works...

C: 回合开始时：我方奇美拉在本场对战每发动<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>次攻击/追加攻击，队伍中最强的苹果糖向对手发射<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>枚攻击随机目标的导弹，每枚导弹造成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: At the start of turn: For every <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of attack/Follow-Up ATK launched by ally chimeras in this battle, the strongest Candied Apple in the team launches <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> missile(s) targeting random opponents, each dealing <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> DMG.

E: At the start of battle: The strongest Master Cat-Thief in the team deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> DMG to all opponents with <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK</color> lower than that of this unit's, and steals 1 random target among them into the summon queue.

C: 穿戴者被击倒时：以<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>重新加入对战，每场对战生效2次
E: When the wearer is knocked down: Rejoins the battle with <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP, effective 2 times per battle.

C: 对手奇美拉攻击时：对其造成1次<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>的伤害
E: When an opponent chimera attacks: Deals 1 instance of DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK to the attacking opponent.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的咕噜鱼儿对<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值最高的对手造成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点伤害。每有<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>名同伴被召唤后，重新发动该技能
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Gurgling Fish in the team deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> DMG to the opponent with the highest <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP. This ability triggers again for every <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> companion(s) summoned.

C: 黑天鹅被大丽花追及，无处可逃。黑天鹅以「焚化工」的手段发起反制，而大丽花释放力量，将二人带往橡木之梦。
E: Pursued by The Dahlia with no escape, Black Swan retaliated with the power of "The Cremators." In response, The Dahlia unleashed her own power, transporting them both to the Oak Dream.

C: 大丽花和流萤穿过通路，在此发现AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak>的残骸。<color=#f29e38ff>「繁育」</color>是格拉默铁骑的力量来源，失熵症是名为「活着」的死亡。AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak>拒绝战死的命运，选择叛逃。流萤从伤痕判断出，AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak>绝不是失熵而死。大丽花感知到梦境中出现了几位闯入者，与流萤前往察看。
E: The Dahlia and Firefly made it through the passage and discovered the wreckage of AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak> here. <color=#f29e38ff>Propagation</color> was the source of power for Glamoth's Iron Cavalry, and Entropy Loss Syndrome is a form of death named "living." AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak> refused the fate of dying in battle and chose to defect. From the scars, Firefly deduced that AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak> hadn't died of entropy loss. The Dahlia sensed several intruders in the dreamscape and went to investigate with Firefly.

C: 知更鸟进入大丽花创造的密室，双方交换信息。「梦主」曾以一句「律令」作为给知更鸟的礼物。而后，知更鸟踏上「同谐」命途，直到此次返回匹诺康尼，却发现与美梦无法相容。知更鸟怀疑这是因为歌斐木行于另一条命途——「秩序」。
E: Robin entered the secret chamber created by The Dahlia, where they exchanged information. The Dreammaster once gifted Robin with a "divine law." Afterward, Robin embarked on the Path of Harmony, but upon returning to Penacony, discovered an incompatibility with the Dreamjoy. Robin suspected this was because Gopher Wood walked a different path: the Path of Order.

C: 知更鸟向流萤承诺，会让牺牲的AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak>被美梦铭记。大丽花认为，知更鸟作为「梦主」选中之人，一定对歌斐木的计划极为关键。
E: Robin promised Firefly that AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak>'s sacrifice would be engraved in Dreamjoy's memory. The Dahlia believed that Robin, the one chosen by the Dreammaster, must be crucial to Gopher Wood's plan.

C: 大丽花叛离永火官邸，但她继承着冥火大公的遗愿，要为匹诺康尼的「记忆」带去毁灭。在每一次背叛之前，大丽花忠实履行着各方盟友的职责。她曾压制知更鸟的力量以帮助花火刺杀得手，随后与之谈判，从花火处换来「剧本」内容。
E: The Dahlia defected from the Ever-Flame Mansion, but she inherited Duke Inferno's dying wish to bring Destruction to Penacony's "memories." Before each Betrayal, The Dahlia faithfully fulfilled her duties to various allies. She once suppressed Robin's strength to help Sparkle carry out the assassination, then negotiated with her to obtain the contents of the "Script" from Sparkle.

C: 「虚无」瞥见了最先挣脱美梦之人的愿望。正因怀抱愿望，他们才有能力做梦；正因从未实现这些愿望，他们才有能力醒来。黄泉询问你的愿望，欣慰于你已作出决定。而她的愿望只剩自己的名字。至于流萤，她是行于「终末」的猎手，为了反抗命运，注定舍弃愿望。
E: The Nihility glimpsed the wishes of those who first broke free from the sweet dream. It was because they had held onto their wishes that they could dream, and because those wishes went unfulfilled that they could wake. Acheron asked you of your wish, and was comforted that you had made your choice. For herself, only her own name remained as a wish. As for Firefly, she was a hunter treading the path of Finality, destined to forsake all wishes in her rebellion against fate.

C: 至少开启<unbreak>20</unbreak>个宝箱，并通关（阈值协议4及以上）
E: Open at least <unbreak>20</unbreak> Chests and clear the run (with Threshold Protocol 4 or higher)

C: 在哀歌塞壬「困难」难度挑战中，战胜敌方首领的第一阶段
E: Defeat Phase 1 of the Boss Enemy in the Elegy Siren challenge in Hard mode

C: 盛大的宴会即将告结，只需向前开拓，为匹诺康尼夺还明天。
E: As the grand banquet draws to a close, all that remains is to trailblaze forward and reclaim tomorrow for Penacony.

C: 每有一种火漆系列奇物，获得#2个该火漆所属命途的祝福。
E: For every type of Sealing Wax Curio, obtain #2 of each Sealing Wax's Path's Blessing(s).

C: 击破强化
E: Break Boost

C: 弱点击破效率提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: Weakness Break Efficiency increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 该目标只可攻击【黑潮造物】，且只可被【黑潮造物】攻击。
E: This target can only attack "Black Tide Creature" and can only be attacked by "Black Tide Creature."

C: 该目标只可攻击【泰坦眷属】，且只可被【泰坦眷属】攻击。
E: This target can only attack the "Titankin" and can only be attacked by the "Titankin."

C: 潜伏
E: Lurking

C: 负载生命值
E: HP Overload

C: 给你鼓励
E: Encouragement for You

C: 韧甲+
E: Resilient Armor+

C: 橡木鸣蛀之梦，梦主实行一切阴谋的地方——当然，律令所说的话不能尽信。既然阴差阳错来到了这里，想办法获取更多关于梦主的线索吧。
E: The Dream of Gnawing Oak, the place where the Dreammaster executes all his schemes... Of course, the words of the laws can't be taken at face value. Since I've ended up here by a twist of fate, I'll see if I can find more clues about the Dreammaster.

C: 你书写了一段奇迹，继续开拓的日子近在眼前。\n去和大家谈谈接下来的行程吧。
E: You've written down a miracle, and the days of Trailblazing are just ahead.\nGo talk to everyone about the upcoming journey.

C: 在她们看来，梦主并未倒向「秩序」，可其他的命途又完全无法联想到一起。她们将要展示的证据，恐怕远远超出我的认知。
E: In their eyes, Dreammaster hasn't sided with the Order, yet the other Paths can't be connected in any way. The evidence they're about to present will likely far exceed my understanding.

C: 往事毕，此刻，是让黑天鹅眼见为实的时候了。
E: The past is behind us. Now, it's time for Black Swan to see it with her own eyes.

C: 奥赫玛著名的「奇美拉世界锦标赛」正在火热进行中。据说赛事组推出了新的对决活动，完成定级赛后再回去看看吧。
E: The famous Chimera World Tournament in Okhema is in full swing. Word is that the organizers have launched new battle events, so check them out after completing your placement matches!

C: 调查虫群逃亡的原因
E: Investigate why the Swarm fled

C: 与清醒的人们会面
E: Meet up with the people who are awake

C: <color=#6f7cda><s>泯灭帮…永火官邸？</s></color>
E: <color=#6f7cda><s>The Annihilation Gang... Ever-Flame Mansion?</s></color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>你是为了银河的愿望而启程的。在以你为主角的故事里，宇宙会逃离「终末」的命运。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>It was a wish of the cosmos that set you in motion. And in the tale where you are the protagonist, the stars themselves will defy the destiny of "Finality."</color>

C: 你对他们做了什么？
E: What did you do to them?

C: 别抱太大希望，那只是个外号。你的梦想不一定能实现。
E: Don't get your hopes up. It's just a nickname. Your dream might not come true.

C: 或许吧。但是……
E: Maybe. But...

C: 可我们已经在这里了，总要试试看。
E: But we're already here. Might as well give it a shot.

C: 怎么了？
E: Hello?

C: 没有袭击我。它们…是在「逃亡」吗？
E: They didn't attack me. Are they... "running away"?

C: 我早该料到，失声只是表象，真正的问题出在「同谐」，对吗？
E: I should have known. Losing your voice was just the tip of the iceberg. The real problem lies with the Harmony, doesn't it?

C: 看来不是偶然，猎犬也和我一样，捕捉到了那一丝杂音。
E: Seems it wasn't a coincidence. The Bloodhound picked up that strange noise too, just like I did.

C: 看来，只能使用一些手段了。
E: Looks like I'll have to use a few methods of my own.

C: 事实上，我也曾出现在你的「记忆」里。而且，同样与匹诺康尼有关。
E: As a matter of fact, I've appeared in your "memories" before. And similarly, it was related to Penacony.

C: 可惜，来了位多管闲事的忆者。下次再见面，交给我就好，我得…让她享受一段刻骨铭心的时光。
E: Too bad, a nosy Memokeeper had to show up. Next time we meet, leave it to me. I'll... give her an experience she won't soon forget.

C: 你见过它们？
E: You've seen them before?

C: 你想不想，和我死在一起？
E: Would you like to die together with me?

C: 近来歌斐木自称抱恙，从未在十二时刻现身。偏偏就在最近，他又在梦境深处，掩埋了自己<color=#dbc291ff>最为阴暗的罪行</color>。
E: Lately, Gopher Wood has been claiming to be ill, never appearing in the Twelve Hours. Yet just recently, he buried his <color=#dbc291ff>darkest crime</color> deep within the dreamscape.

C: 可以碰碰运气，说不定协助歌斐木的忆者，和我有类似的习惯。
E: We could try our luck. Perhaps the Memokeeper helping Gopher Wood shares the same habits as me.

C: 真可惜啊。
E: What a shame.

C: 在这里面，想必存有某种「温和的刺激」，让他能在此时将记忆找回，以免遭到篡改。
E: Inside here, there must be some kind of "gentle trigger" that would help him recover his memories before they are subjected to distortion.

C: 在一切结束后，她已经安然无恙地离开了。
E: And after everything was over, she had already left safe and sound.

C: 「虚无」的令使？！「剧本」中难道提起过她？
E: An Emanator of the Nihility!? Was she ever mentioned in the "script"?

C: 而且，我可是在做梦，不会那么疼的。
E: Besides, this is just a dream, so it won't hurt that much.

C: 还真是咄咄逼人呢。是已然进退失据，还是猜到了些什么？「永火官邸」的康士坦丝，又能是为何而来？
E: My, how aggressive. Are you backed into a corner, or have you figured something out? What could bring Constance of the Ever-Flame Mansion here?

C: 打断别人的叙旧，可真够没风度的。不过，请便——
E: To interrupt another's reunion... such a graceless act. But by all means...

C: 这方面，你才是专家呢。不过，我一直以为，使用那份力量会让你…惆怅万分。
E: When it comes to this, you're the expert. Yet I'd always imagined that calling upon that power would make you... profoundly melancholic.

C: 今日，不止一只小鸟将要远行——在你启程的时刻，我又怎能缺席？
E: Today, more than one little bird will embark on their long journey. How could I miss the moment of your departure?

C: 但你需要一个人解读真相，只靠武力，无法解决任何问题。
E: But you need someone to decipher the truth. Force alone won't solve anything.

C: 只管「欺瞒」
E: "Deceit" is the only way

C: 这是……
E: Is this...

C: 我实在难以分辨，这究竟是紧张还是雀跃。{NICKNAME}，你是不同的，唯一的，值得我为之期待的——
E: I can hardly tell if this is nervousness or excitement. {NICKNAME}... You are different, unique, and worth waiting for.

C: 关键仍然在于「太一之梦」。恐惧和美梦…依靠两种谎言，他们才能汇集入梦者的「同愿」。归根结底，只是勉强扬升的「伪神」。
E: The key still lies in Ena's Dream. Fear and sweet dreams... He relies on these two lies to gather the dreamers' "shared wishes." He's still just a "false god" who barely managed to ascend.

C: 很可惜，我们甚至仍在第一重，也就是「太一之梦」。虽然寻回了自我，但仍在做梦——我们只是串联起了各自的梦境，并非已然逃脱。
E: Unfortunately, we're still in the first layer, which is Ena's Dream. Although we've regained our sense of self, we're still dreaming... We've only managed to connect our individual dreamscapes, but have not escaped.

C: 可是，这还是没有解决最根本的问题。{RUBY_B#太一}星期日{RUBY_E#}该怎么办？在跨越三重梦境的时刻，他只需一次注视，就能抹杀我们全部的努力。
E: But that still doesn't solve the fundamental problem. What about {RUBY_B#Ena}Sunday{RUBY_E#}? He could wipe out all our efforts with no more than a glance the moment we cross the three dreamscape layers.

C: 因为，<color=#dbc291ff>哪怕一切为时已晚，我们还是能去唱…自己能唱的歌。</color>
E: Because... <color=#dbc291ff>Even if it's too late, we still have the choice to sing whatever we can.</color>

C: 不是，我看过「剧本」的，你问我？
E: Hey, I've read the "script"! Why are you asking me?

C: 如果我失败了呢？
E: What if I fail?

C: 其实，我曾经很羡慕你。即便生为一场灾难，内心也不会因此感到痛苦。
E: Actually, I used to envy you. You wouldn't feel pain even though you were born to bring disaster.

C: 一缕？
E: A strand?

C: 它为何会出现在这里？
E: What's the cat doing here?

C: 不，我必须完成约定。
E: No. I must keep my promise.

C: 动手吧，我还没有落魄到因为区区损毁，就背叛迷钟「老大」的程度。
E: Just do it then. I've enough integrity left in me not to be a snitch to Boss Ticker over some petty damage.

C: 你拿起长矛和盾牌。今年的纷争月，你将随大军一同出征，杀死敌人的挚友、烧毁敌人的家乡——唯有「毁灭」能偿还「毁灭」。
E: You pick up your spear and shield. In this Month of Strife, you will march with the army to slay the enemy's dearest friends and burn their homeland. Destruction can only be repaid by destruction.

C: 我的心里好像有一个大洞，吞食着快乐和悲伤，永不餍足。一切我珍视的东西投进去，都顷刻化为乌有。想必你也是如此吧。
E: It feels like there's a black hole in my heart, devouring joy and sorrow, unsatisfied. Everything I cherish gets thrown in there and vanishes in an instant. I guess you must feel the same way.

C: 因为我说的话总是反向验证，久而久之，官方就不让我发言了嗷呜。
E: Since everything I say ends up being proven wrong, they eventually banned me from making any official statements, awoo.

C: 好啦，既然灰宝都学会了，我和缇宝老师的任务也要结束了。往后，就在赛场上相见吧！
E: All right, now that Grayie has learned everything, Tribbie's and my mission is complete. Let's meet again on the battlefield!

C: 很珍贵的故事。
E: A precious story.

C: 而对于极其模糊的往事，可以点击对应的节点进行更加细致的重温。
E: For those particularly hazy memories, you can {LAYOUT_MOBILE#tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#click} on the corresponding node to revisit them in more detail.

C: 感到迷茫的话，不妨看看给你整理的<color=#f29e38ff>攻略</color>！
E: If you're feeling lost, why don't you check out the <color=#f29e38ff>guide</color> I prepared!

C: 一键觅宝
E: Quick Hunt

C: 终末任务
E: Finality Mission

C: 特殊机制
E: Special Mechanism

C: 战斗开始•弱点击破
E: Battle Begins: Weakness Break

C: 队伍编成•{NICKNAME}
E: Added to Team With {NICKNAME}

C: 陪我…一起吧……
E: Come... With me...
